# ABOUT ERIC EARLY
---
Eric Early is a husband, father, attorney, businessman and son of a Marine. **Not a career politician.** Eric was raised to believe in America’s founding principles of limited government and free markets. He believes that every American should be given the opportunity to fulfill their American Dream, and his parents inspired Eric to achieve his personal goals. As the co-owner and Managing Partner of a nationally recognized law firm, Eric understands how difficult it is to start and run a successful business. As your next US Senator, Eric will work to cut overly-burdensome regulations that get in the way of entrepreneurship and job creation. Eric will stand-up to the Socialist woke interests that control Washington, DC, fight to preserve and protect our Democracy, and fight for ordinary Californians who are being left behind. [** JOIN ERIC TODAY » **](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=b361c64d103640a6aaa3270c6c87021a&_e=191506EyOMoMICXjpSWF_di3-QqHfnWWgyjBzuwm5zIdYFQsB07jNiFYsCz6aKJUBFPcvZTU5KiiiD6rFlXn6rdLvjdhGgWO9gXc9QEDcpxbf8R3Qvq53CBhK8UQovWkAyit8SiWjoJEggt0uyLT5XtidNJx_hVLlqYmES09_4XzpkjcRud4F1GPL59US_KSxUQmxnmV7OrUQJUU40_EWBQzZCVAr9gaZl8A1FTGAByuayL6KHJgJ31RpKj5gqgV1neMHMh-UMOJYjHSKnY51Ykf6o5hvVu6gpP4tb4dTs4A5U2UnzglrbfJ5vM95C84vRCaA_HA39GSyTvzl4JJZt8-2PsZVrvdPM9wkoCh4nwZl6y16SO5sq8zrhG4ybvt)

name: Stefanie Conahan
subject: Setting the record straight (re the debt ceiling)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC
body:
Off The Sidelines [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP19/1/72722/images/OffTheSidelinesLogo.png]
Let’s talk about the debt ceiling, friends:
That’s the cap on the amount of money the U.S. government can borrow to pay its debts.
In a matter of weeks, the federal government will exceed this legal borrowing limit. And it’s not hyperbole to say that if Congress doesn’t raise the debt ceiling, it would be catastrophic for our economy and American families.
Historically, raising the debt ceiling is a bipartisan exercise in Congress. But today, House Republicans are demanding draconian cuts to federal aid in exchange for voting to lift the debt ceiling. They’d rather tank the economy and throw millions of Americans into poverty than make good on our country's financial obligations.
In today’s Off the Sidelines Spotlight, we’ll explore the debt ceiling, debunk the GOP talking points, and break down where we go from here.
Thank you,
Stefanie
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP19/1/72722/images/Right%20-%20the%20facts.png]
If you remember one thing, it’s this: House Republicans are shirking their responsibilities—to American families, to our economy, to their oath of office—by refusing to vote to raise the debt ceiling.
So let’s cut through the noise. We’re breaking down what Republicans are saying about the debt ceiling—and then giving you the facts.
WHAT REPUBLICANS ARE SAYING: “House Republicans should not have to vote to raise the debt ceiling because WE don’t support new initiatives proposed by the Biden administration.”
THE TRUTH: Raising the debt limit has ABSOLUTELY NOTHING to do with new spending. It is purely backward-looking. In fact, much of the debt [https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/2023/05/16/president-most-blame-spiraling-national-debt-is/] in question was incurred BEFORE President Biden took office.
WHAT REPUBLICANS ARE SAYING: “We don’t want to raise the debt ceiling and authorize new spending.”
THE TRUTH: Once again, nope. That’s not how this works. Raising the debt ceiling enables the Treasury to borrow for spending already authorized by Congress.
WHAT HOUSE REPUBLICANS ARE SAYING: “We'll only vote to lift the debt ceiling if we make massive cuts to federal spending."
THE TRUTH: Well, that's true. House Republicans passed legislation that would increase the debt ceiling in exchange for cuts to federal spending for critical programs. That includes kicking one million seniors off Meals on Wheels, eliminating 30,000 law enforcement jobs, and gutting veterans health care. Not to mention cuts to Head Start, cancer research, housing assistance for low-income families, and more.
WHAT REPUBLICANS ARE SAYING: “Not raising the debt ceiling would be a DISASTER for the U.S. economy.”
THE TRUTH: We’re 100% in agreement with Republicans there. Failure to raise the debt ceiling would be catastrophic. Defaulting on our nation’s debts could mean [https://abcnews.go.com/Politics/debt-ceiling-care/story?id=80288518] :
*
Seniors
could
miss
social
security
checks.
Without
social
security,
almost
22
million
Americans
would
fall
into
poverty.

*
Veterans
benefits
could
be
delayed,
and
military
service
members
could
stop
receiving
paychecks.

*
Our
country’s
credit
could
be
downgraded,
spiking
interest
rates.
That
could
raise
mortgage,
car
and
credit
card
payments.

*

$10

in

and

[https://www.washingtonpost.com/business/2023/05/14/debt-ceiling-deadline-what-default-means/]
the
401k
and
retirement
accounts
of
millions
of
Americans.

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP19/1/72722/images/Right%20-%20dig%20deeper.png]

WATCH | The GOP debt limit plan cuts SNAP benefits. How that affects Americans. [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SDhqsVpSuJU]
LISTEN | What you need to know about the debt ceiling as the deadline looms [https://www.npr.org/2023/05/15/1175733139/debt-ceiling]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP19/1/72722/images/Right%20-%20take%20action.png]

In a matter of weeks, the federal government will exceed this legal borrowing limit. And it’s not hyperbole to say that if Congress doesn’t raise the debt ceiling, it would be catastrophic for our economy and American families. Historically, raising the debt ceiling is a bipartisan exercise in Congress. But today, House Republicans are demanding draconian cuts to federal aid in exchange for voting to lift the debt ceiling. They’d rather tank the economy and throw millions of Americans into poverty than make good on our country's financial obligations. name: Katie Porter
subject: In LA for the writers' strike
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Industry transformation is too often used as an excuse to leave workers behind, and that’s exactly what executives are doing.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=23040%2E3422442%2E1B-TW2)
Last week I joined Writers Guild of America union members on the picket line in Culver City.
[](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_support_workers_today/?source=EMAH16_2_STR_20230516_V1_F&t=2&akid=23040%2E3422442%2E1B-TW2)
**Industry transformation is too often used as an excuse to leave workers behind, and that's exactly what executives are doing.** The writers I met with are on strike for better pay and stronger workplace protections, and I was proud to join them on the picket line.
Technology can't be an excuse to bust unions, and we need to send a message to large corporations—they need to come to the table and offer a fair contract to the workers who power these businesses. Every American should be compensated fairly for their work.
We need strong unions to stand against corporate greed. I'll always stand with America's workers and fight back against corporate greed, no matter the industry. [**If you're with me, can you chip in or sign our petition in support of workers today?**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_support_workers_today/?source=EMAH16_2_STR_20230516_V1_F&t=3&akid=23040%2E3422442%2E1B-TW2)
**[Sign the Petition ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_support_workers_today/?source=EMAH16_2_STR_20230516_V1_F&t=4&akid=23040%2E3422442%2E1B-TW2)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230516-2?refcode=EMAH16_2_STR_20230516_V1_F&refcode2=23040_3422442_1B-TW2&akid=23040%2E3422442%2E1B-TW2)**
Onward,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAH16_2_STR_20230516_V1_F&t=5&refcode2=23040_3422442_1B-TW2&akid=23040%2E3422442%2E1B-TW2)**

Katie Porter for Senate

Irvine, CA 92616

They are doing everything they can to try and further their dangerous, self-serving agenda, and now, Ohioans will vote on this bill on August 8th. Over the next 84 days, Ohio Dems will knock over 500,000 doors and make 135,000 calls to educate base Democratic voters and turn them out to vote "NO" on August 8th. We have an immediate funding gap we need to close to complete this work in just 84 days. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = The GOP knows that the majority of Ohioans REJECT their extremist agenda. Fellow Conservative,

Last month, the U.S. House voted to ban transgender individuals from competing against biological females in sports leagues from the college level down.

**The action taken by the House is a major victory for current and former female athletes** , many of whom fought for decades against discrimination to achieve parity with their male counterparts. The recent presence of transgender individuals in women’s sports is an afront to the generations of women who trained mercilessly to perfect their craft.

My Democrat opponent doesn’t agree. He could have broken with his Democrat colleagues and voted to keep men from competing against female athletes, but **he’s a progressive to the core and seemed to reason that it’s better to pass a bill that puts female athletes at risk rather than upset special interests’ lobbies in D.C**.

**I can tell you this** : I won’t hesitate to cast a vote in the U.S. Senate that protects female athletes from having to compete with biological males. And guess what? **Until Republicans retake the majority, the bill protecting female athletes that the House passed is dead on arrival in the Senate**.

**As a father of a daughter myself,** I will unequivocally support legislation that bans biological men from competing in female sports. Please take a moment to sign my petition (linked below) to let me know that you agree this legislation is right and just.

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

name: Asa Hutchinson
subject: Do you think electability is a factor?
body:
Should Republican Primary voters consider a candidates electability in the general election when casting their votes?

| | | | | [](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/LZJrsnUmcHSCOkICnqiwJA~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRmRqZqP0UgNjQyMDBmZTA2YzU4M2QyMTc4Zjc3NGNkNTk3ODNiODhESmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vYXNhLWZvci1hbWVyaWNhLWluYy9vZmZpY2lhbC1lbGVjdGFiaWxpdHktc3VydmV5VwVzcGNldUIKZF5qIWRkUpy2R1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAU-8~)
---
| | Friend,

In past Republican Primaries, the electability of a candidate in the general election has been a crucial factor for voters. It played a significant role in Ronald Reagan's victory in the 1980 Republican Primary.
As we look ahead to the 2024 general election, it becomes increasingly evident that this will be one of the most significant elections of our lifetime. **It is imperative for the Republican Party to nominate the candidate with the highest chance of securing victory in the general election.** The last thing we can afford is another four years under the Biden administration.
Now, I want to hear your thoughts. Should Republican Primary voters take into account a candidate's electability in the general election when casting their votes?
Your opinion is of utmost importance to me and my campaign. Therefore, I kindly request you to participate in our official electability survey. By taking this survey, you can provide valuable insights that will help shape our campaign strategy moving forward.
**Don't miss this opportunity to make your voice heard and contribute to the future of our party.**
[**_Take the official electability survey!_**](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/LZJrsnUmcHSCOkICnqiwJA~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRmRqZqP0UgNjQyMDBmZTA2YzU4M2QyMTc4Zjc3NGNkNTk3ODNiODhESmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vYXNhLWZvci1hbWVyaWNhLWluYy9vZmZpY2lhbC1lbGVjdGFiaWxpdHktc3VydmV5VwVzcGNldUIKZF5qIWRkUpy2R1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAU-8~)

clean_body: Should Republican Primary voters consider a candidates electability in the general election when casting their votes? | | | | | ~ | | Friend, In past Republican Primaries, the electability of a candidate in the general election has been a crucial factor for voters. It played a significant role in Ronald Reagan's victory in the 1980 Republican Primary. As we look ahead to the 2024 general election, it becomes increasingly evident that this will be one of the most significant elections of our lifetime. It is imperative for the Republican Party to nominate the candidate with the highest chance of securing victory in the general election. The last thing we can afford is another four years under the Biden administration. Now, I want to hear your thoughts. Should Republican Primary voters take into account a candidate's electability in the general election when casting their votes? Your opinion is of utmost importance to me and my campaign. Therefore, I kindly request you to participate in our official electability survey. By taking this survey, you can provide valuable insights that will help shape our campaign strategy moving forward. Don't miss this opportunity to make your voice heard and contribute to the future of our party. ~ | ~ "Take the Official Electability Survey!" Thank you for your time and for being an essential part of our campaign. Together, we can make a difference and ensure a stronger future for our great nation. Sincerely, Asa Hutchinson | ~~ "DONATE $25" | ~~ "DONATE $50" | ~~ "DONATE $100" | ~~ "DONATE ANY AMOUNT" | | ~~ | ~ | | ~~ | ~ ---|---|---|---|--- ~ ~~ 3511 SE J Street #311, Bentonville, Arkansas, 72712, United States of America ~~

name: Samantha Meadows
subject: Wanna be a part of something new?!
body:
Hey...it’s time! | | |
---
| |
---
| It all starts here.
---
## **The fight for democracy starts in our own backyard.**
---
You are braver, smarter, and stronger than you think you are.
---
### **We have to play the long game to win! 2024 is coming faster than you think!**
---
I am excited to announce that some amazing things are developing in my campaign! There are going to be some fun, safe ways for you to join us in getting Democrats out to vote while attracting young voters, Independents, and maybe a few Republicans who are fed up with the MAGA crowd. But time is of the essence!

subject: This is not the end of our fight (veto update)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63399759/406646869/823540626?refcode=ea.3d34c8f8-4bf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.3d34c8f8-4bf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDM0YzhmOC00YmY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0OrmnrGUcIpZVBTK3mPhvtZnehU7zxdOxJYKX8YEMdU=&emci=710e46da-2bf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3d34c8f8-4bf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Peter, Republicans in the General Assembly just voted to override my veto and enact their radical abortion ban. Just one Republican vote would have prevented an override but not a single one stepped up. Now North Carolinians understand fully that Republicans are unified in their attacks against women’s reproductive freedom. I will do everything I can from my executive position to blunt the trauma of this new law. They did this knowing strong majorities of North Carolinians don’t want right-wing politicians in the exam room with women and their doctors. I know this is a difficult moment, Peter. I know that many of us across the state worked hard to fight against this ban. I know that many North Carolinians have been betrayed by their elected leaders, who broke their promises to protect women’s reproductive freedom. **But I also know that right now, they’re counting on you to give up.** They think they’ve won this and they’re counting on us all throwing up our hands and giving up. **We can’t afford to do that, Peter. We WILL stay in this fight — because North Carolinians deserve so much better than the extremist Republican Party dictating our rights.** The best way to solve this is at the ballot box. We absolutely have to break the supermajority in 2024. I’m continuing to work to elect Democrats who we can trust to fight to restore reproductive rights. We need to power them to victory at every level of government all across the state, and I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you to make it possible. **[That’s why I’m personally asking you to contribute whatever you can to help us build out our teams to help Democrats win in North Carolina. We need to power them to victory at every level of government all across the state, and I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you to make it possible. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = We won’t give up, Roy Cooper = = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

What an amazing day, Peter! This morning my team and I launched my campaign to run for Congress in TX-15. The response on the ground has been incredible — and today is only the beginning! I want to give you a quick fundraising update on our day so far. When we launched our campaign this morning, our #1 mission was to raise as much as possible from small-dollar donors in our first 24 hours. That’s because I’m determined to build a campaign by the people, for the people — and to make a big splash while doing it. I know it’s late, but we’re only a few hours from midnight when we’ll lock in the final amount we raised during our first official day on the trail. name: =?utf-8?Q?Caleb=20Heimlich?=
subject: Save the Date: 46th Annual Washington State Republican Party Dinner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Join us at our upcoming 46th Annual Dinner - Get your tickets now!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

name: Sheriff Mark Lamb
subject: Should they be able to compete?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
Men don’t belong in women’s sports – period.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=4e227bd262934683bc8b399a77ccc5e1&_t=YDClhlhn8fm8GnQPBgln5xPcLCRFBBBo7jbV57_SSsR73dTMvHoIel9kKlV5vhf3-dKcpLw6YZmP98rxW6XjtOCRTTo0i6WuKP9VAprA_yg%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=4e227bd262934683bc8b399a77ccc5e1&_t=YDClhlhn8fm8GnQPBgln5xPcLCRFBBBo7jbV57_SSsR73dTMvHoIel9kKlV5vhf3-dKcpLw6YZmP98rxW6XjtOCRTTo0i6WuKP9VAprA_yg%3D)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4e227bd262934683bc8b399a77ccc5e1&_e=SmZxTecP82Jlq4bRNjScQRaItQAQZrlhsq7Jqcz3wM63LgoJVI2TOAIy3FkujN_i4qfBedHSqBcfGt5RZrmK-d-e95V9Lvc6fOGVTOZiEhHBwBQegtlsA0S4gBvErso1ElkpxvY-wP0vYsUTFVpQgKVKpDp6D403m4JE1zz6ZIIv9LRtnrXHVox4J9Cu2EdWPIKAf58HibpuqxNBQ938NWw2GyXQtxWm-aTxYckEwLdY4d0c4-xTuaoraW60B1rE44LsGjvZJdANL9ANCPuJi1hMwVErFcp7NwWVrDSeaIs3sXjM0Vdfa0DDl86OAnfHTzCE7DBMU9jMGoVPY2M4uYl1q4NQppA7fc1SL6kmk5W8NC30rXAnkFl1HTL5khltHGXLti5vJdR5Q6780nh_coi7fpBgZGeItp3triNVVPUDvRxDqcahK6h6Z3J9u05DJqak3obWfQpwMxxxkuO3nF7MbM25bdmvckvQSaiXN7MsYpbAFK61I1m3tWz147ta6jMFhA39s-RVMTaY7HNf9YyH0feBDbFoaNAwaa7xbNrQFybJcyCaycM79gG6du-CUF5OpSLgVmXoJ97jRBnyFQ%3D%3D)
|
Fellow Conservative,

Last month, the U.S. House voted to ban transgender individuals from competing against biological females in sports leagues from the college level down.

**The action taken by the House is a major victory for current and former female athletes** , many of whom fought for decades against discrimination to achieve parity with their male counterparts. The recent presence of transgender individuals in women’s sports is an afront to the generations of women who trained mercilessly to perfect their craft.

My Democrat opponent doesn’t agree. He could have broken with his Democrat colleagues and voted to keep men from competing against female athletes, but **he’s a progressive to the core and seemed to reason that it’s better to pass a bill that puts female athletes at risk rather than upset special interests’ lobbies in D.C**.

**I can tell you this** : I won’t hesitate to cast a vote in the U.S. Senate that protects female athletes from having to compete with biological males. And guess what? **Until Republicans retake the majority, the bill protecting female athletes that the House passed is dead on arrival in the Senate**.

**As a father of a daughter myself,** I will unequivocally support legislation that bans biological men from competing in female sports. Please take a moment to sign my petition (linked below) to let me know that you agree this legislation is right and just.

NO MALES IN FEMALE SPORTS**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4e227bd262934683bc8b399a77ccc5e1&_e=SmZxTecP82Jlq4bRNjScQRaItQAQZrlhsq7Jqcz3wM63LgoJVI2TOAIy3FkujN_i4qfBedHSqBcfGt5RZrmK-d-e95V9Lvc6fOGVTOZiEhHBwBQegtlsA0S4gBvErso1ElkpxvY-wP0vYsUTFVpQgKVKpDp6D403m4JE1zz6ZIIv9LRtnrXHVox4J9Cu2EdWPIKAf58HibpuqxNBQ938NWw2GyXQtxWm-aTxYckEwLdY4d0c4-xTuaoraW60B1rE44LsGjvZJdANL9ANCPuJi1hMwVErFcp7NwWVrDSeaIs3sXjM0Vdfa0DDl86OAnfHTzCE7DBMU9jMGoVPY2M4uYl1q4NQppA7fc1SL6kmk5W8NC30rXAnkFl1HTL5khltHGXLti5vJdR5Q6780nh_coi7fpBgZGeItp3triNVVPUDvRxDqcahK6h6Z3J9u05Dwcg6OcuRCzH4rj0nj5_KEzJT2VZ0JQodn1yS4nyCjvskhOUQion4LWDuGBsqXJOK-bCkEmTIW6GshcmwfTF1BTBAkAIT80U1nbbX4b34d1lazi50hu5_mRx8WiugVVaPa3Wut5Xpz79dOpfS8lp4sw%3D%3D)

I want to take a moment to express my gratitude for this team and everybody who voted in today's primary election Peter,

First, I want to take a moment to express my gratitude to this team and everybody who voted in today's primary election. We are building a campaign by and for the people of Kentucky, and I know that we are headed for a bright future together.

**Now that the primary results are in, I will officially face Daniel Cameron in the November election.**

Peter, election experts are calling this one of the most important elections in the country this year. And now that we know I'll be up against Mitch McConnell’s protégé, we can be certain that all eyes will be on Kentucky.

We have a tough fight ahead of us which is why I need your help to kickstart our general election campaign tonight. **If you can, chip in a few bucks to help us prepare for what's ahead. Here's a link to donate:**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: A partisan farce
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2231%2E5257348%2ETSdTri ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, the Trump administration’s hand-picked special prosecutor
just released a report that failed to find the deep state conspiracy
theory Trump promised. Instead, Durham’s effort to discredit the FBI
resulted in two failed prosecutions, and brought no new meaningful insight
to an inquiry performed by the DOJ’s inspector general years earlier.

No one could be more disappointed than Trump and his chief enabler, House
Speaker Kevin McCarthy. So it’s no surprise that McCarthy chose today to
deflect questions about whether George Santos should resign while facing
13 felony charges — and instead suggested live on Fox News that the GOP
should remove me from Congress entirely. All because Durham’s
investigation was a bust.

[Unsubscribe](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=ccd6ae4fa2e740518806a59d0ffcc60b&_t=KEc3IY1YEToVzDOWZuSvEKeMqKc5yKy2K3CWSnc0whWMtgxHvQz3KvryG2wpcunuP78V60uC9lrdI7yZGGlDWUE5tbnE_7F0YUx2J5smEZg%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=ccd6ae4fa2e740518806a59d0ffcc60b&_t=KEc3IY1YEToVzDOWZuSvEKeMqKc5yKy2K3CWSnc0whWMtgxHvQz3KvryG2wpcunuP78V60uC9lrdI7yZGGlDWUE5tbnE_7F0YUx2J5smEZg%3D)

Fellow American -

On March 4, I announced I would shut down the FBI.

Now that the Durham Report is public, I am doubling down on what I said months ago...

IT'S TIME TO SHUT DOWN THE FBI

_**Agree?**_

At CPAC, when I first brought up this idea, I was criticized for being "partisan." _Far from it._

The Durham Report is a scathing indictment of the FBI and my proposal to shut it down is pragmatic: just as local prosecutors don't require a separate investigative agency to work with local police, neither should the DOJ require an FBI to work with U.S. Marshals.

Bureaucracy is a formula for corruption. **[It's time to end the weaponization of police power in America once and for all.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=ccd6ae4fa2e740518806a59d0ffcc60b&_e=vz-35p9vj1LmjYsan01LFdU2zk4qa2fLwhQxf88zLso9qfW65PgdT2Ch-bH_-6b7rgZ1YNn2QVI8L7Ad2RR1MuDFE8mqRsyn855HbElMawkzzKm0vAYQLhsUBZJKPvZz57J6znvufJerbD0I-LQoB3DMeXvk7Y0ZVusHIgQNu5DgkLVRUAThEtOGLrYI-QcjKRS8sVmNmvNhfIc3-RENZJfJY9LAyac1Rm4kvG3bh5uhZoNmOikpvyNeZrwgoLqyThfcGiehQY1jhZRxH5cDKKxA31uhw2kCt8kbCgOFpsYdjLwj193vdllwBn4vg0zpBhrSE8eJOF3wT3I3HAsJz-VTE1cAn-L9BMEEYV8m1m9rdpIr5N7wJz8sEBFj65dXhQ6PVyVShct0x4dNJjNolphXx6nu-94GPWRRbIJ_HSsvk-Xxhwf2ZfIpL9kb25GjpxZjTbADK3LoSdhoRE609OIWMEFt6vCDiKqXza2wWp9fBKDJBLqnaj-0d4OqgQW3g3dXESohvATVQO6pDRbLdA%3D%3D)**

Fellow American, I need to know if you're with me as we fundamentally disrupt Washington. We've got to unite together to show the swamp that we will not ideally sit by and allow for corruption to continue in DC.

**[Please join our growing movement by letting me know if you agree that we should SHUT DOWN THE FBI.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=ccd6ae4fa2e740518806a59d0ffcc60b&_e=vz-35p9vj1LmjYsan01LFdU2zk4qa2fLwhQxf88zLso9qfW65PgdT2Ch-bH_-6b7rgZ1YNn2QVI8L7Ad2RR1MuDFE8mqRsyn855HbElMawkzzKm0vAYQLhsUBZJKPvZz57J6znvufJerbD0I-LQoB3DMeXvk7Y0ZVusHIgQNu5DgkLVRUAThEtOGLrYI-QcjKRS8sVmNmvNhfIc3-RENZJfJY9LAyac1Rm4kvG3bh5uhZoNmOikpvyNeZrwgoLqyThfcGiehQY1jhZRxH5cDKKxA31uhw2kCt8kbCgOFpsYdjLwj193vdllwBn4vg0zpBhrSE8eJOF3wT3I3HAsJz-VTE1cAn-L9BMEEYV8m1m9rdpIr5N7wJz8sEBFj65dXknTpiLRZ75pYNNYppo6d_Yv32eo4lMSrKl8AMHlvHz9eeHyR-rAxYe7axrtHuNXcWkR0iDBE9nj0kqWr13wt9BfH7WuSbGhs8P7PbnZwJT1SAk4vezdbT7aTjc3qf2OUO8E3RtCHcuBeG4bx_uQQpw%3D%3D) **

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Peter,
I wanted to reach out to you today about a critical issue affecting our community: _**Organized Retail Crime.**_

Recent reports have shown that this type of crime is on the rise, and it is having a devastating impact on retailers and shoppers alike.

That’s why I recently cosponsored the __Combating Organized Retail Crime Act__ , a bipartisan and bicameral proposal that will target the organized retail crime gangs that continue to destroy retailers and threaten public safety.

[_**This is a critical issue for our community, and I am proud to support this legislation. But I need your help to make sure it becomes law. Will you make a contribution today to help me continue fighting for safer streets and stronger communities?**_](https://u32713810.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=P2XsNzd-2BU60NKIIDkRBMXuvnoTrkCmF6-2Fx8aZdCr3SNXTpOlLQlhNvp5b68pSwdV3SXBnM6XRx6vPl8QKxJ1pq5Y3KE0FGYALSTZwg5aRGuI7sLeRCxwX5aATJUB1IfkJdnbzMbXwGCPPrRjRx1SfjthClC2UxYfIpV2cFmVqHKFLak78Lik4TOgTM8R5ru5sKLV7oVVskb4Nf00IN-2FimAMY7EYElpGW2OpTSzs09ZOXqxnRHLIjLyLmPtBZf0tv5_GU_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdkLMmWeLnwK0KfPGgXzXHvoIGcfoQrAuI0Zkzwvv9dkHghc1ZFPh4s2VPIB-2BUJPR1ce1MwXOgEsQtpD9Vs-2BDtc7YNG046U3x7ExvVj01cMS0sE9PNpCIPirhcZ-2FfhatNYR4FWkAMd6LosuBUDhbBwdFLOzKZUf3wv3lT9nmRAWb-2BoswK27VU-2BqxpJBCk5R7ahBjLRCjBOjSv0Ju7t8sGBS3PcG02u0rMbzSgDf9c73UCVAhQHUjZv94vBOZ8ub3pUWZ3r5zUfkz6kTNYghGIiaLICQ-2FHr2GE2z7bW8j1YgT-2FG-2FAZRJytwZOp7Zhlgb7ybYbiLxKJEKxMNffazE2cgkFF5fBnNv6PmLA3skr8vG7xzvjfs3eQIVoOVgFqRiUIuGp6nk05eMB5mX-2ByF4VQMzdFARm0rc-2FDg5nb2d-2F9lX45g0Fk9VGhUbhehf06UguB32wLDwdiyg70SyKOwkKmcgUc-2B8ppxK-2BYsRgEdwIeKmpTND2giuXEcQ6i5ZNkKY0cPbgWpJrxkuax8O0lLSA2r9KvX5INU-2BzO70vhjNfpPEWNiQ5Lgr8C6ecwunoFFBZr48Nl-2BGXeyLvL78M5FPKp-2FLSXISv-2BK6NRQGhLkOlBTIki2hvqUtFHosaro7nQdvyUPe7hCFybI5woP0dE9mxV3hdrofGpNY188Vxww4m0ZGhEDdGIH9cUQFen8uv7c58AEDMB9c9shKyyJYVr4cX27vwSpgD00z51CK7r3ayzIb75RXJFuzIGrXMfJMifz1UWqwfE-2FKIfFCw4Jpnl4tIJefoWrt4BsL2PAZvrhOOTuEaZIFN1y8TVwIaPU8NFoZkcglSeM9ZZ-2F4Ydl-2B3ZGrj-2FWNuuTsNSryovwAW1dav-2BY7RvCWaTX9dySL-2BhzdzBjpPTA8nMjp5GU2mYDZFKcq6enUx4QIrsoV00RztNzyam5jLCdp7KHYa20QS2HEkfHkyeHcQLwvAC3fKFy9aKJFoSoyg-3D-3D)

__**Organized retail crime costs retailers $720,000 for every $1 billion in sales – up 50 percent since 2015.**__ As law enforcement focuses on the rise in drug trafficking and other offenses, criminal organizations have increasingly turned to retail crime to generate illicit profits, using internet-based tools to organize flash mobs, sell stolen goods, and move money.

The bipartisan, bicameral Combating Organized Retail Crime Act creates a unified government and industry collaboration to address this trend. The bill establishes a Center to Combat Organized Retail Crime at Homeland Security Investigations that combines expertise from state and local law enforcement agencies as well as retail industry representatives. It also creates new tools to assist in federal investigations and prosecutions of organized retail crime.

__Your support will help me continue advocating for the resources needed to confront the criminals associated with these crimes and keep our businesses and shoppers safe.
__
Thank you for your continued support.

Sincerely,

clean_body: | | | | Can you help me? | Peter, I wanted to reach out to you today about a critical issue affecting our community: Organized Retail Crime. Recent reports have shown that this type of crime is on the rise, and it is having a devastating impact on retailers and shoppers alike. That’s why I recently cosponsored the Combating Organized Retail Crime Act , a bipartisan and bicameral proposal that will target the organized retail crime gangs that continue to destroy retailers and threaten public safety. | Organized retail crime costs retailers $720,000 for every $1 billion in sales – up 50 percent since 2015. As law enforcement focuses on the rise in drug trafficking and other offenses, criminal organizations have increasingly turned to retail crime to generate illicit profits, using internet-based tools to organize flash mobs, sell stolen goods, and move money. The bipartisan, bicameral Combating Organized Retail Crime Act creates a unified government and industry collaboration to address this trend. The bill establishes a Center to Combat Organized Retail Crime at Homeland Security Investigations that combines expertise from state and local law enforcement agencies as well as retail industry representatives. It also creates new tools to assist in federal investigations and prosecutions of organized retail crime. Your support will help me continue advocating for the resources needed to confront the criminals associated with these crimes and keep our businesses and shoppers safe. Thank you for your continued support. Sincerely, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 \-

Fellow American -

I have a clear vision for how to win the White House in 2024: **a grassroots, bottom-up campaign made of people just like you.**

We're about to hit a major campaign milestone - 35,000 unique donors in just months of campaigning. Unlike my opponents who have years of politicking under their belts, we started with NOTHING and have built this movement.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=83facb30dcce4b368fbe9e7d6b03454a&_e=jC6_S1nYEMA9lLkHDZOqa6RlzRjYWjxuIkNUfZv5RQv_zo8AQV6ZS0J1qW5U50zLSWpegCzC2XJrM5IKMf8O_UfM7axvqwGV301m6fxe6gM2wXfOyCWRHreBsDgGH-mqmxy9urU56VXuwvcZa2TtE43jHGHUBZhItjnYI0n4KVY1K58qLnLSNtYDC68sb4Lez9ny6I3p6IpR_2p7otZm0EmgEnY4hMfHT3YJ1LvoSLTZsvj1dY8d7Q1EI0t7Go1U8aZbL-R_jhAoP_gIrSVpSG8vB1uEEYUIn-vRuESAlFCNNIa3uFICwODVZwD8ROxtuleTEdBfYznyitbUAD11kRbhZfmUd03Ov-PdnDCH2pmLKOcXQIMJOK7Xo5npBYcBEgO0Mb0RX3pccd0SoYlqhQ%3D%3D)
So here's what I am asking of you today: **[will you be one of the unique donors I need to get a prime spot on the debate stage? Make it a small donation - every dollar makes a huge difference when it comes to planning our "Great Uprising."](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=83facb30dcce4b368fbe9e7d6b03454a&_e=jC6_S1nYEMA9lLkHDZOqa6RlzRjYWjxuIkNUfZv5RQv_zo8AQV6ZS0J1qW5U50zLSWpegCzC2XJrM5IKMf8O_UfM7axvqwGV301m6fxe6gM2wXfOyCWRHreBsDgGH-mqmxy9urU56VXuwvcZa2TtE43jHGHUBZhItjnYI0n4KVY1K58qLnLSNtYDC68sb4Lez9ny6I3p6IpR_2p7otZm0EmgEnY4hMfHT3YJ1LvoSLTZsvj1dY8d7Q1EI0t7Go1URZcFh_9Z_DBdIjARz54WAvku3azrF7cG6Ztue5m444bMuzyHG-y78ou8f1XPM9VV5BbE31Ojt5fE4bwAZE-OsmUWW90E_i0ZzuK9WLVApihDl15dNEMiu-ClhXs82TNcKYT7qg0dxQF1Bh6fuYMYtQ%3D%3D)**

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: If we want to make the debate stage in August, we need to secure unique donors to our grassroots campaign. | | Fellow American - I have a clear vision for how to win the White House in 2024: a grassroots, bottom-up campaign made of people just like you. We're about to hit a major campaign milestone - 35,000 unique donors in just months of campaigning. Unlike my opponents who have years of politicking under their belts, we started with NOTHING and have built this movement. So here's what I am asking of you today: As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. Dear Patriot, Below are links to some of the most important news stories today for your consideration. Courtesy of Right Wing Report. |
Dear Concerned American,

Your petition to Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy, your Senators, and your Congressman is linked below.

It's vital that you submit your petition immediately.

_Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, Joe Biden, and the Big Labor bosses are about to go ballistic_.

I have introduced the National Right to Work Act to repeal forever Big Labor's power to force workers to pay union dues in order to work.

_So the union lobbyists, Chuck Schumer, Hakeem Jeffries, and their allies are going to use every trick in the book to bury the National Right to Work Bill_.

And they want to do it as quietly as possible.

_The union kingpins (and their water-carriers in Congress) can't afford the consequences of having their coercive privileges publicly debated and voted on in Congress_!

They don't want the American people to know that: *** _Millions of workers are forced to surrender part of every paycheck to keep their jobs_.

This cash funds violent "organizing" drives, a limousine lifestyle for union bigwigs, and bankrolls radical, tax-and-spend politicians like Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Hakeem Jeffries. *** _Big Labor's power is deadly to millions of small businesses_.

Big Labor politicians and stacked bureaucrats are strangling small businesses with confiscatory taxes, destructive laws, and straitjacket regulations. *** _Forced unionism exports millions of good jobs overseas_.

Productivity-killing work rules, workplace class warfare, slowdowns, "sick-outs," and strikes all take their crippling toll, closing the doors of many businesses -- for good. In the fight to force votes on a National Right to Work law, opponents of forced unionism will face a showdown against the full might of Big Labor.

**[That's why it's vital that you act at once to ignite massive public support for a National Right to Work Bill](http://mgmail.rightwingreport.com/c/eJxs0DvWnCAcQPHVaMkB_ghYWEy-yexDQQQfIA_Hx-pzkjr1vdVPd4NsW2bqsSNcMqCcNLy23aglY0pBY_pxpAODBg8t5j0HzTSMpHYdxRRwQwShlAJHBL3eP58fYC-gza_fQkLFcHKTLafzUxr3kApSYavXzpayV_Cq6Kein5IW9J_tb4TPVdYK3twrUM40IH2KTKivx8zQPsy7y_fN7NHS-NzL8HCnfOPFeRzLMh2QDXXP1eYE5dDDSNiybSXopsQ7r_1ZbA77RqZrnnyiDK_Xk-kY1kV6_AWSlFkiCwfdk2x9XmSMBG4wJSkdjbKnNrCs96F94JHHdteNTrvX6vIrs724BiLk3c8XC8yEivLR2Qrey7NJn8vM97TNYrCPyPP36-8cBQz9ZOuta1pCJGuhTp3eT7euLnNRMTxtvVv_GZbuQunIGGMEJmJUvviUAyqHnxJHrucUTiSu-2mREUwDIvaMfwIAAP__MGSjkg).**

[](http://mgmail.rightwingreport.com/c/eJxs0DnWmzAUQOHVQKnz9CSeUEHh_I73gQANDLIRMtPqc5I69b3V1zem1lracmg41VIg8YpK3wzSkh44SdRDbzuqhNSIle2VrDRoVYYGAQVUXHFEFMQ4ezx_Xj9CPgRWv36rWhQSUnA-HyG6NHzeKbPuvZRz43P-FOJR4KvAV04T-8_2N4rXmedCPCl2ogu2EnVMq1TdHkFabN_jJ2zXJf092O9g5OwcrCS2-5xl9gDGIChvueVRTYHgvR-W960xO_fucAR2HOYs1UKpnmoYNAbg5qqPceyO6Rt3vEPMUazuvoibId9p3cwoIj-n5AwRklwn1-qI-V05fRGv7xY5HKb6JkJuIUzx8hauUxZIQ_CFeE73Usctj_RJy6iMv9U27nu8tlUJ0zpfLk2lOa-lFmVq-s8R5jlspAoJbmnD_M8wNydL3w0AmLArsLzDURuWv9ElYqElFAdT53VrZpXsBeP-WP8EAAD__wGwnl0)

Now is the time to act.

By the time the Right to Work Bill comes up for a vote, every member of Congress must realize the eyes of the American people will be watching.

_National opinion polls all show that 80% of the American people agree it's wrong to force workers to pay union dues under the threat of being fired if they don't pay_!

And the National Right to Work Committee, who has led the fight against forced dues for over 50 years, must have your help in demonstrating that to Congress.

_If the public's attention is fixed on this battle, Congress will be forced to recognize -- or defy to its peril -- the massive public opposition to compulsory unionism_.

Then we'll see who dares to stand with Big Labor. . .

. . . and who stands with freedom and the American people.

**[It's vital you click to submit your petition to Mitch McConnell, Kevin McCarthy, your Senators, and your Congressman immediately](http://mgmail.rightwingreport.com/c/eJxs0LvWnCAUQOGn0ZJ1uB20sJj8k3kPkUHxgooo4tNnJXXqvavPNLqqa2HLb0OxEpwhlVgOjepAGymkYVRLq1CCbjvKzbe1CB2D0jUMGAdJFWWMcSSUvN4_nx8uXpzJX79VxQsBwfVDTM734butIZJuXcq5GWLcCv4q2Kdgnxgm8p_tb-SfO84Ff6PveOes5JUPu1Dd5UFY1q7j5o6cxWDXlEfjFxYFozTzJ3Rg5OXHZbwE9PI5pwC5eiblLYO2TlpWcjbXN9R3i9cUAOM2XmcSCfIQ1ZOObGfl_bafWYhjYTPkuCZntV9B43qcdDpN8lXde7xVPaU4BhnR0wlWH2xAieLcU3_X04pRi00VDL9uKPh7epbKH3HELSyj0sOjjvG6fD52xXXbD-XSyJrSStS8DI3Zkptnd6AqBPRL6-Z_hrG5STgPACDc7kDiBanSJJ6-D0hci4wnou781MQqYTihQ9r_BAAA__9PXaGs)** to demonstrate to Congress and the national media the strong support for Right to Work.

It's all part of the National Right to Work Committee's four-part plan to pass a National Right to Work law: *** _Contact directly by mail up to 10 million supporters_ , urging them to demand their Senators and Congressmen vote for the National Right to Work Bill; *** _Brief personally the hundreds of favorable columnists, radio talk show hosts, and editorial writers nationwide_ who can help mobilize public opinion; *** _Deploy digital advertising through email and across social media_ in the days before the vote to really make Congress feel the heat; and *** _Run TV and radio ads_ targeting swing votes in key states and districts. It is critical in this battle that Congress hears loud and clear from the nearly 80% of Americans who support Right to Work.

Of course, Congress may choose to obey Big Labor bosses rather than the majority of their constituents. That's their choice.

_But time and again, when politicians defied the public and voted for forced unionism, they've paid the price with the end of their political careers_!

Of course, this whole effort will be very expensive.

_An all-out media and direct-mail blitz to mobilize massive public pressure on Congress will be the key to our success_.

To pay for the expensive ads, mailings, and other efforts, it's urgent you send a special contribution to the National Right to Work Committee today.

**[Will you make a generous contribution of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or $50 to launch the next, crucial phase for ultimate passage of a National Right to Work law](http://mgmail.rightwingreport.com/c/eJxs0DvWnCAcQPHVaMkB_rwsLCbfZPYBqIAPcBRFXX1OUqe-t_p1rVFNw4a6b4lQDKggXNS-1YILxpW1BnqulWkayS0jrO9Ib3Gv69BSTAFzIgmlFAQi6PX--fwAewHlv35LBRXDW3A-lxDd1q9py8impZ5bn_Nawauin4p-8jah_2x_I3yuPFfwFtGCDQMHFbcvk_aMmA1Up3EN-30zP4XY0SGXhUnj5-7UIZ5PJBM_nUvqPhqrPaf7nAZXUrqHO32vjq_UBiu9CvdzMXy6pScrzIUZt0qhzQ5QaDB25Nkc0UsVtFCYTyySJxJNU5rKsjXPcXDlnsdgkkTxKt2Xp1x0I526pJvrIlmsNxcVFX3wFbynZ1Fxz6NYt2WUxj9yH88z3vtXgtHO10vLG0IUa6De2m4tYZ7DLmTFsFt0mP8Z5vZC27FjjBEMX4zyiYsyKB_RbQIFLSgUJK_7adAgWQeI-PL9EwAA__-Xe6Fg)?**

[](http://mgmail.rightwingreport.com/c/eJxs0DvWnCAAQOHVaMnhJWhhMfknsw8EEVAQgRF19TlJnfre6lPj1A8D1e08ItZTghnqWGtGpHgnNEFUSTRzxDuFFddUYaGEVly1dsQQE9ghjjDGhAEEXu-fzw-hL4K7X795TxoKk11MqTYsaY57KkDuvt1GU0psyKvBnwZ_SlrBf7a_kXyusjXkzYIk0uqO9CEdlMszQKqx2F20-b6ppRkbbp6lqBCls5vcHT5zrXGeu5qPxawpDN_JqxzDLa74bM-2-_WaDrbgMHjL0DkpjL7Xs5a4FqytrHY183xYI9lJnZhmmFW6A6zc2rW7POvWXe9VbEsiXEqdq-NsEV9hrfeGHwIlSotzXCqDiSsNZrM1DXmvj-9DLo7F5B2fzMOzO89w54OTSSym9WM3INTTgbRpVLHabbOZ8YbCxQu7_TMs4wXSN0MIAdEHBOWEtZ9A-YYlMWAFw6QCft3PADSnigBk6vEnAAD___G_pQg)

It's vital you act immediately to put the politicians' feet to the fire to bring the National Right to Work Act up for a vote.

_It would be a crime to let politicians who support compulsory unionism off the hook_.

Up against the forced-dues fed, billion-dollar might of Big Labor, all the Committee has on its side is truth, public opinion. . .

. . . and you!

Unlike Big Labor, the National Right to Work Committee doesn't have (or want) the power to force anyone to pay dues.

So it has to depend on generous folks like you.

_Please don't make it easy for Chuck Schumer, Hakeem Jeffries, Joe Biden, and Big Labor to bury the National Right to Work Bill_.

Some folks have already sent $500, $1,000, and even more. For others, a contribution of $50 or $100 has been as much as they could afford.

**[Please submit your petition so we can demonstrate to Congress and the media the strong support for Right to Work](http://mgmail.rightwingreport.com/c/eJxskEvOrCoYAFejQwJ8CDhw0Pfv2_sQBYHGF-ADV3_yn_EZVyWV1Ngp2bbM1LojXDKgnDS8tt2Aidai5aMasFCa9kwNRoJUmist27F2HcUUcEMEoZQCRwS93j-fH2AvoM1__wsJFcPRTTZfbpmi3taY0bDOdehszlsFr4p-KvrJ8Yv-of1C-Nw5VPDmywCDMw3IJe5MDOeCmaH96jeXSmGuDSasfmJqj-R2NI7muGMBXohKuhfi4M24fX3h1FGPT6-KX3262GOf1G53YEOg9jFzmITfHwE6FZ22qSfZM3yK69rItWo8KXxbvhy6xb_Nc6T7wFa-El5MkI2hgmVDBFfnLckebHJLkVOi53ArVVGuna3g_X1muaTs-RZnL5R9RPLnuZS0C1D9ZOu5a1pCJGuhjt24XS4El7ioGJ7m3oW_D3N3o3gkjDECs2OUT3xJhfKxTJEj13MKFxJ3eVpkBBsBEXvtfwIAAP__UGqhzg).**

[](http://mgmail.rightwingreport.com/c/eJxs0Du2niAUQOHRaMkCzuFhYXFzb_554BsfiAiijj4rqVPvXX1d3eiqwqHsayY1ApdMyHKqeQ9NNwDXqDmiUYPi2lSGNdQgU1KWtuaUAxVMMc45SMLI18_35xvwC7j49VtpKJAGO04xWzeG3u8hknbfyrWeYvQFfBX8U_BPDAv5z_Y3wueOawE_0rXQ2kGAduFA1V6O4sDNPnt7Pg_acN2QKD1mlppzVNOwIbru7sft6em0ZvRWpSDm3Byj2lPsNtmmR7yPR36G5fXOPiznHHlnnQ1tgn10Y3tuKjix63vtj2O-8rwctukDvtdokh-EcOd0maRXkWZcWzOrw4GPEXunjVjcYMSWo_A6QFwKLns7FfCzvJt2Z5ylD9usmulV53xd7jkPBY0Zp3KrRcWYxgrKUHc-23W1p1QF0nEzdv1nGOubhHRSSgkMByXxolk3JCY3BkmskRwyUffzVmRQ2AFhUz7-BAAA__-HcaPK)

Without your contribution of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or $50, the National Right to Work Committee won't be able to contact 10 million Americans, place the advertising, deploy the whole digital program, or do anything else to put Big Labor on the spot with a public vote on the National Right to Work Bill.

_And if you and I don't press forward now, we may never have a chance like this again_.

Please help today.

clean_body: Dear Patriot, Below are links to some of the most important news stories today for your consideration. Courtesy of Right Wing Report. | Dear Concerned American, Your petition to Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy, your Senators, and your Congressman is linked below. It's vital that you submit your petition immediately. Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, Joe Biden, and the Big Labor bosses are about to go ballistic. I have introduced the National Right to Work Act to repeal forever Big Labor's power to force workers to pay union dues in order to work. So the union lobbyists, Chuck Schumer, Hakeem Jeffries, and their allies are going to use every trick in the book to bury the National Right to Work Bill. And they want to do it as quietly as possible. The union kingpins (and their water-carriers in Congress) can't afford the consequences of having their coercive privileges publicly debated and voted on in Congress! They don't want the American people to know that: * Millions of workers are forced to surrender part of every paycheck to keep their jobs. This cash funds violent "organizing" drives, a limousine lifestyle for union bigwigs, and bankrolls radical, tax-and-spend politicians like Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Hakeem Jeffries. Big Labor's power is deadly to millions of small businesses. Big Labor politicians and stacked bureaucrats are strangling small businesses with confiscatory taxes, destructive laws, and straitjacket regulations. Forced unionism exports millions of good jobs overseas. Productivity-killing work rules, workplace class warfare, slowdowns, "sick-outs," and strikes all take their crippling toll, closing the doors of many businesses -- for good. In the fight to force votes on a National Right to Work law, opponents of forced unionism will face a showdown against the full might of Big Labor. . Now is the time to act. By the time the Right to Work Bill comes up for a vote, every member of Congress must realize the eyes of the American people will be watching. National opinion polls all show that 80% of the American people agree it's wrong to force workers to pay union dues under the threat of being fired if they don't pay! And the National Right to Work Committee, who has led the fight against forced dues for over 50 years, must have your help in demonstrating that to Congress. If the public's attention is fixed on this battle, Congress will be forced to recognize -- or defy to its peril -- the massive public opposition to compulsory unionism. Then we'll see who dares to stand with Big Labor. . . . . . and who stands with freedom and the American people. to demonstrate to Congress and the national media the strong support for Right to Work. It's all part of the National Right to Work Committee's four-part plan to pass a National Right to Work law: Contact directly by mail up to 10 million supporters , urging them to demand their Senators and Congressmen vote for the National Right to Work Bill; Brief personally the hundreds of favorable columnists, radio talk show hosts, and editorial writers nationwide who can help mobilize public opinion; Deploy digital advertising through email and across social media in the days before the vote to really make Congress feel the heat; and Run TV and radio ads targeting swing votes in key states and districts. It is critical in this battle that Congress hears loud and clear from the nearly 80% of Americans who support Right to Work. Of course, Congress may choose to obey Big Labor bosses rather than the majority of their constituents. That's their choice. But time and again, when politicians defied the public and voted for forced unionism, they've paid the price with the end of their political careers! Of course, this whole effort will be very expensive. An all-out media and direct-mail blitz to mobilize massive public pressure on Congress will be the key to our success. To pay for the expensive ads, mailings, and other efforts, it's urgent you send a special contribution to the National Right to Work Committee today. ? It's vital you act immediately to put the politicians' feet to the fire to bring the National Right to Work Act up for a vote. It would be a crime to let politicians who support compulsory unionism off the hook. Up against the forced-dues fed, billion-dollar might of Big Labor, all the Committee has on its side is truth, public opinion. . . . . . and you! Unlike Big Labor, the National Right to Work Committee doesn't have (or want) the power to force anyone to pay dues. So it has to depend on generous folks like you. Please don't make it easy for Chuck Schumer, Hakeem Jeffries, Joe Biden, and Big Labor to bury the National Right to Work Bill. Some folks have already sent $500, $1,000, and even more. For others, a contribution of $50 or $100 has been as much as they could afford. . Without your contribution of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or $50, the National Right to Work Committee won't be able to contact 10 million Americans, place the advertising, deploy the whole digital program, or do anything else to put Big Labor on the spot with a public vote on the National Right to Work Bill. And if you and I don't press forward now, we may never have a chance like this again. Please help today. . Sincerely, Rand Paul United States Senator P.S. name: Chloe Cole
subject: I'm suing them for what they did to me
body:
I guess I’m what you’d call a “cautionary tale.”

| |
---
| |
# FROM THE DESK OF CHLOE COLE
---
|
---
Dear Friend,My name is Chloe.
---
| | You don’t know me but I’m hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson.There are lots of powerful people who don’t want my story to get out, so I’m so grateful that Mr. Carlson had me on as a guest.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5c6c81rpiaocf7e9atcvfpb60jvqqggkbaoh2a0_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpi6eor3chh2bs)
---
| | I guess I’m what you’d call a “cautionary tale.”You see, I’m one of those girls who was deceived by the transgender movement. I’m 18 years old now but here is a picture of what I looked like before the transgender movement got me. And one from after -- when they had turned me into a “boy.”
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq0ldudppg60u6qtn4pc11v8mjcmqbfpclsas9j8_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpi6eor3chh2bs)
---
** _Before transitioning_**
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaeomu9sa4rjtj3fr6e7293gc64qab01ocsvng20_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpi6eor3chh2bs)
---
**_After transitioning_**
---
| | [**Even though we don’t know each other, I’m writing you today hoping you’ll help me stop the** **horror of what happened to me, from happening to other children and their parents.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3q5mb1pn07u35lp7r71o6v238lp8del0bbdstpg_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpi6eor3chh2bs) It all started when I was 11 years old and growing up in Northern California. I was growing embarrassed and confused once my body started changing.I was also shy and didn’t socialize easily – and I didn’t feel comfortable talking about any of this with my parents.But I found ‘friends’ on the internet who told me if I was uncomfortable with my body, I was probably a boy trapped in the wrong body.And the more I agreed with them, the more they celebrated me.I was getting the message loud and clear: if I was a girl who became a boy, I’d be valued and loved even more.Before long I was telling my parents I was transgender.They had no idea what to do. My poor parents were scared and desperate and took me to “experts” who convinced them that if they failed to act quickly, I would surely commit suicide.**The gender clinic gave my parents an ultimatum: “Would you rather have a dead daughter or a living son?”** Given those choices, my parents would have signed anything the doctors put in front of them if it meant “saving” me. When they signed those forms, it wasn’t informed parental consent. It was a desperate decision made under extreme duress.And so, at age 13, I was fast-tracked for medical transition from a girl into a boy. [**Will you help me fight so these radical doctors and hospitals can’t prey on another scared, confused, lonely child like they did me?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo05d6u7vhhtk9ora2vgrjje7f5p3p05k8dg7b60_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpi6eor3chh2bs) The doctors started giving me weekly testosterone injections...they injected me with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders......and finally, they removed my breasts in a radical double mastectomy.I was fifteen years old.And of course, none of this made me any happier or less confused.If you’re like most people I tell my story to... right about now you’re probably thinking, “HOW did it ever get this far?” And the answer is simple.The “experts” lied to my parents -- and to me -- every step of the way.They claimed I would never get “better” unless I medically transitioned – when the truth is that the vast majority of children who think they’re transgender grow out of it with absolutely no chemical or surgical intervention. They claimed their consent forms covered all the risks of pumping testosterone and puberty blockers into my 13-year-old body......while their forms left out dozens and dozens of known risks.They never told us that there isn’t one single scientific study on the effects these treatments have on young children. And they never, ever, were straight with me about what it would mean to let them remove my breasts.When I woke up from that surgery, I was shocked at how mangled my body was. And now years after the surgery, I still wear bandages every day to cover the oozing, unhealed scars.At age 18, I’m just beginning to understand what it will mean to never nurse my child -- if I’ll ever be able to have children at all. For the rest of my life, my voice will sound like a man’s, my body will look like a boy’s, and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more are lurking around the corner.And my parents feel like they’ve failed me on every level imaginable.I can’t go back. I can’t change what happened. But I can change what happens to the THOUSANDS of kids just like me who are falling prey to the predatory transgender movement and unscrupulous abusive medical “experts.” [**And YOU can help me.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgkdbsq7o7ddq43b128688bson38410bonv7v760_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpi6eor3chh2bs) More and more children are mutilated and abused every day.**There’s even a doctor who advertises her mutilation surgeries on TikTok to draw young kids in.** And it won’t stop until someone fights back.When I turned 18, I decided that someone would be me. I had no idea how I would do it, but I’d seen enough T.V. to know I needed a lawyer. I also didn’t know how hard it would be to find someone willing to take my case in liberal California. didn’t even know what a liberal was until they started slamming doors in my face!Finally, someone told me to call Harmeet Dhillon at the Center for American Liberty.
---
| | And the first time we spoke, I felt something I hadn’t felt in a long time -- hope.Because Harmeet is a fighter like me. She didn’t tell me we’d never win against the giant medical industry.She didn’t tell me the transgender issue was too sensitive to touch.She told me my fight mattered.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo2sq6ojn1qgekesfj8vkr6in31g0ivjghjafsho_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpi6eor3chh2bs)
---
| | Not only because of what had happened to me -- but also because we could STOP it from happening to other children. And so together with Harmeet Dhillon’s non-profit -- the Center for American Liberty -- I’ve launched a case against the radical doctors and hospital who preyed on me......and who continue to prey on children -- maybe even in your family.As I’ve mentioned several times -- I’m 18-years-old.On my own, I’d never have the money to pay for a giant court case like this. That’s one of the ways these radicals are taking over everything. They know regular people like me don’t have the money to fight them in court.But that’s exactly why Harmeet started the Center for American Liberty. The Center for American Liberty brings together attorneys who want to fight for what’s right and matches them with people like me who would have had nowhere else to turn.Right now, the Center for American Liberty has landmark cases going like:
---
* _Brach v. Newsom_ \-- to stop California from shutting down private and religious schools...
* _Ngo v. Roce City Antifa_ \-- to get justice for Andy Ngo after he was beaten by Antifa thugs and liberal politicians did NOTHING...
* _O’Handley v. Padilla_ \-- to stop Big Government from using Big Tech to silence people they disagree with...
* And now my case... _Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente_.

---
The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit. They have big cases but that doesn’t mean they have the big money that their opponents have.[**That’s why I hope you’ll consider helping us by rushing back a small tax-deductible donation of $25 or more.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0fsoccclsheca10okdspadi8njkrg61k083ih30_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpi6eor3chh2bs) There are big forces at work who want to get rich no matter who they hurt.Alone we’re no match for them. [**But if everyone I’m writing to can contribute just $25, or if you’re able, maybe more -- $35, $50, $75, $100, $200, or even $500**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqdd0i89e3lnc5nes4dt597mk9o7tu1gno9ocen8_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpi6eor3chh2bs), we can beat these monsters who are using scared, confused and lonely children to make a buck. For exposing them, I’ve been called a “liar.” I’ve even been told de-transitioners like me don’t exist. But when we beat them in court and stop them from hurting any more children with their lies and mutilations,I will be proud to face them and say:**_“You may have taken away my childhood, and forever changed my future -- but I exist. I exist.”_** Thank you for reading this letter from a complete stranger. I hope I can call you a friend now. And thank you for whatever help you can send to the Center for American Liberty. **[Whether it’s $25, $35, $50, $75, $100, $200, or even $500 or more...](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5d9efka7njl67kresu5n9j6dp3bv1kqvllaehv0_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpi6eor3chh2bs)** every bit moves us closer to stopping these monsters.
---
| | Thank you,Chloe Cole
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrnnrgnbsta7rhpj9dq53kj500eam6pdquucvbpo_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpi6eor3chh2bs)
---
| P.S. This is a photo of me now. It’s been a long, painful road but I’m finding happiness and purpose as I fight to make sure what happened to me NEVER happens to another child. **[Please help me with your tax-deductible gift of $25 or more.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z61kqb84323mma1pd0fo1v1nhc7ik51bcfb5a93o_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpi6eor3chh2bs) **Thank you so much for your help. --Chloe
---
| | [**DONATE**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbop8ktivb4o7pbcg4i61ag202nq748c5hmk9kl0_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpi6eor3chh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7q4dv23h61kf6q0m2pfrsh1fk691og8a7pd47no_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpi6eor3chh2bs)
---
The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
---

---
PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2z343vpno97oghlrhghtftss77oc26qntf1rogb6o)
---

They claimed their consent forms covered all the risks of pumping testosterone and puberty blockers into my 13-year-old body......while their forms left out dozens and dozens of known risks.They never told us that there isn’t one single scientific study on the effects these treatments have on young children. And they never, ever, were straight with me about what it would mean to let them remove my breasts.When I woke up from that surgery, I was shocked at how mangled my body was. And now years after the surgery, I still wear bandages every day to cover the oozing, unhealed scars.At age 18, I’m just beginning to understand what it will mean to never nurse my child -- if I’ll ever be able to have children at all. For the rest of my life, my voice will sound like a man’s, my body will look like a boy’s, and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more are lurking around the corner.And my parents feel like they’ve failed me on every level imaginable.I can’t go back. I can’t change what happened. But I can change what happens to the THOUSANDS of kids just like me who are falling prey to the predatory transgender movement and unscrupulous abusive medical “experts.” More and more children are mutilated and abused every day.There’s even a doctor who advertises her mutilation surgeries on TikTok to draw young kids in. And it won’t stop until someone fights back.When I turned 18, I decided that someone would be me. I had no idea how I would do it, but I’d seen enough T.V. to know I needed a lawyer. I also didn’t know how hard it would be to find someone willing to take my case in liberal California. didn’t even know what a liberal was until they started slamming doors in my face!Finally, someone told me to call Harmeet Dhillon at the Center for American Liberty. | | And the first time we spoke, I felt something I hadn’t felt in a long time -- hope.Because Harmeet is a fighter like me. She didn’t tell me we’d never win against the giant medical industry.She didn’t tell me the transgender issue was too sensitive to touch.She told me my fight mattered. | | | Not only because of what had happened to me -- but also because we could STOP it from happening to other children. And so together with Harmeet Dhillon’s non-profit -- the Center for American Liberty -- I’ve launched a case against the radical doctors and hospital who preyed on me......and who continue to prey on children -- maybe even in your family.As I’ve mentioned several times -- I’m 18-years-old.On my own, I’d never have the money to pay for a giant court case like this. That’s one of the ways these radicals are taking over everything. They know regular people like me don’t have the money to fight them in court.But that’s exactly why Harmeet started the Center for American Liberty. The Center for American Liberty brings together attorneys who want to fight for what’s right and matches them with people like me who would have had nowhere else to turn.Right now, the Center for American Liberty has landmark cases going like: Brach v. Newsom \-- to stop California from shutting down private and religious schools... Ngo v. Roce City Antifa \-- to get justice for Andy Ngo after he was beaten by Antifa thugs and liberal politicians did NOTHING... O’Handley v. Padilla \-- to stop Big Government from using Big Tech to silence people they disagree with... And now my case... Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente. The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit. They have big cases but that doesn’t mean they have the big money that their opponents have. There are big forces at work who want to get rich no matter who they hurt.Alone we’re no match for them. , we can beat these monsters who are using scared, confused and lonely children to make a buck. For exposing them, I’ve been called a “liar.” I’ve even been told de-transitioners like me don’t exist. But when we beat them in court and stop them from hurting any more children with their lies and mutilations,I will be proud to face them and say:“You may have taken away my childhood, and forever changed my future -- but I exist. I exist.” Thank you for reading this letter from a complete stranger. I hope I can call you a friend now. And thank you for whatever help you can send to the Center for American Liberty. every bit moves us closer to stopping these monsters. | | Thank you,Chloe Cole | | | P.S. This is a photo of me now. It’s been a long, painful road but I’m finding happiness and purpose as I fight to make sure what happened to me NEVER happens to another child. Thank you so much for your help. --Chloe | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 | Trump Train News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: American Briefing
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
I’ve always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfsn53fgscii4rhl9fesu011gjmrqlucaci3fd4o_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpi6eor7c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

** [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z98db0tab8jro106gats7nmhl3l3cndkrmroqbeg_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpi6eor7c5h2bs)
[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zr98euqhfhlml43h6u1sai8hd3993r2a7luvfthg_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpi6eor7c5h2bs)

I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Briefing
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

**So, I just CANCELED her event, and will instead throw a commemoration of Israel 's 75th anniversary.**

Let me be clear: I will not stand for the Squad's anti-semitism.

Now, Rashida Tlaib is DOUBLING DOWN on bringing HATE to the halls of Congress...

Without the hidden agenda, slant, or bias, our talented team of editors dig through hundreds of sources and pull out the most important news of the day - so you don't have to. Charlie

name: Alan Keck
subject: Thank you.
body:
Polls are closed, but as we wait on results, there are just two words I need to say, “thank you.”
[](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pjdkluy-dytiuyidkd-r/) Friend, the polls have officially closed and I wanted to take just a moment while we wait on the results, to say two words, _" thank you."_Thank you from the bottom of my heart for your unwavering support of our campaign-of a Kentucky that wins. Whatever the results might hold, I'm immensely proud of, humbled by and grateful for the campaign we have run, and the team-_you included_ -that was behind us from the very beginning.That includes my wife Tiffany, and my three girls who have been the biggest blessings imaginable, supporting me and putting up with my long trips away from home as I campaigned across the Commonwealth over these last six months. There's no doubt in my mind that whatever the results hold, the Lord has been with us every step of the way-guiding us, and helping us to prove to Kentuckians that this election isn't like the last-but a chance for the Commonwealth to start anew, to solve the crises career politicians can't or won't solve, and to focus on what makes Kentucky better-faith and family. _So again, thank you._ Thank you for your support. Thank you for putting up with my emails, thank you for staying engaged every step of the way and thank you for voting. I launched this campaign because I knew I wasn't alone in wanting a Kentucky that wins again, and you alongside thousands of other Kentuckians have forever changed politics in the Commonwealth for the better in proving just that. _That alone is a victory worth celebrating._ But believe me when I say, whatever the results, _we 're just getting started._God Bless. Alan Keck ### | [Unsubscribe](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-u-pjdkluy-dytiuyidkd-j/)
---

| | | | | Peter, **_FIRST:_** North Carolina Republicans rushed through an extreme abortion ban. **_THEN:_** Our Democratic Governor Roy Cooper VETOED this harmful legislation. **_NOW:_** Republicans in the legislature just voted to override the Governor’s veto. This harmful legislation doesn’t represent the will of the people, and it doesn’t represent North Carolina values. That is why I—and the entire North Carolina Senate Democratic Caucus—will continue to fight for reproductive rights. [**We aren’t done fighting. Can you split a $5 donation between North Carolina Senate Democrats and Blue Amp Action to fight back against these extreme Republicans and their attacks on reproductive rights?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td2682f8b-1ed0-4996-9587-44af6204d68c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for standing with us, Sydney Batch
