| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td14b2738-b0f7-4bbf-8d83-052f5fbf24f0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

## CIA Ad Seeks to Hire Russian Spies
The CIA has produced and posted a slick new Russian-language TV spot aimed at recruiting native Russian spies ([Watch here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj01rtDAYAH9Nclt58h0PObywCC-tpbceJZonmhI3i2aV_fdle-51Bgbmqx96n3K6zR9-RVdjGfxU04EDqAszFy4GToOLiBwFRce0lYILphhdXPRSg9Raj8yMFnCS0QZuo4EAXCpNk-PABShmoFUKVINBgbKhNdNoVBsZkYAh1bI13yXd6oIxP8uBWzOVlWa31HrfifhHeEd4d55n8yyP-hjx5V_E12khojuIuL7_f-v66-ce7Ew3F-5nyjnt2hAJ8-pT_k3Wvw9_AgAA__9hTlCb)). The American spy agency first posted the [video on Telegram,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7Fu7CAQAL8GOixY4LALite4u9emtDCs7zbBxjKcrfx9dKnTjTTFaD7u0z1Qpu3xP6zo21KmEBudOEkrlBOgJ-DJL4iAmqNXt95o0Moq_vQ9ajnEJWrbh2jmPkij1U2rOaBO4AwnDxK0tMrJwVppO0xW2j4NLs7ODotiRmKiVo7us9DWnrjk73Li0cWy8uyfre2V6X8MRgbjdV1dnOuGV317BuMbGYyRgjgpYRHHq1YKm6g7YRWvryPQhgxGfvi0X5Qz1ZtjRj7WQPk30v5-_gkAAP___wxYlw) a popular social media platform in Russia, as well as Facebook and Twitter. The ad, titled "Why I made contact with the CIA: My decision," ends with instructions on how to contact the CIA privately and securely.
## ChatGPT CEO Tells Congress He Wants to Be Regulated
Sam Altman, the CEO who oversees ChatGPT, asked Congress [to regulate AI technology](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1ytCAUQJ9GOxx-RKSg-Bq7_dqUzl24uDeDYISsydtnNnXqc4oz5-223oAS5e0_7OhaLCv4Rk9cuWbCMKlW2QcXESWqHp2Y5lFJJbToH85akFYr4NrOd-GjD9EYBdOIahq1mXtykkvFtTDcas31gEFzPQdr_N1oG0U3cgzUyjm8F8rtgTF9lyeegy97n9yjtaN26l8nl04u13UNsXxlvOqLd3I5SqJGvnZyKQdmIOaxsAo7g9R2yAzCTq2yO20b1sYiwsleFmS2FfbxSQ3ZdZa89acLx0UpUZ1MN_JtB0q_Fe3vKT8BAAD__2f7ZPc) to protect people and the economy, saying the technology has the potential to "go quite wrong." In testimony to Congress, Altman called for the [establishment of a new agency](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAQQL_G3ojg8HFmYOiSLV07WhgOmwoby0aJ-vdVOnd8esvT-3pMD59L3pdPv7FrqU4-tPzkSaJQJEBP0EeXmIF1z06ZcdCgFap-dXaUNGtIs00qMA4DKQYtLZtk7MjYZwcStERF0iJKvHFEiWO0FGZCm1Q3SI651fP2XfPeVk7lpz75vIW69cWtrR1Xpz86uHdw98fOr-ut3nC2HAp3cA-rb8vRRD1491kEruLym_ClbX4Xoe7LydclSKdkTTBIKunRR0zRjLOWBARAVvani8crl5IvQ90gl83n8tfR_t_yGwAA__83y2Hv) to license AI technology, with the power to revoke that license if companies didn't abide by government rules.
## Lawyers Claim IRS Ordered to Stop Biden Investigation
The IRS has [disbanded the team](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOpDAQRL_GZD2y2xiGgOASsrn0QmRMe-iTsZHtZcTfr9h4k0pKKtV7_17zy3Lg-P5rdxqrT7N1lU-apQHVA-oZm3X0REi6oVF1z1ajVkY122g00trJVnvT9d7ZJznVdn7xtvU0IDY8okQtjerlYIw0D1qNNM916N3Sm8Er0Upauab8-J841o18uNJJ-eHS3oRxq_UoQv8ROAmc4nWkUu9K4HQPC5ykETipOzgXcDYW4HhSqfy2NwZUsjv4nHbYvmKlDAuvFOHIaSHgCHs6CT4blxpoCelDGVywvBfgAi6QzeGCTNUGtjXlS-DU5HE9PhwCl64XrXzvlsPP4_q7wO8AAAD__-HydC0) investigating tax fraud claims against Hunter Biden as retribution against the whistleblower leading the team, say lawyers for the whistleblower. In a letter sent to Congress, the lawyers claim the team was disbanded by [order of the Justice Department.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uxCAQBp_G7rD4OYyvoEjj7tKmtDCszxthsGBjkrePLnXqT_o0Mx-P5eEwYnq-uwMsbXlxnvCChWsmDJNqkX2wG4AE1YMV43RTUgkt-t0KD8Jo7YURegzScSUdFxMf9Tptq5c9Wsml4loYftea6wGC5noKd-NXo--b6G4cAlIuw2fGRDts8SdfUAafjz7aneisnXrr5NzJubU2bPk7QauvvZPzmSMS-trJGUtlBY58QWWQCAswTBdUwqd7-TACd7D9KxEUtmKAxM6SV2Btx0oR1pgbFOajw-P1RC6iI8yJFThzob7YcDaMEetouht_Hg7jHyb9X-03AAD__wyfcxc) If the move came as retribution against the whistleblower, it would be illegal under federal law. Details beyond the letter itself remain sparse. One legal scholar argues that an ongoing ["media blackout"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGymzAQAL9GdMdIBzJQUKShc9qUjEAnc46QGHE443z9G7_6Ndvuzv65z3fHkdPjt9tplJBntwq_aNYWTAfYzFj5MRAhNRWN5ta3DTbGmmobe7y1vvUDra0b0NPSI3WGsF2WYLvBVTyixkZb0-nBWm1r8lbb3g_dunR2CEa1mjxLLvUzc5KNQnznF5V6zXsVx03kOFXzS-GkcHrm5GRzSa4S6V3n8lA4fQQKJ20VTuYDt1Ph1Z1wihOCnTw7kI1giW79my-BnGBhTwnWXMp1COcEfIKUK77huCLLfyoQ6UURTrlCUDhVZfTHP46Rz1unWv3YHcfvSvl52lcAAAD__6FNb64) has made it difficult to get to the truth on issues relating to the Biden family.

Today we’re covering the CIA’s TV spot to hire Russian spies, Martha Stuart on the Sports Illustrated Swimsuit cover, and a driver who told police it was his dog who was driving drunk. Want to stay informed throughout the day? and stay in touch. | CIA Ad Seeks to Hire Russian Spies The CIA has produced and posted a slick new Russian-language TV spot aimed at recruiting native Russian spies (). The American spy agency first posted the a popular social media platform in Russia, as well as Facebook and Twitter. The ad, titled "Why I made contact with the CIA: My decision," ends with instructions on how to contact the CIA privately and securely. ChatGPT CEO Tells Congress He Wants to Be Regulated Sam Altman, the CEO who oversees ChatGPT, asked Congress to protect people and the economy, saying the technology has the potential to "go quite wrong." In testimony to Congress, Altman called for the to license AI technology, with the power to revoke that license if companies didn't abide by government rules. Lawyers Claim IRS Ordered to Stop Biden Investigation The IRS has investigating tax fraud claims against Hunter Biden as retribution against the whistleblower leading the team, say lawyers for the whistleblower. In a letter sent to Congress, the lawyers claim the team was disbanded by If the move came as retribution against the whistleblower, it would be illegal under federal law. Details beyond the letter itself remain sparse. One legal scholar argues that an ongoing has made it difficult to get to the truth on issues relating to the Biden family. ➤ New York City 's plan to house migrants in school gyms has sparked a storm of protest by parents against Mayor Eric Adams, who says the housing is meant to be temporary. Adams says the ongoing wave of migrants flooding into New York has forced unpopular solutions. () ➤ Allies of former VP Mike Pence have created a super PAC to raise money for a potential presidential run. Pence has signaled that he plans to challenge his former boss, Donald Trump, in the 2024 election. The opposing camps of two Dem candidates created a chaotic uproar on the stage, injuring at least two people. () ➤ Olympic gold-medal figure skater Sarah Hughes has announced plans to run for Congress in New York against incumbent Republican Anthony D’Esposito. Hughes won the skating gold medal in the 2002 Winter Olympics. body:
The FBI launched the investigation with ZERO justification.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a2a90cdb5b89417c9e665fd82f278120&_e=uqUhFKX44r4moFxUDosjBw4DhNIiwSe5BpmJmFHzzoynYqOm6HlUVqSLAGPKMUZ5yQHpuCV4EP8gDujDseZqw5Qhq-NSP89ebjErIVhtS7HH_7B55P-yX-edMu9Nj-ErDhyoRCUJPcku5fd__58yAzqblyEneBLCs8sxaWqcdVaOiTe9W7Fe09VfG8_oRMnedWCEimt_InCVfSMUKUSFbjTiWtOvHItnXb8N6fcqKVb3TQNVVeUuhhOP_E3qdxWQ)

Hello Friend,

The Durham Report reveals what we knew all along - **Russiagate is a political crime syndicate, the FBI rigged our elections, and they unlawfully targeted President Trump.**

_The FBI launched the investigation with**ZERO justification**._ Even CNN has to report that on their fake news website.

It was 5 years ago that I led the House investigation into Russiagate with Devin Nunes. Our report from then says the exact same thing as the Durham Report. The FBI had ZERO justification for going after President Trump. But for 5 years, the fake news media lied to the American public.

**Make no mistake:** The DOJ and FBI conspired with the fake news media to bury the truth.

America cannot let this happen again.

After serving under President Trump, I created the Kash Foundation. **The Kash Foundation provides legal aid to veterans, American-first patriots, and whistle-blowers fighting to expose the Deep State corruption.** We fund litigation grants for individuals who have been wronged, release documentation exposing government corruption, and call out each government operator that betrayed their oath of office.

I am on a mission to _**defeat**_ the Government Gangsters who robbed the American people of justice.

Now more than ever, I am counting on your support.

name: Our Time To Run Team
subject: Get Your 20-Day FREE Trial Today!
body:
Our Time To Run is here to support your ambition for running for elected office
| |
---
Hello ! Sometimes it feels like the world has gone a little crazy, right? Do you often wonder why political leaders make the choices they do, when you believe they could do better? You can do better. We know the importance of everyday Americans like you running for political offices, and that's why we started Our Time To Run.
---
At [Our Time To Run](https://nje015.keap-link014.com/v2/click/42bd152cc68124b50cdbc2c63ede362f/eJyNj00LgkAQQP_LnEXty8xbiIhoHaLOITrQls4u65iI-N_bPvBU0HXmzRveAIyUEyclBEBXdGcrsEBjIZRA4lAS58Vru1zMPdeCStAt1rJVEAxfbyfgOfZ9C7hXaIDjYRumyT4-Z8k-NZzKtXnwl8Vbb_z5JIp22ySDcfxpxlpwdDfyBgLWLT57SmGa-KQrw1-YVRM4Ttd1tmw1ixpZ6pbsQtbOVQoyjlwppPKTn2L_No0PawJjZg==), we believe that the best way to create a better America is by empowering everyday citizens to take an active role in shaping their communities. By running for political office, you have the opportunity to make a real difference in the lives of the people around you, and to help create a future that reflects your values and priorities.
---
Unfortunately, too many people are deterred from running for office because they believe that it is too difficult, too expensive, or too time-consuming. That's where [Our Time To Run](https://nje015.keap-link014.com/v2/click/d76ab8fc13b7048b4f5ab0fc9012ddac/eJyNj0sLglAQhf_LrEXtZelORES0FlHrEB3oms69XMdEwv_e7UGrgrZzvvMN5waMVBCnFQRANbqzFVigsRRKIHEkiYvymS4Xc8-1oBF0SbTsFQS3r90P8Dj7psGjQgMc9mGUpbvklKe7zHCq0ObBXxZv7W_mH1G8DdMcpumnGVvB8dXIOwhY9_jYUwmziY-6MfyZWXWB4wzDYMtes2iRpe7JLmXr1FKQcRRKIVXv-RmOL9N0B2VaY18=) comes in. We provide expert education and resources to help you learn everything you need to know about running for office, no matter what type of office or where in the country you are located.
---
Our program is designed to give you a detailed roadmap of what needs to be done to run for elected office, including how to get started, how to build a strong campaign team, how to develop a winning message, and how to navigate the complexities of campaign finance and election laws.
---
We also provide a supportive community of like-minded individuals who are committed to building a better America. Our network includes experienced political operatives, campaign consultants, and elected officials who are eager to share their knowledge and expertise with you.
---
So if you are ready to take the first step in your journey towards running for office, we invite you to [join the Our Time To Run community for 20 Days Completely Free!](https://nje015.keap-link014.com/v2/click/58357f21ca3f51ac646caddf32eeae4a/eJyNj8EKgkAQQP9lzqJmZelNJGKxPESdQ3SgtZxdtjGJ8N9bKzwVdJ1584b3AEYqiEUFMVCN_mQODhgspZZInCrionxtZ9Mg9B24SDqvjWo1xI-vtyMwjKOZA3zXaIH9Lkkzka-PG5FnltOFsQ_-soSLaBmMotU2ERvo-59mbCSvblZ-hZhNi0NPJW0TH8zF8idmfY09r-s6V7WGZYOsTEtuqRqvVpKso9AaqfrkZ3h_m_onaJZjYw==) Together, we can help you find your voice and give you the tools you need to live in a world built by you.
---
Best regards,
---
**Our Time To Run Team**
info@ourtimetorun.com
---

I’ve been fighting for those values since day one. And I’m so grateful to come to you today as your Republican nominee for Governor! We have the right message. We have all of the momentum. I just need your help so we can celebrate another BIG WIN this November.

Peter,
At the end of March – the first quarterly deadline of the year – we really turned on the jets and finished the quarter strong. And I have you to thank for that. I asked you for your support – and you came through.

I sincerely appreciate all of your help.

As you can see below, we’re going to need every donation we can get, so I am not going to be shy about asking for your help.
[](https://1776pac.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=e1cfcd5a0e&e=84ee529f47)
We’re finding ourselves almost a million behind Aspen Adam, and the liberal Democrats have committed millions upon millions of dollars to target my district.

They want me out, and they want it bad.

The only way that we will stop them is if grassroots conservatives like you, Joey, come together to say NO to their radical woke money.

[**So as we face our May Mid-Month deadline, can I ask you to chip in a quick donation to help us get back some momentum?**](https://1776pac.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=7957719519&e=84ee529f47)

It's happening now. See below for a screenshot of what Democrats are already running in Texas. Their plan is perfectly clear: Flip Texas blue, and transform the Lone Star State into a state of complete leftwing misery. Let 's show them right now that it's not going to happen! NOTE: the graphic above is what we've already seen from Democrats on social media. Texas is their target. Our mission is to KEEP TEXAS RED and to SAVE AMERICA from their toxic vision. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Stop taxpayer support for greedy food corporations
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1776022?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Tell President Biden to STOP spending BILLIONS every year supporting a DESTRUCTIVE and UNJUST food system!**[**Act now!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1776023?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) Multinational corporations are DECIMATING small farms and family-owned businesses by producing _**low-quality, processed food**_ for cheap. These meals aren’t just bad for your health -- they also _**degrade the environment**_ and are often _**produced by factory farms that subject animals to cruelty.**_ But the **federal government actively supports the corporations crushing small and sustainable farms** by purchasing billions of dollars’ worth of food from Big Ag corporations every year. **With a single stroke of his pen, President Biden could fix this problem. [Tell President Biden to implement food service guidelines to PROTECT the planet, small farms, and the health of MILLIONS of people by 11:59pm TONIGHT! >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1776024?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1776025?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The U.S. federal government is the LARGEST purchaser of food in the world and wields enormous influence over the food system. Imagine the transformation of our polluting, unsustainable food system that could take place if President Biden chose to use **YOUR TAX DOLLARS** to support ethical companies instead.
A food system that prioritizes the health of people and the planet is within reach, Friend. But taxpayer money currently supports companies that only care about their own bottom lines. **President Biden could change that in an instant -- but we need your help to convince him! [Please, Friend, take immediate action to STOP the BILLIONS of taxpayer dollars going to greedy multinational food companies!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1776026?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) **
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1776025?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Chloë Waterman
Climate-friendly food senior program manager,
Friends of the Earth**
|

subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWj8qqcDXN

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest
Christians.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWj8qqcDXN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Friend,

I've
always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted
to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced
persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But,
beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early
Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed.
I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the
complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap
in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and
spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To
uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest
online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May
23.

In this
course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first
four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways
the new faith transformed the Roman world.

You can
watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today
using the secure link below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61812934:Wj8qqcDXN:m:3:2532013465:73157A74FDA2D53213A11B99ACCD10A4:r

I hope
you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the
first Christians.

Best
regards,

Kyle
Murnen, '09
Director
of Online Learning
Hillsdale
College

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Colin Allred
subject: I’m running to defeat Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to
defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of
Texas.

Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our
razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of
the most vulnerable Senators in the country!

That’s why I need you with me: Please, will you split $25 or whatever you
can spare between my campaign and Charles Booker to help reach our daily
goal of $150,000? [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18958?t=1001&akid=3242%2E346206%2EzDvSA1 ]Every dollar you can spare will help us build a
people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our
Senate majority. Please donate now →

I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My
mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends
meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers,
coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football
scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I
wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what
I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly
served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas,
where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the
opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the
fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an
11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in
2018.

Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t
be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted
Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz
– when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you.
But I can’t get there alone:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18958?t=1002&akid=3242%2E346206%2EzDvSA1 ]That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding
donor of my campaign. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots
movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it.
Please, split $25 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and
Charles Booker to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our
Democratic Senate majority →

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way
to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230517-3242-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3242_346206_zDvSA1&akid=3242%2E346206%2EzDvSA1

clean_body: Peter, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas. Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country! That’s why I need you with me: Please, will you split $25 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Charles Booker to help reach our daily goal of $150,000? [ ]Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. Please donate now → I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL. But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family. I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018. Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone: [ ]That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $25 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Charles Booker to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority → Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing. Let’s do this, Colin Allred Contribute to Charles Booker:

name: United Rural Democrats
subject: Wall Street won't tell you this, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
Democrats are leading the charge.

| |
---
Hi Peter, You won't hear this from Wall Street, but the success of our country depends on investing in rural America. 1 in 5 Americans live in rural communities, but they're often left out of the political and economic equation, lacking investment that will spur job creation and growth. **Democrats are partially to blame too – in the past, we've let Republicans build decades of political capital in rural areas without offering folks a compelling alternative. That ends now.** In the past year, Democrats have announced more than $1 billion in investments for the food industry, millions of dollars in small business loans for rural entrepreneurs, job training programs, and $2 billion in expanding access to reliable, high-speed internet. United Rural Democrats is backing Democratic candidates who are bringing these investments, changes and progress to rural towns across the country. **But winning in rural areas takes more than changemakers running for office. It means organizing a Democratic infrastructure that will _last_.** URD is showing up for rural communities all year round, no matter the election cycle, to build relationships with voters, leaders, and neighbors. [**_The GOP has had more than five decades to build trust with rural America, but their policy promises have failed to materialize. We need your help, Peter, to elect Democrats who will bring investment and change to rural communities. Will you chip in $5 or more to make sure we can continue securing wins for Democrats and all Americans?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63403524/406671722/1646350971?refcode=230517_urd_investinrural_l1&ms=230517_urd_investinrural&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDFhOGFjYjktYWZmNC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=P-O9CPDshlpeO0zHhB14BAkBHgMsTJTV1BoY7i2P5dg=) clean_body: Democrats are leading the charge. | | Hi Peter, You won't hear this from Wall Street, but the success of our country depends on investing in rural America. 1 in 5 Americans live in rural communities, but they're often left out of the political and economic equation, lacking investment that will spur job creation and growth. Democrats are partially to blame too – in the past, we've let Republicans build decades of political capital in rural areas without offering folks a compelling alternative. That ends now. In the past year, Democrats have announced more than $1 billion in investments for the food industry, millions of dollars in small business loans for rural entrepreneurs, job training programs, and $2 billion in expanding access to reliable, high-speed internet. United Rural Democrats is backing Democratic candidates who are bringing these investments, changes and progress to rural towns across the country. But winning in rural areas takes more than changemakers running for office. It means organizing a Democratic infrastructure that will last. URD is showing up for rural communities all year round, no matter the election cycle, to build relationships with voters, leaders, and neighbors. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = Thank you for your support. \- United Rural Democrats | United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue? = = PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . subject: this is why I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Hi, friend, I wanted to tell you why I'm running for Senate, but I know you're busy, so I'll keep this short.
1.
As
a
father,
I'm
running
to
build
a
better
world
for
my
kids
and
yours,
to
create
more
opportunities
for
them
and
their
peers
to
succeed
and
to
ensure
our
country
lives
up
to
its
promises
for
the
next
generation.

2.
As
a
Texan,
I've
watched
Ted
Cruz
fail
our
state
for
more
than
a
decade,
doing
what's
best
for
Ted
Cruz
and
not
for
Texas
families.
I'm
running
to
be
a
voice
for
Texans
in
the
Senate,
and
I
promise
to
always
put
you
first.

3.
As
a
civil
rights
attorney,
I'm
running
to
defend
our
fundamental
rights.
Ted
Cruz
and
his
allies
are
waging
an
all-out
war
on
our
right
to
vote,
which
is
the
basis
for
all
other
rights.
Expanding
our
Democratic
Senate
majority
is
our
best
hope
of
stopping
them.
If you're with me in this fight, I'm humbly asking: Will you please split $25 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and friend’s campaign to raise $50,000 before midnight? Every dollar helps as we work to unseat Ted Cruz, protect the Senate and build a better future for our families. → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Thank you so much, I'm glad to have you on this team.
Colin Allred

clean_body: Hi, friend, I wanted to tell you why I'm running for Senate, but I know you're busy, so I'll keep this short. 1. As a father, I'm running to build a better world for my kids and yours, to create more opportunities for them and their peers to succeed and to ensure our country lives up to its promises for the next generation. 2. As a Texan, I've watched Ted Cruz fail our state for more than a decade, doing what's best for Ted Cruz and not for Texas families. I'm running to be a voice for Texans in the Senate, and I promise to always put you first. 3. As a civil rights attorney, I'm running to defend our fundamental rights. Ted Cruz and his allies are waging an all-out war on our right to vote, which is the basis for all other rights. Expanding our Democratic Senate majority is our best hope of stopping them. If you're with me in this fight, I'm humbly asking: Will you please split $25 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and friend’s campaign to raise $50,000 before midnight? Every dollar helps as we work to unseat Ted Cruz, protect the Senate and build a better future for our families. → [] Thank you so much, I'm glad to have you on this team. Colin Allred [] DONATE [] [] [] [] [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . name: =?utf-8?Q?Greg=20Wheeler?=
subject: Rep. Syke asked the U.S. DOJ to investigate Akron police
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Greg Wheeler]( "Paid for by Vote Greg Wheeler")
body:
My thoughts on that | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/84f632a817d2/im-announcing-my-run-for-us-congress-5811713?e=d6699466fe)
---
| | [ ](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=40cbdeea97&e=d6699466fe)
---
| Peter,
---
| | Recently an Ohio grand jury voted against indicting the police officers involved in the incident that led to Jayland Walker’s death in 2021.

My incumbent opponent is calling for the U.S. DOJ **_to investigate the Akron police_** following the grand jury’s decision, by casting aspersions through a **one-sided summary of events** outlining the actions of law enforcement in the line of duty.

**This request by my opponent woefully disregards the full scope of evidence surrounding this case. **

The facts of the case reveal that Walker was depressed, recently purchased and learned how to use a firearm, had spoken to a police officer friend about how get police to shoot at your or _‘suicide by police’_. Walker instigated a police chase _the day before the shooting_. On the day of the shooting, Walker instigated a second police chase and fired from his car at police during the pursuit. At that point, Walker became a fleeing felon.

When he fled on foot, he was still a fleeing felon.

While any loss of life is tragic, we must also recognize that police officers often face split-second decisions in high-pressure situations, and their actions are judged based on a standard of reasonableness given the circumstances. The grand jury thoroughly reviewed all the available evidence, including witness statements, video footage, and forensic analysis, before making their decision finding that the officers acted in accordance with their training and protocols, and that their use of force was justified under the law.

My incumbent opponent’s lack of circumspection regarding _the full body of evidence is egregious_ , and foments race-based conflict and the erosion of respect for those who daily put their lives at risk to maintain law and order. _Her errors of omission also include a call for more community based policing._

**We must take a stand to ensure that Ohio’s cities do not become like Chicago, Philadelphia, New York, and Seattle due to the Radical Left’s systematic dismantling of our nation’s traditions of law and order.**

When the people of Ohio send me to DC to defend their Constitutional rights, they will have a public servant who will faithfully attend to the facts _from all sides_ before [pitting misinformed constituents](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=08812d3f54&e=d6699466fe) against those who courageously fend off violent and anarchist behaviors that threaten the peace in our communities.
---
| Respectfully,
---
| [ ](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=1d212cd8aa&e=d6699466fe)
---

clean_body: My thoughts on that | | | | | | Peter, | | Recently an Ohio grand jury voted against indicting the police officers involved in the incident that led to Jayland Walker’s death in 2021. My incumbent opponent is calling for the U.S. DOJ to investigate the Akron police following the grand jury’s decision, by casting aspersions through a one-sided summary of events outlining the actions of law enforcement in the line of duty. This request by my opponent woefully disregards the full scope of evidence surrounding this case. The facts of the case reveal that Walker was depressed, recently purchased and learned how to use a firearm, had spoken to a police officer friend about how get police to shoot at your or ‘suicide by police’. Walker instigated a police chase the day before the shooting. On the day of the shooting, Walker instigated a second police chase and fired from his car at police during the pursuit. At that point, Walker became a fleeing felon. When he fled on foot, he was still a fleeing felon. While any loss of life is tragic, we must also recognize that police officers often face split-second decisions in high-pressure situations, and their actions are judged based on a standard of reasonableness given the circumstances. The grand jury thoroughly reviewed all the available evidence, including witness statements, video footage, and forensic analysis, before making their decision finding that the officers acted in accordance with their training and protocols, and that their use of force was justified under the law. My incumbent opponent’s lack of circumspection regarding the full body of evidence is egregious , and foments race-based conflict and the erosion of respect for those who daily put their lives at risk to maintain law and order. Her errors of omission also include a call for more community based policing. We must take a stand to ensure that Ohio’s cities do not become like Chicago, Philadelphia, New York, and Seattle due to the Radical Left’s systematic dismantling of our nation’s traditions of law and order. When the people of Ohio send me to DC to defend their Constitutional rights, they will have a public servant who will faithfully attend to the facts from all sides before against those who courageously fend off violent and anarchist behaviors that threaten the peace in our communities. | Respectfully, | | Greg Wheeler Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress, OH-13 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | "Paid for by Vote Greg Wheeler" | | Copyright © 2023 The Committee To Elect Greg Wheeler, All rights reserved.

name: JAMES JUDGE
subject: WATCH: We’re Helping to Defund Left-Wing PBS
body:
Taxpayer-funded PBS is trying to indoctrinate our children with its “LGBTQ+ toolkit.”
| | | |
---
| Dear Friends,
Taxpayer-funded PBS is trying to indoctrinate our children with its "LGBTQ+ toolkit."
Thankfully, Citizens Defending Freedom is leading the charge to defund PBS.
In case you missed it, Fox News wrote about our efforts [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SEvTSFQlz890F3gNrXHYe676TXDKBlYawTGUslpcYYDh7agDEycTsySwA5zT1IvjxfkH2ed5Hkxh8QIO-skb6SIRK_NvikBRuPpHCSjmp3mtY8-qoevNdKrI06Yly-PH5DtTPMl84ZPW-zwEoML8T_YN-pfng64Z2EboL4W8uQbMEaF3VyrRGQtQe-gqb4dL1-aRQ4zQLUB-ej1zh_BxOl2UzHYrtsRO66kWIJXCqs_OMtXexvAnpqSMPEwa2t3oiliF-bnn6RUNKymEURv_Ug==&c=5lpt8-fayh_-xpp-QgOG3lilWyItqeXapnXbTDfj9a7vtLevvvW8hQ==&ch=-Uo_wA3Lg3y5vuUyuEbTQMCLGv28FXxjl29QQeHOZnTcnc6CK-J7wQ==).
Two days after we called PBS out for indoctrinating children, Oklahoma Gov. Kevin Stitt vetoed a bill that would use tax dollars to fund PBS.
Check out a highlight of our recent podcast segment where we explain more here:

---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SEvTSFQlz890F3gNrXHYe676TXDKBlYawTGUslpcYYDh7agDEycTsySwA5zT1IvjnCr16JgkoJ9PsOpTfgs6ZLrFWRdxAs20QzWoCjL5FHG5Qn61b4h0qMhrUbeYAqO3TPhI_rU2vODo-uCaM4XZPbfG_XimZd0tbmvlGsLjGvOZUJYIf0v0OFv5T76dCMAzXoqQF1Gkz3ciT9Mk7zi7Eyup_NlU0xeeBJztuRaQqUg=&c=5lpt8-fayh_-xpp-QgOG3lilWyItqeXapnXbTDfj9a7vtLevvvW8hQ==&ch=-Uo_wA3Lg3y5vuUyuEbTQMCLGv28FXxjl29QQeHOZnTcnc6CK-J7wQ==)

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Vote Chris Brown - Public Service Commissioner
body:
|
---
| | |
---
| _Many of you have asked for recommendations on the elections coming up August 8th. The primary elections are some of the most important elections because many voters skip the primary elections thinking they are unimportant.__The Public Service Commissioner is more important than many realize because the Biden Administration has targeted our energy grid and seems determined to destroy our way of life.__Chris Brown is a founding member of the Mississippi Freedom Caucus and has a proven conservative record. I urge you to support him both financially and with your vote on August 8.__Below is a message from Chris. Learn more about Chris at_ _****_[_**www.chrisbrown4ms.com**_](https://www.chrisbrown4ms.com/) _Dana_
---
| | |
---
| Dear Friends,Our campaign for the Public Service Commission in the Northern District of Mississippi is showing significant momentum. In recent polling, I received over 25% of the vote, with my opponent only having 11%. This poll is a clear sign that the people of Mississippi want a proven conservative leader who will stand up to the Radical Left’s agenda.The standards for the decisions I’ve made in Mississippi’s State House are the same standards I’ll hold as Public Service Commissioner:Does it put Mississippi and America **FIRST**?Does it enhance the quality of life for Mississippians?Does it fit our Mississippi Values?Joe Biden and Washington Democrats have an America-last approach that has put American families in the worst possible positions. The cost of living is outrageous, wokeness has taken over, and American energy independence has become taboo. As a businessman, I am for keeping all options regarding our energy needs on the table. I want Mississippi to be on the cutting edge in this space. At the same time, we must use common sense to keep rates low. Mississippi families deserve real solutions now.[**Will you help keep Joe Biden’s anti-American policies out of Mississippi?**](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/DV5KH1qVq6up2432tGNIfg)The people of Mississippi have spoken, and they’re on our side. We’re well on our way to being nominated. Still, we must ensure we continue to do the work necessary to finish strong. [Will you help us stand strong with a donation of $1,000, $500, $250, or anything you can contribute today?](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/DV5KH1qVq6up2432tGNIfg)Sincerely,|
---

Chris
| You are receiving this email because you signed up for alerts from Mississippi Freedom Caucus.
Click [here](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/-7ymgC7tnNADvyZ50YSzdQ) to unsubscribe from this mailing list.

---
| | [ ](https://www.votervoice.net)
---

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Study Ancient Christianity
body:
I’ve always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zr26frc138d0ip46f7jdjn1fmnut6pt2q8499vlo_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpgmcpr4c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

** [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjq8s5h37e2pkrjtqkena9oj54dfla5b60ghnk9g_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpgmcpr4c3h2bs)
[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z96rds055joblje6bo2rr43e9goo23r8l0eqa798_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpgmcpr4c3h2bs)

I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pro Life Update
---

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Urgent Campaign Update from Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
Urgent message from Ted Cruz to all supporters and staff...

| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0mg80q6vd42371nsdl68e1hrbf2fk3p1tm3qvh0_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpgmcpr2chh2bs)
---
Fellow Conservative **Here is the situation:** As you have heard, Rep. Colin Allred, a hardcore liberal, has just announced he is running against me in my United States Senate race in Texas. Who is he? He is a far-left Democrat. As a member of Congress, he has voted with Nancy Pelosi an astonishing 100% of the time. What that means is on every issue Texans care about, **he's voted wrong**. So he's voted for open borders over and over again. He's voted for higher taxes over and over again. He's voted for 87,000 new IRS agents. He's voted for massive new regulations. He's voted for the Biden administration's assault on oil, gas and energy production here in Texas and all over the United States. **This race is going to be one hell of a fight...** My last Senate reelection was in 2018. In 2018, it was the most expensive Senate race in the history of our nation in terms of hard money. We were outspent three to one. They absolutely flooded the zone with money and media. **And let me tell you what Democrats did in 2018--** They increased Democrat turnout in the state of Texas, from 1.8 million, all the way up to 4 million, where they more than doubled Democrat turnout in Texas. Now, we saw that coming and we leaned in hard. We increased Republican turnout from 2.8 million, all the way up to 4.2 million. But point two was the whole margin we had- we won by 200,000 votes out of more than 8 million votes cast- that shows the kind of battle it's going to be... Texas is the single biggest prize for Democrats in the country. It's not rocket science, if you're a Democrat, after Donald Trump, there is no Republican in the country you want to beat more than me. _They're going to_ __flood the state with cash__ _trying_ to flip Texas blue- and it has already begun... It’s just been a few days since Allred announced he’s running against me in 2024. **But he’s already raised $2 MILLION, setting a new 2024 fundraising record.** Democrats are all in. **I need your strong and generous support to fight back- just like we did in 2018. I need your help more than ever before. And I’m asking you to please step up right now >>**
---
[**MAKE AN EMERGENCY DONATION TO TED CRUZ >>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5n8398lchqcgc7gavsod0o0op6milsfv6ujb5io_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpgmcpr2chh2bs)
---
Thanks for your help at this crucial moment. For Liberty,

So he's voted for open borders over and over again. He's voted for higher taxes over and over again. He's voted for 87,000 new IRS agents. He's voted for massive new regulations. He's voted for the Biden administration's assault on oil, gas and energy production here in Texas and all over the United States. This race is going to be one hell of a fight... My last Senate reelection was in 2018. In 2018, it was the most expensive Senate race in the history of our nation in terms of hard money. We were outspent three to one. They absolutely flooded the zone with money and media. And let me tell you what Democrats did in 2018-- They increased Democrat turnout in the state of Texas, from 1.8 million, all the way up to 4 million, where they more than doubled Democrat turnout in Texas. Now, we saw that coming and we leaned in hard. We increased Republican turnout from 2.8 million, all the way up to 4.2 million. But point two was the whole margin we had- we won by 200,000 votes out of more than 8 million votes cast- that shows the kind of battle it's going to be... Texas is the single biggest prize for Democrats in the country. It's not rocket science, if you're a Democrat, after Donald Trump, there is no Republican in the country you want to beat more than me. They're going to flood the state with cash trying to flip Texas blue- and it has already begun... It’s just been a few days since Allred announced he’s running against me in 2024. But he’s already raised $2 MILLION, setting a new 2024 fundraising record. Democrats are all in. I need your strong and generous support to fight back- just like we did in 2018. I need your help more than ever before. And I’m asking you to please step up right now >> Thanks for your help at this crucial moment. For Liberty, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | id:2023-05-08-11:23:00:568t | Trump Train News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Friend,
Honestly, I’m used to all of the many attacks from our enemies.
That’s the battle I signed up for. It’s part of the job.
_...But a line is crossed when they attack**YOU.**_
**The Left is now shamelessly attacking the _innocent AUDIENCE_ members at my CNN town hall who were cheering, applauding, and laughing.**
That perfectly sums up the nasty Left.
For all of their phony cries about the “end of democracy,” Democrats don’t want you to have the right to make up YOUR own mind and have YOUR own voice.
_But very soon, you will once again have a President who respects YOUR rights and will always put YOU first._
**Now, let’s show our many enemies that they cannot silence the greatest political movement in history.**

clean_body: It’s one thing if they come after me. But I won’t let them attack you. | | | Friend, Honestly, I’m used to all of the many attacks from our enemies. That’s the battle I signed up for. It’s part of the job. ...But a line is crossed when they attackYOU. The Left is now shamelessly attacking the innocent AUDIENCE members at my CNN town hall who were cheering, applauding, and laughing. That perfectly sums up the nasty Left. For all of their phony cries about the “end of democracy,” Democrats don’t want you to have the right to make up YOUR own mind and have YOUR own voice. But very soon, you will once again have a President who respects YOUR rights and will always put YOU first. Now, let’s show our many enemies that they cannot silence the greatest political movement in history. Thank you, | Donald J. body:
Elections are just months away, and we still don’t have nationwide voter ID
| You need an ID to do almost everything in America - but not to vote? Elections across the country are just months away, and we STILL don’t have nationwide VOTER ID. It’s insane. That’s why we’re asking you right here, right now to answer this one question: [**Do you support voter ID in EVERY state across the country?**](https://email.updates.electcommonsense.com/c/eJw8kcGOmzAQhp9muBHBmBhy4LAbhFql6q2t1AsyniFYxcbCZtN9-8o0uwdfvvn_0Xyysn4x03sL9SsgzoYCIIJ4AcR9lL_tj5fm8Zr_veX2209OI7wCYnz3_Jl7rjixVWZJtO4yait9mUhl3JayqYQoqrrJ5lYjkyybiZqGCJUgKbGhsqDiPOqCx8y0WKAozmVdClEhnsriIpvLOMp6nKYzT1AVuycVOZx4YR31au3qArvAJ73abGnnGH04TusB-8B63_j0MG5jSgnA_ijm_5v5UQXs39bIW24onycQ_R7tYJnMbkF0TzOZYFj3TTOIznk1pDdPz4lW1itzdyC6D4eBdRiOxYbyt3KYp4M4rz46q4vsIoiOVqciA0pl1_0gLoW2dP5m3B1EF7c9BQa3GALRXeXtOn-5afvrgMffie7P96_30mdbS_5hlsUEWUNV3JNBsv8XAAD__-1_n9g)

name: Granite Solutions Press
subject: RELEASE: Democrat Aligned Lobbying Organizations Offer to Fund House Democrat Travel Expenses
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:**
May 17, 2023
---
| | **CONTACT:** Rep. Joe Sweeneyinfo@GraniteSolutions.org
---
| **Democrat Aligned Lobbying Organizations Offer to Fund House Democrat Travel Expenses
**
---
**Salem, NH -** Granite Solutions Chairman and State Representative Joe Sweeney (R-Salem) released the following statement after Democrat leaning lobbying organizations publicly confirmed their practice of funding Democrat House Members' travel expenses to the New Hampshire State House for legislative session days:

"I am appalled. Democrat aligned lobbying organizations have publicly confirmed their practice of funding Democrat House Members' travel expenses for legislative session days at the New Hampshire State House. This revelation raises alarming questions about the potential influence of outside groups on our legislative process and the independence of our elected representatives. By directly financing travel expenses, these organizations undermine the impartiality and integrity of our democratic system, eroding public trust in the decision-making process. It raises the question of how many House Democrats have had travel or other life expenses funded by lobbyist organizations in order to attend session days. We must prioritize the transparency, accountability, and independence of our elected officials. Let us restore faith in our legislature and reaffirm our commitment to serving the people who have entrusted us with their representation."

###**
****BACKGROUND:** The now deleted tweet from lobbying organization founder Linds Jakows offering to pay for travel expenses for Democrat Representative Robin Vogt (D-Portsmouth):

clean_body: We have to defend and act now!| | | My friend, the Democrats know that any path for them to take back the U.S. House from Republican control has to go through Minnesota. In the first quarter of 2023, the Democrats have stockpiled a war chest of funds totaling nearly $38 MILLION to target Republican districts across America. They want to reclaim the House, but to do that they MUST win seats like MN-01. It's our job to make sure they fail! | | | | | We MUST show Democrats we will not stand for their liberal ideology in Minnesota. They can build their war chest with funds from wealthy out of state left-wing donors, but – with your help – we can push back and show them we are NOT scared of their liberal rhetoric. The Democrat's path to take back the House must lead through Minnesota, but we can stop them by defending seats like MN-01. I've seen first-hand how successful Republicans can be when we unite and fight, Thank you, Brad Finstad | | | | | | | | ---|---|---

name: ICYMI News
subject: Study Ancient Christianity
body:
I’ve always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

| This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbp4hi0odhi0j4jcmi8ebkbo72tmh8a7hjag2pco_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpgm6ob2cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:**

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zeuv7p24mnanvstmrq8sjh4u09ev7kdag94ucmq8_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpgm6ob2cjh2bs)**
I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

ICYMI News
---

subject: Biological men in women’s sports

body:
Female athletes are one step closer to being able to compete against other biological females – but the Democrat majority in the Senate stands in the way.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=75b62e59d40e443aa97f2f8818232f76&_t=ZGKkKzj8APph3kjer70dWdi5Zb3rbDLY-XF9fSWucrYkt2RnewZsJQRm0BOR_Ideb7-Php5HbwFiHK5vb6Dgu1ecZu9_dCJ1XD1Sp3eNS-E%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=75b62e59d40e443aa97f2f8818232f76&_t=ZGKkKzj8APph3kjer70dWdi5Zb3rbDLY-XF9fSWucrYkt2RnewZsJQRm0BOR_Ideb7-Php5HbwFiHK5vb6Dgu1ecZu9_dCJ1XD1Sp3eNS-E%3D)

|
Peter,

Last month, the U.S. House voted to ban transgender individuals from competing against biological females in sports leagues from the college level down.

**The action taken by the House is a major victory for current and former female athletes** , many of whom fought for decades against discrimination to achieve parity with their male counterparts. The recent presence of transgender individuals in women’s sports is an afront to the generations of women who trained mercilessly to perfect their craft.

My Democrat opponent doesn’t agree. He could have broken with his Democrat colleagues and voted to keep men from competing against female athletes, but **he’s a progressive to the core and seemed to reason that it’s better to pass a bill that puts female athletes at risk rather than upset special interests’ lobbies in D.C**.

**I can tell you this** : I won’t hesitate to cast a vote in the U.S. Senate that protects female athletes from having to compete with biological males. And guess what? **Until Republicans retake the majority, the bill protecting female athletes that the House passed is dead on arrival in the Senate**.

**As a father of a daughter myself,** I will unequivocally support legislation that bans biological men from competing in female sports. Please take a moment to sign my petition (linked below) to let me know that you agree this legislation is right and just.

[**SIGN YOUR NAME

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

name: DLCC Special Elections Team
subject: re: last night’s special elections in New Hampshire and Pennsylvania >>
body:
State Democrats just WON two special elections in New Hampshire and Pennsylvania. This is our 16th special election victory since the state of the year, and we have two more in just two weeks. | | |
---

body:
We wanted to share with you some updates about Gov. John Kasich's recent activities as he continues to lead with compassion.| | | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=ccd696d02a4543648275a83b93a6dd50&_e=Nw8fl33Q1ec6WWKJkZcZkCPByGNdmOQs5uW7gfNimrAKuwP-qoiYAOxvbVenY2NQlR2JwwRXqWzQuckILv9FluAXw-HLJgkltBphopw_3wUy2mBdr2iOoVbsWLqb396aIv9mytlqa4qsXOZMZorp97m9cXKxSpvURORC-xWnUKy9k7_Yp1PKDmmeXAvFRzIVEquUbj7QiwA90Dq73gHxXA%3D%3D)

Peter, below you'll find a summary of some of Gov. Kasich's recent activities. Thank you for all you do to help us share these updates. We appreciate your continued support! -Team Kasich
---
|
---
**What Does the Republican Party Stand for Today?**
---
Gov. Kasich joined MSNBC's Ari Melber for an in-studio interview about the state of today's Republican party. After losses in 2018, 2020, 2021 and 2022, what needs to change for the party to start winning elections again? See Governor Kasich's comments below:
---
[| | |
---|---|---](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=ccd696d02a4543648275a83b93a6dd50&_e=Nw8fl33Q1ec6WWKJkZcZkP-oYAiL7VdPicIBhri6DPfBjl-SCQe4ekSnq9_lyTWCEruJEb2YzqWc9VgFab1-2HgLLtT5dL_z6wb0_vedgvuT-rjJDQ1IW3NATqAsDh79k_Y-8DFYg-l3zISxdho6ddKFRl3mfSKnC4n3k6Al7SpOxzvYVvP4ZxTolosNYkRnm0M_riSjkjxKLisvNTxINxS22-t9Ofb9FLmuX-AEcFY%3D "Gov. Kasich: The State of the Republican Party")
[WATCH INTERVIEW](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=ccd696d02a4543648275a83b93a6dd50&_e=Nw8fl33Q1ec6WWKJkZcZkGpLLbTBZYk0m2_uC2zWLsS_xVI-gGot4D-8wRQ-w5V7ddskDWr88JKXHX1qZbLp_tIk7e-s2HxkLDI703Q6UOXA7uKGeSmmw0NVKL_49IJtNlfo715vqMiuYR6HkkNy8hlKjmPjfFVRm33BtV9dXPiCVjqFPl9vJ93bpdf6SBkN65m4g_BAoZk2uMvDI_BxPg%3D%3D)
---
|
---
**The GOP Needs a Policy Vision and Hope**
---
Gov. Kasich often hears people justify their support for President Trump by mentioning that they support his policies. What specific policies? Simply being against everything isn't a winning way to rally voters to your cause. In order for the Republican party to start winning elections again, we need leaders who aren't afraid to propose ideas on immigration, the budget, prescription drug prices, military spending reform, and many other issues that matter to Americans. [Watch a clip of the governor discussing it (here)](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=ccd696d02a4543648275a83b93a6dd50&_e=Nw8fl33Q1ec6WWKJkZcZkOmK4AM_rbZ5Ah4FDaZ6m-lrLYhcFLVvhcbx4218YxRLxXsS_wp8kBk04Ixe4xNbZSQa-8EBo5JEAVgz-bgMSkgekkmZ2CJ1xd4vrrJWVwdf6iVb9PHxpB6APfeRrEJx0uYooKnXF-xpDdN1I9l7FpWXiI8pTWLi-DlImc4ehUZkNtJbuYAO6YQcX9yoJqNxBP8OsTT0Qo-H7lA6gIpxNa3HRY84ke1Jg5Zg7wHOJj07). name: Jon Tester
subject: Oops!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hey there, folks -- So listen, I was goofing around with my good friend Cory Booker, and well, I don’t know how to say this, but... **we accidentally _broke a wall._** Oops! 😬

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/12242?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230517-JonTester-TesterTandemWall-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230517-JonTester-TesterTandemWall-Pros-sl1&akid=10789%2E9716520%2Ea9UlKA)
I know, I know, I know -- "It's all fun and games until someone's head goes through a wall." Well, no one's gonna have to tell me that twice.

Before we broke that wall, Senator Booker was helping me record a quick video for my campaign. It's gonna be a tough one -- National Republicans are eyeing me as one of their TOP targets next year, and they're getting ready to spend _millions_ to attack me and take control of the Senate.

Our BIG grassroots fundraising deadline to fight back ends at midnight, and I’ll be honest, we’re at risk of falling short of our goal -- plus, now we’ve got a wall to repair! So please, I’m personally asking for your help:

**[Will you split a donation of $5 between my campaign and the DSCC to help fight back against Republican megadonors, defend the Senate... and fix the drywall?](https://go.dscc.org/go/12242?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230517-JonTester-TesterTandemWall-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230517-JonTester-TesterTandemWall-Pros-sl1&akid=10789%2E9716520%2Ea9UlKA)**

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Jon Tester and the DSCC.

We’ve seen similar attacks in other states. Just last year we defeated Amendment C in South Dakota and Issue 2 in Arkansas — both attacks that required the same 60% supermajority for any future measures to pass. Usually these attacks are in response to a progressive measure being passed by voters — or in an attempt to keep a future progressive issue from ever reaching the ballot. And team, this restrictive measure is no different — Ohio extremists have gone ON RECORD stating that this 60% supermajority manuever is an attempt to keep voters from protecting abortion via ballot measure as soon as this November. I’m Renee, Co-Founder and Executive Director of Their Future. Our Vote. and Their Future PAC. I launched Their Future PAC with Annie because America’s 73 million children are our future and deserve a voice in the halls of Congress and in state legislatures from coast to coast.

The work we’re doing here at Their Future PAC is crucial. It’s been just one month since we launched, and already, we’ve been to Washington to speak directly with members of Congress twice about the importance of centering kids in policy decisions and have been on major news outlets to spread the word.

America’s future is on the line next November – and I’m the left’s #1 target. Colin Allred recently launched his campaign to challenge me for our Texas U.S. Senate seat and raised a **staggering $2 MILLION in the first 36 hours** after his public announcement!

It’s vital that we reach our May mid-month goal and our deadline is coming up fast.

**Will you pitch in today to help KEEP TEXAS RED on November 5, 2024?**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667562%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3BUt8isVgAyr9CHPcs10fA&sysid=1)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667563%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bc06wsGJ3b%2b4vN42M9MOUA&sysid=1) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667564%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MWzEeO8Tv5j%2fpeYV82XI1A&sysid=1)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667575%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OIRNCcI3rMggqFn5O2UPfw&sysid=1)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

American Update

_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667576%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NReX27ErIKw6I9hXBPneRA&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667577%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1Ij5ghEAh8h0lsj306YpBw&sysid=1)_

name: The GIFFORDS Team
subject: Is this the country we want to be?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Other countries are issuing travel warnings due to the United States’ weak gun laws
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may23.Jtluwk&refcode=em230517-1-subs&t=1&akid=5634%2E3935704%2EQn4zmu)
A new article from Newsweek revealed that the gun violence crisis in the United States is so horrific, countries including Canada, Australia, and the UK have issued warnings to people traveling to our nation.
In Canada’s guidance, they go so far as to say that in America, “there is a risk of being in the wrong place at the wrong time.”
**Gun violence is a uniquely American problem, and the rest of the world is watching.**
This should be a wake-up call to us all. Is this the way we want to present ourselves to other nations? Is this the country we want to be?
From horrific mass shootings to community violence that often doesn’t make the headlines, we don’t have to live with so much violence day in and day out. Here at GIFFORDS, we know there are solutions to this crisis. But we can’t help pass commonsense gun safety solutions without support from engaged and concerned folks like you.
[**So please, will you make a contribution of $3 or any amount that makes sense for you to GIFFORDS PAC today? We must band together to create a better, safer future for our country and future generations.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may23.Jtluwk&refcode=em230517-1-subs&t=2&akid=5634%2E3935704%2EQn4zmu)

In Canada’s guidance, they go so far as to say that in America, “there is a risk of being in the wrong place at the wrong time.” Gun violence is a uniquely American problem, and the rest of the world is watching. This should be a wake-up call to us all. Is this the way we want to present ourselves to other nations? Is this the country we want to be? From horrific mass shootings to community violence that often doesn’t make the headlines, we don’t have to live with so much violence day in and day out. Here at GIFFORDS, we know there are solutions to this crisis. But we can’t help pass commonsense gun safety solutions without support from engaged and concerned folks like you. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you, The team at GIFFORDS Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

---
Folks, It's been a tough two years away from the campaign trail. I thank you for all the support and love in 2020. I also thank you for your support in helping Heather Mizeur in 2022. I understand the value of mental health regarding the passing of a family member, the death of nearby friends to the long covid, and my recovery after getting Covid-19 again. Yet, the advocacy role for LGBTQ rights is still pressing nationwide. To stand up against all the hate and discrimination, I want to run again for Office this Summer. Therefore, I'll need your support going into 2024. I'm counting on all of us to make history as we did in the primary for 2020 by letting our progressive ideas succeed in the hall of Congress, with me being the first Combat Veteran LGBTQ Marylander to win a seat in the US House. Here is how you can help me to do this by joining me this Saturday at 7 pm for our Committee Meeting for anyone seeking to volunteer or learn more about my 2024 campaign. Lastly, please consider donating to our Campaign if you cannot make it.

body:
| | | | |

# [Sign your name: Open a criminal investigation of Rudy Giuliani >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb77659ad-2a8c-4963-835b-1b7f2aa7dc44/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | A former employee of Rudolph Giuliani is suing him for $10 million over allegations of sexual assault and harassment, including charges that he forced her to perform oral sex on him. She also detailed a range of other misconduct, including his plan to sell presidential pardons for $2 million. And according to her complaint, she has the tapes to prove it. [**It's time to open a criminal investigation of Giuliani.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tff2e060a-51a9-40bc-8a8f-10d3f0364b53/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) A lawsuit makes sense, and if these allegations are proven, Giuliani should have to pay. But he should also go to jail for a very long time. [**Add your name, and join with us in calling on state and federal officials to open a criminal investigation against Giuliani as soon as possible.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb7477917-b954-4df7-b400-04e441271cdc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Peter, this is the EXACT reason we launched our Defeat Cruz Fund. Ted Cruz has been hoovering up donations from his extremist MAGA followers all year long. Fellow Conservative, This week, I issued a subpoena to FBI Director Christopher Wray for an FD-1023 form that a whistleblower said links Joe Biden to a criminal scheme.
We’ve been wondering why so many foreign nationals paid the Bidens so much money, and we could be very close to finding out.
**This FD-1023 form that the FBI has links Joe Biden himself to a criminal scheme involving money for policy decisions during his vice presidency.**
It is with a heavy heart that I fear our Commander-in-Chief may be compromised by foreign actors, and I’m going to do everything in my power to deliver the whole truth to the American people.
These revelations destroy the Democrat’s and media’s false narrative about Joe Biden and his family, and they are going to fight until the end to stop me from exposing their lies.
I am under constant attack, and they are only going to intensify as I get closer to providing Americans the facts. **[My only defense is fighting back and defending my integrity and credibility, and I rely on grassroots conservatives to help me do that. ](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=7c45db2f87834511a3e3e773552a67eb&_e=ko0soi2UY7-89oG5ZYnO5OK1NgbAhbBMmfLNpKEVqyZ20stCH0FHnTs8bVafLkRCmLbuUl0vXivs2m6CD0W3krZw_bR2sZNee8TjFVLpY5cn1y71T0_BCjYsJopOAjZRuHN-vQkfITwGCXiEHWeYTUyE0ps27kehyxt9SHDZZ5CRQJluqSIXtVzu0RpHMtqrnWlJ97SM0YXXCpzp-bpa9r2oHmQm5G42XDFUooKubqlmSylDuwH1nU-zyNdLbBOgFf2tqx5w9gJf_66QFD0Kl39HwFiUzkIcEZY-LPux_4GnuRaJWZ3NnoxkQrL4ycWWxBHBTEKyaE1VHVTjuK0s0KiqtnoYNpL_KDMQd9c-hYCYqgSfC-SjXewA8QKbMSJs)**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=7c45db2f87834511a3e3e773552a67eb&_e=ko0soi2UY7-89oG5ZYnO5OK1NgbAhbBMmfLNpKEVqyZ20stCH0FHnTs8bVafLkRCmLbuUl0vXivs2m6CD0W3krZw_bR2sZNee8TjFVLpY5cn1y71T0_BCjYsJopOAjZRuHN-vQkfITwGCXiEHWeYTUyE0ps27kehyxt9SHDZZ5CRQJluqSIXtVzu0RpHMtqrnWlJ97SM0YXXCpzp-bpa9r2oHmQm5G42XDFUooKubqkBy8Kuq9VsHYUDeR69dv5QKHQ44Q11kKV-O4MOAv2MZj8_m_njRX1A9lSP2nKstmv5Y9KvG3H-aGLBPnr6vDf2adc-AaLT57Z47Tr1dbzfMDAM0iJYgoN_q5NgvIaNrKPVZfBfo9gMOZZgkhXus9HO)
---
Like I’ve said before, county boys from West Kentucky are a tough breed, _**we don’t back down and we don’t cave to pressure from high and mighty big city liberals on cable TV.**_
But that’s not going to stop the folks in the mainstream media from attacking me and trying to destroy the credibility of my work and the good name I’ve spent an honest life building.
**[So please, if you’re able, chip in a couple bucks so my team and I can mount a defense to the onslaught of attacks that have already begun.](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=7c45db2f87834511a3e3e773552a67eb&_e=ko0soi2UY7-89oG5ZYnO5OK1NgbAhbBMmfLNpKEVqyZ20stCH0FHnTs8bVafLkRCmLbuUl0vXivs2m6CD0W3krZw_bR2sZNee8TjFVLpY5cn1y71T0_BCjYsJopOAjZRuHN-vQkfITwGCXiEHWeYTUyE0ps27kehyxt9SHDZZ5CRQJluqSIXtVzu0RpHMtqrnWlJ97SM0YXXCpzp-bpa9r2oHmQm5G42XDFUooKubqlyMmdIacbRraN0qensQfKYCsi4G2oaMDjs0ocx3R5bpJfMvVVQH0GGAoDLEhaeUm0Gn3xiNEnGixCtAtBKHeggRBR52UOnEyhlCbZMK2DLnSep9FyD49SG7HfpllUI40VgmxrBoIPBWbfNk9pfnjmK)**
If you can’t, please take the time to say a prayer for our country, we’re going to need it.
With Courage,
| |

**James Comer**

But the Biden-appointed Special Counsel is instead reportedly mulling SEDITIOUS CONSPIRACY CHARGES against me despite being innocent ... In their eyes, shunning the special interests and putting the American people first is the greatest offense you can commit. America’s justice system is truly DEAD. body:
The left is all-in to flip Texas next November. Help us FIGHT BACK!

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ze95n9nnd9jht3c8o4i9oqh7g3b1fq5lcqrca6jg_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpgm9p76c1h2bs)

Fellow Conservative, I’m going to get right to the point today. If you’ve been paying attention, then you know what’s at stake and what we’re up against.

America’s future is on the line next November – and I’m the left’s #1 target. Colin Allred recently launched his campaign to challenge me for our Texas U.S. Senate seat and raised a **staggering $2 MILLION in the first 36 hours** after his public announcement!

It’s vital that we reach our May mid-month goal and our deadline is coming up fast.

**Will you pitch in today to help KEEP TEXAS RED on November 5, 2024?**

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zc0mrhk4jrf208108uh18hhred40v69hcf3c05dg_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpgm9p76c1h2bs)
---
Colin Allred has been all over MSNBC and other far-left media outlets bashing me since his announcement. It’s his entire campaign game plan – and the reason is clear as day.

He DOES NOT represent our Texas values. Not. Even Close.

**There’s no way he could ever truly represent the good people of Texas!** **[_Help us reach our goal before the clock runs out_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zavnplhnk7buofkod10evtah3ce18bvd57fhtg5g_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpgm9p76c1h2bs)[ _._](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zie4mfpdje14i2j8p7u947p1j8todnrok306atd0_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpgm9p76c1h2bs) **Thank you for any donation you can send at this critical time.
