name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWHEi5cDCN

ACI - Religious Liberty Survey

I am fearful that legal persecution will intensify
against Americans holding to faith-based values

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWHEi5cDCN

Fellow
American,

There is
a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me
worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values.

After the
Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and
signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only
intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who
wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Are you
concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our
founding-Religious Liberty?

In
addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act, numerous
examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v.
BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL
RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few
examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to
faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to
their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act,
brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal
Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and
organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex
marriage failed.

This has
the potential to only intensify legal persecution against
individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to
faith-based values.

The
American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to
preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation
for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty,
Community, and Life.

Whether
it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield
after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a
cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I
am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who
wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?

Please
share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning
religious liberty in America.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61813787:WHEi5cDCN:m:3:2532013465:17AC0B97EC44555AFD367AB2A9A9C1BB:r

Thank you
for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder &
Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

body:
#
Derek,
There’s a very important group of people being used as pawns by McCarthy and the GOP right now. And it’s not Veterans.
They’re the Gold Star families — people whose sons or daughters, husbands or wives, mothers or fathers made the ultimate sacrifice in service to our nation.
Many of these families receive Social Security or SNAP benefits. Most of them receive survivor benefits.
McCarthy’s plan cuts billions from the VA. It slashes Social Security and SNAP. But if he doesn’t get his way, he’ll force our nation to default on its sovereign debt, and the benefits that these Gold Star families depend on will dry up.
The cruelty of that is almost unimaginable. For McCarthy, Marjorie Taylor Greene, Lauren Boebert, and the rest of the extremists and radicals in their party — it’s exactly what they want.
VoteVets **WILL NOT** let them get away with it.

I have a clear vision for how to win the White House in 2024: **a grassroots, bottom-up campaign made of people just like you.**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

# About Nancy
---
Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! In 2020, she took SC-01 back from the Democrats and now, is fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. [**JOIN NANCY**](go.txting.io/mEWDMy)

body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=175%2E791427%2EtNcPFi)
Hey there, we're reaching out this morning to ask you to **[chip in $5 to stand with Ilhan Omar and our re-election campaign for Congress today.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may23.dqks1K&refcode=em230517-1-t2&t=2&akid=175%2E791427%2EtNcPFi)**
✋Here's FIVE reasons why:
1. In 2022, Ilhan went up against MILLIONS of dollars in outside spending — from right-wing super PACs, special interest groups, and establishment Republicans who want nothing more than to stop our movement's momentum.

2. Meanwhile, we funded our campaign the right way: lots and lots of grassroots supporters chipping in what they can.

3. If we're going to repeat our successes and send Ilhan back to Congress in 2024, we _**need_** to pick up the pace on our fundraising here in the early stages of the cycle.

4. Plus, a HUGE part of our campaign's resources come from emails just like this one sent to people just like you.

5. Ilhan's counting on your support — a $5 donation is the most impactful thing you can do today to show you stand with her.

What do you say? We know $5 doesn't seem like the kind of money that can make a difference, but when we're all chipping in, it does. So please:

name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: NEW: Josh Hawley Needs to Learn a Thing or Two About ‘Manhood’
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Read the full op-ed written by Lucas Kunce and Congressman Jake Auchincloss about Hawley’s new book »
#
_The following is an op-ed from Lucas Kunce and Congressman Jake Auchincloss, written in response to the release of Senator Josh Hawley’s new book “Manhood: The Masculine Virtues America Needs.”**Read an excerpt below and please consider sharing on social media.**_ **[Then, if you’d like to support Lucas’ campaign to replace Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat, please chip in $5 or more toward his goal of raising $15,000 online before midnight tonight:](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33194?refcode=em20230517-3132&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3132%2E614464%2E0iUTGK)** If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33195?refcode=em20230517-3132&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=2&akid=3132%2E614464%2E0iUTGK) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33195?refcode=em20230517-3132&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=3&akid=3132%2E614464%2E0iUTGK) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33194?refcode=em20230517-3132&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3132%2E614464%2E0iUTGK)
---
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33196?t=5&akid=3132%2E614464%2E0iUTGK)
**[READ THE FULL OP-ED](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33196?t=6&akid=3132%2E614464%2E0iUTGK)**
_In America today, there is no man more obsessed with “manhood” than Sen. Josh Hawley (R-MO)._
_And while he’s never been to war, he spends most of his waking hours cosplaying on the battlefields of a culture war. This includes accusing men like us, two Marine veterans, of wanting to redefine things “like courage, and independence, and assertiveness—as a danger to society.”_
_Thankfully for those of us who have been poorly instructed, Josh’s book, Manhood, can show us the light. For just $29.99 we can learn the path to achieving Hawley-level masculinity by recreating ourselves in his own image._
_While we haven’t read the book, we certainly hope there’s a chapter on the manliness of skittering away from mobs you’ve incited outside the U.S. Capitol._
_But however cringe-worthy Hawley’s solutions might be, the problem is real. The data is clear: Working-class men in America are disconnected from the economy, and it hurts._
_As two male Democrats, we have not just the opportunity but the responsibility to go on the offensive here and actually engage with the issues Hawley is misrepresenting. The senator is not here to work on the issues in good faith, he’s here to advance a culture war that serves his own ambition._
_He wants men to think that by subscribing to his politics, or quitting video games, or buying his book, their problems will suddenly go away. But a culture war isn’t going to help these men who have fallen behind regain their footing in the economy, in education, in their local community. Instead, it’s just going to divide us further._
_Real family values are about providing a healthy alternative to the toxic masculinity Hawley is offering. The disconnect between men and the economy or society isn’t happening because men are failing to achieve some weird idea of what it means to be a man. The core of this crisis is the fact that men without a college degree have seen their relative earnings fall by 30 percent since 1980._
_Why? Because Josh Hawley and others like him have blocked advancements for working class Americans at every turn..._
**[READ THE FULL OP-ED](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33196?t=7&akid=3132%2E614464%2E0iUTGK)**
**[SHARE ON FACEBOOK](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33197?t=8&akid=3132%2E614464%2E0iUTGK)**
**[SHARE ON TWITTER](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33198?t=9&akid=3132%2E614464%2E0iUTGK)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230517-3132-footer&t=10&refcode2=3132_614464_0iUTGK&akid=3132%2E614464%2E0iUTGK)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=3132%2E614464%2E0iUTGK). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

subject: I feel like I’m taking crazy pills

body:
I'm tired of watching the GOP use the same tired, losing strategies over and over again.

| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zil8ike9nrvnlhhu9krlnk6sm92cqfcj1fbm38i0_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpim4pr4chh2bs)

Friend, I'm exhausted. For too long the GOP has used the same tired, losing strategies that have led us to defeat after crushing defeat. [_**_But, Friend, what has the left done that we haven 't?_**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6pfo3qrble3iti9lm3negiha2p5s1ifm0advrlo_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpim4pr4chh2bs) The radical left has made an historic incursion into our schools, and they've done so with NO resistance from conservatives. And for DECADES now leftists have had TOTAL CONTROL over what our children learn in schools. Yet conservatives expect to win when the next generation is being TRAINED to hate conservatism, and basic American Values! **I 'll put this simply: Conservatism and Love for American Values will face a mass extinction event if we don't stand up NOW!** My name is Ryan Girdusky, and I founded the 1776 Project PAC to fight back against the radical left and take back our schools one by one. And in just over a year, we've notched more than 130 victories. And what's even more astonishing is that we've done it for PENNIES on the dollar compared to what other organizations have spent on congressional races that NEVER achieve anything of substance. **We 've been so successful that people like Tucker Carlson, Ben Shapiro, and Laura Ingraham have even publicly praised our organization and encouraged their viewers to support our team.** Our team has already achieved an amazing level of success... Just imagine what we could do with you on our team! **[Would you consider joining the 1776 Project PAC with a donation of $17.76 or more today?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhqelvl7tj260bvsmtial47b2se7sqeag2uapt9o_rp22sh2s8i66o71cpim4pr4chh2bs)** Thousands of patriots like you have already decided to step up and make a difference- and their support has enabled us to impact the lives of MILLIONS of students, and change the future of America. Please, Friend, will you join us in taking back our schools once and for all? Sincerely, Ryan Girdusky, Founder 1776 Project PAC

Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | | ---|---|--- Supporter: Notification Status: Signed Up Donald J. Trump May 17th, 2023 “It’s no surprise that Ron DeSantis and his political cronies have continued to terrorize the Florida legislature with the threat of his veto pen if they don’t acquiesce to his demand to endorse his candidacy. There are some brave legislators who have stood up to DeSantis’ Swamp-like behavior and resisted his intimidation tactics in order to do what is right for Florida and the country. Those who he can’t control—including almost the entirety of the Florida federal congressional delegation— have endorsed President Trump because he’s the only candidate who can beat Joe Biden and take back the White House.” **\- Steven Cheung, spokesperson | ---|--- Donald J. Trump May 17th, 2023 Mar-a-Lago, FL— A shows President Donald J. Trump holds a decisive lead in the 2024 GOP primary election—with 58% of likely Republican primary voters supporting him. According to the survey, conducted May 12-15, President Trump remains the only GOP candidate who can beat Joe Biden in a general election. In a general election race between President Joe Biden and former President Donald Trump who would you prefer? 43% President Donald J. Trump (+5) 38% Joe Biden In a general election race between Joe Biden and Ron DeSantis who would you prefer? 37% Joe Biden (+4) 33% Ron DeSantis Who do you think the Republican Party should nominate as the party's candidate for president in 2024? 58% President Donald J. Trump (+37) 21% Ron DeSantis 5% Mike Pence 3% Nikki Haley 1% Vivek Ramaswamy | ---|--- Donald J. Trump May 16th, 2023 Mar-a-Lago, FL – After four years of investigating the origins of the Trump-Russia collusion hoax, Special Counsel John Durham’s report released yesterday is a damning indictment of the Obama-Biden White House, DOJ, and intelligence community’s interference in the 2016 and 2020 presidential elections. The same gameplan is now being run by the Deep State to unjustly influence the 2024 election and prevent Americans from returning President Trump to the White House. The Federalist “The Obama administration possessed no real evidence that then-candidate Donald Trump colluded with Russian government officials when it launched its investigation into the Trump campaign leading up to the 2016 election, according to a new bombshell report.” Washington Post “The FBI’s handling of key aspects of the case was “seriously deficient,” Durham wrote, causing the agency “severe reputational harm.” That failure could have been prevented if FBI employees hadn’t embraced “seriously flawed information” and instead followed their “own principles regarding objectivity and integrity,” the report said. As examples of confirmation bias by the FBI, Durham cites: the FBI decision to go forward with the probe despite “a complete lack of information from the Intelligence Community that corroborated the hypothesis upon which the Crossfire Hurricane investigation was predicated”; agents ignoring information that exonerated key suspects in the case; and the FBI being unable to corroborate “a single substantive allegation” in a dossier of Trump allegations compiled by British former spy Christopher Steele.” Just the News "Based on the review of Crossfire Hurricane and related intelligence activities, we concluded the Department and the FBI failed to uphold their important mission of strict fidelity to the law in connection with certain events and activities described in this report," Durham wrote. “Durham specifically faulted the FBI for relying on evidence from the campaign of 2016 Democrat presidential nominee Hillary Clinton, including the now-discredited Steele dossier, saying leadership lacked the necessary distrust of politically motivated allegations.” New York Post “Special counsel John Durham exposed Monday how the FBI and Justice Department plotted to rig the 2016 presidential election. Top FBI officials also saved Hillary Clinton by scorning the federal statute book and treating her pervasive, perpetual violations of federal laws on classified documents as a harmless, unintentional error.” New York Times “Mr. Durham went beyond criticizing the wiretap applications, writing: “Our investigation also revealed that senior F.B.I. personnel displayed a serious lack of analytical rigor toward the information that they received, especially information received from politically affiliated persons and entities. This information in part triggered and sustained Crossfire Hurricane and contributed to the subsequent need for Special Counsel Mueller’s investigation.” The Daily Signal “Based on the review of [FBI operation] Crossfire Hurricane and related intelligence activities, we conclude that the [Justice] Department and the FBI failed to uphold their mission of strict fidelity to the law in connection with certain events and activities described in this report,” the Durham report says, as by Fox News.” The Gateway Pundit Special Counsel John Durham released his final report concluding the FBI had no verified intel when it opened the Crossfire Hurricane investigation into Trump in 2016, according to Just the News. This was Durham’s final report. There will be no arrests. The American people were lied to for years as the intel community worked feverishly to accomplish their coup on President Trump. And THEY ALL KNEW it was a lie. RedState** “Sean Davis of “The Federalist” got a copy of it before it was officially released and hit some of the highlights in a Twitter thread. He noted that “Neither U.S. nor the Intelligence Community appears to have possessed any actual evidence of collusion in their holdings at the commencement of the Crossfire Hurricane investigation.” “FBI records prepared by [Peter] Strzok in February and March 2017 show that at the time of the opening of Crossfire Hurricane, the FBI had no information in its holdings indicating that at any time during the campaign anyone in the Trump had been in contact with any Russian intelligence officials.” | ---|--- Donald J. name: Robert Garcia
subject: I’m the far-right’s newest target
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63422158/406732382/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTEyMmZlZi1jYmY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jntgZAzrp15aOVMy4fC8Z94X5XCD1wBiGJefAmq1cV4=)
Friends -
Yesterday, I forced a resolution on the House floor to require a vote on the expulsion of George Santos from Congress. Republicans have less than 48 hours to go on the record about whether they will choose party politics or accountability of Santos.
There is no doubt in my mind that this has put a target on my back from the far-right. I will be the perfect enemy for Fox News and the MAGA media: A Gay Immigrant not afraid to hold them accountable publicly.
They will rally their MAGA base to attack me, and I have to be ready for them and their mega donors to throw everything they’ve got at me.
I know I can count on you and this team, so I need to ask:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to my reelection campaign for Congress? I need more support than ever to fight back against GOP attacks.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63422159/406732383/1270846539?refcode2=89122fef-cbf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&refcode=em230517-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTEyMmZlZi1jYmY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jntgZAzrp15aOVMy4fC8Z94X5XCD1wBiGJefAmq1cV4=)
I don’t regret demanding this vote for a second. It was the right thing to do. We cannot continue to let a liar, fraud, and manipulator represent our country and its people.
But now, things are going to get tough for our campaign.
The truth is, I don’t fund my campaign like Republicans with their corporate PAC money — and I don’t want to. Our campaign is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can, not special interests. And every single donation means I have one more person on this team, backing me and my fight for accountability in Washington.
But that also means I can’t win this fight alone.
[**So I am personally asking: Can you please contribute to my re-election campaign for Congress? Every single dollar will help me fight back against the GOP and continue to hold Washington accountable to the American people.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63422162/406732385/1270846539?refcode2=89122fef-cbf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&refcode=em230517-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTEyMmZlZi1jYmY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jntgZAzrp15aOVMy4fC8Z94X5XCD1wBiGJefAmq1cV4=)

Robert Garcia

clean_body: = Friends - Yesterday, I forced a resolution on the House floor to require a vote on the expulsion of George Santos from Congress. Republicans have less than 48 hours to go on the record about whether they will choose party politics or accountability of Santos. There is no doubt in my mind that this has put a target on my back from the far-right. I will be the perfect enemy for Fox News and the MAGA media: A Gay Immigrant not afraid to hold them accountable publicly. They will rally their MAGA base to attack me, and I have to be ready for them and their mega donors to throw everything they’ve got at me. I know I can count on you and this team, so I need to ask: = I don’t regret demanding this vote for a second. It was the right thing to do. We cannot continue to let a liar, fraud, and manipulator represent our country and its people. But now, things are going to get tough for our campaign. The truth is, I don’t fund my campaign like Republicans with their corporate PAC money — and I don’t want to. Our campaign is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can, not special interests. And every single donation means I have one more person on this team, backing me and my fight for accountability in Washington. But that also means I can’t win this fight alone. = Thank you for continuing to fight alongside me and this team. Robert Garcia = * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . Peter – **Right now** , three conservative federal judges are holding a hearing on the legality of mifepristone, one drug of the two-step abortion pill regimen — the most common form of abortion in the country. This comes after a judge in Texas reversed FDA approval, several other judges issued opposing rulings, and then the Supreme Court stepped in to say mifepristone could remain available as the case worked its way through the courts. Now the case is on the bench of three Republican-appointed judges who have been hostile to abortion rights in the past. **Once again, our human rights and bodily autonomy are in the hands of conservative, white, anti-choice men — appointed by George W. Bush and Donald Trump, two men who both lost the popular vote.** It’s anti-democratic, un-American, and a straight-up horror that our rights are on the chopping block once again today. We’re bracing for the outcome of this case, and in order to prepare for all possible scenarios, we’re building up an action fund to fight back. name: Colin Allred
subject: this is why I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
three reasons
| | |
---
Hi, friend, I wanted to tell you why I'm running for Senate, but I know you're busy, so I'll keep this short.
1\. As a father, I'm running to build a better world for my kids and yours, to create more opportunities for them and their peers to succeed and to ensure our country lives up to its promises for the next generation.
2\. As a Texan, I've watched Ted Cruz fail our state for more than a decade, doing what's best for Ted Cruz and not for Texas families. I'm running to be a voice for Texans in the Senate, and I promise to always put you first.
3\. As a civil rights attorney, I'm running to defend our fundamental rights. Ted Cruz and his allies are waging an all-out war on our right to vote, which is the basis for all other rights. Expanding our Democratic Senate majority is our best hope of stopping them.
**If you're with me in this fight, I'm humbly asking:[Will you please split $3 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Maggie Hassan’s campaign to raise $50,000 before midnight? Every dollar helps as we work to unseat Ted Cruz, protect the Senate and build a better future for our families. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63422756/406734168/1987603654?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2273-bu-in&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWE1MWJhMC1jY2Y0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BLIjWGMjRvUBSslEL-Wn0y_6cRhE2Z_yypLVD3oTltI=)**

clean_body: three reasons | | | Hi, friend, I wanted to tell you why I'm running for Senate, but I know you're busy, so I'll keep this short. 1\. As a father, I'm running to build a better world for my kids and yours, to create more opportunities for them and their peers to succeed and to ensure our country lives up to its promises for the next generation. 2\. As a Texan, I've watched Ted Cruz fail our state for more than a decade, doing what's best for Ted Cruz and not for Texas families. I'm running to be a voice for Texans in the Senate, and I promise to always put you first. 3\. As a civil rights attorney, I'm running to defend our fundamental rights. Ted Cruz and his allies are waging an all-out war on our right to vote, which is the basis for all other rights. Expanding our Democratic Senate majority is our best hope of stopping them. If you're with me in this fight, I'm humbly asking:= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Colin Allred and Maggie Hassan: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much, I'm glad to have you on this team. body:
| Sharice needs your view on this.

It’s shameful how far behind the United States is on the issue of maternal health and mortality rates. That’s why on Mother’s Day, Sharice reintroduced legislation that will give health authorities more understanding of this issue so they can better handle it in the future.

Do you support Sharice’s bill to save the lives of mothers by lowering the maternal mortality rate? Answer now: | | [Yes](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63422996/406734854/-1338819108?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230517_SV_1.1_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_momnibus&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTVhOWJkNC1jY2Y0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kE_ZunWgqUrfHdWD0Bn5XWdErdT27nlqCuaEaZpyADU=&emci=e0a511ce-ccf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=495a9bd4-ccf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)

| [No](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63422998/406734857/-1338819108?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230517_SV_1.1_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_momnibus&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTVhOWJkNC1jY2Y0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kE_ZunWgqUrfHdWD0Bn5XWdErdT27nlqCuaEaZpyADU=&emci=e0a511ce-ccf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=495a9bd4-ccf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)
---

The high maternal mortality rates women, especially Black and Indigenous women of color, face across the country is **unacceptable** in 2023. We have to take steps to address them now. This bill will:

✅Establish a grant program to promote community engagement in all types of communities

✅Commission the first-ever large study of the Native American maternal health crisis and provide funding to establish the first review committee on tribal maternal mortality

✅Conduct a comprehensive review of maternal health data

✅Invest in maternal health research for organizations that serve minorities

In the richest country on Earth, the maternal mortality rate should be much lower than it is. We’re proud of Sharice’s new bill to delve into this problem. Now we want to know if you agree this legislation should be prioritized. **[Answer here→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63423000/406734859/-1338819108?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230517_SV_1.1_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_momnibus&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTVhOWJkNC1jY2Y0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kE_ZunWgqUrfHdWD0Bn5XWdErdT27nlqCuaEaZpyADU=&emci=e0a511ce-ccf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=495a9bd4-ccf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)**

— Team Sharice

Hi, Peter,

I didn't have the best childhood, but my Mamaw and Papaw were my rock. Mamaw and Papaw raised me after I lost touch with my father and my mother battled a drug addiction.

**Mamaw was my compass as I navigated young adulthood & ultimately, I found myself enlisting in the Marines. **

The opportunity to serve my country and give back to the nation that gave me so much keeps me going every day.

Supporting conservative values means protecting our constitutional freedoms at each and every turn. If you're like me and know how precious these freedoms truly are, please click here: | [**FREEDOM ISN 'T FREE**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=4b09f89597904f0a8465fbc64417ad9e&_e=ejVuWjMjk-eWJfw2zD-r1IN7B-KfCAR0Bwvy7rirSMw9jiEfp3sE1YPdU76Mk7HST9rjH-QMb0Jzxjo1ss3CP1bjyy-fnBm_ySyr25xR0f6-nZAiuuUsaIPvhMm0ezkdyzniwc2PuC6oK0NzKzKKQnyM9b6HH5H1p4Nwp5Wt9Idz1k1DcMeWAiFKFJb_eRrSX9ZZTIhw2S89ZdqNLmJmm_MB-ijP9X3aJVoruFhaX_ClzAsdOKjQZH7HTPcAsWhKZJLWMGbj1cFROD0EMShBXGsXXIjCSycpyVLerEePTO-McKoWkn5Zo5-uz347lV7QsCUQMpaKskh5evzbmMoFQeJZLp5uM47wtr1DY-TRwYzSbSYptxuV3aVySMGc7HyPEreZagWqSd8PgHHsGPcjY3q2-BuHxCEnGN_Oa18SfMJOYp3B32HR-69Dh585z8PVJOjfBBctZPuMLh55QE5klsSQjzdsYzjniM6C9miSVF5S-trUonpohTu8Dqqo-Wig4rKapzBR3EpkHgQ71iYEal89-OiCw41AutCaqMuiHv8-e24tSWHUHo3Tu7g6llf0SQh8H0RU_C3RIlqUwgRgCw%3D%3D)

| | , Democrats are working to strengthen and pay for Social Security and Medicare, save Medicaid, which provides 25% of all Americans with care, and defend food stamps and housing support from cuts for 40 million citizens, including our children, elderly, and Veterans.

Democrats support education, livable wages, and sustainable clean energy development. Democrats understand that infrastructure development is vital to our economic well-being and jobs for our families.

My opponent, Rep. Jack Bergman, is demanding more deregulation for dirty industries and to make Trump’s tax cuts for billionaires permanent, robbing us of vital revenue to provide for citizens' wellbeing. He wants to eliminate the Department of Education, deinvesting in our future.

We need a subject-matter expert to provide guidance and problem-solving. We need a trusted family physician, not more corporate lawyers creating bills pandering to the super-rich.

Isn’t 170 lawyers in Congress enough? When our Nation's most critical issues revolve around care for hardworking families, we need a family doctor in the House. Thank you, -Bob Bob LorinserCandidate for US CongressDemocrat, MI01

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Free eBook from Victor Davis Hanson: Dueling Populisms
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW7pKUcDN4

Dear Friend, Populism is nothing new to world history. While it
can be easy to think about American politics as being divided
between the Left and the Right, the reality is much different.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW7pKUcDN4

Dear
Friend,
Populism
is nothing new to world history. While it can be easy to think
about American politics as being divided between the Left and the
Right, the reality is much different. What we've really been
seeing is two sets of populist backlash against both the Democrat
and Republican establishment.

And
believe it or not, these tensions actually trace their roots back
to Roman times.

That's
why I'm sending you this email today.

I want to
make sure you get a free copy of one of our popular eBooks:
Dueling Populisms by Victor Davis Hanson.

Hanson is
a Hoover Senior Fellow and world-renowned historian, and I think
you'll get a lot out of his insights. Inside this important
eBook, you'll learn more about:

What
we can expect from a political climate ruled by movements that
rebel against both the establishment-and each other.
The
important parallels between these ancient movements and their
modern counterparts in both progressive and conservative
populism.
What
lies ahead for America as we revive these ancient tensions in our
culture.

You can
get your free copy of Dueling Populisms using this secure link:
https://resources.hoover.org/dueling-populisms-signup/.

And
please feel free to share this with your family and friends. It's
important that we recall the voices of experience and apply them
to contemporary conflicts and challenges.

You can
use this link to get access to your free eBook right now.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iW7pKUcDN4

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

Friend,

Special Counsel John Durham’s report confirms **THE INTELLIGENCE COMMUNITY _NEVER_ HAD ANY ACTUAL EVIDENCE THAT I WAS A RUSSIAN AGENT.**

body:
In my role as the first-ever Second Gentleman of the United States, I get a front-row seat to see just how hard Joe and Kamala are working together to lead this country and deliver results for working families. | | |
---
Hey Peter, it’s Doug. In my role as the first-ever Second Gentleman of the United States, I get a front-row seat to see just how hard Joe and Kamala are working together to lead this country and deliver results for working families. I’ve had the honor and privilege of hitting the road across the country these last two years to meet with people and hear directly from them about the issues that are affecting them -- and the positive impacts they’re already feeling thanks to Joe and Kamala’s leadership. **We’ve accomplished so much together -- but we can’t slow down now, not with so much on the line. That’s why I’m reaching out today to ask you to support Joe and Kamala’s reelection campaign:** **[We’re counting on grassroots donors to power this campaign. clean_body: In my role as the first-ever Second Gentleman of the United States, I get a front-row seat to see just how hard Joe and Kamala are working together to lead this country and deliver results for working families. | | | Hey Peter, it’s Doug. In my role as the first-ever Second Gentleman of the United States, I get a front-row seat to see just how hard Joe and Kamala are working together to lead this country and deliver results for working families. I’ve had the honor and privilege of hitting the road across the country these last two years to meet with people and hear directly from them about the issues that are affecting them -- and the positive impacts they’re already feeling thanks to Joe and Kamala’s leadership. We’ve accomplished so much together -- but we can’t slow down now, not with so much on the line. That’s why I’m reaching out today to ask you to support Joe and Kamala’s reelection campaign: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Your support helped send Kamala to the White House -- making her the first woman, the first Black American, and the first South Asian American to be elected vice president. Your support helped Joe and Kamala take our economy back from the brink, helping create a historic 12 million new jobs. Your support meant Joe and Kamala could take aggressive action to lower costs for working people -- all while making corporations start to pay their fair share. Your support is what helped Joe and Kamala pass the first major federal legislation on gun violence in decades. The list goes on and on. I hope it’s clear:your support has helped make all of this possible. And it’s your support we’re counting on to send Joe and Kamala back to the White House. body:
When we email asking for resources, it’s because we need them. While top of the ticket candidates traditionally receive the most attention, we believe that every race from school board to city council is critical to shaping our Commonwealth’s future.

|
---
Derek, When we email asking for resources, it’s because we need them. While top of the ticket candidates traditionally receive the most attention, we believe that every race from school board to city council is critical to shaping our Commonwealth’s future. Which is why we have programs in place like our Local Candidates Program. We are providing training and resources to Democratic Candidates who otherwise would be on their own. With many first time candidates, creating a functional and effective campaign is an uphill battle. From websites to campaign materials and strategies, we are committed to making the process as streamlined as possible. Which circles back to us needing more resources. We want to make sure EVERY Democrat in our Commonwealth has access to the tools they need to run a successful campaign. This is how we make a difference. This is how we move the needle. body:
| | | Peter, We’re going to take back the Senate.****

There are no ifs, ands, or buts, Peter: America’s future is on the line.

I’ve seen the destruction Democrats want to do our country firsthand and let me tell you: it’s bleak.

They want to erode American patriotism for their woke agenda.

They want to send good, blue-collar jobs abroad while creating a system that only works for their ivory-tower elite.

_And they want to SILENCE every patriot like you who won’t let them get away with it._

**We have to RESCUE AMERICA and that means we must take back the Senate in 2024 - but we can’t do it without you. **

The Left isn’t just wrong - **they’re downright un-American.**

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: George Santos update
body:
It didn’t have to get this far.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=998%2E120351%2EemtOjg)
Peter —
**First,** George Santos was indicted on a slew of federal charges, including money laundering and stealing public funds.
**And now...**
[****](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3709?refcode=em-20230517&t=2&akid=998%2E120351%2EemtOjg)
After telling countless, outrageous lies to get into Congress, Santos is finally facing justice — **but it didn’t have to get this far.**
Local newsrooms like ours are usually the first to uncover corruption and misconduct in politics. But with more and more local newsrooms being shuttered, there aren’t reliable sources to expose bad actors like George Santos **before** they make it to Congress.
[**At Courier Newsroom, we’ve launched local newsrooms in eight battleground states to fill in these gaps in coverage. Our dedicated, on-the-ground reporters are holding elected officials accountable and keeping their communities informed — but to power their work, we need your help. Will you chip in $5 now to fuel our news teams?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3709?refcode=em-20230517&t=3&akid=998%2E120351%2EemtOjg)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3709?refcode=em-20230517&t=4&akid=998%2E120351%2EemtOjg)**
Peter, the list of lies Santos told to get elected to Congress is long and despicable — including his claims that his mother survived the 9/11 terrorist attacks and that he had employees killed in the Pulse nightclub shooting.
**And the fact that Santos almost got away with it says a lot about the state of the news media in 2023.**
The disappearance of local newsrooms means stories like this of fraud and corruption can slip through the cracks. Courier Newsroom was founded because we understand that **local newsrooms are the eyes and ears of our communities.**
But to provide this critical local news coverage, we need the resources to hire and retain talented local reporters and keep the lights on in our existing newsrooms and open new ones.
[**Will you help us stop bad information in its tracks and hold our elected officials accountable by chipping in $5 to support our local news teams now?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3709?refcode=em-20230517&t=5&akid=998%2E120351%2EemtOjg)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3709?refcode=em-20230517&t=6&akid=998%2E120351%2EemtOjg)**
Thank you,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=998_120351_emtOjg&akid=998%2E120351%2EemtOjg)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=998%2E120351%2EemtOjg)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

"Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?"

This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I'm asking for your help today to put an end to it! And if we don't act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she'll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that's where you come in. clean_body: I'm asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left's medical mutilation of our children in the name of "gender dysphoria." | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I'm asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left's medical mutilation of our children in the name of "gender dysphoria." | | | We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13. | | In case you missed our announcement on Tucker 's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy... This included putting her on experimental drugs likeLupron , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders... ... Giving her constant testosterone injections... ... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15. How was this allowed to happen? It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation: "Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?" This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I'm asking for your help today to put an end to it! Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don't act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she'll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that's where you come in. Whatever amount you're able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. | | | So please, do not delay. subject: Save the Date: 46th Annual Washington State Republican Party Dinner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Join us at our upcoming 46th Annual Dinner - Get your tickets now!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f90cbb438&e=6a281f566d&c=762e4f2294)

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: When I came out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=303%2E35263%2Ex25oZF ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Peter, can I tell you a story?

When I came out in college, I knew I was interested in a career in public
service, but I feared that I would have to face a serious choice between
pursuing the field of my dreams or living my authentic life openly.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-may23.WiYufF&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230517_PM1_V2_S1&t=1004&akid=303%2E35263%2Ex25oZF ]A photo of young Tammy Baldwin smiling

Seeing others in the LGBTQ community demonstrate acts of courage by coming
out, being themselves, and being public about who they are and who they
love — I came to realize that I could do both. I could run for office and
be honest about who I am. And that’s exactly what I did.

When I became the first openly gay Senator in our nation's history, I
understood that I needed to use this extraordinary opportunity to make a
difference in people's lives. And from lowering prescription drug prices
to protecting same-sex marriage through the Respect for Marriage Act, I’ve
worked hard every day since to do just that.

That's why I ran for office in the first place — not to make history, but
to make a difference. And folks like you supported me because you wanted
to make a difference, too. Now, I'm asking you to keep going:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-may23.WiYufF&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230517_PM1_V2_S1&t=1005&akid=303%2E35263%2Ex25oZF ]Will you help me continue to make a difference by pitching into my
reelection campaign today?

Over the years, we have made incredible progress in the fight for
equality. But Peter, we cannot mistake that progress for a total
victory.

Republican-led state legislatures across the country continue to pass
harmful legislation, especially targeting the transgender community and
LGBTQ youth.

And when the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, Justice Clarence Thomas
called for Obergefell v. Hodges — the case that established nationwide
marriage equality — to be “reconsidered.”

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-may23.WiYufF&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230517_PM1_V2_S1&t=1006&akid=303%2E35263%2Ex25oZF ]For all of the progress we have made, there is still a LOT more to be
done. I’ll keep up the fight as long as I can, and I’m hoping you’ll
support our important work by chipping in any amount to my reelection
campaign.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-may23.gvrN3l&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230517_PM1_V2_S1&t=1007&akid=303%2E35263%2Ex25oZF ]CHIP IN $5 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-may23.oFPjTV&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230517_PM1_V2_S1&t=1008&akid=303%2E35263%2Ex25oZF ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2152?c0=tbe-em-may23.TgCm-E&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230517_PM1_V2_S1&t=1009&akid=303%2E35263%2Ex25oZF ]CHIP IN $25 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-may23.6U9y2I&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230517_PM1_V2_S1&t=1010&akid=303%2E35263%2Ex25oZF ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-may23.N2RGls&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230517_PM1_V2_S1&t=1011&akid=303%2E35263%2Ex25oZF ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-may23.WiYufF&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230517_PM1_V2_S1&t=1012&akid=303%2E35263%2Ex25oZF ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you for your ongoing support. Let’s recommit ourselves to work
towards the day when all LGBTQ Americans can live in a world where they
feel safe, accepted, and loved.

— Tammy

P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1002&akid=303%2E35263%2Ex25oZF ]www.tammybaldwin.com | [ mailto:INFO@tammybaldwin.com ]INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM | [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=1003&akid=303%2E35263%2Ex25oZF ]Privacy Policy

body:
Border security will be an ongoing problem while Democrats are in office because they simply will not accept responsibility for it, much less come up with a coherent policy that Republicans will support.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=34e2667f489b4b26a0419bb1efc328a9&_t=9YhohcypQegHwd364SqTzo7_5cBxHcvj2tJLoUPgdizOOOxADS9ONzYfqdBypSyc8gRKjKzqwV3lhuFqLtIkbhe8dr5xiiZmaNwPG1iHd28%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=34e2667f489b4b26a0419bb1efc328a9&_t=9YhohcypQegHwd364SqTzo7_5cBxHcvj2tJLoUPgdizOOOxADS9ONzYfqdBypSyc8gRKjKzqwV3lhuFqLtIkbhe8dr5xiiZmaNwPG1iHd28%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=34e2667f489b4b26a0419bb1efc328a9&_e=4YLvorLi3m2EFxsBHFtyLt-Ajf9zFePTOkPMj0GjCMQQl5vFHbQNzbrJbg1Nx0bJ8YBfjwosjKP1CsXnnMR80_6ZpCfZEKE_wujb6hnr8huGSGFvdsMsMc1Lr95fxorJRTkUWwCaifeupVtPX5XyWI-TaAYg6sC90WbEbccplIriBD2Tni7Sd19CRZnLMW7gXP9WcAgvJ2YLheA0qAuyA39qSdDe1aWgP4Go0tplOvex6mfIxBlOdDESqtSpG7zu2XKT740RAKzSKMMgIFAHb3oSw7PkaDGt6tVeMU3-n4fN2GIV_H2KhyhP2RZsuRZN0CHTecImRDzH5jwVUYcxfJj1Yx-6K6z278Ynev8JAhLHYARyJ-xcWqLYkBJ0pKlb1P-P1LQSfxdKOUT-pD_biVB2KVLiwEdIv0_M2bKajmc%3D)
|
Fellow Conservative,

Where is President Biden?

He’s not in The Situation Room.

He’s not at the border, conferring with border patrol agents on the front lines.

He’s not at the Capitol negotiating with Republicans over their recently passed border bill.

Nope - he’s been riding his bike on the beach in Delaware ...

Since Title 42 expired last Thursday at midnight, **the situation at the border has become grave.** And President Biden seems oblivious to everything but his bike and the ice cream cone he undoubtedly enjoyed after his afternoon outing.

As I type this email, migrants who cross the border and request asylum are being given **court dates to appear in front of an immigration judge in 2026**.

Yes, court dates are three years from now. Once migrants are given processing documents, **they’re released on their own reconnaissance and often never heard from again**.

Fellow Conservative, this might be acceptable to Democrat leaders who receive police protection details, **[but is it acceptable to you?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=34e2667f489b4b26a0419bb1efc328a9&_e=4YLvorLi3m2EFxsBHFtyLt-Ajf9zFePTOkPMj0GjCMQQl5vFHbQNzbrJbg1Nx0bJ8YBfjwosjKP1CsXnnMR80_6ZpCfZEKE_wujb6hnr8huGSGFvdsMsMc1Lr95fxorJRTkUWwCaifeupVtPX5XyWI-TaAYg6sC90WbEbccplIriBD2Tni7Sd19CRZnLMW7gXP9WcAgvJ2YLheA0qAuyA39qSdDe1aWgP4Go0tplOvex6mfIxBlOdDESqtSpG7zu1sxpP1tidH3Z6gkspa71b-r93J1-5Gat6Y-px80eTgQFWbi8YeZJQWT28RQ5qdXUoshZpWchaq2x2vf94cbnNOG5PUNKV3f_m46oOQHc8FQqtyodqVijjNnCZaPQFcyvEAGcPsD-2bw851fM41iIOZw-R8P9FJS6r7nxJx9fZNA%3D) **

[**TELL BIDEN:
GET SERIOUS ABOUT THE BORDER->**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=34e2667f489b4b26a0419bb1efc328a9&_e=4YLvorLi3m2EFxsBHFtyLt-Ajf9zFePTOkPMj0GjCMQQl5vFHbQNzbrJbg1Nx0bJ8YBfjwosjKP1CsXnnMR80_6ZpCfZEKE_wujb6hnr8huGSGFvdsMsMc1Lr95fxorJRTkUWwCaifeupVtPX5XyWI-TaAYg6sC90WbEbccplIriBD2Tni7Sd19CRZnLMW7gXP9WcAgvJ2YLheA0qAuyA39qSdDe1aWgP4Go0tplOvex6mfIxBlOdDESqtSpG7zu9qe2A1yfbjqupS8EN_dMCTZxs0988NOy3uKss-H2W7o_52qvQBKLwcECXDUqSZqDp9D1D3gRRUvoAo3liWoHLR3c-_lhYDwOp5c6sPfuXzOXIaL2V-640RlAjlJBvuBv6-izUaG8Pnt7K_BcCxmBtqh-IoK1ZezL1VwlhDG858M%3D)

Republicans just passed a bill that would require anyone claiming asylum to remain in Mexico while awaiting their court date. That seems like common sense to me. But Democrats call it “extreme.”

In my capacity as a county Sheriff and a candidate for U.S. Senate, I recently began collecting signatures for a petition. I’m sending this petition to President Biden, demanding he negotiates with Republicans to implement their border security bill, and **[I’m hoping you’ll add your name to it today](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=34e2667f489b4b26a0419bb1efc328a9&_e=4YLvorLi3m2EFxsBHFtyLt-Ajf9zFePTOkPMj0GjCMQQl5vFHbQNzbrJbg1Nx0bJ8YBfjwosjKP1CsXnnMR80_6ZpCfZEKE_wujb6hnr8huGSGFvdsMsMc1Lr95fxorJRTkUWwCaifeupVtPX5XyWI-TaAYg6sC90WbEbccplIriBD2Tni7Sd19CRZnLMW7gXP9WcAgvJ2YLheA0qAuyA39qSdDe1aWgP4Go0tplOvex6mfIxBlOdDESqtSpG7zuqVl6ykh_jbBhBd5kvY63PYLfemiS-yZ8_0oaAhlrGZG2gMo2wPUmi59C4JYKooCqPqyuefNZEVehXjfqgZykR8b0aYBmBkwpgVoEaNTtJBD2QmjrBKF4xRpWdWk271SxqhFz1c1LGMIEFZzcHMU1hDJ3aP351KabEzCNOgJBhTU%3D)**.

Fellow Conservative, we must stop the invasion. It’s as simple as that.

We do that by sending law enforcement officials, who know a thing or two about quelling unrest, to **replace Democrats in the Senate who can’t seem to figure out how to do their damn jobs**.

**Border security will be an ongoing problem while Democrats are in office because they simply will not accept responsibility for it, much less come up with a coherent policy that Republicans will support.**

As a Sheriff, I can tell you that the bill House Republicans just passed is one that prioritizes keeping our communities safe - and it’s a bill I would vote for if elected to the Senate. By and large, migrants avoid Pinal County (**where I’m Sheriff**) as much as possible because they know that my deputies and I enforce the law.

[**TELL BIDEN:
GET SERIOUS ABOUT THE BORDER->**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=34e2667f489b4b26a0419bb1efc328a9&_e=4YLvorLi3m2EFxsBHFtyLt-Ajf9zFePTOkPMj0GjCMQQl5vFHbQNzbrJbg1Nx0bJ8YBfjwosjKP1CsXnnMR80_6ZpCfZEKE_wujb6hnr8huGSGFvdsMsMc1Lr95fxorJRTkUWwCaifeupVtPX5XyWI-TaAYg6sC90WbEbccplIriBD2Tni7Sd19CRZnLMW7gXP9WcAgvJ2YLheA0qAuyA39qSdDe1aWgP4Go0tplOvex6mfIxBlOdDESqtSpG7zuWCpjls-Uf6FZpp7E7mELz2Uk7XgJclO-kzR1YZLIfmQ3xh2DjGXS2TTlWeYcML9EmaHUpj7glpVw8E3fdVDfUMdoWLOrcE5WxhAueu69lDAKEUSxRqv3ms99AixeYCL-Web5cBUxZIGO8XMvsXmDdwRYKaIvlAXydme7YeKP43k%3D)

**I’m running for the U.S. Senate to change that.**

Americans need leaders in the federal government with the experience of dealing with migrants firsthand. clean_body: Border security will be an ongoing problem while Democrats are in office because they simply will not accept responsibility for it, much less come up with a coherent policy that Republicans will support. | | Fellow Conservative, Where is President Biden? He’s not in The Situation Room. He’s not at the border, conferring with border patrol agents on the front lines. He’s not at the Capitol negotiating with Republicans over their recently passed border bill. Nope - he’s been riding his bike on the beach in Delaware ... Since Title 42 expired last Thursday at midnight, the situation at the border has become grave. And President Biden seems oblivious to everything but his bike and the ice cream cone he undoubtedly enjoyed after his afternoon outing. As I type this email, migrants who cross the border and request asylum are being given court dates to appear in front of an immigration judge in 2026. Yes, court dates are three years from now. Once migrants are given processing documents, they’re released on their own reconnaissance and often never heard from again. Fellow Conservative, this might be acceptable to Democrat leaders who receive police protection details, Republicans just passed a bill that would require anyone claiming asylum to remain in Mexico while awaiting their court date. That seems like common sense to me. But Democrats call it “extreme.” In my capacity as a county Sheriff and a candidate for U.S. Senate, I recently began collecting signatures for a petition. I’m sending this petition to President Biden, demanding he negotiates with Republicans to implement their border security bill, and . Fellow Conservative, we must stop the invasion. It’s as simple as that. We do that by sending law enforcement officials, who know a thing or two about quelling unrest, to replace Democrats in the Senate who can’t seem to figure out how to do their damn jobs. Border security will be an ongoing problem while Democrats are in office because they simply will not accept responsibility for it, much less come up with a coherent policy that Republicans will support. As a Sheriff, I can tell you that the bill House Republicans just passed is one that prioritizes keeping our communities safe - and it’s a bill I would vote for if elected to the Senate. By and large, migrants avoid Pinal County (where I’m Sheriff) as much as possible because they know that my deputies and I enforce the law. What is unfortunate is that most border communities lack the resources to keep their communities secure from the masses that are descending upon them. I’m running for the U.S. Senate to change that. Americans need leaders in the federal government with the experience of dealing with migrants firsthand. We need leaders who aren’t afraid to tell their constituents the truth. We need leaders in Congress who won’t ignore the dire situation at the border because they’re not directly affected by it. | | | Fellow American, A member of my team reached out to you yesterday, but I wanted to make sure you heard from me personally.
**Our deadline extension is expiring[TONIGHT at MIDNIGHT,](http://links.gopwin.org/u/click?_t=880bb7f57f984ec39ea5a13773012007&_m=19ef538b5a9f46128a481927821bbbdc&_e=VorvGK-ziITVkwFer2kledaUpaq1CoMEMKBxzMIft5UuODBWcDYG_xxK7nC-7F-9n8Akkk7xCm52efW8uczRCUqEJiuZuURtdVE1qmJkFVVFpqXuVwLy_baIt2goIpE9NhM4LK6tRU2k0K42ImjojytpFi_m1_VfUNezQqMuRS-iKCuZKlOgwBR9Oo8tT19BB_5va_DTF6AjGFt9dd-cePSR7etGN_W60aI7ITPBKDDLXbYKcO4Pz5fAELK06ykHJA7ZgjIPhm-5mKGj58SqD12qqgEHEYoJet6F_XeoEPuxrn4FwGtbq-PGeje-ohX_Ur0KIpJx1vnImj8MTi6gMnFRUl4bVwtn9NOSlSWlHaTiRgMr8vpw_ywXY6rrKpkL__ZHpIIqumiZasIUHBWYWg%3D%3D) and we’re still not where we need to be. **
_I’m not going to lie, I’m getting worried._
**With my opponent raking in boatloads of cash from the socialist Left, I’m calling on my grassroots team now:[will you take action before our extension expires to help us take back the Senate in 2024?](http://links.gopwin.org/u/click?_t=880bb7f57f984ec39ea5a13773012007&_m=19ef538b5a9f46128a481927821bbbdc&_e=VorvGK-ziITVkwFer2kledaUpaq1CoMEMKBxzMIft5UuODBWcDYG_xxK7nC-7F-9n8Akkk7xCm52efW8uczRCUqEJiuZuURtdVE1qmJkFVVFpqXuVwLy_baIt2goIpE9NhM4LK6tRU2k0K42ImjojytpFi_m1_VfUNezQqMuRS-iKCuZKlOgwBR9Oo8tT19BB_5va_DTF6AjGFt9dd-cePSR7etGN_W60aI7ITPBKDDLXbYKcO4Pz5fAELK06ykH1qOPvaBspGu1Fd5Q6hyQIAHvb2vZ3QGea3leKPnDmvtIGWhhm0rxEmD0fpR0SU_5LI66LuuGL-bZja9c3kg5sgRawlIq5g-eOpvb5YYfULH8o7zdRPl4f06_9TtcFPK6uGXraJbF8lyOJ6I9tntpmQ%3D%3D)**

https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Hi Peter,
I am reaching out to remind you about our upcoming fundraiser for the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus on May 25th in Nashville. Several of us Democratic leaders have been traveling across the state to strengthen relationships and build support for our efforts to make electoral gains in 2024, and it’s your vital support that makes our work possible.
If you are committed to breaking the supermajority in our state legislature, join us on May 25th at the home of our friends Brooks and Bert Mathews. Every dollar we raise will be spent to fund our Democratic candidates in targeted districts across the state in 2024. Please consider supporting us now by joining our host committee for this event. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may25mathews]
We have strong Democratic candidates ready and willing to run for office in our next election cycle. Help us support them, so that we can build a brighter future for Tennessee families.
With gratitude,
John Ray Clemmons
State Representative

name: =?utf-8?Q?Catherine=20Engelbrecht=20|=20True=20the=20Vote?=
subject: Trump, the Camino, and Us
body:
| | | | | |
---
| | Hi Friend-
You are correct. What you are sensing is real. We are experiencing systemic breakdown of our government and total upheaval of our political landscape. Though we’ve seen it coming for years, the season is finally and fully upon us, happening as Earnest Hemingway once wrote, “slowly and then all at once.” It’s easy to feel downtrodden and disillusioned. Don’t. Dare, with us, to see things differently. There’s lots of work to be done. Let’s do it. No use in feeling sorry for oneself; no sense in hoping there’s a cavalry coming to spare us. It’s not happening. We’re it. The people. The good news is that in our area of focus, elections, citizens can be hyper-engaged in electoral processes and have enormous impact. There is no reason to accept the kind of lawlessness our nation experienced in 2020. Holding the line in 2024 will not be easy, but it can be done. How? We must commit ourselves to the discipline of bringing order to chaos. There aren’t many who are willing to stand with us in this gap, but there is one - and only one we know of – who never flinches in the fight. President Trump’s most recent Town Hall speaks volumes. Where else across our culture can we witness unwavering determination like this?

---
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=b3894978b4&e=ad8cba7e98)
In this setting we saw Trump the Warrior emerge yet again – a symbol of courage and resilience. We included the clip to remind us all of what true grit looks like. You may not see it as I do, and that’s ok, we can agree to disagree. Time will tell the tale.
Through all my years of grassroots work, one thing I’ve learned is that fear is a liar. Courage wins. There are tough days ahead, it’s true. But there will also be days of miracles. What’s got me philosophizing? I’ve had some time to think. You may recall that a few weeks ago I began a trek of the Camino de Santiago, a 500 mile spiritual pilgrimage across Spain. I’m now in the last two weeks of my journey with 400 miles behind me. My purpose was to clear my head and listen to God. And what I keep hearing, day after day, mile after mile is - believe. Believe. Everything starts with belief. Believe we can. And I do. At True the Vote, we see incredible beauty in the power of free and fair elections. Yes, it’s a fight. But it’s also the cornerstone of our United States. It’s worth fighting for. We continue in our work to educate, engage, and protect voters; we recognize fully the critical importance of preserving the sanctity and dignity of the ballot box. Without our efforts, the risk of fraud and moral decline increases, further challenging a culture that is already in upheaval, further distancing the people from a representative government. Economic policy, immigration, healthcare, security... freedom... so many things rely upon a trustworthy system of representation and therefore demand election integrity. We can’t quit. We can’t fail. We must have courage and keep pressing on, no matter how hard it may be. And we will. Thank you for your unwavering support of True the Vote and belief in what we do and why we do it. We have big plans ahead. We’re stronger than ever. We’re leaders. And we can do this. Together. Have courage. Believe. See you all soon.
Ever onward -
**PS - If you can help support our work**[**,**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=dc34f5b235&e=ad8cba7e98)**including the six lawsuits we’re currently defending, please do**[**donate today**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=818ebfe0fe&e=ad8cba7e98)**. Thank you so much.**
“ _Catherine on The Way_ ” by Artful Dodger
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=1005ca4bc7&e=ad8cba7e98)
| | | | |
---

You are receiving this email because you opted in for updates via the True the Vote website.

**Our mailing address is:**
True the VotePO Box 3109# 19128Houston, TX 77253-3109
[Add us to your address book](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/profile?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=409a1be5d1) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=409a1be5d1).
|
---

| **Lawmakers agree to expand coverage for post-partum care**
The Senate on May 8 voted 26-1 to grant final passage to legislation expanding coverage for postpartum care under Medicaid from 60 days following a pregnancy to one year. The House of Representatives had approved the bill, which includes several other provisions related to health care generally and women’s health in particular, the previous week on a vote of 119-23, with four members voting “present.”

Democratic lawmakers have pushed for expanded post-partum coverage for years in an effort to combat Missouri’s rising maternal mortality rate. Majority Republicans took up the cause this session after the U.S. Supreme Court eliminated the constitutional right to abortion last summer, allowing a Missouri law to take effect that bans the procedure in nearly all circumstances. With abortion no longer an option for many Missourians, the demand for post-partum care is expected to significantly increase.
Senate Bill 106, sponsored by state Sen. Lauren Arthur, D-Kansas City, also prohibits health care providers from performing prostate, anal or pelvic examinations on an anesthetized or unconscious patient without the patient’s advance permission. In addition, the bill bars insurers from imposing cost-sharing requirements for diagnostic breast examinations, supplemental breast examinations or mammography screenings.
Another important provision, added by the House to the wide-ranging bill, ends the “cliff effect” that strips participants in the welfare, food stamp or child care subsidy programs of their benefits if they start earning too much money from their job to qualify. The bill creates transitional benefits to allow working recipients to continue receiving some assistance until they earn enough to be self-sufficient.
---
|
---
| **GOP bills targeting transgender children win final passage**
The House of Representatives on May 10 sent a pair of bills to the governor making it illegal to provide gender-affirming health care to transgender minors and prohibiting transgender athletes from competing on a sports team that doesn’t correspond with their birth gender. The bills together were a top priority for Missouri Republicans as part of a national movement among GOP-controlled states to enact laws persecuting transgender residents.

Senate Bill 49 would ban gender-affirming surgery for minors, which currently only happens in rare situations, and also outlaw the use of puberty-blocking drugs and hormone therapy for transitioning minors. Those who have already started transitioning when the bill is slated to take effect on Aug. 28 would be exempt from the latter restriction. The House voted 108-50 in favor of the bill.

Senate Bill 39 would prohibit public and private schools from allowing transgender athletes to compete on sports teams that corresponds with their gender identity at any level, from kindergarten through college. The House passed it on a vote of 109-49, with one member voting “present.”

As part of a compromise brokered when the Senate originally approved the bills in March, the restrictions on athletic participation and the limits on puberty-blocking drugs and hormone therapy are set to expire in 2027 unless lawmakers later renew them. Gov. Mike Parson, a Republican, is expected to sign both measures into law.
---
|
---
| **House votes to exempt Social Security benefits from taxation**
The House of Representatives on May 8 voted 154-2 to grant final passage to legislation fully exempting Social Security benefits from state income taxes. The bill, which will cost the state an estimated $318.77 million a year in lost revenue, also authorizes counties to provide a homestead property tax credit to senior citizens.

Existing state law already exempts Social Security benefits from taxation for most Missourians, those who earn less than $85,000 for an individual, or $100,000 for a married couple filing jointly. Senate Bill 190 would extend the exemption to higher-income recipients.

Another provision of the bill would authorize individual counties to establish a tax credit that eligible senior citizens could claim on property taxes owed on a home that they both own and live in as their primary residence. Counties could establish the credit either by enacting an ordinance or putting the matter on the local ballot for voter approval.

The Senate approved the SB 190 in April on a vote of 33-1. Since the House made no changes to it, the bill goes to the governor for his consideration.
---
|
---
| **Lawmakers approve ban on texting, phone use while driving**
Texting while driving would be illegal for motorists of all ages under legislation sent to the governor on May 10 by votes of 97-40, with 12 members voting “present,” in the House of Representatives and 26-7 in the Senate. Under existing law, texting while driving is prohibited only for drivers under age 21.

In addition to imposing a broader prohibition on texting while driving, Senate Bill 398 would bar drivers from talking on a cell phone when behind the wheel unless using hands-free technology or making a call to report an emergency situation.

Police would be prohibited from stopping motorists solely for using an electronic device, but could issue a citation if the stop is for another offense or an accident is involved. Until Jan. 1, 2025, officers could only issue warnings. After that, a violation would be an infraction punishable by a maximum fine of $150 for a first offense, $250 for a second offense within a two-year period and $500 for a third or subsequent offense in a two-year period.

SB 398 also would require car dealers to collect sales taxes on motor vehicle purchases at the point of sale. Under existing law, the sales tax is paid when the owner licenses the vehicle with the state. To avoid paying the tax, however, some vehicle owners will continue driving on the temporary tags they receive from the dealer long after the tags have expired.
---
|
---

| **HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS **
The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19).

SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing.

Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and [download applications](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=e055452033&e=a088917f89). Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email [disastercustomerservice@sba.gov](mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov) for more information on SBA disaster assistance.
