| **RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY **
Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit:

As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy.

Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that **anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program.**

Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. Shipping is free.

---
|
---
| **LOW-COST INSULIN** Before COVID-19 insulin users were having a difficult time affording medication due to the tripling of the cost over the last decade. In the wake of COVID-19, it has become even more difficult for those who rely on insulin to afford the inflated cost. Eli Lilly and Company has introduced a program to purchase Basaglar insulin at significant cost savings. Please call Lilly Diabetes Solution Center at 833-808-1234 between 9 am and 9 pm, M-F to see if you qualify for these savings. More information can be found at the [Eli Lilly and Co. Website](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=daf8a1f8a2&e=a088917f89).

Eli Lilly and Company has introduced a program to purchase Basaglar insulin at significant cost savings. Please call Lilly Diabetes Solution Center at 833-808-1234 between 9 am and 9 pm, M-F to see if you qualify for these savings. More information can be found at the . | | "COVID-19 Food Stamp Information" | "Student Loans - COVID-19" | "When and How to Use Masks" | | Stay up to date on COVID -19 by using this online resource guide for creditable information while at home. | | Check the Status of your Missouri State Tax refund | | | CITIZENS SERVICE BUREAU If you are having issues with street lights, dumpsters, trees, graffiti, potholes or other such items, please report them to the Citizens' Service Bureau. You can call 314-622-4800 or report online at | | | | | | Keep In Touch Phone: Email: mailto:Steven.Roberts@house.mo.gov Office Address: Room 329 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Roberts for St. Louis, All rights reserved. |LIST:DESCRIPTION| Paid for by Roberts for St. Louis, James D. name: Matt Strickland
subject: No, You Move
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Strickland
body:
After my older brother was gunned down and killed, I escaped street violence by enlisting in the Army when I was 17. | | | | [ ](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F7HGRDWTpMXaB3tlikYHFdg%2FIicjU763BhLtIyNtGAxkKFWw/1/010001882ac831d7-91047035-0548-4e60-a53b-ec30e5ca345e-000000/_pt_bh0CSD36IGc1Zpa6OmB8pGE=322)
---
* * *

Please read the message below from our sponsor, Friends of Matt Strickland.
We encourage you to [**visit their site today**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F7HGRDWTpMXaB3tlikYHFdg%2FIicjU763BhLtIyNtGAxkKFWw/2/010001882ac831d7-91047035-0548-4e60-a53b-ec30e5ca345e-000000/hNtObOERlkVFYsi-PcLAjkqulVg=322).

* * *
| | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F7HGRDWTpMXaB3tlikYHFdg%2FIicjU763BhLtIyNtGAxkKFWw/3/010001882ac831d7-91047035-0548-4e60-a53b-ec30e5ca345e-000000/zpoYUMRPSeKgwmzin5O-eet_Giw=322)
Patriot,

[](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F7HGRDWTpMXaB3tlikYHFdg%2FIicjU763BhLtIyNtGAxkKFWw/4/010001882ac831d7-91047035-0548-4e60-a53b-ec30e5ca345e-000000/pSSIUzFvWVYL-8928jOC-jTatcw=322) You’ve probably never heard of me, and if it wasn’t for the Army, I probably wouldn’t be alive today to even write you.

My name is Matt Strickland, and I’m running for Senate in Virginia.
Early voting has already started for my primary, and I could really **[use your help in this last stretch](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F7HGRDWTpMXaB3tlikYHFdg%2FIicjU763BhLtIyNtGAxkKFWw/5/010001882ac831d7-91047035-0548-4e60-a53b-ec30e5ca345e-000000/jeEGdtdY1QcK_a8AFPSbjC5sqCs=322)**.

After my older brother was gunned down and killed, I escaped street violence by enlisting in the Army when I was 17.

I reported to my first duty station on September 10, 2001. The next day the Towers fell, and I spent the next decade fighting in Iraq and Afghanistan. I went from dodging gangs to fighting terrorists . . . and **it feels like I’ve never stopped fighting**.

Let me tell you why . . .

After working for Blackwater and working several deployments as a combat medic, I came home and just wanted some peace with my family.

I bought a food truck and started doing what I loved. It was a hit, and me and my wife, Maria, expanded to a restaurant that we named Gourmeltz.

Life was good for a stretch, then the pandemic hit, and the government illegally ordered me to close my restaurant.

Now listen, I spent too much time fighting for our country to come home and be told that I couldn’t provide for my family . . . that I had to shut the doors to my business and lay off the staff I worked so hard to hire and train.

Maria and I prayed about it. We talked to our staff, and then I talked to my kids.

We have three boys and a beautiful girl.

One of my boys is into comic books, and when I was in his room, I picked up one of them and there was Captain America with this quote . . .

| | ❝ | “Doesn’t matter what the press says.
Doesn’t matter what the Politicians or the mobs say.
Doesn’t matter if the whole country decides that something is wrong is something right.

This nation was founded on one principle above all else:
The requirement that we stand up for what we believe,
no matter the odds or consequences.
When the mob and the press and the whole world tell you to move, your job is to plant yourself like a tree beside the river of truth, and tell the whole world –

‘**No, YOU move**.’”

---|---

And that’s what I did.

The day after an order to shut down was posted on my door, I went to work that morning, opened up, and let the customers in.

The government revoked my permits, my liquor license and even raided the restaurant with armed agents . . . **and I stood my ground and NEVER closed**.

I took the government to court and finally won after nearly losing everything.

And that experience opened my eyes to our government and politicians, and that’s why **[I’m running today and asking for your support](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F7HGRDWTpMXaB3tlikYHFdg%2FIicjU763BhLtIyNtGAxkKFWw/6/010001882ac831d7-91047035-0548-4e60-a53b-ec30e5ca345e-000000/m4NJVK5zqF3FZrKgxMff5FgqP48=322).**

Now, I’m running as a Republican but I’m not proud of a few of the spineless, establishment hacks I’ll be serving with when I win.

These are the same folks that I contacted for help when I had a government boot on my neck . . . and **they’re the same folks who ignored me UNTIL I won**.

And yeah, after I finally won, they all showed up. One even offered to fly a flag over the state Capitol in my honor. I told him, “No thanks.”

**I’m running to CRUSH THE ESTABLISHMENT** . . . Republican or Democrat, I don’t care. If they do nothing when the freedoms of Americans are taken away, they’re all the same to me.

I’m running for Senate in Virginia to give a voice and two fists to all of the people just like us . . . who are powerless to the politicians and their government.

We won’t be powerless anymore . . . **[but I’ll need you to back me for that to happen](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F7HGRDWTpMXaB3tlikYHFdg%2FIicjU763BhLtIyNtGAxkKFWw/7/010001882ac831d7-91047035-0548-4e60-a53b-ec30e5ca345e-000000/SggwmZzTsoRDipcuOQjypeZCOPg=322)**.

You in?

My primary is coming up in just a few days, and **none of the clowns in power want me to win** because they know I’ll be the guy who stands in their way, looks them dead in the eye and tells them, “**No, YOU move**.”

**[Help me get to it.](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F7HGRDWTpMXaB3tlikYHFdg%2FIicjU763BhLtIyNtGAxkKFWw/8/010001882ac831d7-91047035-0548-4e60-a53b-ec30e5ca345e-000000/j_jjWwXpNgNXjtXMbwWd_cFXIMM=322)**

Respectfully,

Matt Strickland
Candidate
Virginia Senate

P.S. Now that you’ve read some of my story, you get why they’re all gunning for me. I will never work for them, I work for us. They know it and they’re throwing tons of money behind my competitor to stop me. But I got you. [**Pitch in and let’s show them how it’s done.**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F7HGRDWTpMXaB3tlikYHFdg%2FIicjU763BhLtIyNtGAxkKFWw/9/010001882ac831d7-91047035-0548-4e60-a53b-ec30e5ca345e-000000/BmEnn3265_S9-TLl2XxdotLUUG4=322)

Paid for by Friends of Matt Strickland
| (C) 2023 Illoominate Media
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
Material Connection Disclosure: The sender of this email may receive compensation for the advertising contained in this message. Any products or services offered by sponsors or advertisers have not been evaluated by Illominate Media and as such no warranty or claims are made.

** To opt-out of marketing emails like these, please unsubscribe below.
[Unsubscribe](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Funsubscribe%2FwJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so%2FjNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg%2FIicjU763BhLtIyNtGAxkKFWw/1/010001882ac831d7-91047035-0548-4e60-a53b-ec30e5ca345e-000000/ugBc79sqk3LMsbEepXOAG5fxcUk=322)
[View Web Version](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fw%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FjNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg%2FIicjU763BhLtIyNtGAxkKFWw/1/010001882ac831d7-91047035-0548-4e60-a53b-ec30e5ca345e-000000/9wXBV_e-ZnaWjPROZGEeFz8Ja7k=322) **
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Russ=20Vought?=
subject: Speaking truth to power
body:
To say i'm proud of my team would be an understatement. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10356939?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | | Friends,

When was the last time you saw someone speak truth to power?

I’m not talking about virtue-signaling or shameless “diversity, equity, and inclusion” speeches we see in government, academia, and corporate board rooms across America.

**I’m talking about a private citizen testifying before numerous members of Congress** on how the Federal Government has become woke and weaponized against the American people.

Last week my colleague at Center for Renewing America, Paige Agostin, did just that.

_With cameras recording and members of Congress listening_ , Paige testified before the House Budget Committee, exposing “woke” ideology as identity-based neo-Marxism that has overrun our federal bureaucracy and is now aimed squarely at the American people.

Her testimony was bold, courageous, and laden with _irrefutable evidence_ based on indepth research from my team on every major department in the federal government.
---
| **WATCH:[CRA’s Paige Agostin: The Departments of Wokeness Must Be Stopped](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=b3f7e47c15&e=17913c7d6d)**
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=de90cc5411&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| Watch Paige’s full testimony [here](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=95cc84d3f0&e=17913c7d6d).

To say I'm proud of Paige and my team would be an understatement.

**CRA Primer:[Woke Weaponized Examples of Cuts](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=04e0625474&e=17913c7d6d)**

In the past six months we’ve rolled out a Budget and we’ve managed to get major parts of our proposals to defund the woke bureaucracy into legislation now being negotiated in the debt limit fight.

**Friends, this is what speaking _real_ truth to power looks like. **

If you’re ready to [join us in the trenches](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=2328e8e3c8&e=17913c7d6d) in our fight to save America, here is how [you can help](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=c27f253ea6&e=17913c7d6d).
---
| Sincerely,

Russ Vought
President
Center for Renewing America
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=3d48099fd1&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=5e172abc37&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=3822cdf857&e=17913c7d6d)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Center for Renewing America, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
300 Independence Ave. SE
Washington, DC 20003

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=340a9f3c7d&e=17913c7d6d&c=fcde0d0e3e) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=340a9f3c7d&e=17913c7d6d&c=fcde0d0e3e).

subject: You don’t think Jamie Raskin should run for Senate??

body:
We’re really surprised to hear that...
| Earlier this week we reached out with the AMAZING news that Congressman Jamie Raskin is considering running for Maryland’s Senate seat!

**This is an incredible opportunity to protect our Democratic Senate majority – but we didn’t hear anything from you!**

[**We need our top 5,000 supporters to respond _before_ Jamie Raskin makes a decision to launch his campaign, so please, take our urgent poll now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/raskin-senate/?source=VPP_20230517_EMPOLL_E2_T1_NS&t=6&akid=7755%2E878179%2E5O5Tqf) | [**_RESPOND BY MIDNIGHT_ : SHOULD JAMIE RASKIN RUN FOR U.S. SENATE? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/raskin-senate/?source=VPP_20230517_EMPOLL_E2_T1_NS&t=7&akid=7755%2E878179%2E5O5Tqf)
---
_– VPP Polling Team_
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: BREAKING (via VPP) <[info@e.protectvoting.org](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/raskin-senate/?source=VPP_20230517_EMPOLL_E2_T1_NS&t=8&akid=7755%2E878179%2E5O5Tqf)>
Date: Sun, May 14, 2023 at 8:31 AM
Subject: re: Jamie Raskin’s potential Senate bid
To: You <[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/raskin-senate/?source=VPP_20230517_EMPOLL_E2_T1_NS&t=9&akid=7755%2E878179%2E5O5Tqf)>
**_BREAKING:_**
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/raskin-senate/?source=VPP_20230517_EMPOLL_E2_T1_NS&t=10&akid=7755%2E878179%2E5O5Tqf)
We have INCREDIBLE NEWS — Congressman Jamie Raskin is “strongly considering” running for Maryland’s open Senate seat! _**YES!**_

_Due to this major update, we’re asking our 5,000 top supporters what you think:_
[**SHOULD JAMIE RASKIN RUN FOR SENATE?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/raskin-senate/?source=VPP_20230517_EMPOLL_E2_T1_NS&t=11&akid=7755%2E878179%2E5O5Tqf)
[YES, ABSOLUTELY! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/raskin-senate/?source=VPP_20230517_EMPOLL_E2_T1_NS&t=12&akid=7755%2E878179%2E5O5Tqf)
---

[UNSURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/raskin-senate/?source=VPP_20230517_EMPOLL_E2_T1_NS&t=14&akid=7755%2E878179%2E5O5Tqf)
From leading the charge to impeach Donald Trump to exposing the truth about the deadly January 6 insurrection, Jamie Raskin is a national HERO.

If he’s elected to the Senate, we’ll protect our slim 50-50 Senate majority. **_The MAGA mob’s takeover would be stopped in its tracks!_**

So before Raskin makes his decision, we need to hear from EVERY Democrat reading this by midnight:
[**SHOULD JAMIE RASKIN RUN FOR SENATE?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/raskin-senate/?source=VPP_20230517_EMPOLL_E2_T1_NS&t=15&akid=7755%2E878179%2E5O5Tqf)
[YES, ABSOLUTELY! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/raskin-senate/?source=VPP_20230517_EMPOLL_E2_T1_NS&t=16&akid=7755%2E878179%2E5O5Tqf)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

| | **How did I go from the teachers unions to school choice?** Let me tell you my story.

As a first-generation Chilean American, I came to the United States seeking endless opportunities.

I was from a disadvantaged and not well-connected family, which means I grew up in the one-size-fits-all public school system.

**My education suffered as a result.** I struggled in large classroom settings, was often bullied, and found myself stuck in an education system that didn't work for me because of our financial situation.

I realized my story was not uncommon and recognized that **the surest way to attain the American Dream is to gain access to a good education. **

I thought the best way to help fix the education system and the next generation of students attain the American Dream was by working for organizations that support education and teachers.

**But, I quickly learned that this teachers union didn 't have the best interests of students or even teachers in mind.** They seemed more concerned with money and maintaining the status quo of the broken system.

That's when I knew if I was going to make a difference, I had to make a change.

I founded the **Federaci on Americana Para Los Niños**, which brings information about school choice to Hispanic communities and joined the American Federation for Children as a Senior Fellow.

After leaving the teachers union and joining the school choice revolution, I never looked back.

**[_Friend, now I 'm asking YOU to join the school choice revolution by pledging a donation of $20.23 or an amount of your choice today >>>_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c43c0bd64c474e73bcf06c7f7375ac33&_e=aBrIUg5peqry5j7RILh6ZYsRHxVJ5RWAEArFVZDBvAk23ERkZ4xcrNtcsMbDCTv1fyXrKSQmsPBl01oJJ6K99Xlp9DhGMEJO2Z7AfkpbmDMTeBPyzstjNScquUx_iPKYsPMn2K0ShLRwnHxjzD_MPjjvNxSYQYnUgfAuP56lxqVHd5Kd9Y2KQM9Mn1yNYJDolNHyMtQw6b-vCI4nYyqA8NSPd4OJbRvorTd0Wg9hM79JZ1bTmO85fU6VuKexFZXL1QKGepfTiVS3tOZvKK6wRRMDskCIPx79AeH4fziPM2b75DEjjaXhI3A7nl7VPO4OKXBe5TXfYsj4Flgr9KcAEB5aQRbaJQhFR-aXxHBQwKmktNmiy2aZ3kjlIQhHTU26cyu1vurqCZ2ATJ1c0LSDtZB7BL30J9w3gOPn61kegME%3D)**

As a first-generation Chilean American, I came to the United States seeking endless opportunities. I was from a disadvantaged and not well-connected family, which means I grew up in the one-size-fits-all public school system. My education suffered as a result. I struggled in large classroom settings, was often bullied, and found myself stuck in an education system that didn't work for me because of our financial situation. I realized my story was not uncommon and recognized that the surest way to attain the American Dream is to gain access to a good education. I thought the best way to help fix the education system and the next generation of students attain the American Dream was by working for organizations that support education and teachers. But, I quickly learned that this teachers union didn 't have the best interests of students or even teachers in mind. They seemed more concerned with money and maintaining the status quo of the broken system. That's when I knew if I was going to make a difference, I had to make a change. I founded the Federaci on Americana Para Los Niños, which brings information about school choice to Hispanic communities and joined the American Federation for Children as a Senior Fellow. After leaving the teachers union and joining the school choice revolution, I never looked back. | | | | Thank you, Valeria Gurr Senior Fellow American Federation for Children | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by American Federation for Children Contributions or gifts to the American Federation of Children are not tax deductible as charitable contributions. | | American Federation for Children 5950 Berkshire Lane, Suite 325 Dallas, TX 75225 | | | | Please see a brief message from the American Federation for Children (AFC): This is a prospecting message not affiliated with this list and is not meant to be an endorsement or opposition towards AFC Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We have to stop medical experimentation on our kids
body:
we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy"

| |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I'm asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left's medical mutilation of our children in the name of "gender dysphoria."
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1c5d98627a6140fbae364905d29b55db&_e=NrxHZyBLUVAamulIbxxAiRTPgsHy1roLZ-RcagDQVhOBeHZr4DeAB6Z2HZOUDTg0BpQJdru6G3OkIwOgeQQk7lC28Tcyx_gpsyM6zPk99Zx1vSqIC9_q3vPu6aHWZ-DFqiWSxnanP7rQQz8Uaa-X81h2NV0LeBf-_RK_t075Yin158LkjzenmLPsxv6cavaxQBUCGm1ryxr8YiBovSrLBvewqicyQ2TqskLJxb-daplGQU_8O0mLzfSFTum5DM6ZHbeECup0eIXS0uwRpM0Ekikl450wrRrBXAtMX7oovZmSONB0AH3SX67f2OWQBgLK9Z1Ta0sTD8dyl9ThS9xnpifFp2hzIs0wurl1SrgXJ2ExnjTRHxPC0ZQ8l-d7PvG-)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker 's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: ** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
"Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?"
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I'm asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I 'm asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions. **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1c5d98627a6140fbae364905d29b55db&_e=NrxHZyBLUVAamulIbxxAiRTPgsHy1roLZ-RcagDQVhOBeHZr4DeAB6Z2HZOUDTg0BpQJdru6G3OkIwOgeQQk7lC28Tcyx_gpsyM6zPk99Zx1vSqIC9_q3vPu6aHWZ-DFqiWSxnanP7rQQz8Uaa-X81h2NV0LeBf-_RK_t075Yin158LkjzenmLPsxv6cavaxQBUCGm1ryxr8YiBovSrLBvewqicyQ2TqskLJxb-daplOi5N81rZxX5s7xQucG95kxIqfVzs8yiunjAxSjThboyfTaRam2zj3T5Axv2mDqLKopNSavKltVCojoK4u68mBERcTXJ1tsmYJo7RiK4IG6zOWHR7Kn7NdLSL8pvFDjbe_lucn7Oq_xnQATHWhPD7q) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don't act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she'll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that's where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1c5d98627a6140fbae364905d29b55db&_e=NrxHZyBLUVAamulIbxxAiRTPgsHy1roLZ-RcagDQVhOBeHZr4DeAB6Z2HZOUDTg0BpQJdru6G3OkIwOgeQQk7lC28Tcyx_gpsyM6zPk99Zx1vSqIC9_q3vPu6aHWZ-DFqiWSxnanP7rQQz8Uaa-X81h2NV0LeBf-_RK_t075Yin158LkjzenmLPsxv6cavaxQBUCGm1ryxr8YiBovSrLBvewqicyQ2TqskLJxb-daplj3EkgH_HNYNqGa91qXy1mL9r07_iLQc-g2BrMvR0tXMgeDz1r4ZYeaminYx0IUix6vTYpRMSXdtE5_6EOIqWJZrv1J87ecC92jFa-K9abyuuo1DXR6Sad7zCXsFWE_dqiyIruatUWytFMTeAbM4fA) Whatever amount you're able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1c5d98627a6140fbae364905d29b55db&_e=NrxHZyBLUVAamulIbxxAiRTPgsHy1roLZ-RcagDQVhOBeHZr4DeAB6Z2HZOUDTg0BpQJdru6G3OkIwOgeQQk7lC28Tcyx_gpsyM6zPk99Zx1vSqIC9_q3vPu6aHWZ-DFqiWSxnanP7rQQz8Uaa-X81h2NV0LeBf-_RK_t075Yin158LkjzenmLPsxv6cavaxQBUCGm1ryxr8YiBovSrLBvewqicyQ2TqskLJxb-dapnkF9uWc0e3yXgWwdinTnhDkFTE2GleK0FYatUcqBW1_EBtFGKKPho7m5frONuf9Dv_mxPXnf-zBrg4eBCE4XRjbTUl32H0cEVoXEx0uA23X7S1MXi3NpSdZ7nCMUfUe3SxPkd7F9HTcr6uItlNV02p)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe's landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these "physicians" abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1c5d98627a6140fbae364905d29b55db&_e=NrxHZyBLUVAamulIbxxAiRTPgsHy1roLZ-RcagDQVhOBeHZr4DeAB6Z2HZOUDTg0BpQJdru6G3OkIwOgeQQk7lC28Tcyx_gpsyM6zPk99Zx1vSqIC9_q3vPu6aHWZ-DFqiWSxnanP7rQQz8Uaa-X81h2NV0LeBf-_RK_t075Yin158LkjzenmLPsxv6cavaxQBUCGm1ryxr8YiBovSrLBvewqicyQ2TqskLJxb-dapn0YtF6kT9LSn1VoNAZYrGfjAfKmfyAdeOkTEYpMYMRA6xos73v9NXl3BF_vsR-J4Whlju_WqnL1YpB3HjLNlIKs_SsA0ro6idg8p910ADCPgxUQtKH5bLEDJkJ6h-FjGfZ8YkDnKT1udj0n2R8MWGI) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole's landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1c5d98627a6140fbae364905d29b55db&_e=NrxHZyBLUVAamulIbxxAiRTPgsHy1roLZ-RcagDQVhOBeHZr4DeAB6Z2HZOUDTg0BpQJdru6G3OkIwOgeQQk7lC28Tcyx_gpsyM6zPk99Zx1vSqIC9_q3vPu6aHWZ-DFqiWSxnanP7rQQz8Uaa-X81h2NV0LeBf-_RK_t075Yin158LkjzenmLPsxv6cavaxQBUCGm1ryxr8YiBovSrLBvewqicyQ2TqskLJxb-dapndT0ZzbeDOsXzrUDcJg6KhIhr5Z1ALRBpsYvIBj_mMrM4E1ctNAMjCmIdvR3DEa-TWD5Zv71MQuOSKKkeChm2zEdfM4ipm58WMrz7YrGJxPyZ3D76Eg7Urd6Srq83-tJ3xj4qwurJc_MC3wiaUqXRa)

body:
Here's the latest on how I'm fighting for you in Congress

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63427736/406753657/-345890914?refcode=EM_FR_230515NoteFromNikki_NB_5_TESTA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjgwM2I4NS1kYWY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B7GhkiMtCoYV5MoLtI6DcNt8uwQCrV1bdPBYHWZum6M=)
Hey, Team. I hope you’ve been getting the updates from my team on the latest from our campaign, but I wanted to reach out to you directly with an update on what I’m working on for Illinois.

It has been so rewarding to meet with constituents and hear your experiences firsthand. I’ve taken those conversations with me to Washington, and forged bipartisan relationships to create meaningful solutions addressing those most important issues to our communities.

I’ve been encouraging efforts to address the pain folks are feeling at the pump by lowering gas prices and increasing ethanol availability, which supports our farmers, too. I’m fighting against far-right GOP efforts to force a government shutdown in debt ceiling discussions. And alongside Senator Durbin and Senator Duckworth, I secured millions in federal funds to modernize our rail system and improve transportation access and efficiency across the state.

[I’m fighting every day in Congress to improve the lives of our working families, and tackle the issues you care about most. Can I count on you to stand with me by contributing $3, $10, or whatever you can to my campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63427739/406753658/-345890914?refcode=EM_FR_230515NoteFromNikki_NB_5_TESTA_l1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjgwM2I4NS1kYWY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B7GhkiMtCoYV5MoLtI6DcNt8uwQCrV1bdPBYHWZum6M=)

[#VeteranOfTheDay Army Veteran Charity Earley](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zht24jlegebrll9pup5ddcib9kglaqmnep4apdf0_rp22sh2s8i66o71cphm0o72c3h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38cth6kpjactmekpradrmeej3fddnk9g64pj7k1imf937cuhnacbl69q37dtj65obac9k6jqq8cjlmjqq6t9hekp78ctlkoob8cjkm5qfb99k69orad7nk8iv0)
Born in December 1918 in Kittrell, North Carolina, Charity A. Earley was the oldest of four children. Raised in Columbia, South Carolina, by her father who was a minister and her mother, a former teacher, she excelled in school and became valedictorian at Booker T. Washington High School. After completing high school, she attended Wilberforce University of Ohio, where she studied Latin, math and physics. Upon graduating, she taught math at a local high school while working on a master's degree in psychology at Ohio State University.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: ALERT: Grassroots Conservatives Once Again Targeted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Republican Party
body:
New revelations show that conservatives were targeted not just by the Democratic Party of Illinois, but by senior leaders of the IL GOP.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/701f4d351842/alert-grassroots-conservatives-once-again-targeted?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a36da31945-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_17_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a36da31945-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Illinois Review eBlast Powered By
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a36da31945-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_17_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a36da31945-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

IL GOP Secretly Supported a Slate of Anti-Grassroots Candidates in Will County During April 4th Election, and Improperly Used Mailers to Attack the Conservative-Base of the Party (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/il-gop-secretly-supported-a-slate-of-anti-grassroots-candidates-in-will-county-during-april-4th-election-and-improperly-used-mailers-to-attack-the-conservative-base-of-the-party.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a36da31945-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_17_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a36da31945-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

The Illinois Republican Party remained mostly silent during the April 4th election cycle, with the exception of two social media posts encouraging people to vote – but behind the scenes, the IL GOP general counsel and top advisor to chairman Don Tracy was working as a paid legal advisor to an anti-grassroots slate of candidates, and approving mailers with the IL GOP postage discount (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-weaponized-postage-discount-to-attack-conservative-candidates-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a36da31945-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_17_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a36da31945-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) – despite Tracy’s comments that the state party wasn’t going to get involved in the election, in another dig aimed directly at the conservative base of the party.

Tracy and the IL GOP despise the grassroots – and they’ve spent the last year proving it.

During the 2022 primary, senior IL GOP officials backed the anti-grassroots gubernatorial candidate Richard Irvin, who in previous elections, pulled
Democratic Primary ballots (https://twitter.com/markmaxwelltv/status/1471589397552320517?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a36da31945-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_17_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a36da31945-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in 2014, 2016 and 2020.

During the General Election, the IL GOP deliberately ignored the grassroots-preferred candidates for governor and attorney general, and even left them off of social media posts, with the exception of congratulating them on their primary victories.

At the Republican State Central Committee meeting in December, the IL GOP sent a very clear
message (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-establishment-to-grassroots-only-rich-donor-voices-matter.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a36da31945-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_17_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a36da31945-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to the over 200-plus grassroots activists in attendance that, “only rich, donor voices matter.”

And earlier this month, Tracy secretly created an
Endorsement Policy Committee (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/don-tracy-secretly-creates-il-gop-endorsement-committee-in-attempt-to-block-grassroots-from-winning-future-primary-elections-catching-gop-leaders-by-surprise.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a36da31945-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_17_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a36da31945-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , which Tracy will chair – paving the way for the chairman and the state party to officially endorse their preferred candidates in primary elections, in an apparent dig at the grassroots-base of the party.

In January, Tracy floated this idea during an interview with
Bishop on Air (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O6DHuWDOgrI&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a36da31945-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_17_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a36da31945-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , and blamed the top of the ticket for the midterm election losses this past November – saying that the IL GOP needs to re-evaluate their primary election neutrality policy moving forward.

In other words, Tracy wants to prevent conservative grassroots candidates from winning primary elections in the future – and he’s going to ensure that by creating this committee and adopting policies that make it harder for conservatives to win races in Illinois.

But Illinois Review has recently learned that IL GOP general counsel
John Fogarty (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/why-don-tracy-supports-the-il-gop-endorsing-in-primaries-his-close-allies-get-rich-during-the-campaign-season.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a36da31945-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_17_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a36da31945-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , who is still paid by the state party – and continues to serve as a top aide to Tracy, was advising a slate of anti-grassroots candidates in Will County during the April 4th election cycle called Integrity for Homer Glen (https://integrityforhomerglen.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a36da31945-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_17_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a36da31945-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .
IL GOP General Counsel John Fogarty was paid by Citizens to Elect Christina Neitzke-Troike and Integrity for Homer Glen. (Source: Illinois State Board of Elections website)

And some of the candidates on Integrity for Homer Glen were identified as Democrats, including Homer Glen Village Clerk candidate Candice Bielski (https://integrityforhomerglen.com/meet-our-slate/candice-bielski/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a36da31945-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_17_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a36da31945-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , who according to records, is listed as a “soft Democrat.”
Records indicate that Candice Bielski, a member of the Integrity for Homer Glen slate, is a "soft Democrat."

Fogarty is also one of the officials in charge of the IL GOP postage discount usage, and so it’s no surprise that Integrity for Homer Glen sent out 13 mailers targeting Homer Forward (https://www.homerforward.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a36da31945-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_17_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a36da31945-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) – the slate representing the conservative grassroots base of the party.

Last winter, when officials associated with Homer Forward inquired about usage of the IL GOP postage discount, IL GOP officials denied their request, stating that the postage discount was temporarily “suspended.”

But that was a lie – the IL GOP postage discount was already in use, and it was being used against their slate.

Usage of the postage discount is for official IL GOP use only. But hiring Fogarty, as Neitzke-Troike and Integrity for Homer Glen did, almost guarantees your ability to use it – even if, improperly.

In the correct example, Permit No. 64, which is associated with the IL GOP, and used in the General Election, lists the return address as,

Paid for by the Illinois Republican Party
PO Box 78
Springfield, IL 62705
This mailer is an example of the proper use of the IL GOP postage discount, including Permit No. 64 and the return address linked to the IL GOP.

But Fogarty and Integrity for Homer Glen – his client, in one example, use the IL GOP Permit No. 64, but they list the return address as,

Paid for by Citizens to Elect Christina Neitzke-Troike
13256 W Hiawatha Dr
Homer Glen, IL 60491
An example of an improper use of the IL GOP postage discount, listing IL GOP Permit No. 64, but an address not associated with the IL GOP.

In another example, Fogarty uses the IL GOP Permit No. 64 – in an attack mailer leveled against conservative grassroots candidate Rose Reynders, and a member of the Homer Forward slate, but this time, they list a return address for an organization that doesn’t exist, and whose address is an empty lot.

Committee for Leadership & Fiscal Responsibility
380 E Joe Orr Rd
Chicago Heights, IL 60411
An example of an improper use of the IL GOP postage discount, listing IL GOP Permit No. 64, but an address not associated with the IL GOP. In fact the address listed is an empty lot.
The address listed for the Committee for Leadership & Fiscal Responsibility, an address associated with the IL GOP Postage No. 64, is a vacant lot. (Source: Google StreetView)

Three examples with the same postage permit number, but three different return addresses. And only one is correct, and that’s the mailer paid for by the Illinois Republican Party – proving yet again, more examples of improper usage of the IL GOP postage discount.

This also proves that the IL GOP is meddling in city and township races – putting their thumb on the scale to tip it in favor of their preferred candidates and slates – slates who oppose the grassroots base of the Republican party.

And who paid for the postage of these mailers? The Illinois State Board of Elections website indicates that on March 27, 2023, Ozinga for Illinois made a $25,000 transfer to the IL GOP account.
Ozinga for Illinois, an ally of the Integrity for Homer Glen slate, made a $25,000 transfer to the Illinois Republican Party account on March 27, 2023. (Source: Illinois State Board of Elections website)

Ozinga is the chair of the Will County GOP and a state central committeeman who voted on Saturday that he had confidence in Tracy’s leadership – and it’s no secret that he was aligned with the Integrity for Homer Glen slate.

It’s also no secret that Don Tracy and the IL GOP despise the grassroots, and sadly, this is just one of many examples. And until Tracy is removed as chairman, this type of improper behavior will only continue.

And Illinois Republicans – especially the grassroots, will continue to lose, too. And that’s unacceptable.

https://youtu.be/_ljj5hI3Jto?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a36da31945-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_17_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a36da31945-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Attorney Tom DeVore joins Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas on "Mark My Words" on AM 560 The Answer to discuss Saturday's IL GOP State Central Committee Meeting and the speech that he delivered during public comments.

IL GOP Grassroots Committee Co-Chairs Larry Smith and Rhonda Belford Disrespect the Grassroots and Defend Don Tracy, as Calls for their Resignations Grow (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/il-gop-grassroots-committee-co-chairs-larry-smith-and-rhonda-belford-disrespect-the-grassroots-and-defend-don-tracy-as-calls-for-their-resignations-grow.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a36da31945-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_17_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a36da31945-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

As the deciding votes (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/larry-smith-and-rhonda-belford-were-key-votes-in-saving-don-tracys-job-during-saturdays-gop-meeting-in-blow-to-the-grassroots.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a36da31945-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_17_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a36da31945-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) that saved embattled Illinois Republican Party Chairman Don Tracy’s job on Saturday, IL GOP Grassroots Committee co-chairs Larry Smith and Rhonda Belford have come under fire from the grassroots – with many calling for their resignations as chairs, as Smith and Belford spent the weekend lashing out on social media and making phone calls to defend Tracy and their decision to keep him as party chairman.

“Don Tracy supports grassroots conservatives more than anyone,” was a message that Smith repeated, as he spoke with Illinois conservatives over the weekend who expressed their outrage that the co-chairs of the grassroots committee – Smith and Belford – would support a party chairman who views the conservative grassroots base of the party as “
steerage (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-establishment-views-grassroots-as-steerage-3rd-class-citizens.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a36da31945-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_17_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a36da31945-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ,” or third-class citizens. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/il-gop-grassroots-committee-co-chairs-larry-smith-and-rhonda-belford-disrespect-the-grassroots-and-defend-don-tracy-as-calls-for-their-resignations-grow.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a36da31945-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_17_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a36da31945-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

name: M4A Update (via CoriBush.org)
subject: Medicare for All is back!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Health care is a human right.
#
Peter,
Our movement has always been united in the belief that health care is a human right and we're long overdue for a solution that can meet the scale of the crisis our communities and country are facing.
Today, the Medicare for All Act of 2023 was reintroduced in Congress and is **_the only policy solution that can guarantee quality health care for all.**_ Period.
As a nurse, Cori is all too familiar with the failings of our current health care system that prioritizes profit over people.
[**This is a huge moment and Cori won't stop fighting until we can guarantee health care for all regardless of ability to pay. Can you chip in $5 today to support Cori's organizing, advocacy, and legislative push to guarantee Medicare for All?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230517.TyTkdx&refcode=em20230517-2709&t=1&akid=2709%2E1082990%2E0yY1wi)
**[Donate $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230517.TyTkdx&refcode=em20230517-2709&t=20&akid=2709%2E1082990%2E0yY1wi)**
Right now, the United States spends more than twice as much per person compared to other countries and yet tens of millions are without the essential care and coverage they need. The COVID-19 pandemic put a massive spotlight on our current system's significant failings and we have the chance to respond to this pressing moment.
Providing health care to all shouldn't be considered a radical idea but rather the bare minimum of any government to care for its own citizens.
At the same time, our profit-driven health care system all too often places significant barriers and challenges to receiving care and this continues to **disproportionately impact low-income and BIPOC communities.**
We have the unique ability and opportunity to transform our health care system to one that prioritizes compassion instead of greed and corporate profits.
That's why Cori was proud today to sign onto the Medicare for All Act of 2023 to guarantee that all of us can receive the same level of essential care and coverage. [**Can you chip in today to support our movement's momentum for a humane and dignified health care system?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230517.TyTkdx&refcode=em20230517-2709&t=21&akid=2709%2E1082990%2E0yY1wi)
**[Donate $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230517.TyTkdx&refcode=em20230517-2709&t=22&akid=2709%2E1082990%2E0yY1wi)**
In solidarity,
—CoriBush.org

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-footer?refcode=em20230517-2709-footer&t=23&refcode2=2709_1082990_0yY1wi&akid=2709%2E1082990%2E0yY1wi) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.coribush.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.coribush.org/signup/update-your-information?t=24&akid=2709%2E1082990%2E0yY1wi)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.coribush.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2709%2E1082990%2E0yY1wi)

body:

We are the most **vulnerable district in Florida** , and we need to meet _every single deadline_ from now until Election Day if we’re going to protect this seat. _Make no mistake: if the Democrats take Miami, they’ll have an in to tear down the rest of the state._ We can’t afford to miss this, and there are just HOURS to go. Peter, I am OVERWHELMED with gratitude for the amount of support this campaign has gotten since we launched yesterday morning. Over 100 of you joined us as contributors to our campaign! From myself, the entire team, and this movement — which now includes you, Peter — muchas gracias. Whether you shared our launch video, talked to someone about our platform in Texas, or made a donation — your support is giving this campaign momentum and is what will get us to a win in this race. Across South Texas and beyond, thousands of people have sent a powerful message demanding a better future for nuestras familias. I’m so proud to say that we are hitting our targets for engagement, fundraising and growth, but we can’t stop here. We have a long road ahead. We know there will be attacks from Monica De La Cruz and her army of Trumpist, right-wing mega donors and super PACs. name: Abortion Rights Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: Associated Press: Abortion after 12 weeks banned in North Carolina after GOP lawmakers override governor’s veto
body:
With their new veto-proof supermajority, Republicans in North Carolina have overridden Gov. Roy Cooper’s veto to jam through a 12-week ban on abortion. | | |
---
| | _Associated Press:_ **Abortion after 12 weeks banned in North Carolina after GOP lawmakers override governor’s veto** With their new veto-proof supermajority, Republicans in North Carolina have overridden Gov. Roy Cooper’s veto to jam through a 12-week ban on abortion. [Electing just **_one_ more Democrat** to the NC House will break the Republican supermajority. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Trump is bragging about ending Roe v. Wade, and just endorsed a six-week abortion ban, in case you were wondering what the 2024 election is going to be like …
body:
Preview of 2024 attacks on women’s rights
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdc06b59f-ea88-4f23-951b-9e3803a816bd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_[BREAKING: Sick individual, Donald Trump, just endorsed a six-week abortion ban.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3511d3bc-b65b-4ef9-8402-06404840f6d2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfeba3d32-f936-45d4-8de6-6feccf82b077/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Trump brags about ending Roe, enabling bans that'll kill women. Like the six week ban he extols, when women often don't even know they're pregnant._** **_If he'll brag so openly about taking away basic rights, what do you think he'll do if given another opportunity?_** _I served on Planned Parenthood's Ohio Board. Even before Dobbs, right wingers passed laws making it nearly impossible to obtain an abortion in many parts of the state. I'll never forget the stories of scared women, alone, impoverished, fearing violence. Now they're threatened by our law._ _Planned Parenthood's done so much for women, especially those in need. They know how much harm this threat against women will do ... and how to fight back._ **_[Please join Blue Amp Action in chipping in $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Planned Parenthood Action Fund, because these rights aren’t going to protect themselves.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdfa6ba95-bb75-472c-af7a-65d79653f96b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_** _Thank you, on this week of Mother's Day, fighting for mothers and all other women out there being used as political footballs by crass, cruel Republicans._ Cliff

name: Sheriff Mark Lamb
subject: Your court date: 2026
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
Border security will be an ongoing problem while Democrats are in office because they simply will not accept responsibility for it, much less come up with a coherent policy that Republicans will support.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=b668ac4a61334068b051c72c83cf9ba5&_t=_owwzidwc1DOaRBOhwucwmVJXs4bGsgDTMcYwl-jJpeY80C0MPegGpvNgUCsuGgvjZJD6kgU6N_3VOLvaZD1p4Mmd1MsfIzx-cJs4Alxc6c%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=b668ac4a61334068b051c72c83cf9ba5&_t=_owwzidwc1DOaRBOhwucwmVJXs4bGsgDTMcYwl-jJpeY80C0MPegGpvNgUCsuGgvjZJD6kgU6N_3VOLvaZD1p4Mmd1MsfIzx-cJs4Alxc6c%3D)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b668ac4a61334068b051c72c83cf9ba5&_e=sViTZ0nJpNUmiAD8o486e_ePLQeOEyBiPj2cDsV0HbZlO0zEwUbL43joGq5JxwySf-Kan8_t5xM2aB44MxKzAEnhIoeyziCtyVL6tk9qHaVyFgOn0j_TqbnjhWF8HZeWwYGixtLDSLJbsdXU1qdKMbZfBG3SG1gFJBv66ywACcOXOlO5lhxcXTpe4FJUkEzgKmDVhp2ishJ8nrRfD8nZAgSpJOdgSh6SH6Pns1YkSi8eMad4Is2LXVvZioU9eq8ATbulz1_q8HrNuKrlrLvv4tVpCIuRBIgaOr0WBmlCb4dP4BlLeIVyHKnZpvL9m1QU-89YsXoY_N7hbIsaScfOcViJfF8nem4meLPGo3gyvBVWuskR_5a_5UCxBTR71soF4KE5CPUPlcWrOWiD8NFnzl0mf92e6eCcGUYZmjWJqUQ%3D)
|
Fellow Conservative,

Where is President Biden?

He’s not in The Situation Room.

He’s not at the border, conferring with border patrol agents on the front lines.

He’s not at the Capitol negotiating with Republicans over their recently passed border bill.

Nope - he’s been riding his bike on the beach in Delaware ...

Since Title 42 expired last Thursday at midnight, **the situation at the border has become grave.** And President Biden seems oblivious to everything but his bike and the ice cream cone he undoubtedly enjoyed after his afternoon outing.

As I type this email, migrants who cross the border and request asylum are being given **court dates to appear in front of an immigration judge in 2026**.

Yes, court dates are three years from now. Once migrants are given processing documents, **they’re released on their own reconnaissance and often never heard from again**.

Fellow Conservative, this might be acceptable to Democrat leaders who receive police protection details, **[but is it acceptable to you?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b668ac4a61334068b051c72c83cf9ba5&_e=sViTZ0nJpNUmiAD8o486e_ePLQeOEyBiPj2cDsV0HbZlO0zEwUbL43joGq5JxwySf-Kan8_t5xM2aB44MxKzAEnhIoeyziCtyVL6tk9qHaVyFgOn0j_TqbnjhWF8HZeWwYGixtLDSLJbsdXU1qdKMbZfBG3SG1gFJBv66ywACcOXOlO5lhxcXTpe4FJUkEzgKmDVhp2ishJ8nrRfD8nZAgSpJOdgSh6SH6Pns1YkSi8eMad4Is2LXVvZioU9eq8Ar-0WDhYEEmg6cosdmD4rlsxMFXTImWw-aWhhacwbj0h-54JBo-RnYHHMilXjHoAgwNEqJmLo0xuDZj1jJ2tqQiNZ-X2ehJ2_N6XgJAyq5ymfsMotPLb_Xb5HO_xHxjyK4TuH89JmYl-Dfnibjw6i4IFv1RiWvrMegCOXUiZbrtk%3D) **

[**TELL BIDEN:
GET SERIOUS ABOUT THE BORDER->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b668ac4a61334068b051c72c83cf9ba5&_e=sViTZ0nJpNUmiAD8o486e_ePLQeOEyBiPj2cDsV0HbZlO0zEwUbL43joGq5JxwySf-Kan8_t5xM2aB44MxKzAEnhIoeyziCtyVL6tk9qHaVyFgOn0j_TqbnjhWF8HZeWwYGixtLDSLJbsdXU1qdKMbZfBG3SG1gFJBv66ywACcOXOlO5lhxcXTpe4FJUkEzgKmDVhp2ishJ8nrRfD8nZAgSpJOdgSh6SH6Pns1YkSi8eMad4Is2LXVvZioU9eq8AzeTEBoP3AjOXYNHJcbh_vUMj3cEcZLry6giDyUNsOq16jl6sLJHTYzQjzFgW6Wwz4ROHKOt-gRg1pCiZABqF-YxfJLCDP45KQCMQEkGVad7t6Qz1o6a-JxaExYZ3qYpA4ROezmff7LrxaFcZSC5jf39uL3IGqAuyms79OhlyrCs%3D)

Republicans just passed a bill that would require anyone claiming asylum to remain in Mexico while awaiting their court date. That seems like common sense to me. But Democrats call it “extreme.”

In my capacity as a county Sheriff and a candidate for U.S. Senate, I recently began collecting signatures for a petition. I’m sending this petition to President Biden, demanding he negotiates with Republicans to implement their border security bill, and **[I’m hoping you’ll add your name to it today](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b668ac4a61334068b051c72c83cf9ba5&_e=sViTZ0nJpNUmiAD8o486e_ePLQeOEyBiPj2cDsV0HbZlO0zEwUbL43joGq5JxwySf-Kan8_t5xM2aB44MxKzAEnhIoeyziCtyVL6tk9qHaVyFgOn0j_TqbnjhWF8HZeWwYGixtLDSLJbsdXU1qdKMbZfBG3SG1gFJBv66ywACcOXOlO5lhxcXTpe4FJUkEzgKmDVhp2ishJ8nrRfD8nZAgSpJOdgSh6SH6Pns1YkSi8eMad4Is2LXVvZioU9eq8Aggp8IG_XiYhtkf5B2qN43Tdf1X4FmaLnuacvHSElQ-33bP1dl9SEobvBwAOInl_Kc2GXAA-AvZtGYPnokxI3X3YLi1Dq-oGHB_Svg9FI1vDhOc8Ag57HV0rEN8eO3zCAkLGT694HAwLHTOk4CUp7BM4QHddjgPPBuLUyKaoT3qo%3D)**.

Fellow Conservative, we must stop the invasion. It’s as simple as that.

We do that by sending law enforcement officials, who know a thing or two about quelling unrest, to **replace Democrats in the Senate who can’t seem to figure out how to do their damn jobs**.

**Border security will be an ongoing problem while Democrats are in office because they simply will not accept responsibility for it, much less come up with a coherent policy that Republicans will support.**

As a Sheriff, I can tell you that the bill House Republicans just passed is one that prioritizes keeping our communities safe - and it’s a bill I would vote for if elected to the Senate. By and large, migrants avoid Pinal County (**where I’m Sheriff**) as much as possible because they know that my deputies and I enforce the law.

[**TELL BIDEN:
GET SERIOUS ABOUT THE BORDER->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b668ac4a61334068b051c72c83cf9ba5&_e=sViTZ0nJpNUmiAD8o486e_ePLQeOEyBiPj2cDsV0HbZlO0zEwUbL43joGq5JxwySf-Kan8_t5xM2aB44MxKzAEnhIoeyziCtyVL6tk9qHaVyFgOn0j_TqbnjhWF8HZeWwYGixtLDSLJbsdXU1qdKMbZfBG3SG1gFJBv66ywACcOXOlO5lhxcXTpe4FJUkEzgKmDVhp2ishJ8nrRfD8nZAgSpJOdgSh6SH6Pns1YkSi8eMad4Is2LXVvZioU9eq8A71Bb5gL4vFOqaICeeh2fFnF8Fvl5sm-R5yrL05P5zfNEW6mM8Xu-XsmImsQABYnyxuNt7Oudn04eNuEAGc3s-BRPmbYtyDJRwZ7hak-YG3KpnNv3lk_e4RxBhexkAq7hZcdaaaKRoyd3h9u8I6dbMrIo76b7UILWCQHs6k0QSZI%3D)

What is unfortunate is that most border communities lack the resources to keep their communities secure from the masses that are descending upon them.

**I’m running for the U.S. Senate to change that.**

Americans need leaders in the federal government with the experience of dealing with migrants firsthand. We need leaders who aren’t afraid to tell their constituents the truth. **We need leaders in Congress who won’t ignore the dire situation at the border because they’re not directly affected by it**.

Thank you for your time,
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b668ac4a61334068b051c72c83cf9ba5&_e=sViTZ0nJpNUmiAD8o486e_ePLQeOEyBiPj2cDsV0HbZlO0zEwUbL43joGq5JxwySf-Kan8_t5xM2aB44MxKzAEnhIoeyziCtyVL6tk9qHaVyFgOn0j_TqbnjhWF8HZeWwYGixtLDSLJbsdXU1qdKMbZfBG3SG1gFJBv66ywACcOXOlO5lhxcXTpe4FJUkEzgKmDVhp2ishJ8nrRfD8nZAgSpJOdgSh6SH6Pns1YkSi8eMad4Is2LXVvZioU9eq8AiOpbMOMvJzlUm7NMCksZWnHyBjcA7FNsfg_-gweBme5r4wwFgmE2RUsDIutBAhJ75R6gX8HxEKen3jLb2HI0AxdRx2n9HbB_WbmS92PuW70pxPBUei_fNlTk_asP0pFxSh0XcJu4fda6flIU6JdAU1rPwsphgzYX9JjiQ2mcgeY%3D)
Sheriff Mark Lamb
Republican for U.S. Senate

**Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b668ac4a61334068b051c72c83cf9ba5&_e=sViTZ0nJpNUmiAD8o486e69vN8WJOKXbyxF48jfA-HGR878acpjE0RJh8NtiSszV-ffTIJyNfWdz1rn_x6ibcPgkv5dDOdbG7c-Ptm3KVGZTSn3vBp6DtQVik7TQ2MGV78dLlCd_B9B2C5uCZxJDnsyBccbYosfJkLbHf6vu6c6UUGn9i1y24A0XEgRsufH9W_BasZ4-v34gg7x3GWY3GX8jiS7gtltr2w0Iin7P5t0%3D) [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b668ac4a61334068b051c72c83cf9ba5&_e=sViTZ0nJpNUmiAD8o486e7-xMGnKYmbgZiBFqSgsP8L__DdO1o9HHIKXjAcuumTrelSx5pJvTUWWmSnKYqlsZEGh93z-NsqJbPQQ1tBU5Ec86Dha8sQLmrlsJ967-ORV0bPRRaaLNL9KFICavMfE8XynFKfA2_6WLNXTCIN1hK_yaKxVvl7iYp0BI1MG-9zVaHyaLUisLGwnAydJnCI0Dg%3D%3D) [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b668ac4a61334068b051c72c83cf9ba5&_e=sViTZ0nJpNUmiAD8o486e2xYpA3605KtmBsxBM8GltcD_TTU1Z0J2SdO0QUgeErGnghQsdqLJFTsCtl5FzWFHZtonZaEt6WbJYZ67QOqfzMFrzhEF2hIlLLekmv80FEsuXgumWAbkhMk_ePPWJAc1SBMQWITW2Ss_K7vlvurFATD0DhE_5YyZ5HocDME1XrQGoH9uFUKwLLK4bwMQfczO4LSVctXLgP_hBeMvtxwHjA%3D)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b668ac4a61334068b051c72c83cf9ba5&_e=sViTZ0nJpNUmiAD8o486e_ePLQeOEyBiPj2cDsV0HbZlO0zEwUbL43joGq5JxwySf-Kan8_t5xM2aB44MxKzAEnhIoeyziCtyVL6tk9qHaVyFgOn0j_TqbnjhWF8HZeWwYGixtLDSLJbsdXU1qdKMbZfBG3SG1gFJBv66ywACcOXOlO5lhxcXTpe4FJUkEzgKmDVhp2ishJ8nrRfD8nZAgSpJOdgSh6SH6Pns1YkSi8eMad4Is2LXVvZioU9eq8AyUTz9M4GIAdlBcnIiBKZIhp0C3h1UjiApAHmuZ9RAa21arrv_NsUwnX4j1voWEi4oNDGdyKQ0Uf09pvhZUCPk0ViAZP5cE7WyG4zY97k4ssLf4ePsvxjwdZ4aoYM1RW9TW6yt7KPVMipk9ldoPJK9E8vrhZs65a1nbduGJc78Qk%3D)
**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

name: Stop Gun Violence PAC
subject: They’re making assault weapons easier to access →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STOP GUN VIOLENCE PAC

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63430815/406765137/-1382951893?refcode=BLU-SAN-20230516-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTkzZDM5YS1lMWY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WCPaanHDZidPYoM2PcahShV-dqTs8k6vpTQHbpxTnmk=)

| Peter,

Standing up for the working class has always been my first priority. And as Republicans hold our economy hostage by refusing to raise the debt ceiling, I am working every day towards ensuring our working class remains protected.

I am proud to have introduced legislation to increase Social Security benefits. This legislation will ensure that seniors have the resources they need and that future generations don’t retire into poverty after a lifetime of hard work.

[_**Will you co-sponsor my bill to protect Social Security by adding your name today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63430816/406765138/-2089141029?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTkzZDM5YS1lMWY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WCPaanHDZidPYoM2PcahShV-dqTs8k6vpTQHbpxTnmk=&emci=ad76c394-e1f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0193d39a-e1f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6681226)

| [ADD YOUR NAME ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63430817/406765139/-2089141029?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTkzZDM5YS1lMWY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WCPaanHDZidPYoM2PcahShV-dqTs8k6vpTQHbpxTnmk=&emci=ad76c394-e1f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0193d39a-e1f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6681226)

Though there is more work to be done in our efforts to preserve Social Security, this is an important and essential first step.

Peter, I will never stop fighting for our working class.

Glad to have you on my side.

clean_body: I am proud to have introduced legislation to increase Social Security benefits. | = | Peter, Standing up for the working class has always been my first priority. And as Republicans hold our economy hostage by refusing to raise the debt ceiling, I am working every day towards ensuring our working class remains protected. I am proud to have introduced legislation to increase Social Security benefits. This legislation will ensure that seniors have the resources they need and that future generations don’t retire into poverty after a lifetime of hard work. | Though there is more work to be done in our efforts to preserve Social Security, this is an important and essential first step. Peter, I will never stop fighting for our working class. Glad to have you on my side. Linda * | | = Paid for by Stand with Sanchez Stand with Sánchez P.O. body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Friends, this is alarming: [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
First , Politico reported our Democratic Senate majority could hinge on winning in Ohio.
Then , multiple outlets, including FiveThirtyEight and NBC News , ranked me as one of the most vulnerable incumbents on the ballot.
Now , The Cook Political Report is calling this race a TOSS-UP – and I urgently need your grassroots support to protect this must-win seat.
My midnight deadline is coming up, and I'm counting on your help to reach my $50,000 goal so I can prove the pundits wrong, win in Ohio and defend our Democratic Senate majority. Please, friend, will you split $5 or more now between me and Kirsten Gillibrand ? [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_sherrodbrown?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
I've been in quite a few races, and I know we can win this one – but it's going to take all of us, friend . Thank you for being on my team.
- Sherrod

Will stunned political experts in 2022 when he came so close to winning against right wing Republican, Ken Calvert. It ended up being one of the closest races in the country. He outperformed every projection and was the only Democratic challenger in California to win the independent vote. That’s a big deal.

There is no question in my mind that in this upcoming election, with the Presidency on the ballot, the larger turnout will be the key to victory IF we have a strong campaign.

I have committed my energy, time and money to this race and today I am asking you to start Will off with a show of support that will send him a message that we are behind him 100 percent.

[**I’ll share more about why I'm backing Will, but first, I have an important request: Could you donate $3 to help him reach his goal of generating 2,500 online donations to launch with strength? Here’s why Democrats across the country should pay close attention to this race:
**1\. We need candidates like Will in Congress.** As a former federal prosecutor, he understands the ongoing danger that extremism poses to our democracy. He brought justice to insurrectionists, and I know he'll take the oath to defend democracy as seriously now as he did in the Justice Department.

**2\. Retaking the House runs through CA-41.** After the new lines were drawn, CA-41 became a true swing seat. It’s the type of district Democrats MUST WIN to regain Congress.

**3\. GOP super PACs.** Despite the tough midterm environment in 2022, Will was the third most “overperforming” Dem challenger in the country. He was also heavily outspent by the GOP’s dark money machine. If Democrats help Will keep pace, he can flip this seat!

**4\. Will’s opponent Ken Calvert has got to go.** Calvert voted to overturn the 2020 presidential election. He backs the extreme ban on abortion -- including for instances of rape, and wants doctors who perform them to go to jail. CA-41 is home to one of the most LGBTQ-friendly cities in Palm Springs, yet Calvert staunchly opposes gay marriage.
The rematch is on, folks. Will came so close to winning in 2022, and this is our chance to finish the job. But it depends on widespread, grassroots support.

name: Team Kennedy
subject: RFK, Jr. in the news -- Left, Right, and Independent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Pundits from across the political spectrum are intrigued by RFK, Jr.'s fresh approach to leadership.

| [ ](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=news_update_left_right_perspec&n=1)
---
Peter -- We’d like to share with you three articles on Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.’s candidacy that are remarkable for the diversity of their sources. One is from the solidly Left (some would say far Left) website Counterpunch. The second is from the other end of the spectrum, the solidly Right publication The American Conservative. And the third is from a small-town newspaper, the Berkshire Eagle. Together, these articles suggest the possibility of a broad-based populist movement. We encourage you to read all three to get a sense of the momentum that is building behind RFK, Jr.’s candidacy. **[Counterpunch](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=bRKowWSEbI3-iKVMSb5t0xRxhLCkmgcki-sEZsFRmjN-bnFhqyf3YVQm0X_qJplJJmXRlle4ZTbJsCJ6HYHoUq8MxQ54RNgLf5wNcQ4Fdys&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=news_update_left_right_perspec&n=2)** : Should the Left Give RFK, Jr. a Chance? A smart, detailed, and poignant appeal to the left to see RFK, Jr. as the person we need for this post-Covid moment. [**The American Conservative**](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=Ad-pzZpZoRYVMb-dTcQz7s3fZuLj0Nnq_v1jQJdeCIBuhIlLT5Pis0Jw4-djtKaVhO9SPKdT5qTyJ_IRvyVvFA&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=news_update_left_right_perspec&n=3) : The Courage of RFK, Jr. Describes how many of RFK, Jr.’s campaign priorities have cross-appeal to conservative values. [**Berkshire Eagle**](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=4EWNE-jtwxtgGMABCRUdfFlfnZdOJ6EGsXPopPztEbcHDKl3-vqui49iQImk9XQftrR-DORql6D8xu88Pk_Gy2V6xJnjCUM6kTMeJ0koxySQbN0w5xqZMx0l_FY6k4SkkWfgZsgAE5IyJAQk_jq_7qjiT1o4VRWAGReDXdmmsIg&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=news_update_left_right_perspec&n=4)**:** Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is the candidate to heal the great divide. This opinion piece argues the issues that matter to RFK, Jr. are not liberal or conservative, but “self-evident conclusions of a patriot.” We agree with the Berkshire Eagle. body:
After years of us being in this fight, the IRS just announced a pilot program for free tax filing. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63445541/406802600/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ13W_TAX_E_20230517_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmMzNzQwMi0wNWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WEpIl6w-Km48j19woT5CJimG4riZqIbWsQNMyOG48DY=&emci=7ac37402-05f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7bc37402-05f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
Sometimes, fighting for change feels like pushing a boulder up a never-ending hill. But if you keep going, and going, and going, you finally glimpse sunlight streaming over the top of the hill — and you know you’re making progress. Here’s an example of a fight where we just got some encouraging news: creating a free tax filing system. You see, for years and years, I’ve called out giant tax prep corporations for lobbying to keep it an expensive hassle to file your taxes. (Looking at you, TurboTax. You too, H&R Block.) But it doesn’t have to be this way. In fact, free filing has been implemented in many other countries. And I’ve urged the IRS to make free filing a reality — in legislation, in hearings, in letters, in explainers, you name it. People like you have raised your voices, too — in petitions, on social media, in messages to elected officials, and more. Last year, we took a big stride up the hill. Democrats included funding for the program in the Inflation Reduction Act, along with support for the IRS to crack down on wealthy tax cheats (another important boulder). And this week, **we found out that the IRS will launch a pilot program for free tax filing next year, with room for the program to grow in future years.** **I’m going to stay on this and make sure Americans don’t have to waste time and money with big tax prep corporations.** We’ve been pushing this boulder up the hill side by side. I’m deeply grateful for your partnership, and I wouldn’t be in this fight without grassroots support. [_**Let’s stay in the fight and keep the good news coming. Can you pitch in $3, or any amount that makes sense for you today, to support our re-election campaign and help grow our grassroots movement for the big, bold reforms we need? This is how we make change.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63445542/406802601/-551446403?amount=3&refcode=EMZ13W_TAX_E_20230517_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmMzNzQwMi0wNWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WEpIl6w-Km48j19woT5CJimG4riZqIbWsQNMyOG48DY=) | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

name: Indiana Dems
subject: We need your help calling out massive salary increases for career politicians

Peter, Indiana Republicans just snuck through massive salary increases for Attorney General Todd Rokita, Secretary of State Diego Morales, and other statewide elected officials. It’s wrong and we’re calling it out. Our teachers and first responders should be getting a big raise -- not career politicians. [**Will you make your voice heard today by signing our petition condemning such a massive salary increase for career politicians?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63431541/406767403/-1914424494?refcode=230517-Salaries&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTA2YzYxOS1lNGY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=guhCIqopC-uAZKaOgjKnTkueJfeN5VgJ4zX4VBJEMg8=&emci=ad2a0cae-c6f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=1506c619-e4f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) Hidden away in the $45 billion budget that was just rammed through a couple of weeks ago are massive raises. Why should our state leaders be given massive raises on top of the large taxpayer-funded salaries they’re already making? It’s wrong and we won’t sit quietly as it happens. Thank you for standing up. -Indiana Democrats | | | = | = [content goes here] Indiana Democratic Party 115 W Washington INDLPS, IN 46202 United States Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. clean_body: The Biden-appointed Special Counsel is harassing, threatening... | | | Friend, As I wrote to you in an email yesterday, I’m used to the Deep State’s attacks against me. When you run for president as a political outsider and pledge to drain the swamp and root out corruption, you are going to be mercilessly attacked. But I will NEVER get used to the vicious attacks against my supporters, my associates, and my family members. That’s why I’m disgusted that the Biden-appointed Special Counsel is harassing, threatening, and terrorizing my staff. The Deep State only attacks me, because I give a voice to YOU, the American people. They would have ZERO SHAME framing you, harassing you, or threatening you if you stood in their way. But in 2024, We The People will once again take back the reins of our country and save our Republic before it’s lost for good. Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Adam Schiff
subject: I just introduced legislation to expand the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| We need to begin to restore trust and balance to the Supreme Court.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=2234%2E5257348%2E6qwKRR)
Hey Derek,
I'm excited to let you know that yesterday, Rep. Hank Johnson and I introduced the _Judiciary Act of 2023,_ which would expand the Supreme Court.
**[Will you join me as an original citizen cosponsor by adding your name to expand the number of Supreme Court justices?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230517-judiciary-act.F9DxSZ&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230517_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=2234%2E5257348%2E6qwKRR)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230517-judiciary-act.F9DxSZ&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230517_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=2234%2E5257348%2E6qwKRR)
---
The total lack of an enforceable code of ethics on the Supreme Court is _unacceptable_ , especially amidst multiple allegations of impropriety surrounding Justices Thomas, Gorsuch, and Roberts.
In just the last few weeks, we’ve learned that a wealthy GOP donor has subsidized private jet rides and yacht trips for Clarence Thomas. And bought Thomas’ mother’s house. And paid for Thomas’ relatives’ private school tuition. And secretly funneled $25,000 to Thomas’ wife (who still parrots Trump’s Big Lie about the stolen election).
It’s dangerous, Derek. The Supreme Court makes life-changing decisions about our fundamental rights and freedoms, yet they do not abide by a standard Code of Ethics.
Not only that — but since McConnell and Trump stole two seats to install an illegitimate right-wing majority that is deliberately stripping our constitutional rights, the faith and trust in our Supreme Court is at an all-time low.
The founders of our country believed in a fair, impartial Supreme Court that was above politics — which is far from what we have now.
**We need to begin to restore trust and balance to the Supreme Court.**
That’s what the legislation I’ve introduced will do. It will expand the number of seats on the Supreme Court. After Trump and McConnell stacked the highest judicial body in our country with their appointees – not just once, not just twice, but three times – it’s high time we unstack it.
**[Derek, please add your name as a citizen cosponsor of our legislation to expand the Supreme Court and restore dignity and trust in our institutions.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230517-judiciary-act.F9DxSZ&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230517_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=2234%2E5257348%2E6qwKRR)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230517-judiciary-act.F9DxSZ&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230517_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=2234%2E5257348%2E6qwKRR)
---
Thank you for showing your support for this important work.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230517-judiciary-act.F9DxSZ&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230517_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=8&akid=2234%2E5257348%2E6qwKRR)

body:
| | | Friend, I was looking over our numbers, and I saw you STILL haven’t taken advantage of our mid-month deadline extension. I would not be asking for your help if it were not important.. We are the most **vulnerable district in Florida** , and we need to meet _every single deadline_ from now until Election Day if we’re going to protect this seat. _Make no mistake: if the Democrats take Miami, they’ll have an in to tear down the rest of the state._ We can’t afford to miss this, and there are just HOURS to go. **[Please, pitch in before TONIGHT at MIDNIGHT so we can meet our EXTENDED mid-month deadline!](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=334fc27b358749ec870774c95204c8f7&_e=dOslAwKRyooYMPXsJbHNLkD-0_1QPZt3l5vT9hy8jjpzQuXtVC0Qydu7pUMYMGWyR_50zYsUQ0YPgSP9e4bDO_rJSKqDMZoTsvUNtdenWSYsgyjBwM8bNcfybPU2k7ujCCHCSNy-NDqm0ySergT-TU2tpeQtmoucYeokeTqShjgmwrwDBeuBeTd84jKTvFsygAfAlb1MmNBjvsjMcLl3EhtVr0HNlzj5828HLi2XnDzb5qLK_18dPjxGj8eA9CEiAq9E2PJ16m1YccMtByNseNjglWWu7QDRBpkPWmfW4DlyYKklnLUtDEDQG2lAKkRzLo3AOVY-wqN7f2QMyAugASr9YKJCia_v-9IAw8ZCEQk7LuufSQER7sjnPNb1-7xC)**
