name: Replace Sinema
subject: RE: Sinema spending scandal continues
body:
Sinema’s using donor money to fund her expensive marathon hobby | | | Peter – Did you catch our message on Monday? Over the last few weeks, Kyrsten Sinema’s luxury spending spree (on her campaign’s dime) has been under fire. New coverage shows her **campaign funds were used in connection to her athletic competitions** , leading to swift backlash about her questionable spending. And it’s not partisan: Democrats, Republicans, and even the running community itself has taken notice. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xf34-SufcIFY8N3Hkj5GreiwINs7EVeFxusl2-8vj4WFpPmc_Tv0aQWN1qgLekf3aI3DOlNxuLki5wKmTgcf3LEFlj-B_yI5xgoLx_dsYuWydWgw7-su42_CoLdph3yDwPOuw1Zcb86lP1NW4FxtiHdmG6tD2Z482Y-ivlYQNXT8l0rrgq8GAw42xdJe5KVfaDpmVZ2f-x5d21IB1w0d13EBpdlu8tPpafui8JbvNZZ-Wd3kcnPHGS7Mf1XVSOihkATUmP9rqXN4tTjDFbV1cP4WR3ygswGfU5SS82KMU5mNi-OzwXjCaocJE8JF2VQqA2necp7DNPdFhq3Wnxk2EQ/3w9/9APXQ5hfQbO2wS5itwzVnA/h0/OH2MKBM_2jQvcB2FQgffw6ieaa8bvYDI1d11zP-qRcE)**Sinema’s sell out ways are finally coming to light–and we need to use this momentum to keep getting the message out.****_[Chip in to help us keep it up >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xf34-SufcIFY8N3Hkj5GreP8WTvvSh2oOTq8Ks7FInj2ATXdpKJ0AMKH3R4pOzCkqN32rwVSMsbDMoFLqL9ZB8zLL1b3irbrsy9CAYua-y3iqf122G0q3K5znUTfKb0Ek8R2V9-b3J0rw7xdaDxrAWN-tv0B2FifXa0-TwAo_BfYcB7qvTJru5-9f_7zQWL6lMe5_TPtdntqM-at_b7m32zdrMlkGYkU36Uyiz6_KndJ3pVTXIWs6n9MkFHuuZVkN9-UDCuSOR_r9HRfegaz6E98JrqBcrzn0QWllOT93-9Gx40ObkCLnszOQtK_lFDF7Sfy_O8A_X0aaNfdEAr1kD/3w9/9APXQ5hfQbO2wS5itwzVnA/h1/ZCGEtxisFRs8xmxQjQ4UO2fIOPazttEMGly6mNma1cE)_****__** Thanks for all you do, -Replace Sinema **–PREVIOUS EMAIL–** Peter – More explosive reporting on Sinema’s questionable spending includes the use of campaign funds to pay for travel expenses related to her well-documented hobby of running in athletic competitions, including the Boston Marathon. **On the tab? An $8,000 bill to stay at the Ritz Carlton during the race.**
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xf34-SufcIFY8N3Hkj5Gre3iGRCX6H8z0e9ZGbYSjvTEyot4FqGmWW-uzP-0rVSjca7mQvgmsMVs21u9R8q-KOjdHn9PeKE5LVXX63Ek_AInjnV8QrvXwhp7Gtqk2ecQ0P24KFyS0Utz0uH5odS3CSZO9GHZBb52Nql1BqOjSNy9QVxyDBSYtJiRUGG-eqpVq-1wUVhMs0NA-poJ2wk0FQpzpf_NSbvMaXajnTgLeGAjRC37VDHwOSTuvGHyyTT-OfagouBy0NaozvAdoDnCchZAacUe0syz5JGPTBCTnppnuz4vSYqJz5FDnP0Wcg6haVCdpdB5rzL1b0qfgd9hRx/3w9/9APXQ5hfQbO2wS5itwzVnA/h2/KlAWEJfOTATiK0yjER9FKKimjk3wkpdy-Cku7BLIZNw)This is just the latest drip in the ongoing Sinema’s spending scandal: recent reporting includes spending tens of thousands on five star hotels and Michelin restaurants (including $20,000 on wine alone), travel to international cities like Paris and Barcelona, and hundreds of thousands on a security arrangement with Tulsi Gabbard’s sister. All this, plus Sinema’s ties to special interests have caused some Arizona leaders to call for Sinema’s resignation. **Sinema’s spending scandal is outrageous and abusive - but exactly what we’ve come to expect from her.****[Help us get our message out in Arizona so we can replace Sinema with a strong Democrat like Ruben Gallego >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xf34-SufcIFY8N3Hkj5GreGhBcZGbi9S0tdfmD5FSwNgrN-KsxEQGOPhB6GxYD0GCTTagGQQdaDnnRIKQeR6hEF6ILHSNBn2IlSiaqUnC3cN0wJ9GWgSFg7F704abeDVr8aqtE6rlgOxLTmJczYk8uybaI_m_VsiFCfJvhiDYWMNOSTyqgEZEFULnNPDick4m-2doHHYWlupYMzW1Yj1q-Gu9IL89r-ylqYvt5II8cxJ3QInoGUG_c9MoqV360EC47waHNfPheew8SGf2E5QxIDkc-79zH9SEN5KlLsNPwCe1Um8_kVXek_m8wvNN7ykSI0VWTUGzE2SvbJ5jcoGxK/3w9/9APXQ5hfQbO2wS5itwzVnA/h3/PpJpjS_Ny4ZhYG6CRPpFGE3JLYuI43wuk9oaCEXdP48) ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xf34-SufcIFY8N3Hkj5GrerjcRNnLAEM2kKMHXu4hzT1w5jDhjtd3QZeJrQqVpjHUgeBe9iRXLJSeJJ8Em9mr3otk_uohEPz0aIxlg1FoCFmSAp7VfR6DNWAKlQqx6-Q-IMZFCrrku_3yBvS2R4uFzuII1byJaLsemGGjGqyu6eIjEIwgZ_q-80Ma5VberXvku1lINBfNKw1VdcwNf6MucnUkzmPKO7M-cmRoJVFV8VVT68khqrhioNNaNZKz4URzJYl1hQu8j_z7BV7lXjOpjX4f4G8b8YUfd03ceq152HMJXFcP7ucQoVHHHeFT0r7GnNynDbupXoVFbwxNbndpp4zfF_jEnt_k6odARMlCQdGwLhErNmf9AGU_Iv95tGBc/3w9/9APXQ5hfQbO2wS5itwzVnA/h4/Q8zGz2Ety8ltvFsoVQLjOt20sYUfrUAr9aBd6134p_s)

International vacations... high-end wine... five-star hotels... Michelin restaurants... an expensive athletic hobby, running races across the country. Sinema’s pattern is clear:
She raises money from special interests (like private equity), does legislative favors for those special interests in return (like protecting the carried interest loophole), and then spends their campaign contributions on her own luxury lifestyle, while continuing to ignore the everyday Arizonans who put her in office.
As one ethics expert said, “**It is one thing to ask donors for money to support your campaign and get your message out to voters, it is another to ask them to bankroll your personal life.** ”
Arizona sent Sinema to the Senate to fight for and protect our interests, not run marathons, get massages, and fly in private jets to hobnob with billionaire donors.
Sinema is corrupt–plain and simple. That is why we’re doing everything we can to make sure that her first term in the Senate is also her last. **[Help us get the word out in Arizona so we can elect a Democrat like Ruben Gallego instead of a sell-out like Kyrsten Sinema in 2024 >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xf34-SufcIFY8N3Hkj5GreY0yz0WMCEE7RunrheDDC3Bn751tPRTTlWjHU3XvHRl94g9DKcX3ZMsM_ioVZt9T7rFeg4wadajhFHhBRebJdatcvJel595JTGqHhc6eEyEiq63tl5kj5ZJuzmWp16LOIhn-781ShEBqLewMxa3DMUS3NWXRwecd7fVOQd5pDG3SrdZH8hg2QFNEJlbpH2Yb0shRCsgnpNNElHYYQqWtAt6IuHoKxcQZOzf9B_xqnoUI4HIBq7_91TFGfMPyU6BRYApOeFC5UtxbLppiJG_dwhvCNFQyEJGnQ0qjoD0HS11I74DCOGusBIachWKR_imuh/3w9/9APXQ5hfQbO2wS5itwzVnA/h10/FGdwDIhYtCTjx4F53tGXbFeZlM43aXq4h7PdUGAxKAk) **

Over the last few weeks, Kyrsten Sinema’s luxury spending spree (on her campaign’s dime) has been under fire. And it’s not partisan: Democrats, Republicans, and even the running community itself has taken notice. ’s sell out ways are finally coming to light–and we need to use this momentum to keep getting the message out. Thanks for all you do, -Replace Sinema –PREVIOUS EMAIL– Peter – More explosive reporting on Sinema’s questionable spending includes the use of campaign funds to pay for travel expenses related to her well-documented hobby of running in athletic competitions, including the Boston Marathon. On the tab? An $8,000 bill to stay at the Ritz Carlton during the race. is just the latest drip in the ongoing Sinema’s spending scandal: recent reporting includes spending tens of thousands on five star hotels and Michelin restaurants (including $20,000 on wine alone), travel to international cities like Paris and Barcelona, and hundreds of thousands on a security arrangement with Tulsi Gabbard’s sister. All this, plus Sinema’s ties to special interests have caused some Arizona leaders to call for Sinema’s resignation. Sinema’s spending scandal is outrageous and abusive - but exactly what we’ve come to expect from her. Team, this is HUGE: According to a new poll, **53% of Americans say they _definitely won’t_ vote for Trump for president next year.**

But that's almost IDENTICAL to the number of Americans who voted against Trump in 2016 and 2020 -- which means next year's election could be _**razor-close!**_

If this poll is accurate, we need to lock in as many Democratic votes as possible. We need 65 more people in Pennsylvania to let us know by midnight that they'll NEVER consider voting for Trump. **So please, sign our urgent petition now to confirm you DEFINITELY WON’T vote for Donald Trump next year:**

**Sign on to confirm you DEFINITELY WON’T vote for Trump >>**

name: Katie Presley, EMILYs List
subject: Abortion bans are detrimental to mental health
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
|
---
| | It's Mental Health Awareness Month [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63433741/406775397/66865039?sourceid=1050069&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjcyYjM1NS1lYmY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ahwXtz2UH_0B8y2lskc61n_kT8hF4YpCtsusUYqmfZ8=&emci=a6521f14-eaf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=4b72b355-ebf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) **Content Warning: Mental health struggles, medical trauma, rape** Abortion bans are detrimental to mental health. Fighting for our reproductive rights means fighting for our safety, autonomy, and well-being. **Honor Mental Health Awareness Month with a donation that helps elect women nationwide who will ALWAYS fight for our most fundamental freedoms:** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63433742/406775398/66865039?sourceid=1050069&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjcyYjM1NS1lYmY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ahwXtz2UH_0B8y2lskc61n_kT8hF4YpCtsusUYqmfZ8=&emci=a6521f14-eaf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=4b72b355-ebf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter,

Let's just come right out and say it: Abortion bans are not about "health" or "safety," though the anti-choice movement loves to use those buzzwords. Banning abortion is about control and subjugation. It's no surprise, then, that **the onslaught of vicious bans being proposed, passed, and signed by Republicans nationwide is already having a detrimental impact on the mental health of those affected**.

Maybe you read the story about two friends in Florida who had miscarriages at the same time, but were denied care because of Florida's ban. One of the women almost died, and both were deeply scarred by their experiences.

Or maybe you read about the woman in Texas who was also denied care during a miscarriage until she was in septic shock. Neither of her senators (Ted Cruz (R) and John Cornyn (R)) had the decency to attend when she came to the Senate to testify, but she addressed them directly when she said she almost died on their watch. Her miscarriage happened nine months ago, and she has been struggling with depression and PTSD ever since.

Or, speaking of Republicans with no respect for mental health, maybe you heard Rep. Lauren Boebert say that rape victims need love and a gun, but not access to an abortion.

Maybe you've seen these stories, or maybe you haven't, but you still know — **protecting mental health means protecting the right to choose**. Fighting for reproductive rights means more than fighting for the right to an abortion. It also means fighting for our safety, our well-being, and our freedom. I'm proud to work every day to elect women I know will fight for me — and for all of us.****If you're able, join me in honoring Mental Health Awareness Month with a donation to EMILYs List today:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Elect-Women-This-May](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63433749/406775432/66865039?sourceid=1050069&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjcyYjM1NS1lYmY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ahwXtz2UH_0B8y2lskc61n_kT8hF4YpCtsusUYqmfZ8=&emci=a6521f14-eaf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=4b72b355-ebf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** Thank you for your support,

Katie Presley (she/they)
Deputy Director of Digital Fundraising, EMILYs List

Fighting for reproductive rights means more than fighting for the right to an abortion. It also means fighting for our safety, our well-being, and our freedom. I'm proud to work every day to elect women I know will fight for me — and for all of us.**If you're able, join me in honoring Mental Health Awareness Month with a donation to EMILYs List today: ** Thank you for your support, Katie Presley (she/they) Deputy Director of Digital Fundraising, EMILYs List | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

body:
This harmful legislation doesn’t represent the will of the people, and it doesn’t represent North Carolina values.

| _**FIRST:**_ North Carolina Republicans rushed through an extreme abortion ban.

_**THEN:**_ Our Democratic Governor Roy Cooper VETOED this harmful legislation.

_**NOW:**_ Republicans in the legislature just voted to override the Governor’s veto.

This harmful legislation doesn’t represent the will of the people, and it doesn’t represent North Carolina values. That is why I—and the entire North Carolina Senate Democratic Caucus—will continue to fight for reproductive rights. [_**We aren’t done fighting. name: Team Lateefah
subject: 📲 A thank you call from Lateefah
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
body:
Earning the support of our beloved community by putting in the work for each and every one of us.
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=28%2E1163%2EEf5wtO)
We’re building a movement **_together._**
Lateefah has spent her life fighting for folks without a voice. Now, to win this race, she’s earning the support of our beloved community by putting in the work, day in and day out, for each and every one of us.
**That’s why, instead of relying on corporate PACs and dark money deals, we are running a grassroots-powered campaign to send Lateefah to Congress.** With all of us behind her, she’ll bring our stories and our experiences to the halls of the Capitol to continue that fight.
**[So if you can today, will you chip in $5, or any amount, to keep our campaign going? Lateefah will be calling a few people who donate — no matter the amount — to thank you for your being part of this movement.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230517-1?refcode=em20230517-1&refcode2=28_1163_Ef5wtO&akid=28%2E1163%2EEf5wtO)**
_(Make sure you have your phone number saved in your ActBlue information so we can give you a call at the right number!)_
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230517-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230517-1&refcode2=28_1163_Ef5wtO&akid=28%2E1163%2EEf5wtO)**
We mean it when we say this movement wouldn’t be anywhere without supporters like you. Lateefah wants to reach out to folks who chip in to emails like this one — **because you’re central to our campaign’s success.**
So if you can chip in today, you might get a ring from Lateefah as a token of our thanks! 📞
**[What do you say? If you can donate any amount to this email, we’d be truly grateful.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230517-1?refcode=em20230517-1&refcode2=28_1163_Ef5wtO&akid=28%2E1163%2EEf5wtO)**
_(Make sure you have your phone number saved in your ActBlue information so we can give you a call at the right number!)_
Thank you, thank you, thank you!!
💜 Team Lateefah
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-wrapper?refcode=em20230517-1&t=2&refcode2=28_1163_Ef5wtO&akid=28%2E1163%2EEf5wtO)**

subject: We keep having the same conversation

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63434018/406777187/-53242616?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230517_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjMxZmM1My1lZGY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=svoUVuF9nnKuVq6ewhQKdHkJHa7FC4SnkFWcejWlejs=)
---
Hey Peter — We’re disappointed as you are that the legislature couldn’t pass sensible gun laws before gavelling out of their most recent session this past April. We know the vast majority of voters support strengthening our gun laws and making our communities safer from gun violence, yet the GOP decided to kick the can down the road until August. **We’ll be blunt about this: The Republican Party has made it clear that they are beholden to the gun lobby and will do anything to keep the campaign checks coming, even if it’s at the expense of loved ones lost due to gun violence. Our communities won’t be safe while they value the campaign cash the gun lobby provides over the lives of Tennesseans, and we’re committed, Peter to the passage of common-sense gun laws that over 80% of Tennessee voters are calling for.** Tennessee’s firearm death rate is 56% higher than the national average. By making sensible adjustments to our existing gun laws, we could reduce that number by 10% or even higher. Red flag laws, purchase waiting periods, and proper storage laws are supported by the majority of voters. In this fight, we are on the right side of history. [**We’re going to fight for the safety of every community from Memphis to Mountain City — can we count on you to join us? Add your name to our petition calling on the legislature to pass common sense gun laws this August.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63434019/406777188/1976904288?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230517_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjMxZmM1My1lZGY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=svoUVuF9nnKuVq6ewhQKdHkJHa7FC4SnkFWcejWlejs=&emci=8131fc53-edf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=9231fc53-edf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6362892) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63434020/406777189/1976904288?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230517_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjMxZmM1My1lZGY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=svoUVuF9nnKuVq6ewhQKdHkJHa7FC4SnkFWcejWlejs=&emci=8131fc53-edf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=9231fc53-edf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6362892)

Peter, we won’t back down. The livelihoods of Tennesseans depend on our willingness to find sensible solutions to end these terrible and preventable acts of violence.
Thanks for taking a stand with us,
Team TNDP
Tennessee Democratic Party

subject: Colorado School Board STRIKES BACK
body:
Colorado School Board UNANIMOUSLY Passes Resolution
---
| | | | | | |
---
| | | | |
# Colorado school district stands up to teachers union's 'stunning' rejection of capitalism: 'Anti-American'
---
| [ ](https://9l762.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/H1hxmh0bydQNqgzbRjKf79CezVrwtxpfYiv0ZGPi2wtiXVPnqpN3IYtZTYmDCoBRieLvN69hvfp6qRYF8mV7Uf8Nja2yDJwetd23rQxan9PF1IrWlByz9vPeMuQO7QANTeGG3u0HEKPWYdKneBcvReZ4rHqZSp2lVuqoXZH5Boi7Eetr8Vu3vcrio5kybW9VqcRd-eb-zL1HrIXTBW5E)
---
|
### Colorado School Board STRIKES BACK At Teachers Union
---
| The Colorado Education Association [CEA] reportedly passed a resolution that declares that "capitalism inherently exploits children, public schools, land, labor, and resources." This resolution follows the trend of teacher unions pushing a far-left ideology. The president of the National Education Association, the largest teachers union in the nation, declared that racial and social justice is a "pillar" of the NEA's efforts. A Colorado school district is taking a stand against the state's largest teachers union after it passed a stunning resolution rejecting capitalism.Woodland Park School Board Vice President David Illingworth said at the school board meeting that he was in "shock" after learning of the union's statement and outlined his school board's criticism of the "radical anti-American" resolution. "I was pretty much in shock from that statement. As vice president of the school board in Woodland Park, it was just pretty stunning to see the biggest teachers union in the state of Colorado openly adopt a radical anti-American resolution like that and be really open about it," Illingworth said Tuesday. "The mask has come off in Colorado. This union thinks they're too big to fail. They don't think they have to hide their anti-American radical political agenda any longer. And they're determined to push it not just on the government and the people, but on their kids." The Woodland Park School Board passed its own resolution in response to the union's actions where it unanimously supported economic freedom and principles of the Constitution. "We're very pleased to take a stand for freedom, whether that's in capitalism, through the economics or whether that's through constitution and equal opportunity. That's what people can do," Illingworth said. Hopefully more school boards will stand up to these progressive teacher unions.
---
|
---

name: Young Kim
subject: Humbly asking you to read all the way through.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
desperate Democrats have once again named me a Top Target.

| |
---
| | | **-- FROM THE DESK OF REP. YOUNG KIM -
REPRESENTATIVE FROM CA-40**
Friend, I'm writing to you today with some important information. I hope you'll take a moment to read this all the way through.

My family came to America in search of a better life. Through hard work and determination, I was able to put myself through college, start a business, and raise a family. For that, I am incredibly proud.

Being one of the first Korean-American women to serve in Congress is an honor I do not take lightly.

Now, the desperate Democrats have once again named me a Top Target. Friend, they will once again result in desperate, disgusting attacks like calling me a token candidate they always use against strong, Republican, minorities.

Friend, their attacks only make me fight harder. I won't be deterred by desperate Democrats who will say and do anything to score some cheap political points. _**They 've already committed MILLIONS of dollars to defeat me. **_

As an immigrant and conservative woman, this isn't the first time I have been subjected to the Dems attacks. That's why I need your help. This is not the first and certainly won't be the last time the Left comes after us - not after being named their top target, again.

_**[I need you to stand with me, Friend. I'm humbly asking if you'll chip in just $5 today to help us keep fighting.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8c057a182b764b63b6c305563aa0dd8e&_e=WzlAMKUwGQAEj0oTFQ_4XJrPNEVoz--vQ_bNH4eK1xSaDBHgM9-dF7waNRuJx47fcmczdo8w-UlJ_sycCqgbJlfPofONNldLEliKX3OObbdM--70m-lAXYNjGSqUb6MrLg9Fkm704B_9kwRvYqPjF2SAZEtNktDnZOSFkKB2SJB1Jhb9oDtZvhpgBOIg-iqpx-SMh1VtahDfiOboevdPK4B3JYTzTgE-8PTtCPDAHNrq5_VKdsHN-ZUxWWpAWqHayZhiLdxIp5LcJSKrOE_DuF5i3tFkT1C3LXojlSNvN1ukgmMfHUO3l6RZv4QC_FHRS8DNXkDdAsNfRzBcjbUrdEZzjDyn663asrGva3y5Vo4l1DCE-uLYk1IJYP9hhjEvH8vJk7o-CDhxmESoQx7RvNluZAca4YlQ47NwgWRJZD8rOMh6ptBvKh4xmIqWNvzoSYHMy-WUKS_s5FMrG3TUWg%3D%3D "I need you to stand with me, Friend. _We 'll get straight to the point, Friend:

We are completely dependent on grassroots support to fuel our efforts against the Democrats.

YOU are the reason Young is in Congress today, and YOU will be the reason she's able to continue our fight for small business support, lower taxes, slashing red tape, cutting back unnecessary government spending, more educational opportunities for our children, fixing our broken immigration system, and keeping the American Dream alive for generations. **[So, we're humbly asking for $3, $5, $10, or a greater amount to help keep my seat so I can keep fighting for you. ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8c057a182b764b63b6c305563aa0dd8e&_e=WzlAMKUwGQAEj0oTFQ_4XJrPNEVoz--vQ_bNH4eK1xSaDBHgM9-dF7waNRuJx47fpvr4h4wW69-wLV_fq7ETeKQQANqqNecQvn6AD3CjsnMFT4lhg-7ENQ07p0lnq9lcV4Cau1qZOJgprSnUkXgIvHgdlOBnnKs95ZqfyYVmOmAEPfmyaOsZXtQHN6DdOpqxL3sNFK6viVHY4P8v3A0d3MxPXL31ErYdPwLmME-Cmh0CGhR0_pz1LpwYUnNMbKQHUZJPigRfJphpbKBVSsg8EabQCecWUkBZEE_Eqmd3MQ8YkfluXRtTiHxOYd434pQAXc50X3VonEpGjC0y2NtJO_aCN1nfwPT4UxptvwnvnePu0lWBUDjArVUqK8RDRlApol_tZV38uOsUM90DDpPtopvdfUK01QGgdp4_bQfm931bySa0ML01Oo-XDYmg02BL_GGlGKgOI7CrKbKxtG7gUw%3D%3D "So, we’re humbly asking for $3, $5, $10, or a greater amount to help keep my seat so I can keep fighting for you. clean_body: desperate Democrats have once again named me a Top Target. | | | | | -- FROM THE DESK OF REP. YOUNG KIM - REPRESENTATIVE FROM CA-40 Friend, I'm writing to you today with some important information. I hope you'll take a moment to read this all the way through. My family came to America in search of a better life. Through hard work and determination, I was able to put myself through college, start a business, and raise a family. For that, I am incredibly proud. Being one of the first Korean-American women to serve in Congress is an honor I do not take lightly. Now, the desperate Democrats have once again named me a Top Target. Friend, they will once again result in desperate, disgusting attacks like calling me a token candidate they always use against strong, Republican, minorities. Friend, their attacks only make me fight harder. I won't be deterred by desperate Democrats who will say and do anything to score some cheap political points. They 've already committed MILLIONS of dollars to defeat me. As an immigrant and conservative woman, this isn't the first time I have been subjected to the Dems attacks. That's why I need your help. This is not the first and certainly won't be the last time the Left comes after us - not after being named their top target, again. "I need you to stand with me, Friend. I’m humbly asking if you’ll chip in just $5 today to help us keep fighting. " | | | "EMERGENCY DONATE $10" Thank you, | Young Kim We 'll get straight to the point, Friend: We are completely dependent on grassroots support to fuel our efforts against the Democrats. YOU are the reason Young is in Congress today, and YOU will be the reason she's able to continue our fight for small business support, lower taxes, slashing red tape, cutting back unnecessary government spending, more educational opportunities for our children, fixing our broken immigration system, and keeping the American Dream alive for generations. "So, we’re humbly asking for $3, $5, $10, or a greater amount to help keep my seat so I can keep fighting for you. " | ** | | Paid for by Young Kim for Congress P.O. Box 17490 Anaheim, CA 92817 Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Maurice Mitchell, Working Families Party
subject: Our work doesn’t let up now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
This is about more than an election. | | | Peter — Last night was another big election night in Pennsylvania — and from Philly to Pittsburgh, Working Families Democrats ran incredible and inspirational campaigns. In Allegheny County, WFP members helped power primary wins for candidates including progressive champion **Sara Innamorato** for County Executive and **Matt Dugan** for County District Attorney! These results were a huge win for clean air and water and a fair justice system, and a victory for all of us who want a government that works for everyone, not just the powerful and politically connected. In Philadelphia, WFP champion **Helen Gym** unfortunately came up short in her grassroots campaign for mayor. No other candidate had to weather the scale of negative attack ads Helen did — including from Republican megadonor Jeffrey Yass who made it his personal project to stop Helen from becoming mayor, pouring over a million dollars into dishonest smears. Last night, Helen told supporters that her campaign “was always about more than an election.” We couldn’t agree more. We are so proud of the campaign Helen and her team ran, and know that the future of Philadelphia is brighter for it. **The work that we're engaged in together at the Working Families Party is about more than an election — it’s about building a multiracial movement to make our nation work for the many.** And that work doesn’t let up: **In Pennsylvania,** we’ve got to immediately pivot to our general election campaign — re-electing the people’s councilwoman, Kendra Brooks, to her minority party seat in Philly’s City Council, ensuring that pastor and organizer Nicolas O’Rourke joins her, supporting union organizer Jarrett Smith’s bid for the minority party seat on Philly’s City Commission, and powering our primary winners across the state to victory in November. **And everywhere else,** we’ve got to double down on recruiting and training the candidates who can take back the House in 2024, and building towards working families majorities not just in Congress but in state legislatures, counties, cities, and towns. **[If you’re with us in this fight, let us know by making a contribution of $10 today to the Working Families Party. Your grassroots donations help make sure working people have the support they need to win — and add up to something bigger than any one election.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUHT47mgAJJW7A2qAO96_eNSlIjf8jPa1Jw3kqa2O2I-lr89ZU-JaEj7QCoU49_vwoNeSKkk4HNgsyocv-soSckEF3ES8iAiOCq9iA3SLL9NBLNgCkVzBb8Dw8HVBFxqB_FT0A3lHa7TPWvi8ACsE2cSfrMSHC54qpiupHRZ9g-mvbTtgwuKqPnok23HkCzWBRKvANyRKHJ8om8nUNgJgaHwf6hyhkE0ETtQ7EC6BOZj3yH5hMPPrNL2ebnTGe3jg0ydtg-q15S_nAZTNnUF_xJclMbjYezdJk34RirA4D8oQ1Do-U8s2WA33HHeDD6IKFUK7WVGQZuI6k3IdQLpeKucePmLbMgpZy6Tnh9EnrCrD3wEAoqDIftobydD8uLo_-plAns4OASuf5F75Dk-eKbQ/3w9/MbfDzSPaSwugJQzRYxqpfA/h0/BtE1Mw1i4zvrP_wt6CkC-4Cp3rH5SeoT8xQJZRUqrv8)** **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUHT47mgAJJW7A2qAO96_eNSlIjf8jPa1Jw3kqa2O2I-lr89ZU-JaEj7QCoU49_vwo-0CBQoM_L1qSpqgtrfbAzpNbIueUtRg2rTFHW9pOgiA8YRiONBr5y-DubZejfelQrM6Gh8J-ijg0Hb6VYpozngzcDvC7em4Rab56dkLYrNpm-nlLTmbAKDwvGq6RP8EvWMeZV9RtZYdp_NMCP278joGv7_ODu1OVQJ4IBloSUxMPoICxGkNd_hgk5e5cVgXFjpr77U2avZBCY6HXl_LDwv0L7ePucJQJHWRq4YS1DmIHhiOJcJESBLOpB49ORbDQAXmVpUs0Khiqt-j4evvNj05b3-vUBZtN1B4QciO_1A3A5Z4Pt_jgmVFdHyPqCybXsx2I0EDzq5iuGuEU-uz8Hw/3w9/MbfDzSPaSwugJQzRYxqpfA/h1/MlIpZR_f7WLPtHOMWlcf1XlwEd0DWUTadxeoyU6NeAk)** In solidarity, always, Maurice P.S. clean_body: This is about more than an election. | | | Peter — Last night was another big election night in Pennsylvania — and from Philly to Pittsburgh, Working Families Democrats ran incredible and inspirational campaigns. In Allegheny County, WFP members helped power primary wins for candidates including progressive champion Sara Innamorato for County Executive and Matt Dugan for County District Attorney! These results were a huge win for clean air and water and a fair justice system, and a victory for all of us who want a government that works for everyone, not just the powerful and politically connected. In Philadelphia, WFP champion Helen Gym unfortunately came up short in her grassroots campaign for mayor. No other candidate had to weather the scale of negative attack ads Helen did — including from Republican megadonor Jeffrey Yass who made it his personal project to stop Helen from becoming mayor, pouring over a million dollars into dishonest smears. Last night, Helen told supporters that her campaign “was always about more than an election.” We couldn’t agree more. We are so proud of the campaign Helen and her team ran, and know that the future of Philadelphia is brighter for it. The work that we're engaged in together at the Working Families Party is about more than an election — it’s about building a multiracial movement to make our nation work for the many. And that work doesn’t let up: In Pennsylvania, we’ve got to immediately pivot to our general election campaign — re-electing the people’s councilwoman, Kendra Brooks, to her minority party seat in Philly’s City Council, ensuring that pastor and organizer Nicolas O’Rourke joins her, supporting union organizer Jarrett Smith’s bid for the minority party seat on Philly’s City Commission, and powering our primary winners across the state to victory in November. And everywhere else, we’ve got to double down on recruiting and training the candidates who can take back the House in 2024, and building towards working families majorities not just in Congress but in state legislatures, counties, cities, and towns. In solidarity, always, Maurice P.S. If you’d like to read more about WFP’s work in Pennsylvania this cycle, read that goes into more detail about the extraordinary organizing our entire team did to reach voters in these and other races across the state. Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter — WE DID IT!!! 🥳 Breaking through a crowded primary, Collective PAC endorsed leader Cherelle Parker has officially been elected as the Democratic Nominee for Mayor of Philadelphia! She is on her way to becoming the first Black woman and 100th mayor in the city’s history! | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | With Black mayors continuing to lead the four largest cities in America, it’s clear that Black voters are demanding representation in our government louder than ever — and we’re determined to give it to them. From Cherelle Parker in Philadelphia, to Brandon Johnson in Chicago, and even Karen Bass in Los Angeles, it’s more clear than ever, Peter: Our endorsed mayoral candidates win. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | — The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. subject: Should I put you down for Option 1 or Option 2?

**Option 1: We surrender to Biden 's Open-Borders agenda, and allow him to legalize millions of illegal immigrants.**

name: Our Revolution
subject: BREAKING: Bernie just reintroduced Medicare for All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
Peter Willis,

Despite being the wealthiest country in the
history of the world, America does not guarantee health care to our
people.

We pay higher drug prices than anywhere worldwide, and 100 million of us
suffer from medical debt.

That's why Our Revolution rallied today with Bernie Sanders and Pramila
Jayapal to announce the reintroduction of Medicare for All! To build on
the momentum, we're launching a new campaign to support Medicare for All
and end medical debt.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8649?t=1009&akid=4288%2E5885482%2ELWZnN_ ]Stand with Bernie and Our Revolution in our fight for healthcare
justice, and we'll send you both a Medicare for All and an End Medical
Debt sticker if you chip in $10 or $5 recurring!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8669?t=1010&akid=4288%2E5885482%2ELWZnN_ ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8649?t=1011&akid=4288%2E5885482%2ELWZnN_ ]GET YOUR STICKERS

We aren't naive: we know the flood of healthcare industry money and their
army of lobbyists will do everything in their power to ensure Medicare for
All doesn't get through Congress.

However, President Biden can end medical debt with an executive order,
making it a much more achievable goal.

Our theory of change is simple. Hospitals are federal contractors who
receive hundreds of billions of taxpayer dollars through the Medicare and
Medicaid programs. That means the President can withhold federal funding
from hospitals that hurt patients.

President Biden can save families with his pen by stopping predatory
collection practices that cause debt to spiral out of control.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8649?t=1012&akid=4288%2E5885482%2ELWZnN_ ]Help fund our campaign to end medical debt by pitching in $10 or $5
recurring, and we'll send you two powerful stickers calling for Medicare
for All and the end of medical debt!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8669?t=1013&akid=4288%2E5885482%2ELWZnN_ ][IMG]

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5923?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230517_FR_ENDMEDICALDEBT_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_ENDMEDICALDEBT._krh3C&t=1001&akid=4288%2E5885482%2ELWZnN_ ]Our membership card

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230517_FR_ENDMEDICALDEBT_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_ENDMEDICALDEBT.7uWXf3&t=1002&akid=4288%2E5885482%2ELWZnN_ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing as a 2023 Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $10 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230517_FR_ENDMEDICALDEBT_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_ENDMEDICALDEBT.9X9lud&t=1003&akid=4288%2E5885482%2ELWZnN_ ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5926?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230517_FR_ENDMEDICALDEBT_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_ENDMEDICALDEBT.R-LMGD&t=1004&akid=4288%2E5885482%2ELWZnN_ ]GIVE ONCE

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1005&akid=4288%2E5885482%2ELWZnN_ ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1006&akid=4288%2E5885482%2ELWZnN_ ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1007&akid=4288%2E5885482%2ELWZnN_ ][IMG]

name: Andy Beshear
subject: This will be the most competitive race this year.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
As the only Democratic incumbent governor up for re-election this year, we know that this race will be the most competitive in the whole country.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63436235/406785290/1241197580?refcode=email_051723_shapiro-beshear&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWNjYzNhMi1mMmY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=62U6lwWb6OeSJjqm7rkPybYSd9vL2TAkGhxyqhp94rk=) Derek – Kentucky Governor Andy Beshear here.

It's official – the general election has begun! I'm up against Mitch McConnell's protege and outside money is already flooding our state, just as it did last time around, to try and undo all of the progress we've made. I need your support to win this tough race and continue moving Kentucky forward.

I ran for office in 2019 on the promise to do right by Kentuckians in every corner of the Commonwealth. Since being elected, my team and I have helped produce the highest revenue surplus in the state’s history, created more and better-paying jobs for Kentuckians, funded our schools, and expanded health care for folks.

Now I'm running for re-election to protect this progress and continue delivering results for Kentuckians, but I have a tough fight ahead of me. A**s the only Democratic incumbent governor up for re-election this year, we know that this race will be the most competitive in the whole country.**

**[Please, if you can, split a contribution between my campaign and Gov. As the only Democratic incumbent governor running for re-election this year, I have a target on my back. But I'm not going to allow that to dissuade us from running an honest, transparent, and people-powered campaign.

I won the governor's office by just 5,136 votes last time around. I know this will be another tough race, and I'm counting on your support to ensure my team and I have the resources to take on my opponent and outside spending.

**[Can I count on you? Split a donation between my re-election campaign and Gov. Josh Shapiro to help us win this race and keep moving Kentucky forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63436247/406785298/1241197580?refcode=email_051723_shapiro-beshear&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWNjYzNhMi1mMmY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=62U6lwWb6OeSJjqm7rkPybYSd9vL2TAkGhxyqhp94rk=)**

clean_body: As the only Democratic incumbent governor up for re-election this year, we know that this race will be the most competitive in the whole country. = Derek – Kentucky Governor Andy Beshear here. It's official – the general election has begun! I'm up against Mitch McConnell's protege and outside money is already flooding our state, just as it did last time around, to try and undo all of the progress we've made. I need your support to win this tough race and continue moving Kentucky forward. I ran for office in 2019 on the promise to do right by Kentuckians in every corner of the Commonwealth. Since being elected, my team and I have helped produce the highest revenue surplus in the state’s history, created more and better-paying jobs for Kentuckians, funded our schools, and expanded health care for folks. Now I'm running for re-election to protect this progress and continue delivering results for Kentuckians, but I have a tough fight ahead of me. As the only Democratic incumbent governor up for re-election this year, we know that this race will be the most competitive in the whole country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Andy Beshear and Josh Shapiro and will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = As the only Democratic incumbent governor running for re-election this year, I have a target on my back. But I'm not going to allow that to dissuade us from running an honest, transparent, and people-powered campaign. I won the governor's office by just 5,136 votes last time around. I know this will be another tough race, and I'm counting on your support to ensure my team and I have the resources to take on my opponent and outside spending. = Thank you for being a part of this campaign, Andy | By participating, you agree to the for recurring autodialed marketing messages from Josh Shapiro to the phone number you provide. name: Senator Heidi Campbell
subject: It’s my 20th wedding anniversary today! 👰‍♀️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230517_em_fr_b1_HC_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230517_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
Peter,
I remember my and Andrew’s wedding day as though it were yesterday. Tonight, I’m excited to take a well-deserved break and celebrate an amazing 20 years of marriage together.
Peter, I’m grateful every day for my husband and our south Nashville home near Radnor Lake. But lately, I’ve been thinking about the many Nashvillians who may have to make a tough decision between saying “I do” or putting a down payment on their new home.
Does anyone remember this one-hit-wonder of a Nashville reality TV show from 2021? ⬇️
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230517_em_fr_b1_HC_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230517_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
The show follows ten Nashville couples as they’re choosing between having their dream wedding or buying a house—all while being wooed by realtor Nichole Holmes and wedding planner Sarah Miller.
Marriage or Mortgage Nashville reality TV show
The inability of working-class Nashvillians to afford both a wedding to remember and a first home is unfortunately not a new issue.
Thanks to the COVID-19 pandemic and record low interest rates, the past few years have caused Nashville property rates to skyrocket for both renters and property owners.
Peter, as your next mayor, I’m committed to ensuring that people can actually afford to live, work, get married, and raise a family here in Music City.
I plan on using public and private partnerships to deliver 4000 affordable housing units to our city. But I can’t get there without your help, Peter.
Can I count on you to donate to my campaign for Nashville mayor now so that I can keep fighting for accessibility and affordable housing in our city? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230517_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230517_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
With gratitude,
Heidi
Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230517_em_fr_b1_HC_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230517_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves.
Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment.
Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote.
Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream.
Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Campbell for Mayor
P.O. Box 330302
Nashville, Tennessee 37203
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230517_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]

In Congress, I’m driven to spearhead common sense reform like this and so much more, but I need you to support my campaign to make sure I can keep it up.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63438081/406786919/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230517-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2ExNWQ5YzctZjRmNC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8K-TIiKuInvNIbF0NAdGqHHMFAGtCiNJOWt3Qm6XGvY=)

| Peter,

In Congress, it’s my job to meet the needs of my constituents – and I’m committed to being their advocate and representative every day.

_**When I see a problem – I act.**_

Recently, I heard from Virginians with disabilities who experienced horrible treatment by airlines. Travelers were dropped from their wheelchairs while boarding a plane or had their wheelchairs damaged or lost by airlines.

These sorts of stories are simply unacceptable, so I stepped up immediately to address the issue, calling on the Department of Transportation to review enforcement of its disability violation policies.

My constituents – and every American – deserve to have dignity preserved. These are perhaps the sorts of initiatives you don’t hear about in the news every day, but their importance cannot be overstated.

In Congress, I’m driven to spearhead common sense reform like this and so much more, [_**but I need you to support my campaign to make sure I can keep it up. Will you please consider a contribution today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63438083/406786920/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230517-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2ExNWQ5YzctZjRmNC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8K-TIiKuInvNIbF0NAdGqHHMFAGtCiNJOWt3Qm6XGvY=)

clean_body: In Congress, I’m driven to spearhead common sense reform like this and so much more, but I need you to support my campaign to make sure I can keep it up. | = | Peter, In Congress, it’s my job to meet the needs of my constituents – and I’m committed to being their advocate and representative every day. When I see a problem – I act. Recently, I heard from Virginians with disabilities who experienced horrible treatment by airlines. Travelers were dropped from their wheelchairs while boarding a plane or had their wheelchairs damaged or lost by airlines. These sorts of stories are simply unacceptable, so I stepped up immediately to address the issue, calling on the Department of Transportation to review enforcement of its disability violation policies. My constituents – and every American – deserve to have dignity preserved. These are perhaps the sorts of initiatives you don’t hear about in the news every day, but their importance cannot be overstated. In Congress, I’m driven to spearhead common sense reform like this and so much more, = | | | = | = | = | = | = With appreciation for your support, Abigail * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. Box 3112 Fredericksburg, VA 22402 United States | | | ---|---|--- Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit . = = If you wish to receive fewer emails, .

name: Jessica Anderson, Heritage Action
subject: This is why Heritage Action is different👇
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
Heritage Action is focused on winning with you| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=45f33f9da69c4805ba59ed1dd9b132b2&_e=kxcybTUPrRZz-u2WFaLQGISkbULWOQv03FlU9ph-iYQLTT8N26SUzHDYaIGpjnVR7GjQRsdDRyqeft_7iGhwVKMa-khZIWdSXJkzRQlE9SMtY9xFwse1gKBEFQtGTbNxPDqlZzch2s8gIANcXG_qygwmua0Za1c2rjyGA9hNw2JJ9v7GhWG5CGiFKP5KJ1WyrqhtscujMxsVxjmsSRjirXSfiNH05Zgqk11cXNkXbiuga6JRlR8FfM5SExmfeG2-ApN_R74OasSvLp7di6A-fJydl_Y2sCSeMoIhgwcQJf_Tk1727s-MrVykVYGoMUwFekmiCMmHAsDWG4PFKLxVYx1Ga0Z-22_1ZEkbWnc7f0v203Te2WGo9UTkOit1LSAn)
---
| | Peter, Here at Heritage Action, we like to talk about what _**WE’VE DONE WITH YOU.**_ Thanks to dedicated conservatives like you, we've accomplished so much in the first half of 2023. These conservative victories are possible because of generous Heritage Action members.
---
[**Heritage Action Wining with you in 2023 (...with much more to come)**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=45f33f9da69c4805ba59ed1dd9b132b2&_e=kxcybTUPrRZz-u2WFaLQGISkbULWOQv03FlU9ph-iYQLTT8N26SUzHDYaIGpjnVR7GjQRsdDRyqeft_7iGhwVKMa-khZIWdSXJkzRQlE9SMtY9xFwse1gKBEFQtGTbNxPDqlZzch2s8gIANcXG_qygwmua0Za1c2rjyGA9hNw2JJ9v7GhWG5CGiFKP5KJ1WyrqhtscujMxsVxjmsSRjirXSfiNH05Zgqk11cXNkXbiv1ipUXQtYqx1uQBokoZXP4Z-nmYXhqH1C26yVagea8eISDaaM6R-9xXTMbGZgawr6do3h9BlWAquNaT7z6Il14JkvmhH9a5fUHnzycbqcVPgb6e5J5xvSHbcZOhOe8HNnw_1ZLX02J8z9TslArRSTI)
* **Forced Biden's very first veto,** making him reject a bipartisan majority of Congress in support of woke ESG policy infiltrating retirement savings.
* **Directly challenged numerous bureaucratic rules** and regulations from the Biden Admin.

* **Blocked radical nominees from receiving Senate confirmation,** such as Gigi Sohn, a pro-censorship liberal.

* **Made Biden betray his own party** and come out against DC’s soft-on-crime laws.

* **Established the framework on spending and the debt ceiling,** leading to House Republicans passing the historic Limit, Save, Grow Act (H.R. 2811), which includes spending cuts and pro-growth elements.

* **Supported the House passage of the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act** (S. 613/ H.R. 734).

* **Laid the groundwork and guided through** for House passage the Secure the Border Act of 2023 (H. R. 2).

Thanks to dedicated conservatives like you, we've accomplished so much in the first half of 2023. These conservative victories are possible because of generous Heritage Action members. Forced Biden's very first veto, making him reject a bipartisan majority of Congress in support of woke ESG policy infiltrating retirement savings. Directly challenged numerous bureaucratic rules and regulations from the Biden Admin. Blocked radical nominees from receiving Senate confirmation, such as Gigi Sohn, a pro-censorship liberal. Made Biden betray his own party and come out against DC’s soft-on-crime laws. Established the framework on spending and the debt ceiling, leading to House Republicans passing the historic Limit, Save, Grow Act (H.R. 2811), which includes spending cuts and pro-growth elements. Supported the House passage of the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act (S. 613/ H.R. 734). Laid the groundwork and guided through for House passage the Secure the Border Act of 2023 (H. R. 2). Working with Congress to challenge Biden’s woke student loan bailout scheme. Peter, your support makes all of this possible, and we want to keep racking up conservative wins and achieving real results for the rest of 2023 and beyond. That’s why I’m asking you to help us continue our fight by rushing a critical donation before MIDNIGHT to help us stay on track to meet our May mid-month goal. [**May 17, 1900:** American Author L. Frank Baum published his most famous children’s book The Wonderful Wizard of Oz. The book was so successful that it became a musical in 1902. Baum went on to write a whole Oz series with 13 more books. The Wizard of Oz is regarded as one of the greatest American stories of all time.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=18d1233af2ca4ebaae6acf9389b8aec0&_e=7hfix_B6QpUa7lWBEUzgjIVjhpKA6U1th5m5pBc0fr7apX7NOgrSteqO4_AxTiwRYXHGeE3K7JVKpUiLqRxKS_yg7HzI2lo2Gq_vRO40OruHa06352vUrnLFq9kgnQ-gyJIKFqQMVzbdAz-Xj7tRYn92CI-euzsI9yp9buCMc-X_RyhA1_1eTvs6LQEe5yRM7ZGY5Mde9T1Rmcpq0ZvR_AnDgnA95LZ-L3GLP4_7KBnWbXukUxuDwHHYJimo19EC) **Source -[wikipedia.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=18d1233af2ca4ebaae6acf9389b8aec0&_e=7hfix_B6QpUa7lWBEUzgjIVjhpKA6U1th5m5pBc0fr7apX7NOgrSteqO4_AxTiwRYXHGeE3K7JVKpUiLqRxKSx7vC2S530iGxh1A4_U--Afl2N0Eoevo2LB1OFDPolNYB-lHJEbioFNeUY5LvERSetHWabi5IS2hVaWtIvbfJPLdjE8aPRQp0D09AtKvcLEODwn4dDyGfX9zSj3pqhvBrKnd2yHskoWUCjxatcfSEis6HOa95Dpjg8lortRWiV1W)[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=18d1233af2ca4ebaae6acf9389b8aec0&_e=7hfix_B6QpUa7lWBEUzgjBfs0ZuWQgXPRFBfzP_qoA9dh097CVNdo5q5HYul_Kq1uffT4DULu0mKnihdgjBgBTjtGHvDBNlmjF5eGOLaVblMYE7CDKwuCUmqoDcYwHwTEZhpbG-FaBIff4qlPTeMoJI2Z0Ks5p9lWAN4jCY6_RjDUSabeUZ9AxFRMlafeCY2wUm0Sx5HIAbkc8BZJ1faH338ZcZFCSKal4s5AoPEKuzWWnaIe8V6UntccMXcUeG_)**

[**May 17, 1939:** The first ever sporting event to be filmed and aired live on American television was a collegiate baseball game between Princeton and Columbia Universities. Filmed at Columbia’s Baker Field, the game was broadcasted by the National Broadcasting Company, and after its success NBC decided to try a Major League game, beginning sports television as we know it today.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=18d1233af2ca4ebaae6acf9389b8aec0&_e=7hfix_B6QpUa7lWBEUzgjClvt805j47nGRGf999qJU_tL3yeZbz9IK8sLXG3cpFJpIIuGX-3n1xHf9pLCUp0dbjkRhANx7V5LAS8qwmox-D7FKDOry1ydm3A0C7rSKqcE98Ee7EHHNUFGt7lzI2lAI7pBBlaLEWBSewE-SlSBxRFMdPiykJ5vmXtIntWzefY2kBNwu7V0-bGQEVdTC1gye_uWpvexYLBw0Uca43VtzgUmz_ajhhugkIaK8bO5xhtHfsT7MWqbvGqGa03T3FRppIGtq57UBjCNGfFdhIaQMEevORFEu4YIcBst0JrLpjN64V5y0dtiAr8SkTZ6FBnti2S7leaf0MiyjEtCQIdTbU%3D) **Source -[columbia.edu](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=18d1233af2ca4ebaae6acf9389b8aec0&_e=7hfix_B6QpUa7lWBEUzgjClvt805j47nGRGf999qJU_tL3yeZbz9IK8sLXG3cpFJpIIuGX-3n1xHf9pLCUp0dbjkRhANx7V5LAS8qwmox-D7FKDOry1ydm3A0C7rSKqcE98Ee7EHHNUFGt7lzI2lAI7pBBlaLEWBSewE-SlSBxRFMdPiykJ5vmXtIntWzefYMP6uchcKd3fHI0qKrHcF3YKFrOn7NehtK8PW71815PeGIpZKkBdpVVMOwxD3xFEdSRHbN-tKYaKnj3MlJyI24PGC0vtK9sizilFrf2kC6BsXg9B08zJQjnDsCjSuIzFuym5DfbgmlFmCh-EwCmXx3eG_E-wVgBxYATtmr9SjBNo%3D)**

name: Team Becca
subject: Becca is making mental health a priority.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont
body:
May is Mental Health Awareness Month.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63439519/406788927/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDgyZjVmYi1mNWY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W7Gwgr4p_7vBauL4t_3SWCOrNzXsq5wHfT54Lkg-Hts=&emci=b98f9cb6-c2f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=9d82f5fb-f5f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Peter: When Becca decided to run for Congress, she made expanding mental health care for Vermonters a key component of her platform. Now, she’s taking _serious_ action to address the ongoing mental health crisis impacting Americans in Congress – particularly teens and young adults.
* First, Becca introduced the **Peer Education and Emergency Response for Mental Health Act** earlier this spring, a bill to invest federal dollars in training teachers, school personnel, and students to assist their peers who may be facing a mental health crisis.
* Then, she joined Congressman Brian Steil (WI-01) to introduce the **Protecting Young Minds Online Act** , a bill to launch research into the mental health impact of social media on kids and young adults.

This Mental Health Awareness Month, there are more bills related to mental health and well-being moving through Congress than ever before. Thanks to courageous leaders like Becca – who are open about their own struggles with mental health and willing to work across party lines to find common ground – it’s likely that we will see real action on this issue before the end of the year. **Becca is taking our priorities and turning them into meaningful policies. We need to keep effective, bold leaders like her fighting for all of us in Washington.** **[Please pitch in $5 or more to help Becca continue pushing for mental health reform and progressive policy action as our Congresswoman.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63439520/406788928/-146036107?refcode=E21484-20230517-MentalHealth-SL-Healthcare-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDgyZjVmYi1mNWY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W7Gwgr4p_7vBauL4t_3SWCOrNzXsq5wHfT54Lkg-Hts=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63439521/406788929/-146036107?express_lane=true&refcode=E21484-20230517-MentalHealth-EG-Healthcare-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDgyZjVmYi1mNWY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W7Gwgr4p_7vBauL4t_3SWCOrNzXsq5wHfT54Lkg-Hts=)** | **[$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63439522/406788930/-146036107?express_lane=true&refcode=E21484-20230517-MentalHealth-EG-Healthcare-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDgyZjVmYi1mNWY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W7Gwgr4p_7vBauL4t_3SWCOrNzXsq5wHfT54Lkg-Hts=)**

clean_body: May is Mental Health Awareness Month. | | Peter: When Becca decided to run for Congress, she made expanding mental health care for Vermonters a key component of her platform. Now, she’s taking serious action to address the ongoing mental health crisis impacting Americans in Congress – particularly teens and young adults. First, Becca introduced the Peer Education and Emergency Response for Mental Health Act earlier this spring, a bill to invest federal dollars in training teachers, school personnel, and students to assist their peers who may be facing a mental health crisis. Then, she joined Congressman Brian Steil (WI-01) to introduce the Protecting Young Minds Online Act , a bill to launch research into the mental health impact of social media on kids and young adults. This Mental Health Awareness Month, there are more bills related to mental health and well-being moving through Congress than ever before. Thanks to courageous leaders like Becca – who are open about their own struggles with mental health and willing to work across party lines to find common ground – it’s likely that we will see real action on this issue before the end of the year. Becca is taking our priorities and turning them into meaningful policies. We need to keep effective, bold leaders like her fighting for all of us in Washington. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = – Team Becca = If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, **If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . Ryan Girdusky, Founder

name: Sara (personal)
subject: Big news: I’ve just reintroduced my bill to protect our reproductive health data
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]

Hi Friend, I’m excited about this: I’ve just reintroduced my bill, the My Body, My Data Act, in the House of Representatives.

This is an essential piece of legislation that would create a new national standard to protect our personal reproductive health data. The bill addresses the huge gap in privacy laws that we need to fill if we’re going to keep pace with the new and emerging technologies we use every day. By minimizing the personal health data that is collected and retained by apps, cell phones, and search engines, we can prevent our data from being disclosed, misused, or weaponized.

That last piece - the weaponization of our data - is the dystopian-level threat that we’re actually facing right now, so let’s talk about it for a minute. Listen, apps and websites have been collecting and using our personal data for years - we know that, and it can be helpful! - but in this post-Roe v. Wade era, we’re seeing the consequences of this digital surveillance intensify.

Every day - every minute that we’re on our phones and devices - we’re generating data that could be used against us, or against our health care providers and allies. Our locations, search histories, texts and emails - even our reproductive health data from things like period tracking apps - it’s all collected by companies and websites that can exploit our data and ultimately lead to very real threats to our safety and privacy.

The My Body, My Data Act would address these key issues in several ways:

*
Limit
data
collection.
Prevent
companies
from
being
able
to
share
or
sell
your
data
by
ensuring
that
those
who
collect,
retain,
or
use
your
personal
reproductive
and
sexual
health
data
are
limited
only
to
what
is
strictly
needed
to
deliver
a
product
or
service.
*
Expand
consumer
protections.
We’ll
provide
additional
protections
like
giving
consumers
the
right
to
access,
delete,
or
correct
their
personal
data
if
they
choose
to
do
so.
*
Expand
data
protections.
Current
laws
like
HIPAA
only
protect
your
health
information
when
it’s
being
used
by
doctors
or
health
insurers,
leaving
a
huge
gap
in
protection
for
data
collected
in
apps,
cell
phones,
and
search
engines.
*
Require
new
privacy
policies.
Companies
must
develop
and
share
a
privacy
policy
outlining
how
they
collect,
retain,
use,
and
disclose
your
personal
reproductive
health
data.
*
Enforce
the
law.
We’ll
make
sure
the
federal
trade
commission
(FTC)
enforces
the
law
and
develops
rules
to
implement
the
statute.
*
Ensure
accountability.
Should
companies
violate
our
data,
the
bill
includes
a
private
right
of
action
to
allow
individuals
to
hold
them
accountable.
This
part
is
a
big
deal.

As attacks on abortion access increase, my bill will create essential protections for vulnerable individuals. 19 states have already banned or severely restricted abortion - which puts people in those states at increased risk of having their digital footprints weaponized against them.

And this isn’t just a hypothetical - the criminalization of abortion (and miscarriages and stillbirths) is already happening , as prosecutors are exploiting this gap in federal data protections to enforce cruel anti-abortion laws.

We need urgent action to strengthen digital privacy and protect our reproductive health information so that it can’t be used or weaponized against us, and this bill is a great first step to creating this framework and offering some immediate solutions to deter bad actors.

If you agree, please join me by adding your name in support of my bill right now.

We have a long way to go to ensure our privacy laws address the needs of this century as new technologies continue to advance. I’m proud of this work and this bill, and I hope you know how much I appreciate your help and support in moments like these.

-Sara
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: How you can help me get a prime spot on the debate stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
If we want to make the debate stage in August, we need to secure unique donors to our grassroots campaign.

| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a071644122f94a2c931e560afa022d2a&_e=eiajphrhJBMAZCkc_7wHkGY6tHyTg4LRY5vCch8uPzBBucHVckCFjefvc2IjNlT4RXvGYwB93Ho48XDF78jJbMfzik9uMMf0D-qUX1CRuV3fTuztICu4rW7o_vH6zwPJMV6SmL97lw5e6U_BEnU1h2WkvgBGd2-p6tCIncz4_cajKk5SkQJ2B7LNRbdKmhQrz_ZF29jsc5ZekdOVlNieD0T0wNMLsPmjSyR3PSGuk6eQSnCukcG4ggvTk6AHecvpjpVJNRKzrfOC4RzFLkifOf9WcLrdtdcA7JZkEHmyK5djyYqukmuuTU5mBKHHIx42ZhU0ZdCh1o5AgYIBv7S1qcPVckt0yYT-7PbOYMhH1nLcR0vhBqyK0SHcaB0AHnez-Plvx_XoNDvEyAn4f35iwqz00h-JvBzHKN8jjTTzDQ4%3D)
Fellow American -

I have a clear vision for how to win the White House in 2024: **a grassroots, bottom-up campaign made of people just like you.**

We're about to hit a major campaign milestone - 35,000 unique donors in just months of campaigning. Unlike my opponents who have years of politicking under their belts, we started with NOTHING and have built this movement.

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a071644122f94a2c931e560afa022d2a&_e=eiajphrhJBMAZCkc_7wHkGY6tHyTg4LRY5vCch8uPzBBucHVckCFjefvc2IjNlT4RXvGYwB93Ho48XDF78jJbMfzik9uMMf0D-qUX1CRuV3fTuztICu4rW7o_vH6zwPJMV6SmL97lw5e6U_BEnU1h2WkvgBGd2-p6tCIncz4_cajKk5SkQJ2B7LNRbdKmhQrz_ZF29jsc5ZekdOVlNieD0T0wNMLsPmjSyR3PSGuk6eQSnCukcG4ggvTk6AHecvpYR1Ipx3iAILOOEM5eGEhS52pduPA8tawmMJtcIbJdfFSiWBY-dp9eSFGKbnm7tjHr0QoSheZZokSU9RBM0747pXdJ7IEJiANNOd--G2KNpAdCAypQEjhu3TSyYJlt7et9oQ9fG_zhgsjD4Z34gJEL_3_7a-lIyWidXORJ5lr8_4%3D)
So here's what I am asking of you today: **[will you be one of the unique donors I need to get a prime spot on the debate stage? Make it a small donation - every dollar makes a huge difference when it comes to planning our "Great Uprising."](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a071644122f94a2c931e560afa022d2a&_e=eiajphrhJBMAZCkc_7wHkGY6tHyTg4LRY5vCch8uPzBBucHVckCFjefvc2IjNlT4RXvGYwB93Ho48XDF78jJbMfzik9uMMf0D-qUX1CRuV3fTuztICu4rW7o_vH6zwPJMV6SmL97lw5e6U_BEnU1h2WkvgBGd2-p6tCIncz4_cajKk5SkQJ2B7LNRbdKmhQrz_ZF29jsc5ZekdOVlNieD0T0wNMLsPmjSyR3PSGuk6eQSnCukcG4ggvTk6AHecvpOeMbxBAJhquV1CifXUkLhJjUJLxXBFyr-c8ZOq21_6FZfV9MgmhGKx521oZzNOwOe98zazEk4csAJQWvj3iZG3CBNyrACX68r7aKvoEQlptiP8MF59xgqQkRsTLa9J2-lB8Okv3A5o6I2wb0I498NS4gO-ZZLt1MdTll8p-dSd4%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a071644122f94a2c931e560afa022d2a&_e=eiajphrhJBMAZCkc_7wHkGY6tHyTg4LRY5vCch8uPzBBucHVckCFjefvc2IjNlT4RXvGYwB93Ho48XDF78jJbMfzik9uMMf0D-qUX1CRuV3fTuztICu4rW7o_vH6zwPJMV6SmL97lw5e6U_BEnU1h2WkvgBGd2-p6tCIncz4_cajKk5SkQJ2B7LNRbdKmhQrz_ZF29jsc5ZekdOVlNieD0T0wNMLsPmjSyR3PSGuk6eQSnCukcG4ggvTk6AHecvpDd03hghyqiPTSM2O_n-IY9mhiEL1gb3cdmkmsqQKOP48p9XZoCz0kX2bWYE7wZ3rBgIX3m-ZNuds7qlTydGTsyi7qFRujZ5kUWYpXP9VaPApJAehiDAdF9L0NwJz5EdkS1anVdl31fzM3P_Yk1eSKLcpSECmDJoIEMVrwD_3MEE%3D)

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: A big moment for our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Convention is an opportunity for Katie to meet with potential supporters, party delegates, and state and local officials.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=23076%2E3422442%2Eoq4h2w)
Derek, over Memorial Day weekend, Katie and our team will be in Los Angeles for the California Democratic Party Convention. The convention is an opportunity for Katie to meet with potential supporters, party delegates, and state and local officials.
**The convention is a big moment for our campaign.** Press and political pundits will be watching to see which candidate seems to be garnering energy and excitement, and that can translate into very real momentum for our campaign _outside_ of the convention.
But pulling off a successful convention weekend doesn't come cheap. We have to purchase thousands of buttons, stickers, and t-shirts, and print literature about Katie. **Here are just a few of the expenses:**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230517-1?refcode=EMAH17_1_WTB_20230517_V1_F&refcode2=23076_3422442_oq4h2w&akid=23076%2E3422442%2Eoq4h2w)
Want to support Team Porter at this month's Democratic Party Convention? **[Consider chipping in today to help power our campaign.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230517-1?refcode=EMAH17_1_WTB_20230517_V1_F&refcode2=23076_3422442_oq4h2w&akid=23076%2E3422442%2Eoq4h2w)**
**[Donate $5 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230517-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAH17_1_WTB_20230517_V1_F&refcode2=23076_3422442_oq4h2w&akid=23076%2E3422442%2Eoq4h2w)**
Thanks for considering!
Team KP

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAH17_1_WTB_20230517_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=23076_3422442_oq4h2w&akid=23076%2E3422442%2Eoq4h2w)**

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=23076%2E3422442%2Eoq4h2w)
