name: Al Franken via Blue Amp Action
subject: My friend Josh Riley is running for Congress in New York’s 19th District — a key district to taking back the House in 2024.
body:
House seat pickup
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb70076e7-0768-4246-85f3-e6f45bb4ebfa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [__](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6eef98f6-513a-450b-a580-e9f66cc34b9a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Dear Person Who Opens My Email, My friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley made a BIG announcement. Josh is running for Congress in New York’s 19th District — a key district to taking back the House in 2024. He ran for the seat last cycle in his first political race, nearly defeating a 30-year career politician and Republican Marcus Molinaro – losing 50.8% to 49.2% in a district where some Democrats at the top of the ticket lost by more than 6 points. Josh will win this time! And I will give you five reasons why 2024 promises to be better than 2022. **[But first, let’s help Josh’s 2024 campaign get off to a great start. Will you join me right now by splitting a contribution of $10 or more between Josh Riley and Blue Amp Action right now? He’s not taking corporate PAC money and he’s counting on individual supporters like you and me, Peter.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T24cd1d66-5ec8-4407-b871-84dec5aa1e67/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T10b33e61-ab44-4eda-bfe2-fbf4b290cf6a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Here are five reasons why 2022 was a seriously hard year to win in New York as a Democrat, and why it’s so impressive Josh came as close to winning as he did:
1. **Redistricting**. Last cycle, the New York State Legislature drew a congressional map that the New York State Courts deemed too partisan — so they threw it out and redrew it themselves. Unfortunately, for five months Josh had been running in the wrong damn district! The only good part is that the working-class town Josh grew up in remained in the newly formed 19th District. But Josh had a whole bunch of new territory in which to make himself known.
2. **Primaries**. Josh had to win an expensive primary challenge in late August against a strong opponent. Still, Josh won the primary by a nearly two-to-one margin. By working his butt off, not that he had much of a butt to start with—have you seen this guy? Beanpole!
3. **Marc Molinaro**. Josh’s Republican opponent in the general election had already been a State Assembly Member, County Executive and GOP candidate for governor in 2018, losing to then-Governor Cuomo. Molinaro gained wide name recognition and had no challengers in his 2022 primary. But now he has a record to run on–and it’s not a good one. He’s voting 95% of the time with Marjorie Taylor-Greene!
4. **Crazy GOP Attack Ads**. Republicans had momentum statewide, and they ran tons of deeply dishonest dark money ads that said crap like, “Josh Riley’s allies want to defund the police.” I don’t know who Josh’s “allies” are but Josh and I funded the police—getting crisis intervention training and bullet proof vests for local police departments across the country. It was completely false, and it was sickening.
5. **Midterm vs. Presidential Years**. 2024 will not be a midterm! Ultimately, too many New York Democrats didn’t show up in a number of races this past cycle. But this time, not only is the presidency on the line – so is the Supreme Court. You can bet Democrats will turn out!

So now that you know how tough 2022 was — and how CLOSE Josh came to pulling it off — are you ready to join me in supporting Josh for 2024? **[Split a contribution to support Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign — he’s going to win one of the most important races in America for 2024 and I want you to be a part of it.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7a92ba12-e000-4b1f-a393-0ac78d1e6c7b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thanks, Al [**P.S. I like the P.S. because it’s one more opportunity to ask for a donation. So donate now!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T39124121-e188-4ca2-be29-beec66b92626/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta19a2c1e-b72b-4115-adf7-a563532350cc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

clean_body: House seat pickup | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can . | | | | | | | | Dear Person Who Opens My Email, My friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley made a BIG announcement. Josh is running for Congress in New York’s 19th District — a key district to taking back the House in 2024. He ran for the seat last cycle in his first political race, nearly defeating a 30-year career politician and Republican Marcus Molinaro – losing 50.8% to 49.2% in a district where some Democrats at the top of the ticket lost by more than 6 points. Josh will win this time! And I will give you five reasons why 2024 promises to be better than 2022. | | | | | | | | Here are five reasons why 2022 was a seriously hard year to win in New York as a Democrat, and why it’s so impressive Josh came as close to winning as he did: 1. Redistricting. Last cycle, the New York State Legislature drew a congressional map that the New York State Courts deemed too partisan — so they threw it out and redrew it themselves. Unfortunately, for five months Josh had been running in the wrong damn district! The only good part is that the working-class town Josh grew up in remained in the newly formed 19th District. But Josh had a whole bunch of new territory in which to make himself known. 2. Primaries. Josh had to win an expensive primary challenge in late August against a strong opponent. Still, Josh won the primary by a nearly two-to-one margin. By working his butt off, not that he had much of a butt to start with—have you seen this guy? Beanpole! 3. Marc Molinaro. Josh’s Republican opponent in the general election had already been a State Assembly Member, County Executive and GOP candidate for governor in 2018, losing to then-Governor Cuomo. Molinaro gained wide name recognition and had no challengers in his 2022 primary. But now he has a record to run on–and it’s not a good one. He’s voting 95% of the time with Marjorie Taylor-Greene! 4. Crazy GOP Attack Ads. Republicans had momentum statewide, and they ran tons of deeply dishonest dark money ads that said crap like, “Josh Riley’s allies want to defund the police.” I don’t know who Josh’s “allies” are but Josh and I funded the police—getting crisis intervention training and bullet proof vests for local police departments across the country. It was completely false, and it was sickening. 5. Midterm vs. Presidential Years. 2024 will not be a midterm! Ultimately, too many New York Democrats didn’t show up in a number of races this past cycle. But this time, not only is the presidency on the line – so is the Supreme Court. You can bet Democrats will turn out! So now that you know how tough 2022 was — and how CLOSE Josh came to pulling it off — are you ready to join me in supporting Josh for 2024? Thanks, Al | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: The Ohio Democratic Party
subject: Have you seen this…? We have an IMMEDIATE fundraising gap:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We're fighting back against extremists who will do anything to rewrite the rules and defy the will of Ohioans. Can we count on your support to fight back?
| Team, here's the situation:

**Over the next 83 days, Ohio Dems will knock over 500,000 doors and make 135,000 calls to turn out Democratic voters to vote "NO" on August 8th to save citizen-led ballot initiatives. **

| | We have less than a month until the U.S defaults on paying its debt, Derek. House Republicans’ solution? A bill that cuts funding for veterans’ benefits, Customs & Border patrol, Alzheimer’s research, social security offices, and more. This is unacceptable. They’ve presented an unworkable plan that will force our country to default on its debt and release economic catastrophe on the American people. Senator Warner is determined to defuse this crisis, but while he’s working on this, he needs your help. **_[We are up against our mid-month deadline and need 250 grassroots supporters to donate $5 or more before midnight to stay on track. Can you chip in right now to help?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63442949/406792717/-1097791522?refcode=mw_em_230517_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODdiYjQ4Mi1mOWY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7DQLeeq1NK3AhVrnw1SBXpDxSRiYiqzsPQuo9IiYs2A=)_** It’s time to pass a clean debt limit increase. Under the tenure of President Trump, it was raised _three times_ without this political drama. But now, House Republicans are more than happy to play political blackmail with the debt limit. May 16th, 2023 Bringing you the latest news, updates and what you _need_ to know about the race for U.S. Senate in Ohio
---
|
---
Welcome to the inaugural edition of The Dolan Download – a concise, weekly newsletter providing the most important updates on the race U.S. Senate in Ohio.
---

# 3 Things to Know This Week:
---

# Get up to speed...
---
Matt Dolan’s trip to the southern border with Ohio law enforcement continues to make news In case you missed it, Matt Dolan was out with a new border security focused op-ed that ran in more than dozen papers across Ohio, including the [Columbus Dispatch](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=00549a1225da4f5589240ac99f1a73ec&_e=qsB7NwP4NYAVhT3leGtOjVdhI8qwWgSRwRdcoOHsuzymo23yUMC84vooivmGKPrv8HBEu18nBQRdWHX7Wc_Jty7OtvoDKY4m4yLiU0iCxN4MIIIKHSgxRFO0YJxlD4hs-bWt0jwKDtw1MHjU81sK9xJZCKsQzJ540gIECHvAOfpg2srRInTwzmaUIFglZ9fWzWuMVb1nVJ2csyCq8tYhEluB13V9Ijk4B_a3AHtUoGIjA_JI3VsQNeNAwg0dLaLIj7uV-DrNwHogFEjfETp6IkuX6pDLhzhschuqZIg8cOEy7UFN7Myk1ymdNvYCDCmNMLaL_2-88oFBHHBL75c4MxRiEIA2BwDToZI2IAaPlqE9etNdzIqnDRDONW1hzCqhbM9_GOfPlAcK-d-v-Ixlv6fkMY67L3fg-TKCrucAlLoRa0gBLIfFWpq6RZIDkbjKYj3p--sFEjTvsiilrPVo5-lNu78ulV9yC0alTVI1VYw0FpOuuCFV66FNs8gWxCxAXo4QcVwW0hPxjQpgL-g9Z1w81gBXhJj6x_RCmyyo9Gvnw7Shewv_8HpAkw8QwSgA94Su67pqyVqAfNghR2McJG4b2Dkx5QZ5RaFg2nqD1q8JRZtPjndiQRVplc5zWBMV), Cincinnati Enquirer and Akron Beacon Journal. Dolan discussed his recent trip to the U.S. southern border, took Joe Biden, Alejandro Mayorkas and Sherrod Brown to task for their policy failures, and outlined multi-faceted solutions that would help to protect America and reduce overdose deaths in Ohio. Dolan recently joined members of Ohio law enforcement in Athens Ohio for a tour of BuckEye Cam, an Ohio-based trail camera manufacturer that is providing technology and hardware to state and federal agencies on the southern border. Dolan [used the trip to Athens on Friday](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=00549a1225da4f5589240ac99f1a73ec&_e=qsB7NwP4NYAVhT3leGtOjVdhI8qwWgSRwRdcoOHsuzymo23yUMC84vooivmGKPrv8HBEu18nBQRdWHX7Wc_Jty7OtvoDKY4m4yLiU0iCxN4MIIIKHSgxRFO0YJxlD4hsJ918gPrROffDXDJc8Y1tuxaKnE_rz-1wxiC_CQ4IDstrVrAQOKDMpw6k19MRk_GaE8LllPhejy_rojUA3SmAJ2-XrhFD2sktZTQNMUr3rAKvjhnXCXLxE8MnTunNPChyQxhC3V9c6Q9tCQwfHd94x2MRWPw0gLInUywoTrFDYdqdJLfaLldOOl5d5WDnNrH4uK9CwjCqExgD5XFQtUhCpZJUWnhRPEu2ljnRQVnCr3FhlDUOGFIo1au-Jkgg-b42eAOhOTjP73NTzOi3tonkngVlENFCPZ2oUi4qNOSYtF9wrMstDyvAsODT-DI8Y8eQpoABQjYm9deY6HbntRTDfqvFfuUnjbfU3WMZFSk_XqiDmdR6_sbYMwDm8AGrdVkY93rI0JGakYGFfCPIi25ksBU5MpOv0OMrUvQ1xplUqEYM0fdZhVI3dPhfBcWx76TQMKcairzk8sWE4Zs2R1lWHF5lfKYGYrf6SdAV4a_CL2ontI0td0H5wu7gv_FVrVRSz4Y-lAlOYbyl1zwZiYD6waSwA625_et67Yb1qSEGj_cio3xyBDS2Zk2pp8lKSSQK5Ke9jnh1y2L-GETmhFIW7t488TVHPRk3kcTLO55RR1Q%3D) to call on the Biden Administration to “extend Title 42, designate the China-backed cartels as foreign terrorists and take the necessary steps with infrastructure, civilian and military personnel to stop the flow of human trafficking and fentanyl into the country, save American lives and restore our nation’s sovereignty.”

**Cook Political Report says Dolan is GOP’s best bet against Sherrod Brown** The [Cook Political Report](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=00549a1225da4f5589240ac99f1a73ec&_e=qsB7NwP4NYAVhT3leGtOjVdhI8qwWgSRwRdcoOHsuzymo23yUMC84vooivmGKPrv8HBEu18nBQRdWHX7Wc_Jty7OtvoDKY4m4yLiU0iCxN4MIIIKHSgxRFO0YJxlD4hsXqmOIQxfeYv480d1LFz5Eon238IfNJlUZvgSgLxlslOlDe6N0fBUt7d_d2I4Pag9KDQ4wkjGLnET1bHcWlz6thyiQepSF7MhtEF_0oWU8iTB9derb0X0KC-KXKInVldG0BWZYGx-FEylfXpnAmOQaJ3s3hLoE9PZTOG9y8IwOuxX0xnd29GslypKvhoeElqX52-WbGuoL_HydSWPqP7ziNeJ5UfUuqvD4hIEJ_hj78YnUbJlDFTXB9bsNkWpXO0lJqk4BIVI49zv8QgexKANhYoeqVhaIvJFg2_bbm5PLvs_gfcrLfsQ6fI10eiR0RblhcGUPqLG4djIZB10-1pEakXNFilRnyaIpRaYbseHmx1COMyLJKOrvqMxdp9faG-fwCT3XnjBLFw0aG4u8hGNjbwLfYkiU4ev4BfWGYqi6IZQULDR8dk9elQEY3vEh6j0jc7o3_zzGV8g3vhmiDd7TMVHTX5CkxOYgKhiSIOet94zQBAi4Iye4Dq0tMnh6mlW) is out with fresh analysis on the U.S. Senate in Ohio, and it reflects what many Ohio Republicans already know: “Both Democrats and Republicans we talked to agree that Dolan would be the most formidable candidate Brown could face...” “Dolan would be a low-risk, strong candidate,” one veteran Ohio GOP strategist told us. Race handicappers also noted the fact that Bernie Moreno’s Civil War reparations gaffe overshadowed the launch of his campaign: “But Moreno’s campaign trail inexperience was on display last week just days into his candidacy. Appearing at a campaign launch, the Cleveland businessman suggested that there should be reparations for descendants of white Union soldiers who fought in the Civil War, alluding to the ongoing debate over reparations for descendants of enslaved Black people. “They talk about reparations. Where are the reparations for the people, for the North, who died to save the lives of Black people?" Moreno said. "I know it’s not politically correct to say that, but you know what, we've got to stop being politically correct... Ohio Republicans we talked to saw it as a warning sign he may not be ready for prime time. “Moreno has never been a real candidate and he could be mistake-prone,” one strategist said. “If you’re a serious candidate, you don’t say those kinds of things tongue-in-cheek,” the source added. Another Buckeye strategist told us that while Trump may be able to get away with comments like that, “it doesn’t mean somebody else can do that and be successful.” Cook Report also offered the following comments on Frank LaRose, as a self-described “pragmatic moderate,” who is also soliciting money from national donors in support of a Senate bid: “LaRose is also expected to join the fray, but the ideological chameleon could have issues competing with two self-funders.”

**Sherrod Brown again was recently caught playing games with his personal taxes** According to [NBC News](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=00549a1225da4f5589240ac99f1a73ec&_e=qsB7NwP4NYAVhT3leGtOjVdhI8qwWgSRwRdcoOHsuzymo23yUMC84vooivmGKPrv8HBEu18nBQRdWHX7Wc_Jty7OtvoDKY4m4yLiU0iCxN4MIIIKHSgxRFO0YJxlD4hsSP3v34obY0-OIrPsjkqPUvJ_VrPUQSf6QLis2k0ct7EegIaQR0XimE83uGYl6BufXDvcgqEcfe4ZguWhGSuyIsA8c3guIzbjhYVqi-3uhPS7MESGPHRBqts0tU35VS7qsQF3WITCyfPHXyuBtFPnB-Sn2kANaC50XqXaZ_Wvn_BJro7qk8G8PZjXhNDH32_O9ZMiOQBL4yJT7iPwampKGW43WEMvn-TVFxJ2a4zhMBUNDiiH2jg288TxoPFp0LfK0Y6bKXGhtuP_V6B3oWrYmm1R2bs4mERk8yZk_kMn8qsca24vcmVbDlBeA5ksEB5JlAwKpbaN9Pg9qhADLEFLaOUGvoDnSnlX89vUk3QgSMl-M5lv6pmOOroX1j4S15qQhAy8BocTwRZMmSPV0AAwsCrq2VgcMYt7SyzwViMDMit5s2mjCvdCYkgbUR2RRTzsQpxz0KoKSJbPP8NdxyxR5JdJfdczhWZk8WTXgu433sKrdDbv3oF9PCjHITICVNB84ItTJrx3eA2Deq2h5y964UNh2ivNhYGvPyuiEA2gcnMWcoaHdN7p_LaX90hHNJiGN8ezz9J9CT4BwkZkwHdP2A%3D%3D), Sen. Sherrod Brown for years claimed an owner-occupancy tax credit at two properties, public records show — a potential violation of the state’s rules governing such incentives. Brown was also late paying the tax bill on their Cleveland house at least seven times since purchasing it in 2013, missing a payment deadline as recently as February. At one point in 2015, the county labeled Brown as delinquent after he failed for months to pay a nearly $1,200 bill. As for late payments, publicly available copies of property tax bills for Brown’s Cleveland home show fees for missing deadlines on their 2022, 2021, 2019, 2018, 2015 and 2014 taxes. In 2012, The Plain Dealer of Cleveland reported on tax delinquencies involving a condo Brown owned in Washington, D.C. In recent days, Matt Dolan attended events in Columbus, Toledo, Findlay, Lima, Perrysburg, Gallipolis, Port Clinton, Warren, Athens, Belmont, Ashtabula, Trumbull County, Cleveland and Lewis Center. Below are pictures of Matt attending Lincoln Day Dinners, earned notable Ohio endorsements, hosting events and focusing on key issues of importance across Ohio.

clean_body: | | | May 16th, 2023 Bringing you the latest news, updates and what you need to know about the race for U.S. Senate in Ohio | Welcome to the inaugural edition of The Dolan Download – a concise, weekly newsletter providing the most important updates on the race U.S. Senate in Ohio. | | 3 Things to Know This Week: Matt Dolan’s and Title 42 ran in more than a dozen papers across Ohio last week. The Cook Political Report has Republicans and Democrats that Matt Dolan is the GOP’s “most formidable” contender to defeat Sherrod Brown. Sherrod Brown – yet again – failing to pay his taxes. | | Get up to speed... Matt Dolan’s trip to the southern border with Ohio law enforcement continues to make news In case you missed it, Matt Dolan was out with a new border security focused op-ed that ran in more than dozen papers across Ohio, including the , Cincinnati Enquirer and Akron Beacon Journal. Dolan discussed his recent trip to the U.S. southern border, took Joe Biden, Alejandro Mayorkas and Sherrod Brown to task for their policy failures, and outlined multi-faceted solutions that would help to protect America and reduce overdose deaths in Ohio. Dolan recently joined members of Ohio law enforcement in Athens Ohio for a tour of BuckEye Cam, an Ohio-based trail camera manufacturer that is providing technology and hardware to state and federal agencies on the southern border. Dolan to call on the Biden Administration to “extend Title 42, designate the China-backed cartels as foreign terrorists and take the necessary steps with infrastructure, civilian and military personnel to stop the flow of human trafficking and fentanyl into the country, save American lives and restore our nation’s sovereignty.” | Cook Political Report says Dolan is GOP’s best bet against Sherrod Brown The is out with fresh analysis on the U.S. Senate in Ohio, and it reflects what many Ohio Republicans already know: “Both Democrats and Republicans we talked to agree that Dolan would be the most formidable candidate Brown could face...” “Dolan would be a low-risk, strong candidate,” one veteran Ohio GOP strategist told us. Race handicappers also noted the fact that Bernie Moreno’s Civil War reparations gaffe overshadowed the launch of his campaign: “But Moreno’s campaign trail inexperience was on display last week just days into his candidacy. Appearing at a campaign launch, the Cleveland businessman suggested that there should be reparations for descendants of white Union soldiers who fought in the Civil War, alluding to the ongoing debate over reparations for descendants of enslaved Black people. “They talk about reparations. Where are the reparations for the people, for the North, who died to save the lives of Black people?" Moreno said. "I know it’s not politically correct to say that, but you know what, we've got to stop being politically correct... Ohio Republicans we talked to saw it as a warning sign he may not be ready for prime time. “Moreno has never been a real candidate and he could be mistake-prone,” one strategist said. “If you’re a serious candidate, you don’t say those kinds of things tongue-in-cheek,” the source added. Another Buckeye strategist told us that while Trump may be able to get away with comments like that, “it doesn’t mean somebody else can do that and be successful.” Cook Report also offered the following comments on Frank LaRose, as a self-described “pragmatic moderate,” who is also soliciting money from national donors in support of a Senate bid: “LaRose is also expected to join the fray, but the ideological chameleon could have issues competing with two self-funders.” | Sherrod Brown again was recently caught playing games with his personal taxes** According to , Sen. Sherrod Brown for years claimed an owner-occupancy tax credit at two properties, public records show — a potential violation of the state’s rules governing such incentives. Brown was also late paying the tax bill on their Cleveland house at least seven times since purchasing it in 2013, missing a payment deadline as recently as February. At one point in 2015, the county labeled Brown as delinquent after he failed for months to pay a nearly $1,200 bill. As for late payments, publicly available copies of property tax bills for Brown’s Cleveland home show fees for missing deadlines on their 2022, 2021, 2019, 2018, 2015 and 2014 taxes. In 2012, The Plain Dealer of Cleveland reported on tax delinquencies involving a condo Brown owned in Washington, D.C. In recent days, Matt Dolan attended events in Columbus, Toledo, Findlay, Lima, Perrysburg, Gallipolis, Port Clinton, Warren, Athens, Belmont, Ashtabula, Trumbull County, Cleveland and Lewis Center. Below are pictures of Matt attending Lincoln Day Dinners, earned notable Ohio endorsements, hosting events and focusing on key issues of importance across Ohio. | | | | | | | | | | Interested in joining Team Dolan? Matt Dolan needs your help to bring our conservative voices to the U.S. Senate, consider contributing below to help us WIN in Ohio! | | | Forward this email to a friend! Visit DolanforOhio.com for more information on Matt Dolan’s campaign. | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

**_This will be one of the closest races in the entire country and could decide control of the House._** President Biden won this district in 2020 – and it’s the last Biden district in Orange County that still has a Republican Representative in the House.

Michelle Steel voted _against_ codifying _Roe v. Wade_ (a few times, actually), and she received 100% ratings from anti-abortion groups like the California Pro-Life Council for her voting record.

name: Zak Malamed
subject: I’m running for Congress against George Santos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Please give me a few moments to introduce myself and tell you why I’m running.
| Folks,

I just announced my candidacy for New York’s 3rd Congressional District. **Yes, that means I’ll be the Democrat running against George Santos.**

In just a moment, I’ll ask for your help to defeat him [**(you can split a donation with the Voter Protection Project here)**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45385?t=6&akid=7772%2E878179%2EtM8l21). But before I do, please allow me a few seconds to introduce myself, tell you why I’m running, and convince you that this race is both important _and_ winnable. | I’m Zak Malamed, and I was raised right here in the district and attended Great Neck Public Schools from K-12. From an early age, my family instilled three principles in me: service, struggle and sacrifice.

My grandmother immigrated to New York to pursue the American dream. My grandparents struggled and sacrificed to provide opportunity for their kids in a new home. My father worked in the garment industry before it collapsed and he had to start over. My mother was an educator who turned into a caretaker when some of her closest friends fell ill to cancer. These are the people who’ve taught me everything — how to work hard, to care for others, to give back to the community that gave to you.

I’ve spent the last four years campaigning and defeating MAGA extremists across the country in some of the most competitive districts and states with my organization The Next 50. Now, I’m being called to run myself and defeat George Santos so we can restore opportunity and pride in our district.
---
Unseating George Santos isn’t just about restoring dignity to the office. It’s an important bellwether in our national fight against right-wing extremism. And, while this district might have voted Republican last year, it’s wide open now.

But the Republicans will not give up easily, because NY-03 is the key to holding their majority in the House. We fully expect them to raise millions of dollars to bolster Santos. And that’s why I need you.

[**Will you be one of the very first Founding Donors to help me unseat George Santos? Make a donation to me and the Voter Protection Project right now on launch week to get us started with strength.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45385?t=7&akid=7772%2E878179%2EtM8l21)
[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45387?t=8&akid=7772%2E878179%2EtM8l21)
---
New York’s 3rd isn’t the same district it was when I was growing up. Home prices and rents are up. Local businesses struggle with inflation. Our neighbors feel more transience than security. Folks are rightfully angry and scared about the change.

It is that frustration and fear that carried George Santos – and MAGA Republicans like him – to victory across Queens and Long Island. But MAGA extremism isn’t the answer.

I haven’t given up on government’s ability to adapt to the needs of a new generation – and meet the challenges of the moment. I have lived those challenges. In Congress, I’ll be a Representative who prioritizes whatever work it takes to build a future we all can see ourselves in, because I know exactly what it’s like to look ahead and have serious doubts about what’s doable in the given circumstances.

I’m running because I’m called to serve the community that gave so much to me. We can win because I know what it takes to run a competitive campaign and I’ve done it in districts all across this country. But we can only pull this off if we can gather strong grassroots support from Day One.

[**Please donate to be one of our first Founding Donors by splitting a donation between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project to unseat George Santos.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45385?t=9&akid=7772%2E878179%2EtM8l21)

Before I go, I just wanted to thank you for allowing me to introduce myself and tell you about the importance of this race. I promise to fight hard to win this campaign on your behalf and for the good of all my neighbors here in New York’s 3rd.

Thank you from the bottom of my heart for being one of our first supporters.

—

**Zak Malamed**
Candidate for NY-03
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45385?t=10&akid=7772%2E878179%2EtM8l21)
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7772%2E878179%2EtM8l21). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7772%2E878179%2EtM8l21).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=7772%2E878179%2EtM8l21) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=7772%2E878179%2EtM8l21). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=7772%2E878179%2EtM8l21)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=7772%2E878179%2EtM8l21)

> Peter,
> Republicans in the General Assembly just voted to override my veto and enact their radical abortion ban.
> Just one Republican vote would have prevented an override but not a single one stepped up. Now North Carolinians understand fully that Republicans are unified in their attacks against women’s reproductive freedom. I will do everything I can from my executive position to blunt the trauma of this new law.
> They did this knowing strong majorities of North Carolinians don’t want right-wing politicians in the exam room with women and their doctors.
> I know this is a difficult moment, Peter. I know that many of us across the state worked hard to fight against this ban. I know that many North Carolinians have been betrayed by their elected leaders, who broke their promises to protect women’s reproductive freedom.
> **But I also know that right now, they’re counting on you to give up.** They think they’ve won this and they’re counting on us all throwing up our hands and giving up.
> **We can’t afford to do that, Peter. We WILL stay in this fight — because North Carolinians deserve so much better than the extremist Republican Party dictating our rights.**
> The best way to solve this is at the ballot box. We absolutely have to break the supermajority in 2024.
> I’m continuing to work to elect Democrats who we can trust to fight to restore reproductive rights. We need to power them to victory at every level of government all across the state, and I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you to make it possible.

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: HHS Earmarks Millions of Dollars to Give Illegal Immigrant Minors Long Term Foster Care
body:
It is not enough that American taxpayers spend billions of dollars
annually to “temporarily” care for the onslaught of illegal
immigrant minors that cross into the U.S. through the Mexican border
until they get released to relatives or sponsors.

[alt_text]

[*****]
May 17, 2023

[article-image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63396&L=29549&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaWxsZWdhbC1pbW1pZ3JhbnQtZm9zdGVyLWNhcmUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=59c8101d90cfeab0e28033130bf4203bfb2694c166059f275ec81a978fe9e692]

It is not enough that American taxpayers spend billions of dollars
annually to “temporarily” care for the onslaught of illegal
immigrant minors that cross into the U.S. through the Mexican border
until they get released to relatives or sponsors. Now the Biden
administration is quietly doling out tens of millions more for
long-term foster care through fiscal year 2024. The money will go to
providers that will give Unaccompanied Alien Children (UAC) with no
family in the U.S. continuing “quality care in a community
setting.”

clean_body: It is not enough that American taxpayers spend billions of dollars annually to “temporarily” care for the onslaught of illegal immigrant minors that cross into the U.S. through the Mexican border until they get released to relatives or sponsors. [alt_text] [*****] May 17, 2023 [article-image] [] It is not enough that American taxpayers spend billions of dollars annually to “temporarily” care for the onslaught of illegal immigrant minors that cross into the U.S. through the Mexican border until they get released to relatives or sponsors. Now the Biden administration is quietly doling out tens of millions more for long-term foster care through fiscal year 2024. The money will go to providers that will give Unaccompanied Alien Children (UAC) with no family in the U.S. continuing “quality care in a community setting.” Read More [] [Gunsmoke: Dept. Of Justice Doubles Down On Bid To Keep Hunter Biden’s Illegal Gun Purchase Top Secret, Court Documents Show] [] Gunsmoke: Dept. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Be a hero for our coral reefs
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1776843?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | Next weekend, the highly anticipated release of the live-action rendering of _**The Little Mermaid**_ is set to hit theaters. For many who fondly remember the 90’s animated classic version, the ads for the new film transport viewers to an enchanted, sparkling underwater setting that brings magical childhood dreams to life on the big screen. **However, one thing you won’t see advertised on Disney’s billboards is the story of Lighthouse Point.** Once nestled among the crystalline, turquoise waters of Eleuthera Island in The Bahamas, Lighthouse Point was abundant with brightly colored marine life living harmoniously across ancient limestone coral reefs. It doesn’t require too much imagination to see that Disney has drawn much of its inspiration from the natural wonders of our real-life oceans. But unlike fantasy and fiction, Lighthouse Point didn’t have a fairy tale ending. Instead, **Disney itself became the villain** by **RECKLESSLY BUILDING OVER** this aquatic habitat with the construction of a _$250 MILLION cruise ship pier!_ _**Fortunately, the story of our ocean’s coral reefs doesn’t have to end here.**_ If we can demonstrate enough public support from environmentalists like you, we can still STOP Big Cruise corporations from DESTROYING the last of our world’s great coral reefs. [**Don’t miss your chance to be a HERO today, Friend. Add your name right now to help SAVE our coral reefs from being WIPED OUT by the cruise industry’s corporate greed! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1776844?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1776845?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Coral reefs are called “the rainforests of the sea” due to their key role in our ocean ecosystems. When Disney Cruise decided that its profits were more important than the preservation of Lighthouse Point, it not only damaged a critical habitat that supported biodiversity and promoted a healthy planet, but it also destroyed a significant part of the local Bahamian culture.
Increased vessel traffic and industrial development by cruise ship corporations are decimating our oceans with dirty, toxic pollutants that end up on our beaches and in our oceans and the atmosphere. **We cannot allow Big Cruise to continue threatening our oceans, coral reefs, marine life, local communities, and the planet -- for the sake of profit. **
[**But this powerful industry won’t stop without intervention from the Environmental Protection Agency. Please, Friend, will you demand immediate action from the EPA now before it’s too late?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1776846?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1776845?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for protecting our oceans and coral reefs,
Friends of the Earth**
|

clean_body: | | | | | == ---|---|--- | | Next weekend, the highly anticipated release of the live-action rendering of The Little Mermaid is set to hit theaters. For many who fondly remember the 90’s animated classic version, the ads for the new film transport viewers to an enchanted, sparkling underwater setting that brings magical childhood dreams to life on the big screen. However, one thing you won’t see advertised on Disney’s billboards is the story of Lighthouse Point. Once nestled among the crystalline, turquoise waters of Eleuthera Island in The Bahamas, Lighthouse Point was abundant with brightly colored marine life living harmoniously across ancient limestone coral reefs. It doesn’t require too much imagination to see that Disney has drawn much of its inspiration from the natural wonders of our real-life oceans. But unlike fantasy and fiction, Lighthouse Point didn’t have a fairy tale ending. Instead, Disney itself became the villain by RECKLESSLY BUILDING OVER this aquatic habitat with the construction of a $250 MILLION cruise ship pier! Fortunately, the story of our ocean’s coral reefs doesn’t have to end here. If we can demonstrate enough public support from environmentalists like you, we can still STOP Big Cruise corporations from DESTROYING the last of our world’s great coral reefs. == | == Coral reefs are called “the rainforests of the sea” due to their key role in our ocean ecosystems. When Disney Cruise decided that its profits were more important than the preservation of Lighthouse Point, it not only damaged a critical habitat that supported biodiversity and promoted a healthy planet, but it also destroyed a significant part of the local Bahamian culture. Increased vessel traffic and industrial development by cruise ship corporations are decimating our oceans with dirty, toxic pollutants that end up on our beaches and in our oceans and the atmosphere. We cannot allow Big Cruise to continue threatening our oceans, coral reefs, marine life, local communities, and the planet -- for the sake of profit. == == Thanks for protecting our oceans and coral reefs, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 foe.org/about-us/contact/

name: Team Pramila
subject: Add your name: We need Medicare for All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Add your name to urge Congress to pass the Medicare for All Act of 2023 and finally bring universal health care to our country in a time when we need it the most.
#
Peter,
Health care is a human right and it must be guaranteed for all — not just the wealthy few. And passing the Medicare for All Act of 2023 is the strongest step forward in building the future we deserve.
That's why Pramila is standing with Rep. Debbie Dingell, Sen. Bernie Sanders, and National Nurses United in a collective action to urge Congress to support the Medicare for All Act of 2023.
Will you join us in the fight to finally bring true universal health care to everyone in this country? [**If so, please add your name to our action to call on Congress to pass the Medicare for All Act of 2023 and finally ensure that every person is guaranteed quality health care, regardless of their ability to pay.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42048?t=1&akid=2495%2E420207%2Eko9WRm)
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42048?t=2&akid=2495%2E420207%2Eko9WRm)**
Pramila said it best: **It's time to put people over profits and care over corporations.** And our country's lack of universal health care has proven to be an issue of gender justice, racial justice, and economic justice.
By passing the Medicare for All Act of 2023, we will ensure that:
* **Everyone will have health care,** including dental, vision, hearing, and long term care.
* Expensive premiums, deductibles, co-pays, and other out of pocket costs **will be eliminated completely.**
* Roughly **95% of all U.S. households would save money** on health care costs.
* The **U.S. would save over $450 billion** on health expenses annually.

As a progressive movement dedicated to building a democracy rooted in love, compassion, and equality, we have a moral and ethical obligation to show up and root for solutions that meet the urgency of our needs.
**We need as many supporters on our side if we want to ensure that this momentous bill can come to fruition.**[**Add your name to urge Congress to pass the Medicare for All Act of 2023 and finally bring universal health care to our country in a time when we need it the most.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42048?t=3&akid=2495%2E420207%2Eko9WRm)
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42048?t=4&akid=2495%2E420207%2Eko9WRm)**
Together,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230517-2495-footer&t=5&refcode2=2495_420207_ko9WRm&akid=2495%2E420207%2Eko9WRm)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Team NPP
subject: Courts matter —
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project_
body:
Today is the anniversary of Brown v. Board of Education.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63443745/406795521/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230517BvBOE_N_TEAM_90do_3_NG_A_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNiNWE4NDFlLWZkZjQtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IOBR-4WmD-Ayx7SiJizTOa-EifEwuQjUHmoRAYN6AyY=)
| Fellow activist,

Nearly seven decades ago today, the U.S. Supreme Court declared segregation unconstitutional and began the end of Jim Crow with their pivotal unanimous ruling on _Brown v. Board of Education_. This ruling not only opened the doors to integrated classrooms but also served as a clarion call for justice, unity, and the recognition of every American’s right to true equality.

As a voting rights organization committed to defending and strengthening the rights of every Pennsylvanian, we celebrate this joyous anniversary. Yet we must remember it was **also the Supreme Court that allowed the evils of segregation in the first place with _Plessy v. Ferguson_.**

**[Fellow activist, the law and its interpretation have never been neutral. It’s up to us to fight for courts that rule fairly. With Pennsylvania’s voters selecting a PA Supreme Court Justice and far more judges throughout our state this year, we must take this lesson to heart. Will you contribute $10 now to help us spread the word and engage the voters of our focus communities for these elections?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63443746/406795522/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230517BvBOE_N_TEAM_90do_3_NG_A_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNiNWE4NDFlLWZkZjQtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IOBR-4WmD-Ayx7SiJizTOa-EifEwuQjUHmoRAYN6AyY=)** clean_body: Today is the anniversary of Brown v. Board of Education. = | Fellow activist, Nearly seven decades ago today, the U.S. Supreme Court declared segregation unconstitutional and began the end of Jim Crow with their pivotal unanimous ruling on Brown v. Board of Education. This ruling not only opened the doors to integrated classrooms but also served as a clarion call for justice, unity, and the recognition of every American’s right to true equality. As a voting rights organization committed to defending and strengthening the rights of every Pennsylvanian, we celebrate this joyous anniversary. Yet we must remember it was also the Supreme Court that allowed the evils of segregation in the first place with Plessy v. Ferguson. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alyxyd-trhiujldw-y/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alyxyd-trhiujldw-j/) **Abuse of Power** **[Senate Democrats are urging Biden to use the 14th Amendment to raise the debt ceiling](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alyxyd-trhiujldw-t/), **arguing he has the constitutional authority to take the unilateral step to prevent a GOP-driven default. **Getting Off Scot-Free** The**[IRS has removed the "entire investigative team"](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alyxyd-trhiujldw-i/) **from its multi-year tax fraud investigation of Hunter Biden. **Biden Sides with China** **[Biden vetoed a bipartisan resolution](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alyxyd-trhiujldw-d/) **that would have reversed his executive action last year ordering the Department of Commerce not to enforce tariffs on Chinese solar panel manufacturers for two years.

**Leave School Lunch Alone!** **[The GOP needs to focus on a new demographic to sway new voters.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alyxyd-trhiujldw-h/)** Elementary and middle school kids will not like what the Biden administration plans to do to their school lunches. **Supporting NYC Hero** The [**_legal defense fund for the U.S. Marine is charged in the death of a New York City man_**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alyxyd-trhiujldw-k/) who threatened other subway passengers, has topped $2 million. **The Durham Report** You can read the full Durham report **[here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alyxyd-trhiujldw-u/)**. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alyxyd-trhiujldw-o/)!**

Dear friend,

I hope this email finds you well. **I am reaching out urgently because girls' sports and our children’s future are at stake.**

Education Secretary Miguel Cardona just proposed changes to Title IX rules that would allow biological males to compete in girls' sports. **I will not stand for such a blatant attack on our values.**

Now Secretary Cardona proposed taking away lunch money for schools that don’t allow boys to compete in girls’ sports. Do you know what this means? [**School lunch programs for needy children are in jeopardy ON TOP OF GIRLS’ SPORTS. >>**](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=1d38c73c2d6049779365c37889082fae&_e=BZ1O0FvfiYGDgm2PTy9wXqJKJK8VcqYgKBmlfzVFGjRNZAJoxGvmmMwyHg9VWANSPhWQVzEk2OPXLGHBAmIXbeAoA3rCl09KdWkuTkca3hTx1zPiJdRCx0mTjkSXRdG5tAHopItaqNQzl6PS80BrrxgnfONaX75TNZH_d-7gYkgRxN3G9njhPnqL3ziy5nicH9Oc8Hc6WKq-DaUhFzBbuvFLvftkTbQZvxHL6sofeO2L74Jyq4s5RL6G9ajF4TR82mpV55pVNssggwOX0F7MfLnkT_NnqMUMw0f-ShsIz8DG4aFyRJcecSvCIdjPgP4B-wxbRnrlc35u2t1aU9rhwuqAWv4pGQ14IRRcJKK5dmcxFr8UJ46lEcohGKSjywSR1NmXdk9pTVWW5bZUcGe9w2ttdT9LFuNfpYjwi-mLmBj-fiF-HhPbAjYXVtFdDD5JTHLcAk6yfwfm9nv9HJCmh0_WGr8z71Gmd3-oYj45k4_83cCwKxx-eCd9IGZ2it-V8rnwYUWDNGFOqc9zEmOQr4oI6C8ySbX9Mh2vIf0TX-_hqwKpCO9mrc61DAzlNgYuBcSkia-UUPykXXvPbHWKFg%3D%3D)

clean_body: They’re trying to take away our children’s meals | Dear friend, I hope this email finds you well. I am reaching out urgently because girls' sports and our children’s future are at stake. Education Secretary Miguel Cardona just proposed changes to Title IX rules that would allow biological males to compete in girls' sports. I will not stand for such a blatant attack on our values. Now Secretary Cardona proposed taking away lunch money for schools that don’t allow boys to compete in girls’ sports. Do you know what this means? We cannot let his radical agenda endanger our girls or leave vulnerable children hungry. That's why we need your support. We are launching a fundraising campaign to protect girls' sports and ensure no child goes without a meal. | Please contribute today. Thank you for your support. Sincerely, | ---|--- Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

I know Will can win this thing. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63448349/406841653/1321783056?refcode=em-5.17.23-seg3-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjMwMjVmMC0xZmY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mPzBJWmpIMPUf1PnXAxtOmhk4b2iykfaNWD5iBYtUrs=) **Peter, I’ve got a huge announcement that should bring a smile to your face and hope to your heart:** former federal prosecutor, Will Rollins just announced his campaign for Congress in California’s 41st District -- one of the most important races in the country in the effort by Democrats to retake the House.

Will stunned political experts in 2022 when he came so close to winning against right wing Republican, Ken Calvert. It ended up being one of the closest races in the country. He outperformed every projection and was the only Democratic challenger in California to win the independent vote. That’s a big deal.

There is no question in my mind that in this upcoming election, with the Presidency on the ballot, the larger turnout will be the key to victory IF we have a strong campaign.

I have committed my energy, time and money to this race and today I am asking you to start Will off with a show of support that will send him a message that we are behind him 100 percent.

[**I’ll share more about why I'm backing Will, but first, I have an important request: Could you donate $3 to help him reach his goal of generating 2,500 online donations to launch with strength? Here’s why Democrats across the country should pay close attention to this race:
**1\. We need candidates like Will in Congress.** As a former federal prosecutor, he understands the ongoing danger that extremism poses to our democracy. He brought justice to insurrectionists, and I know he'll take the oath to defend democracy as seriously now as he did in the Justice Department.

**2\. Retaking the House runs through CA-41.** After the new lines were drawn, CA-41 became a true swing seat. It’s the type of district Democrats MUST WIN to regain Congress.

**3\. GOP super PACs.** Despite the tough midterm environment in 2022, Will was the third most “over-performing” Dem challenger in the country. He was also heavily outspent by the GOP’s dark money machine. If Democrats help Will keep pace, he can flip this seat!

**4\. Will’s opponent Ken Calvert has got to go.** Calvert voted to overturn the 2020 presidential election. He backs the extreme ban on abortion -- including for instances of rape, and wants doctors who perform them to go to jail. CA-41 is home to one of the most LGBTQ-friendly cities in Palm Springs, yet Calvert staunchly opposes gay marriage.

clean_body: I know Will can win this thing. | = Peter, I’ve got a huge announcement that should bring a smile to your face and hope to your heart: former federal prosecutor, Will Rollins just announced his campaign for Congress in California’s 41st District -- one of the most important races in the country in the effort by Democrats to retake the House. Will stunned political experts in 2022 when he came so close to winning against right wing Republican, Ken Calvert. It ended up being one of the closest races in the country. He outperformed every projection and was the only Democratic challenger in California to win the independent vote. That’s a big deal. There is no question in my mind that in this upcoming election, with the Presidency on the ballot, the larger turnout will be the key to victory IF we have a strong campaign. I have committed my energy, time and money to this race and today I am asking you to start Will off with a show of support that will send him a message that we are behind him 100 percent. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = Here’s why Democrats across the country should pay close attention to this race: 1\. We need candidates like Will in Congress. As a former federal prosecutor, he understands the ongoing danger that extremism poses to our democracy. He brought justice to insurrectionists, and I know he'll take the oath to defend democracy as seriously now as he did in the Justice Department. 2\. Retaking the House runs through CA-41. After the new lines were drawn, CA-41 became a true swing seat. It’s the type of district Democrats MUST WIN to regain Congress. 3\. GOP super PACs. Despite the tough midterm environment in 2022, Will was the third most “over-performing” Dem challenger in the country. He was also heavily outspent by the GOP’s dark money machine. If Democrats help Will keep pace, he can flip this seat! 4\. Will’s opponent Ken Calvert has got to go. Calvert voted to overturn the 2020 presidential election. He backs the extreme ban on abortion -- including for instances of rape, and wants doctors who perform them to go to jail. CA-41 is home to one of the most LGBTQ-friendly cities in Palm Springs, yet Calvert staunchly opposes gay marriage. The rematch is on, folks. Will came so close to winning in 2022, and this is our chance to finish the job. But it depends on widespread, grassroots support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks, Barbara Boxer Former U.S. Senator, California | = Democrat Will Rollins is a former national security and counter-terrorism prosecutor running for Congress in California's 41st Congressional District. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
If we want to make the debate stage in August, we need to secure unique donors to our grassroots campaign.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=2206d321a1004afbbf195154f07bc805&_t=dgpRm6VziPBBRtK_qzrVDnU8fsRPTE0bcv2yVAPAoyjG4Cad-S8k-XzuxN2fW33PEM2dNe55eBqoVmnE6AKip1vitvAvDZPHE2zt_pDJ1pQ%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=2206d321a1004afbbf195154f07bc805&_t=dgpRm6VziPBBRtK_qzrVDnU8fsRPTE0bcv2yVAPAoyjG4Cad-S8k-XzuxN2fW33PEM2dNe55eBqoVmnE6AKip1vitvAvDZPHE2zt_pDJ1pQ%3D)

| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2206d321a1004afbbf195154f07bc805&_e=bCsJFq8pyC0eLSgTEEIOTkFrkM8W6EloXSrbvabaU3EAHNXgIYQX3gvRp9b_TvVc3kwtigAdx2fPc8Kq_vN7lel23ul4RQU5NGyWw85_nLOgRjOfn4pcd2sQyNll4kmIPrSJYfNtCfSb2lpbBx-pIBJ1FjfPgiBDFRix-IkwrAB07ewhIXl0bwuxlAXdcRoVCyBkk_5waRX7spLCKPCsjQwrrucnY1rPfRka8oGUy9c4ncdfONHM_3GnYNIM5QZ2n4SV37iS_9mj8UbWWQ_3JLJKugnVxHn-PrzIUNrkMFAvWWWrLyP1EOOElqBeD8NAmllElOdWK3DHaE1H6qVymT7W_jcXs-w_xNJYeBZ0WBN8w-TiDEyxId37RefBEvFGs8NSiBunmi0mYwmgVS3_1A%3D%3D)
Peter -

I have a clear vision for how to win the White House in 2024: **a grassroots, bottom-up campaign made of people just like you.**

We're about to hit a major campaign milestone - 35,000 unique donors in just months of campaigning. Unlike my opponents who have years of politicking under their belts, we started with NOTHING and have built this movement.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2206d321a1004afbbf195154f07bc805&_e=bCsJFq8pyC0eLSgTEEIOTkFrkM8W6EloXSrbvabaU3EAHNXgIYQX3gvRp9b_TvVc3kwtigAdx2fPc8Kq_vN7lel23ul4RQU5NGyWw85_nLOgRjOfn4pcd2sQyNll4kmIPrSJYfNtCfSb2lpbBx-pIBJ1FjfPgiBDFRix-IkwrAB07ewhIXl0bwuxlAXdcRoVCyBkk_5waRX7spLCKPCsjQwrrucnY1rPfRka8oGUy9c4ncdfONHM_3GnYNIM5QZ2IE5F5LNEZqvguk-A-86UwenCCEgI4PVcjy4MXRa_1pIFxPkNKOJ3jFiAuMkbQx12aKnl4_NcctfCbaGQxO2KSqtmdpyMsa9RMMlPbZLs77TfMk95fYB_HZc478Woz4ZgS2PKmlDC4EvDkmXZwsiRUQ%3D%3D)
So here's what I am asking of you today: **[will you be one of the unique donors I need to get a prime spot on the debate stage? Make it a small donation - every dollar makes a huge difference when it comes to planning our "Great Uprising."](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2206d321a1004afbbf195154f07bc805&_e=bCsJFq8pyC0eLSgTEEIOTkFrkM8W6EloXSrbvabaU3EAHNXgIYQX3gvRp9b_TvVc3kwtigAdx2fPc8Kq_vN7lel23ul4RQU5NGyWw85_nLOgRjOfn4pcd2sQyNll4kmIPrSJYfNtCfSb2lpbBx-pIBJ1FjfPgiBDFRix-IkwrAB07ewhIXl0bwuxlAXdcRoVCyBkk_5waRX7spLCKPCsjQwrrucnY1rPfRka8oGUy9c4ncdfONHM_3GnYNIM5QZ2aolpfTLiEOA4cR4ZRFp2a2K78EVP54nMCBzDOz3N0yWIXZEAKKN_AySisgTJd4N6yTvHy9C_GmCvt2AIL0vU4i696IJXaay-S-dS9mrzSl27-Gs1sZId75iTKztPcAEc-uew3tjFFy51EJoJW-6dNg%3D%3D)**

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

**[Be a part of our movement, Peter, by becoming our 35,000th donor!](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2206d321a1004afbbf195154f07bc805&_e=bCsJFq8pyC0eLSgTEEIOTkFrkM8W6EloXSrbvabaU3EAHNXgIYQX3gvRp9b_TvVc3kwtigAdx2fPc8Kq_vN7lel23ul4RQU5NGyWw85_nLOgRjOfn4pcd2sQyNll4kmIPrSJYfNtCfSb2lpbBx-pIBJ1FjfPgiBDFRix-IkwrAB07ewhIXl0bwuxlAXdcRoVCyBkk_5waRX7spLCKPCsjQwrrucnY1rPfRka8oGUy9c4ncdfONHM_3GnYNIM5QZ2-IIOsEWrXiFkyr3i7imQTO1MBgm8WrEiiO0uIaf_0Dg4DBG88O2bI7APGzHDOtKDNjSL9OtsTQaoJKxoNtENj4ArDI-Y5k53mQWAYq2PZK5pJ98Mt_TW5g41wgpMHZ-RVInaDyljrH9uEtgW6OPR2Q%3D%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2206d321a1004afbbf195154f07bc805&_e=bCsJFq8pyC0eLSgTEEIOTkFrkM8W6EloXSrbvabaU3EAHNXgIYQX3gvRp9b_TvVc3kwtigAdx2fPc8Kq_vN7lel23ul4RQU5NGyWw85_nLOgRjOfn4pcd2sQyNll4kmIPrSJYfNtCfSb2lpbBx-pIBJ1FjfPgiBDFRix-IkwrAB07ewhIXl0bwuxlAXdcRoVCyBkk_5waRX7spLCKPCsjQwrrucnY1rPfRka8oGUy9c4ncdfONHM_3GnYNIM5QZ2Aem4WPI8hSsK-hkHWLCjo_yFtkJdhwbJzGwZBBaI0Ihffsp0Xv5Lu15v3H-j-j1bkFubrckNPTCZj3DOR4pDR75pDFM2STTdI16NJoLe8jo7rmoSAqS6lmmP1L8Fsw4l__nXMdMq56W4_HZ09N-7-Q%3D%3D)

**Now, a generous group of donors will _MATCH_ every donation I receive during my mid-month fundraising campaign, up to $10,000.**
That means that every dollar that you can spare to help me fight for progress will be DOUBLED – but only until _11:59 p.m. tomorrow night_. So please, before this rare opportunity slips away:

[**Will you rush a MATCHED donation of $5 or more to my campaign to make your gift for justice and equality go _TWICE_ as far?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63444488/406798516/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1071-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWVjYWFlYS1mZWY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3g1ZZURFFw8-X0-hvEEhN9gWelmDjdCIyNXOTrdH7a8=)

When I first made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black woman ever to serve as New York’s attorney general, I knew that unraveling generations of systemic corruption and predatory practices wouldn’t be easy – but I knew we had to try.
**And since 2018, I’ve been able to secure real wins for New Yorkers.** I’ve fought to hold Big Pharma accountable for their role in the opioid crisis, took gun manufacturers and sellers to court for their hand in the gun violence epidemic, advocated for the creation of an abortion fund to protect the reproductive rights of _every_ person in the country, and more.

body:
Friend, this is important, so I wanted to reach out one more time.
---
Yesterday, I questioned the former executives of Silicon Valley Bank and Signature Bank – because it's past time we hold big banks and Wall Street firms accountable for putting profits ahead of workers and small businesses.
I'm leading the charge in the Senate – but as we take this fight to the next stage, I need to know that you're with me. **[Please, before midnight, sign on to my urgent petition to hold corporations and their executives accountable.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63444530/406798620/1937384096?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=250,100,50,25,5&code=jtk195-su-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGVjYWFlYS1mZWY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9xUvc9OHN-mGLO44lwVIg8XdIrfo1bXuHu4DuxL6ZhE=&emci=01038679-b4f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=1decaaea-fef4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=18332626)**

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Sherrod Brown**
Date: Tues May 16, 2023
Subject: We must hold bank executives accountable
| | |
---
Friend – this morning, I questioned the former executives of Silicon Valley Bank and Signature Bank during a Senate hearing.

Executives got rich off of mismanaging these banks. It's time the American people get some answers – and as chair of the Senate Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs Committee, I'm committed to making sure this never happens again.
**Only in corporate boardrooms can you run your business into the ground, and somehow manage to come out ahead. We've seen this play out time and time again, and I'm sick and tired of it.**
Workers make one mistake – like overdrafting an account – and get dinged with fees and penalties. But when bank executives and giant Wall Street firms do something much worse – like run their bank into the ground and crash our economy – they're given a golden parachute.
**It's time these bank executives and big corporations face accountability. I'm leading the charge in the Senate, but if we're going to get this done, I need to know you're with me.**

**[Please, before midnight tonight, will you add your name to my urgent petition and let me know you're in this fight with me?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63444532/406798622/1937384096?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=250,100,50,25,5&code=jtk195-su-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGVjYWFlYS1mZWY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9xUvc9OHN-mGLO44lwVIg8XdIrfo1bXuHu4DuxL6ZhE=&emci=01038679-b4f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=1decaaea-fef4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=18332626)**

subject: Let’s save our public lands

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63444634/406799182/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDM3MGVhMi1mZmY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yttj8SbiiC9Jb5ZIrNipefubKgHDqF5XrQH6JdoFh1E=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63444636/406799183/889669090?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDM3MGVhMi1mZmY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yttj8SbiiC9Jb5ZIrNipefubKgHDqF5XrQH6JdoFh1E=&emci=06a89cd3-40f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=14370ea2-fff4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540) Friend, As a “core” member of this team, I want you to be the first to know: Today, I reintroduced the CORE Act. Last year, we successfully protected the Camp Hale-Continental Divide National Monument, setting aside more than 53,000 acres of public lands that will now be protected for our children and grandchildren. Now, we’re working to pass the CORE Act and protect more than 420,000 additional acres of public lands. Colorado’s public lands are critical to curbing the effects of climate change, growing our economy, and our way of life as Coloradans. I won’t stop working to protect them. [**Will you join me and help us pass the CORE Act and protect Colorado’s public lands? clean_body: | = Friend, As a “core” member of this team, I want you to be the first to know: Today, I reintroduced the CORE Act. Last year, we successfully protected the Camp Hale-Continental Divide National Monument, setting aside more than 53,000 acres of public lands that will now be protected for our children and grandchildren. Now, we’re working to pass the CORE Act and protect more than 420,000 additional acres of public lands. Colorado’s public lands are critical to curbing the effects of climate change, growing our economy, and our way of life as Coloradans. I won’t stop working to protect them. | Team, you’ve been with us at so many critical moments, just like this one, and I’m so grateful to have you with us in this work. name: Postal Service
subject: Fact: The USPS is an essential public service, not something to be gamed.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEMOCRATS WIN SEATS PAC, 315 INSPIRATION LANE, GAITHERSBURG, MD 20878
body:
We’ve all felt it:

Under Louis DeJoy, the prices for sending mail have skyrocketed and the speed of service has gone down substantially. Now he plans to cut letter carriers’ pay and lay off more workers— a move that will be felt throughout the nation.

The Trump appointee has a plan to privatize the USPS in the next 10 years, a direct threat to workers, consumers, and our entire postal system. We must stop him.

The president has the opportunity to nominate two more nominees to the USPS board of governors—so we’ve launched a letter writing campaign to make sure whoever is nominated is going to make it a priority to fire DeJoy at last. Click here to participate before our Friday deadline→ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/sign-here-to-send-a-letter-directly-to-president-biden-take-the-steps-to-finally-fire-louis-dejoy-3?source=2023DeJoy_DWS&referrer=group-democrats-win-seats-pac&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwspac-upsell23?amount=25]
Start writing! [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/sign-here-to-send-a-letter-directly-to-president-biden-take-the-steps-to-finally-fire-louis-dejoy-3?source=2023DeJoy_DWS&referrer=group-democrats-win-seats-pac&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwspac-upsell23?amount=25]

From denying members of Congress access to investigate issues, to slowing down the delivery of essentials like medication, the postal service is in a state of immediate crisis.

Now, we need to do everything we can to save this essential public service. Are you with us?

Sign on now→ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/sign-here-to-send-a-letter-directly-to-president-biden-take-the-steps-to-finally-fire-louis-dejoy-3?source=2023DeJoy_DWS&referrer=group-democrats-win-seats-pac&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwspac-upsell23?amount=25]

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Team,
Each month, we set a fundraising goal based on the resources we need to have Keith’s back as he fights to help people afford their lives and live with dignity, safety, and respect as Attorney General.
Powerful special interests are working 24/7 to restrict our right to vote, end our right to choose, make us less safe, and make corporations more powerful and the middle class weaker. So, our goals matter A LOT.
That’s why we’re reaching out today to ask for your help. We’re already more than halfway through the month but less than 40% of the way to our budget target. We need to raise $5,000 online this week to get back on track.

subject: The Fresno County Republican Party Endorses Michael Maher for Congress

body:

| |
For Immediate Release
May 17, 2023
Contact: Tim Rosales | 916.475.4900
**The Fresno County Republican Party Endorses Michael Maher for Congress**
Michael Maher, a law enforcement and military veteran, is thrilled to announce an endorsement from the Fresno County Republican Party for his campaign for Congress.

In a statement, the Chairwoman of the Fresno County Republican Party, Elizabeth Kolstad, wrote, “Too many decades in Washington have left Democrat Jim Costa out of touch with the people of Fresno and the needs of the Central Valley. Mr. Costa has voted to increase taxes—raising the cost of living—and supported policies that have left our communities vulnerable to crime. Valley native Michael Maher served our Country in the military and is now a successful small business owner. Having spent a lifetime listening to & experiencing the problems of our region, he understands our needs- lower costs of doing business, safer communities & stopping border violence. Michael Maher is a next generation Republican and will put the Valley first."

The Fresno County Republican Party joins a growing list of local leaders and elected officials endorsing Michael Maher’s campaign for Congress, including Congresswoman Connie Conway, State Senator Shannon Grove, and former Fresno County Supervisor Debbie Poochigian.

---

body:
Border security will be an ongoing problem while Democrats are in office because they simply will not accept responsibility for it, much less come up with a coherent policy that Republicans will support.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=89e74bcc050040808b43a9dd723c7cf0&_t=UgaDXK17nl9P-1VdcwGtsO-GnWARpXK-stDSha-SUDmZ7KRWueo6B7_s8RdlXH5dTBBvSdA-pZNvRkMwVb-iELRAE0t3pzzfZ_0FifbJYQE%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=89e74bcc050040808b43a9dd723c7cf0&_t=UgaDXK17nl9P-1VdcwGtsO-GnWARpXK-stDSha-SUDmZ7KRWueo6B7_s8RdlXH5dTBBvSdA-pZNvRkMwVb-iELRAE0t3pzzfZ_0FifbJYQE%3D)
