|
Fellow Conservative,

Where is President Biden?

He’s not in The Situation Room.

He’s not at the border, conferring with border patrol agents on the front lines.

He’s not at the Capitol negotiating with Republicans over their recently passed border bill.

Nope - he’s been riding his bike on the beach in Delaware ...

Since Title 42 expired last Thursday at midnight, **the situation at the border has become grave.** And President Biden seems oblivious to everything but his bike and the ice cream cone he undoubtedly enjoyed after his afternoon outing.

As I type this email, migrants who cross the border and request asylum are being given **court dates to appear in front of an immigration judge in 2026**.

Yes, court dates are three years from now. Once migrants are given processing documents, **they’re released on their own reconnaissance and often never heard from again**.

Fellow Conservative, this might be acceptable to Democrat leaders who receive police protection details, **[but is it acceptable to you?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=89e74bcc050040808b43a9dd723c7cf0&_e=RHfwq5IdgWKEYswmWCmwFTAKmVXJ8pxCJ58xwRlOC4zyHunVMpyiZAQyxDLMbEMF_yGN_t0j37Bhh3GCkHefe5B5w5rJ23SD7p1hJ6IuxZRCSv7vEYDSYsuWM7Wzg8JWYLZ-Xh0lAJckpc7EjeTb7Zcp03PIQ9IDyYEKrMHzKhCO8uhTztMtPQQe6iw3ZJmjUEf_bocdvLvCmWBhXIVyOhoP2Us-tUg4hUXQSu5Nbz1y2osUe3jX9ahxMQ2eRQ9eicvw9DXE2yTcyC-mwjOigKZmD0-nJDt3wlVF8y_0eqmZ2jLs9j6oxURRto_3dgT9d_wAZiiXpBvx_CEhUMWNDsUE5Iqy5iAyL7FRuUHvx56j7MZBxvDs_3XwhAQ9k0RtuJ0uq34JjNEoDcJ1aCJGQpBva7rtwCSmdcyY-BPhy18%3D) **

[**TELL BIDEN:
GET SERIOUS ABOUT THE BORDER->**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=89e74bcc050040808b43a9dd723c7cf0&_e=RHfwq5IdgWKEYswmWCmwFTAKmVXJ8pxCJ58xwRlOC4zyHunVMpyiZAQyxDLMbEMF_yGN_t0j37Bhh3GCkHefe5B5w5rJ23SD7p1hJ6IuxZRCSv7vEYDSYsuWM7Wzg8JWYLZ-Xh0lAJckpc7EjeTb7Zcp03PIQ9IDyYEKrMHzKhCO8uhTztMtPQQe6iw3ZJmjUEf_bocdvLvCmWBhXIVyOhoP2Us-tUg4hUXQSu5Nbz1y2osUe3jX9ahxMQ2eRQ9eYl8MVxfB9BXY8je3EU1qvOHD7O-4N52D1cRButMazUeVn0tKAXV3TtWS0RP9W4t3ilbKuxKBaYIAu50UZ48aGx8sPFQ-1f4YdZe8ytdd9bkBHplM9EOdHW8HOyLJtRv16NPAnYuy8O-Tu3aEAp8fLtr646LFCrBdjCs5lLCtlYE%3D)

Republicans just passed a bill that would require anyone claiming asylum to remain in Mexico while awaiting their court date. That seems like common sense to me. But Democrats call it “extreme.”

In my capacity as a county Sheriff and a candidate for U.S. Senate, I recently began collecting signatures for a petition. I’m sending this petition to President Biden, demanding he negotiates with Republicans to implement their border security bill, and **[I’m hoping you’ll add your name to it today](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=89e74bcc050040808b43a9dd723c7cf0&_e=RHfwq5IdgWKEYswmWCmwFTAKmVXJ8pxCJ58xwRlOC4zyHunVMpyiZAQyxDLMbEMF_yGN_t0j37Bhh3GCkHefe5B5w5rJ23SD7p1hJ6IuxZRCSv7vEYDSYsuWM7Wzg8JWYLZ-Xh0lAJckpc7EjeTb7Zcp03PIQ9IDyYEKrMHzKhCO8uhTztMtPQQe6iw3ZJmjUEf_bocdvLvCmWBhXIVyOhoP2Us-tUg4hUXQSu5Nbz1y2osUe3jX9ahxMQ2eRQ9eRmPPvFRKXFNybHfxTweIS50X1Z_XP1N3_Xm7xFll8LGXGxXA_8swetTzthoNpSlICxYHY3LldLegzS0RnLeCh-ZbBvfe0e6alU4kgyKF-TWSS2Di-gCaOz2kQVJTGjncpqMUWZQpJal5XzBz155kWOgOOsZKlBdnXQZaEuE9OX4%3D)**.

Fellow Conservative, we must stop the invasion. It’s as simple as that.

We do that by sending law enforcement officials, who know a thing or two about quelling unrest, to **replace Democrats in the Senate who can’t seem to figure out how to do their damn jobs**.

**Border security will be an ongoing problem while Democrats are in office because they simply will not accept responsibility for it, much less come up with a coherent policy that Republicans will support.**

As a Sheriff, I can tell you that the bill House Republicans just passed is one that prioritizes keeping our communities safe - and it’s a bill I would vote for if elected to the Senate. By and large, migrants avoid Pinal County (**where I’m Sheriff**) as much as possible because they know that my deputies and I enforce the law.

[**TELL BIDEN:
GET SERIOUS ABOUT THE BORDER->**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=89e74bcc050040808b43a9dd723c7cf0&_e=RHfwq5IdgWKEYswmWCmwFTAKmVXJ8pxCJ58xwRlOC4zyHunVMpyiZAQyxDLMbEMF_yGN_t0j37Bhh3GCkHefe5B5w5rJ23SD7p1hJ6IuxZRCSv7vEYDSYsuWM7Wzg8JWYLZ-Xh0lAJckpc7EjeTb7Zcp03PIQ9IDyYEKrMHzKhCO8uhTztMtPQQe6iw3ZJmjUEf_bocdvLvCmWBhXIVyOhoP2Us-tUg4hUXQSu5Nbz1y2osUe3jX9ahxMQ2eRQ9eW-ID8tuNkog98H5HcoJb9ub-CvVurLliGjLBgT8K5GJ3RRrOmIrDzg4O1vUge0EHT-HF_p-TErapuTl0jNKNb6DKjHcdd_tJ9ZThfal6JaRbsRSHP8zdtjESe_21MuV5BQZ3vhtW1n4NqeCuBRTiZh7kXOqTu2SHEmFkeHTlnuk%3D)

What is unfortunate is that most border communities lack the resources to keep their communities secure from the masses that are descending upon them.

**I’m running for the U.S. Senate to change that.**

Americans need leaders in the federal government with the experience of dealing with migrants firsthand. We need leaders who aren’t afraid to tell their constituents the truth. **We need leaders in Congress who won’t ignore the dire situation at the border because they’re not directly affected by it**.

Thank you for your time,
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=89e74bcc050040808b43a9dd723c7cf0&_e=RHfwq5IdgWKEYswmWCmwFTAKmVXJ8pxCJ58xwRlOC4zyHunVMpyiZAQyxDLMbEMF_yGN_t0j37Bhh3GCkHefe5B5w5rJ23SD7p1hJ6IuxZRCSv7vEYDSYsuWM7Wzg8JWYLZ-Xh0lAJckpc7EjeTb7Zcp03PIQ9IDyYEKrMHzKhCO8uhTztMtPQQe6iw3ZJmjUEf_bocdvLvCmWBhXIVyOhoP2Us-tUg4hUXQSu5Nbz1y2osUe3jX9ahxMQ2eRQ9eAcRc_SV9rhaQ5pzXpbpOEfbSDi9UQolYWbwVC-rzKci4uqy4vHiykSm9TDOOxCMnxuzIyoA2fVa0FivoFCvARSl016E--cWCa-_9FTnSGn3zuoIxanC_mbKuNxAop2EnGlhzetERL8YWqIa_inaXh5m_E75nTBVVB7_wX3qORzM%3D)
Sheriff Mark Lamb
Republican for U.S. Senate

**Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media**

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=89e74bcc050040808b43a9dd723c7cf0&_e=RHfwq5IdgWKEYswmWCmwFbTvL8YGE8YijlU-4oHrkCTIeI4XRuBXDkEcfdyrG1b9DMnA5fV5T3ADTb-tOpBwvXR_jxEVGfBlrGOX-MR9ot6wAPQQmpe42mLEUAx5kMueL2kadaGlBoIuvjVz2BugR5PtIRIkSb8oic8wWcsbyL9ESDyBOaSxKxdlT1s3V_hP9dxGD4bKsnnreaRLzpbl4AYiaj7D7DpfVrbViWHOCeQ%3D) [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=89e74bcc050040808b43a9dd723c7cf0&_e=RHfwq5IdgWKEYswmWCmwFX_7BUp1Y4Wf7LrheYQwKmyNRUAW4YIV1kOeGeAM6kfg4X7x4IsLKS6QwwYuKw6x2Cj_gKHoa7g15m7S03ebYasXOM07dHuH2bA2DSOtkwe20ZAriCdpOClQem3h3SUIaT97t8zv8n6Vcb11rAEIJJRAXu3jvSxlBLhoYNbudLYf-aEO6LW6-0Qo7geijHqBpw%3D%3D) [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=89e74bcc050040808b43a9dd723c7cf0&_e=RHfwq5IdgWKEYswmWCmwFSNVpIIYSkEOo_fKGZJ8Wpmrl_Jo5o1FdjPx5McgP7o1XfWVnMDrUsmG9OQWE80gpJkzvIJemiGXWqcWRdaCEF6W4xN8RkTseZVXX2ijGbdeUNOH8vm8hH6962XeCBucZpUkTPjV5qcUHCw4ewxuK6VaH945ukuyVipL4rUybkFjcR12T2VsASctHldrZ7dGcDMX8-DA6PfJDoIsG-fl7VI%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=89e74bcc050040808b43a9dd723c7cf0&_e=RHfwq5IdgWKEYswmWCmwFTAKmVXJ8pxCJ58xwRlOC4zyHunVMpyiZAQyxDLMbEMF_yGN_t0j37Bhh3GCkHefe5B5w5rJ23SD7p1hJ6IuxZRCSv7vEYDSYsuWM7Wzg8JWYLZ-Xh0lAJckpc7EjeTb7Zcp03PIQ9IDyYEKrMHzKhCO8uhTztMtPQQe6iw3ZJmjUEf_bocdvLvCmWBhXIVyOhoP2Us-tUg4hUXQSu5Nbz1y2osUe3jX9ahxMQ2eRQ9eJJ5QaxX4GBcY4h08IKffK1LS9-a9Ux7YVIBhxLTOUWJJbpueNMQl64Oc6DBrzbrG2xp34CafcFPLxQYyg_Umy1jisaBWBy2Eym32fbohCPsOS1bBY6Ek_QX_H3PFE9kSBVcSgc2Zsrlat9ysof1qFtirQKw6uILwQk2-nhBFx5A%3D)
**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

clean_body: Border security will be an ongoing problem while Democrats are in office because they simply will not accept responsibility for it, much less come up with a coherent policy that Republicans will support. | | Fellow Conservative, Where is President Biden? He’s not in The Situation Room. He’s not at the border, conferring with border patrol agents on the front lines. He’s not at the Capitol negotiating with Republicans over their recently passed border bill. Nope - he’s been riding his bike on the beach in Delaware ... Since Title 42 expired last Thursday at midnight, the situation at the border has become grave. And President Biden seems oblivious to everything but his bike and the ice cream cone he undoubtedly enjoyed after his afternoon outing. As I type this email, migrants who cross the border and request asylum are being given court dates to appear in front of an immigration judge in 2026. Yes, court dates are three years from now. Once migrants are given processing documents, they’re released on their own reconnaissance and often never heard from again. Fellow Conservative, this might be acceptable to Democrat leaders who receive police protection details, Republicans just passed a bill that would require anyone claiming asylum to remain in Mexico while awaiting their court date. That seems like common sense to me. But Democrats call it “extreme.” In my capacity as a county Sheriff and a candidate for U.S. Senate, I recently began collecting signatures for a petition. I’m sending this petition to President Biden, demanding he negotiates with Republicans to implement their border security bill, and . Fellow Conservative, we must stop the invasion. It’s as simple as that. We do that by sending law enforcement officials, who know a thing or two about quelling unrest, to replace Democrats in the Senate who can’t seem to figure out how to do their damn jobs. Border security will be an ongoing problem while Democrats are in office because they simply will not accept responsibility for it, much less come up with a coherent policy that Republicans will support. As a Sheriff, I can tell you that the bill House Republicans just passed is one that prioritizes keeping our communities safe - and it’s a bill I would vote for if elected to the Senate. By and large, migrants avoid Pinal County (where I’m Sheriff) as much as possible because they know that my deputies and I enforce the law. What is unfortunate is that most border communities lack the resources to keep their communities secure from the masses that are descending upon them. I’m running for the U.S. Senate to change that. Americans need leaders in the federal government with the experience of dealing with migrants firsthand. We need leaders who aren’t afraid to tell their constituents the truth. We need leaders in Congress who won’t ignore the dire situation at the border because they’re not directly affected by it. Thank you for your time, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity. Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year. | Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate

name: Katie Hill
subject: What happened in North Carolina last night is a disgrace
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63445180/406801316/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230517_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzZmY2RlMjQtMDNmNS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mdcT7COGQDCkKrDYaSt2FG8qlp0HnwNdJGOOhtP7i2k=)
---
Last night, a supermajority of Republicans in North Carolina overturned the Governor’s veto to enact a 12-week abortion ban in the state. It’s a shame, but it’s no surprise. Republicans have been on a warpath ever since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ almost a year ago. This is the outcome women kept screaming about back in 2016, when everyone told us we were “overreacting.” We’re tired of our warnings being ignored, so let’s set the record straight: **A federal abortion ban is not off the table.** Kevin McCarthy and Mitch McConnell have both made it clear they’re in favor, and it’s clear the Supreme Court won’t be on our side. So it’s up to us to stop it before it’s too late. clean_body: | = Last night, a supermajority of Republicans in North Carolina overturned the Governor’s veto to enact a 12-week abortion ban in the state. It’s a shame, but it’s no surprise. Republicans have been on a warpath ever since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade almost a year ago. This is the outcome women kept screaming about back in 2016, when everyone told us we were “overreacting.” We’re tired of our warnings being ignored, so let’s set the record straight: A federal abortion ban is not off the table. Kevin McCarthy and Mitch McConnell have both made it clear they’re in favor, and it’s clear the Supreme Court won’t be on our side. clean_body: A second Trump term is guaranteed to be a whole lot worse... | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. = Last week, CNN hosted a town hall for twice-impeached former president Donald Trump, and friend, it went exactly as you’d expect. His 90-minute tirade was full of lies, insults to the American people, and of course, his trademark claims of election fraud (which have been debunked and overruled in more than 60 court cases since 2020). Even more concerning were his thoughts on January 6th: “[The insurrectionists] were there with love in their heart. That was unbelievable — and it was a beautiful day.” | = Friend, there’s honestly just too much lunacy to unpack in one email, but I think you get the gist: Donald Trump is fully prepared to use any opportunity, whether on air or in office, to continue chiseling away at the pillars of our democracy and escape accountability for his laundry list of crimes against the American people. I’m fighting in Congress every day to end this epidemic of MAGA delusion, from defeating Trump’s cronies like Jim Jordan and Marjorie Taylor Greene to keeping the former insurrectionist-in-chief himself out of office. But if we’re going to take back the House and protect our democracy in 2024, we cannot afford to fall behind. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Trump’s never going to give up his MAGA megaphone, friend. That’s why it’s on us to make sure we continue pushing forward in the fight to hold him accountable. = — Eric Swalwell | | | = = Text ERIC to 43033 to get text updates! Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 14th Congressional District. He needs your support in order to keep protecting what's important: our healthcare, our paychecks, our future, and our democracy. | | = Eric runs a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots supporters like you, and if he's going to win re-election, he's going to need your help. If you'd still like to stop receiving emails, you can Paid for by Swalwell For Congress Swalwell For Congress P.O. Box 2847 Dublin, CA 94568 United States

name: Alexandra Rojas (via JusticeDemocrats.com)
subject: A question for Peter.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

I have a question for you,
Peter.

If you knew that chipping in your
first $3 donation *right now* could help us
recruit the next AOC, Summer Lee, Cori Bush, or Jamaal Bowman, would you
donate?

Since 2018, Justice Democrats has been dedicated to recruiting progressive
leaders to take on the establishment. And we rely on grassroots supporters
like you to have the resources we need to help progressive candidates win.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134493?refcode=em20230517-29000&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=29000%2E1203867%2EWE9igY ]If you’re ready to make a real difference in the future of our
politics, please make a contribution today. Will you rush a contribution
of $3 or more?

Are you still reading? Okay, here are some more important things to know
about JD:

* Last year with your support, we helped re-elect the Squad and expand
our bloc by supporting Greg Casar and Summer Lee.
* We were the organization to recruit Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, AOC, and
Summer to run for Congress in the first place. We support our
candidates from day one to defeat entrenched incumbents.
* When we say we’re a grassroots organization supported by activists
across the country, we mean it. We strongly believe that the way we
fund our organization matters, and that’s why we’re proud to say we
have an average contribution of $16 this year.

Now that I’ve told you all that, what do you think?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134493?refcode=em20230517-29000&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=29000%2E1203867%2EWE9igY ]Can we count on you to make your first donation of
$3? Every donation helps, no matter the amount.

If you can’t give today, I completely understand. No matter what, thank
you so much for your support.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1003&akid=29000%2E1203867%2EWE9igY ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1004&akid=29000%2E1203867%2EWE9igY ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230517-29000-footer&t=1005&refcode2=29000_1203867_WE9igY&akid=29000%2E1203867%2EWE9igY

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=29000%2E1203867%2EWE9igY

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

| Team,

In 2022, we flipped West Michigan BLUE for the first time in 50 years. In my first term in Congress, I’ve been hard at work advocating for our communities on the issues that matter most, from protecting our children to expanding reproductive healthcare access to combatting the effects of climate change.

Here’s a peek at some more of our recent work:

| | _**Dem Rep on Texas shooting: 'We don't have to live like this'**_

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63445320/406801803/62647395?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDRkOThlZjEtMDNmNS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HEFnCnIQK6KxqYwuUiCS8tJOuzqVZ_s_IJY4l3EoTW4=) Hi team, Blake here – Laura’s political director.

You haven’t heard from me much, but I figured I’d reach out to share some good news: **I’m excited to announce that Laura has officially been endorsed by Burbank’s own Indivisible chapter - Media City Indivisible!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63445321/406801804/62647395?refcode=em-5.17.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDRkOThlZjEtMDNmNS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HEFnCnIQK6KxqYwuUiCS8tJOuzqVZ_s_IJY4l3EoTW4=)
If you don't know, Indivisible is a grassroots movement dedicated to electing progressive leaders and rebuilding our democracy. This endorsement is a testament to overwhelming local support behind Laura’s campaign. We all know Laura is the real deal; she’s the bold, policy-driven lawmaker we need in Congress.

Endorsements like these are why I’m proud to be part of Team Laura and her constituent. This is a locally-focused, community-level effort -- and that’s reflected in how we run this campaign. You won’t find Laura rubbing shoulders with corporate PAC donors, and the vast majority of our funding and support comes from individuals like you.

Now here’s the part where I level with you:

**As it stands, Laura is the most viable progressive woman in the race for CA-30, but we need to step up our fundraising pace. We’re being out-raised by three other candidates, and if we can’t close the gap we run the risk of falling behind. We can’t let that happen.**

**[Will you chip in a grassroots donation now to help us meet our mid-quarter goal by midnight tomorrow and stay competitive in this race?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63445322/406801805/62647395?refcode=em-5.17.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDRkOThlZjEtMDNmNS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HEFnCnIQK6KxqYwuUiCS8tJOuzqVZ_s_IJY4l3EoTW4=)**

clean_body: | = Hi team, Blake here – Laura’s political director. You haven’t heard from me much, but I figured I’d reach out to share some good news: I’m excited to announce that Laura has officially been endorsed by Burbank’s own Indivisible chapter - Media City Indivisible! = If you don't know, Indivisible is a grassroots movement dedicated to electing progressive leaders and rebuilding our democracy. This endorsement is a testament to overwhelming local support behind Laura’s campaign. We all know Laura is the real deal; she’s the bold, policy-driven lawmaker we need in Congress. Endorsements like these are why I’m proud to be part of Team Laura and her constituent. This is a locally-focused, community-level effort -- and that’s reflected in how we run this campaign. You won’t find Laura rubbing shoulders with corporate PAC donors, and the vast majority of our funding and support comes from individuals like you. Now here’s the part where I level with you: As it stands, Laura is the most viable progressive woman in the race for CA-30, but we need to step up our fundraising pace. We’re being out-raised by three other candidates, and if we can’t close the gap we run the risk of falling behind. We can’t let that happen. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | = We’ll keep you updated on our progress. Thanks for your support! Blake Dellinger Political Director =** | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! To chip in to Laura's campaign = To learn more about Laura's progressive record of supporting our working families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Laura Friedman for Congress PO Box 27296 Los Angeles, CA 90027 United States

[**May 17, 1900:** American Author L. Frank Baum published his most famous children’s book The Wonderful Wizard of Oz. The book was so successful that it became a musical in 1902. Baum went on to write a whole Oz series with 13 more books. The Wizard of Oz is regarded as one of the greatest American stories of all time.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7e8422069783492ebc4ac36cb9172466&_e=YTFXvYS9qM4VEnzrwCo-Qlvr9-IUl4ySF2CmoPHVJiw5L5CU4GZBcDRi_9eqr4wA07ec-AZlMgFV62imaNAwWIQnsejITaoNmm1i_hGzltxUuTNAstp0O9uYcwTAxw8VJxo7YU-vo7iKagz3JuEG4jdGUDsMvRyQpWdmnVXo-SkLUjM3Hw05CQjB-oN62XR8LP2wQ4Xr-0-Af6Tq1WvIngADmro-91IVgb-7OMXceAE1-xLnCqpm5msIDmg7PQxB) **Source -[wikipedia.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7e8422069783492ebc4ac36cb9172466&_e=YTFXvYS9qM4VEnzrwCo-Qlvr9-IUl4ySF2CmoPHVJiw5L5CU4GZBcDRi_9eqr4wA07ec-AZlMgFV62imaNAwWFVxVGyZOdFhjUChK8be4kjcXeAggV9ZnA4qypzZDR0rNyfx9O66_EsMFmH6-bQUA-xZVhIgweTYBOuLPaYh8X2KhoUGI1pR7PH4SC8HWk2aPwifeiLhZ8ZDt4t0nNbX0JmkhZMMgN8IPXuDtIxAwJ7NVkVuKEFkq_1j-RkJSUDB)[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7e8422069783492ebc4ac36cb9172466&_e=YTFXvYS9qM4VEnzrwCo-QuR5_DiHG2t68WkbkQHE6hW-2cvIkk6outt1UPBnZkhjhNlXJVndLbV_jq9zKCsb32K1D9-8gDJbuw0LXnVUeP5Zi18EnKY5jfgyCqj8MjHfFBjLisV0FlIxPw5t7ugusV1Jl0azwKW8X1JzPNA03aE6d7mO_9HWrnFzIC2aiLzf87f6KY4yjMGh9sF4dEX_1iLApv6w7FtTRP6aDLt_MWRTglpPzk7m3v4lADVT3Mmb)**

[**May 17, 1939:** The first ever sporting event to be filmed and aired live on American television was a collegiate baseball game between Princeton and Columbia Universities. Filmed at Columbia’s Baker Field, the game was broadcasted by the National Broadcasting Company, and after its success NBC decided to try a Major League game, beginning sports television as we know it today.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7e8422069783492ebc4ac36cb9172466&_e=YTFXvYS9qM4VEnzrwCo-QlQ1WQH8fPYHs0Nu1P3Ggc0xZD0GGsKIo-EfdrIIITtmR6zgNEJLPWqbkXKGVCp5CNyyb6BttKsj1kRAIp7fzgK-oX2M4psJe12kyR24VuLNOui3BXfUQWOkWytkfxro7cAQWjWjaJ2ae9uE9O79V3mk4ttifNfv74sY_3J9K-75nkVB4x7nwEgJYVOVZLNk3P9AKSZuAleJrsS027zERi_7oLxV3sAGoRoqIQJERQndoQ0Tjc8hfzvtK999uijsm2b79osNnUXyFH31Sk8LZlB3zidqESLwDILDRGJvSspePdaKYcxMPhc1LPa4YYN0qpe7KYZvN_qAKnLHZpLC3V8%3D) **Source -[columbia.edu](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7e8422069783492ebc4ac36cb9172466&_e=YTFXvYS9qM4VEnzrwCo-QlQ1WQH8fPYHs0Nu1P3Ggc0xZD0GGsKIo-EfdrIIITtmR6zgNEJLPWqbkXKGVCp5CNyyb6BttKsj1kRAIp7fzgK-oX2M4psJe12kyR24VuLNOui3BXfUQWOkWytkfxro7cAQWjWjaJ2ae9uE9O79V3mk4ttifNfv74sY_3J9K-75Z_UyTPnnagOgj3WAgkauHZ8Oa3mehOrtzXqVlB7L8SuG3IWqz7l1KE__dkjvdjF1ndQQi_XRXJGKFs4a2bnmZmSNN1RhHRJ_lq6pjyGDXZQfjYs6vWMEB4fQneTcxgSZWUfH5McjQChoCfA8MPAfIZP1GmJcol3evLjLFTCU5x0%3D)**

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Should I put you down for Option 1 or Option 2?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I know where I stand: as long as I am Speaker of the House, there will be NO amnesty for illegal immigrants. Are you with me? I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots. | |

| Biden renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants in his State of the Union speech - including the more than 5 MILLION he's ushered in under his administration.
As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden's Mass-Amnesty plan?
**Option 1: We surrender to Biden 's Open-Borders agenda, and allow him to legalize millions of illegal immigrants.**

---
| | [OPTION 1](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=82ccf9aa2ccb468bb6582ec652f5b367&_e=gXBoolzwBZk6FCsEDEDo-GdRyok_5iJzxfNvqSGtlL6ozszJyPKRCHrHlPA7IJsAjkg0z_nH_vsoKUQys7pJ4Tax7LsIUjH1s5XIMzUEKN84-gFoC0bCPK3SPX7EUpTplEYb4vvUKIEv8PaRsv6Y2IaZHMwKohFOFrZFgJWF6EHqD3ihperwU4zi6PNnAdkgOPhGdQFtoC3X46mZeW6b8I5_bs5wbDsrmQi8M52lGmsvaNRbua9wD9ajp4NKQkEbjwD6HlU8J7AcRzs9uQ_adRjBOhguxpOgk3aXweRIZOoUPtKhtBskbIPlbH95VNRPHi6Rrefk0IzZvPZtAMibyiX-88QY6DS8TPk3j2dY95ykdq_RHAR4f7pd_H5XgvrV-Mh6WE9a6qiy4AJBhFj3wA%3D%3D)

**Option 2: We stand strong against Open-Borders Biden, and SECURE the border once and for all!**

---
| | [OPTION 2](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=82ccf9aa2ccb468bb6582ec652f5b367&_e=gXBoolzwBZk6FCsEDEDo-GdRyok_5iJzxfNvqSGtlL6ozszJyPKRCHrHlPA7IJsAjkg0z_nH_vsoKUQys7pJ4Tax7LsIUjH1s5XIMzUEKN84-gFoC0bCPK3SPX7EUpTplEYb4vvUKIEv8PaRsv6Y2IaZHMwKohFOFrZFgJWF6EHqD3ihperwU4zi6PNnAdkgOPhGdQFtoC3X46mZeW6b8I5_bs5wbDsrmQi8M52lGmsvaNRbua9wD9ajp4NKQkEbEIPGsluwSPst0ocEO7HZ9V_k-c2SKqUhNpK08-EFRfMa2bU2Q_4SO6XtHOS78fFjB2pk8Oe8aAVkkinxbijsgo68awvpvfSCNUTNhMxX44fws6hNZ3lAEiyw3Ir61kRfaftJHh01HfIPuDIeC4ak9A%3D%3D)

Should I put you down for Option 1 or Option 2?

I know where I stand: as long as I am Speaker of the House, there will be _NO_ amnesty for illegal immigrants. **[Are you with me?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=82ccf9aa2ccb468bb6582ec652f5b367&_e=gXBoolzwBZk6FCsEDEDo-GdRyok_5iJzxfNvqSGtlL6ozszJyPKRCHrHlPA7IJsAjkg0z_nH_vsoKUQys7pJ4Tax7LsIUjH1s5XIMzUEKN84-gFoC0bCPK3SPX7EUpTplEYb4vvUKIEv8PaRsv6Y2IaZHMwKohFOFrZFgJWF6EHqD3ihperwU4zi6PNnAdkgOPhGdQFtoC3X46mZeW6b8I5_bs5wbDsrmQi8M52lGmsvaNRbua9wD9ajp4NKQkEbagMJjW8d7UGBE7065ujUvT_ITIS8V7yg2tJWTw6_V8gup_a6GSRQrCDWv1eJZX2bsin_vJXoOtOMAuPPW_9PQj_S51jZtCxY6hQF5YuNlwF0X477cEa_0toVH-uTfTcM7Veh6PNY7ZbjmHVoM7M6lA%3D%3D "Are you with me?")** I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots.

clean_body: List of everyone guilty in the Durham Report Hello Friend, The Durham Report reveals what we knew all along - Russiagate is a political crime syndicate, the FBI rigged our elections, and they unlawfully targeted President Trump. The FBI launched the investigation withZERO justification. Even CNN has to report that on their fake news website. It was 5 years ago that I led the House investigation into Russiagate with Devin Nunes. Our report from then says the exact same thing as the Durham Report. The FBI had ZERO justification for going after President Trump. But for 5 years, the fake news media lied to the American public. Make no mistake: The DOJ and FBI conspired with the fake news media to bury the truth. America cannot let this happen again. After serving under President Trump, I created the Kash Foundation. The Kash Foundation provides legal aid to veterans, American-first patriots, and whistle-blowers fighting to expose the Deep State corruption. We fund litigation grants for individuals who have been wronged, release documentation exposing government corruption, and call out each government operator that betrayed their oath of office. I am on a mission to defeat the Government Gangsters who robbed the American people of justice. Now more than ever, I am counting on your support. The investigation is the punishment. It allows the media to coordinate with government gangsters to smear your reputation and rig elections. The DOJ has unlimited resources while you have to fight in court for potentially years. It bankrupts America. It has to stop. We are going to put an end to it. You won't hear this anywhere else. Here is my biggest concern and criticism of the Durham Report. Where are the charges? Who is being charged with this conspiracy to defraud America? Why has he allowed a two-tier system of justice to carry on? It's a criminal cover-up of the crime, and there's a long list of conspirators... FBI - Guilty DOJ - Guilty IC - Guilty Comey - Guilty McCabe - Guilty Strzok - Guilty Lisa Page - Guilty FISA Judges - Guilty Rosenstein - Guilty Chris Wray - Guilty Gina Haspel - Guilty Sally Yates - Guilty Lisa Monaco - Guilty John Carlin - Guilty Michael Sussman - Guilty Christopher Steele - Guilty Stephan Halper - Guilty Fusion GPS - Guilty Mark Elias - Guilty Clinton - Guilty Bruce Ohr - Guilty Nellie Ohr - Guilty James Clapper- Guilty John Brenna- Guilty Fake News- Guilty The American People - Robbed of Justice The Kash Foundation is on a mission to end the Deep State and eliminate the traitors to our country. But I can't do it alone. Justice will only be served if we fight for it together. Please help me raise $45,000 in the next 48 hours to fund the legal battles of whistleblowers, veterans, and America-first patriots working to expose the Deep State. Thank you, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible.

name: Bob Casey HQ
subject: Our majority is on the line
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
All eyes are on PA.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=56%2E552475%2EyfGiAb)
Peter, here's a quick summary of what's happened over the last several days.
**First →** Pennsylvania made CNN's list of Top 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2024.
**Then →** Mitch McConnell revealed that Pennsylvania is on his shortlist of states the GOP is focused on flipping.
**Now →** Roll Call put Pennsylvania on their list of top battleground states for 2024.
**[This is going to be one of the most competitive and expensive Senate races in the country, and we need a strong base of grassroots supporters by our side to re-elect Bob Casey. Will you donate $5 or more today to help us fight back against whatever national Republicans throw our way?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230517-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230517-1&refcode2=56_552475_yfGiAb&akid=56%2E552475%2EyfGiAb)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230517-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230517-1&refcode2=56_552475_yfGiAb&akid=56%2E552475%2EyfGiAb)**
Democrats' razor-thin Senate majority is on the line in Pennsylvania. Thank you for your support.
-- Casey HQ

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=56%2E552475%2EyfGiAb)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=56%2E552475%2EyfGiAb)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

body:
| | | **ALERT via MSNBC: Democrats prepare to "mobilize a blue wave" to _fight back_ against GOP attacks on reproductive rights!**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/13658?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230517-SignatureNeeded-ReproRightsBlueWavePetition-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230517-SignatureNeeded-ReproRightsBlueWavePetition-ETG-sl1&akid=10803%2E9716520%2ELmg7St)

Team, when Donald Trump's far-right Supreme Court justices overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , _millions_ of Americans lost their reproductive rights.

**But now, new polls show that voters are ready to _fight back_ and DEFEAT the Republicans who made that ruling possible.**

Defending our majority is _crucial_ to stopping the GOP's attacks on abortion, so we’ve launched an _urgent_ petition to prove that Democrats like you are ready to fight for our freedoms. **Please, this is critical:**

**[Add your name NOW to join our growing blue wave and prove Democrats will _never_ back down from protecting reproductive rights >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/13658?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230517-SignatureNeeded-ReproRightsBlueWavePetition-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230517-SignatureNeeded-ReproRightsBlueWavePetition-ETG-sl1&akid=10803%2E9716520%2ELmg7St)**

| [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/13658?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230517-SignatureNeeded-ReproRightsBlueWavePetition-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230517-SignatureNeeded-ReproRightsBlueWavePetition-ETG-sl1&akid=10803%2E9716520%2ELmg7St)
---

Thanks,

Team DSCC

name: Sheriff Mark Lamb
subject: Your court date: 2026
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
We hold you accountable if they break the law. Border security will be an ongoing problem while Democrats are in office because they simply will not accept responsibility for it, much less come up with a coherent policy that Republicans will support.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=215b18ae4f974822826797729f7f168a&_t=yA_2Zq6_qrmi-sk-GsSNgLmMoIfJBXtdzk7_JPKfOlSTk-38jcLPwWG22tnlaTDOOE64BzkhGKmI7GhEFVhp9VnuQU97uW2zAfMEcr00hMQ%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=215b18ae4f974822826797729f7f168a&_t=yA_2Zq6_qrmi-sk-GsSNgLmMoIfJBXtdzk7_JPKfOlSTk-38jcLPwWG22tnlaTDOOE64BzkhGKmI7GhEFVhp9VnuQU97uW2zAfMEcr00hMQ%3D)

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=215b18ae4f974822826797729f7f168a&_e=iWqvVFZ0AeL7qDbEjOqlZlez1h_vPvAH5ms3coVhDJbqs7bW21x8U1vCg952tHpg4Ow2bwLWQ_N6oHq7_lpOqgI2vI7r4cx72H8ShJtbVvOXoGmX0Aqsmmbm3t8jYalQgfVGdYUI6WAG_k2s89GAm4L_I7Qq0Y46r00V2-7z6MDcY5o3KVEdpbGzrKVL4-zT0KW89K7BwkdNEqUL8ZdsQAeEX6MW8D-bz5VBEmiG416pZc8W9SJfkT0NCEzWHbjFbJn3vArlKExOP6RCzplom2xuzW8_H25djeEZ-u-a2sJLDUBDOCLQw199BbuWN6r613a05rNReUF4EbNFVhW_VWe3mUcjJKQY9CDCvd-TZ5ffJRuUUWOlrbYPPtArTVu-Hxr1OwiPTwxYF09dX_eS8TRmbkyULK8BLJKuOe0jcj8%3D)
|
Fellow Conservative,

Where is President Biden?

He’s not in The Situation Room.

He’s not at the border, conferring with border patrol agents on the front lines.

He’s not at the Capitol negotiating with Republicans over their recently passed border bill.

Nope - he’s been riding his bike on the beach in Delaware ...

Since Title 42 expired last Thursday at midnight, **the situation at the border has become grave.** And President Biden seems oblivious to everything but his bike and the ice cream cone he undoubtedly enjoyed after his afternoon outing.

As I type this email, migrants who cross the border and request asylum are being given **court dates to appear in front of an immigration judge in 2026**.

Yes, court dates are three years from now. Once migrants are given processing documents, **they’re released on their own reconnaissance and often never heard from again**.

Fellow Conservative, this might be acceptable to Democrat leaders who receive police protection details, **[but is it acceptable to you?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=215b18ae4f974822826797729f7f168a&_e=iWqvVFZ0AeL7qDbEjOqlZlez1h_vPvAH5ms3coVhDJbqs7bW21x8U1vCg952tHpg4Ow2bwLWQ_N6oHq7_lpOqgI2vI7r4cx72H8ShJtbVvOXoGmX0Aqsmmbm3t8jYalQgfVGdYUI6WAG_k2s89GAm4L_I7Qq0Y46r00V2-7z6MDcY5o3KVEdpbGzrKVL4-zT0KW89K7BwkdNEqUL8ZdsQAeEX6MW8D-bz5VBEmiG416pZc8W9SJfkT0NCEzWHbjFbJn3vArlKExOP6RCzplom3hOvd083J2xBT_AjqzFxO0YpjmPwymRSJbYiW7ITblPpPnvV8sGWIpNz8BrAiJ66-ouXgK85-XAEcerOyTiV_RTdkLQ3Mun0WUfI4SCdwFKyDjMJp1MEWMPSmMNLazk0-rLUnUou2sWkvhD8gRn6JA%3D) **

[**TELL BIDEN:
GET SERIOUS ABOUT THE BORDER->**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=215b18ae4f974822826797729f7f168a&_e=iWqvVFZ0AeL7qDbEjOqlZlez1h_vPvAH5ms3coVhDJbqs7bW21x8U1vCg952tHpg4Ow2bwLWQ_N6oHq7_lpOqgI2vI7r4cx72H8ShJtbVvOXoGmX0Aqsmmbm3t8jYalQgfVGdYUI6WAG_k2s89GAm4L_I7Qq0Y46r00V2-7z6MDcY5o3KVEdpbGzrKVL4-zT0KW89K7BwkdNEqUL8ZdsQAeEX6MW8D-bz5VBEmiG416pZc8W9SJfkT0NCEzWHbjFbJn3vArlKExOP6RCzplom-RaMYJ61GdXFPodmvwgmpQd3f2_DWfqCJ_--Yrm39WgQDEFRdSm_X6tU_qZ7V5onXo92782WBBTA8aS0elU1CPi-Cvc3WHlKcRp86rvcAOiFClMzsypi5b1JNf0Dj4T9TuIIbrIyVnPlafL-nUbicg%3D)

Republicans just passed a bill that would require anyone claiming asylum to remain in Mexico while awaiting their court date. That seems like common sense to me. But Democrats call it “extreme.”

In my capacity as a county Sheriff and a candidate for U.S. Senate, I recently began collecting signatures for a petition. I’m sending this petition to President Biden, demanding he negotiates with Republicans to implement their border security bill, and **[I’m hoping you’ll add your name to it today](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=215b18ae4f974822826797729f7f168a&_e=iWqvVFZ0AeL7qDbEjOqlZlez1h_vPvAH5ms3coVhDJbqs7bW21x8U1vCg952tHpg4Ow2bwLWQ_N6oHq7_lpOqgI2vI7r4cx72H8ShJtbVvOXoGmX0Aqsmmbm3t8jYalQgfVGdYUI6WAG_k2s89GAm4L_I7Qq0Y46r00V2-7z6MDcY5o3KVEdpbGzrKVL4-zT0KW89K7BwkdNEqUL8ZdsQAeEX6MW8D-bz5VBEmiG416pZc8W9SJfkT0NCEzWHbjFbJn3vArlKExOP6RCzplomy2QgDhxtqrIbKe_rqabVEFXXNM3yZBA1uAET24Opq9KQ5mCG3ZpTsNWHbnUq-Fi9PGeRECZGoYZD4VJEtgMinFlsVtADCitRctxcUVPefGodwJjU2XaqIqiGda2r3HpxuPqDUg_52AF79LAelB8Kfw%3D)**.

Fellow Conservative, we must stop the invasion. It’s as simple as that.

We do that by sending law enforcement officials, who know a thing or two about quelling unrest, to **replace Democrats in the Senate who can’t seem to figure out how to do their damn jobs**.

**Border security will be an ongoing problem while Democrats are in office because they simply will not accept responsibility for it, much less come up with a coherent policy that Republicans will support.**

As a Sheriff, I can tell you that the bill House Republicans just passed is one that prioritizes keeping our communities safe - and it’s a bill I would vote for if elected to the Senate. By and large, migrants avoid Pinal County (**where I’m Sheriff**) as much as possible because they know that my deputies and I enforce the law.

[**TELL BIDEN:
GET SERIOUS ABOUT THE BORDER->**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=215b18ae4f974822826797729f7f168a&_e=iWqvVFZ0AeL7qDbEjOqlZlez1h_vPvAH5ms3coVhDJbqs7bW21x8U1vCg952tHpg4Ow2bwLWQ_N6oHq7_lpOqgI2vI7r4cx72H8ShJtbVvOXoGmX0Aqsmmbm3t8jYalQgfVGdYUI6WAG_k2s89GAm4L_I7Qq0Y46r00V2-7z6MDcY5o3KVEdpbGzrKVL4-zT0KW89K7BwkdNEqUL8ZdsQAeEX6MW8D-bz5VBEmiG416pZc8W9SJfkT0NCEzWHbjFbJn3vArlKExOP6RCzplom_LVY2M5AM1Pc-HUgyp4nzssLm4UhpLcULHmWUUKp3InICejCzk4HIsL_-70X29FjraS4jVwzwOqdxPx4-_pETr5c14CHw5WjgtbgaxzZ5--JtIkxvOykZW9Ft7Q_rJpidXO0Ve4y5WaccGTQR4heVU%3D)

What is unfortunate is that most border communities lack the resources to keep their communities secure from the masses that are descending upon them.

**I’m running for the U.S. Senate to change that.**

Americans need leaders in the federal government with the experience of dealing with migrants firsthand. We need leaders who aren’t afraid to tell their constituents the truth. **We need leaders in Congress who won’t ignore the dire situation at the border because they’re not directly affected by it**.

Thank you for your time,

clean_body: We hold you accountable if they break the law. Border security will be an ongoing problem while Democrats are in office because they simply will not accept responsibility for it, much less come up with a coherent policy that Republicans will support. | | Fellow Conservative, Where is President Biden? He’s not in The Situation Room. He’s not at the border, conferring with border patrol agents on the front lines. He’s not at the Capitol negotiating with Republicans over their recently passed border bill. Nope - he’s been riding his bike on the beach in Delaware ... Since Title 42 expired last Thursday at midnight, the situation at the border has become grave. And President Biden seems oblivious to everything but his bike and the ice cream cone he undoubtedly enjoyed after his afternoon outing. As I type this email, migrants who cross the border and request asylum are being given court dates to appear in front of an immigration judge in 2026. Yes, court dates are three years from now. Once migrants are given processing documents, they’re released on their own reconnaissance and often never heard from again. Fellow Conservative, this might be acceptable to Democrat leaders who receive police protection details, Republicans just passed a bill that would require anyone claiming asylum to remain in Mexico while awaiting their court date. That seems like common sense to me. But Democrats call it “extreme.” In my capacity as a county Sheriff and a candidate for U.S. Senate, I recently began collecting signatures for a petition. I’m sending this petition to President Biden, demanding he negotiates with Republicans to implement their border security bill, and . Fellow Conservative, we must stop the invasion. It’s as simple as that. We do that by sending law enforcement officials, who know a thing or two about quelling unrest, to replace Democrats in the Senate who can’t seem to figure out how to do their damn jobs. Border security will be an ongoing problem while Democrats are in office because they simply will not accept responsibility for it, much less come up with a coherent policy that Republicans will support. As a Sheriff, I can tell you that the bill House Republicans just passed is one that prioritizes keeping our communities safe - and it’s a bill I would vote for if elected to the Senate. By and large, migrants avoid Pinal County (where I’m Sheriff) as much as possible because they know that my deputies and I enforce the law. What is unfortunate is that most border communities lack the resources to keep their communities secure from the masses that are descending upon them. I’m running for the U.S. Senate to change that. Americans need leaders in the federal government with the experience of dealing with migrants firsthand. We need leaders who aren’t afraid to tell their constituents the truth. We need leaders in Congress who won’t ignore the dire situation at the border because they’re not directly affected by it. Thank you for your time, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. body:
Expanding our Democratic power will take time, investment, and strategy. | | |
---
| | We need your help right now more than ever – here's why:
* Democrats just won an ultra-competitive special election in Pennsylvania – defending our House majority and fending off Republicans’ power grab. **But this race was _competitive_ – and with a one-seat majority, we’re gearing up for more challenges.**
* We’re just three seats away from flipping the New Hampshire House – and with at least two more special elections on the horizon, **we could secure a majority as early as this year AND break up a Republican trifecta mid-cycle.**
* Expanding our Democratic power will take patience, strategic investments, and – above all – grassroots support. **Majorities are built seat-by-seat, year after year, and we’re counting on Democrats like you to step up to the plate.**

clean_body: Expanding our Democratic power will take time, investment, and strategy. | | | | | We need your help right now more than ever – here's why: Democrats just won an ultra-competitive special election in Pennsylvania – defending our House majority and fending off Republicans’ power grab. But this race was competitive – and with a one-seat majority, we’re gearing up for more challenges. We’re just three seats away from flipping the New Hampshire House – and with at least two more special elections on the horizon, we could secure a majority as early as this year AND break up a Republican trifecta mid-cycle. Expanding our Democratic power will take patience, strategic investments, and – above all – grassroots support. Majorities are built seat-by-seat, year after year, and we’re counting on Democrats like you to step up to the plate. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | We’re working around the clock to give Democrats the resources they need to WIN against their Republican opponents in elections across the nation, but we can’t win this battle alone. subject: 👋 nice to meet you, Peter

body:
|

[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/88?t=1&akid=66%2E52803%2EwfN471)

| | [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1290?t=12&amount=25&akid=66%2E52803%2EwfN471) Hey team, my name is Daniel Cooper and I’m Angela’s Deputy Campaign Manager. I’ve worked on enough Senate races to know that early fundraising numbers can make or break a campaign, and this competitive primary race won’t be any different. Campaigns like ours accomplish a lot more when they have resources early, so believe me when I tell you that not just what you give – but also **_when_** you give – will set the trajectory for this race. **[Can you show Angela that you’ve got her back and are committed to electing her to the Senate by pitching in $25 to our campaign today?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1290?t=13&amount=25&akid=66%2E52803%2EwfN471)** | | | [Chip in $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1290?t=14&amount=25&akid=66%2E52803%2EwfN471)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1290?t=15&amount=30&akid=66%2E52803%2EwfN471)
---
There are plenty of reasons why Angela would make a fantastic Senator, Peter.
She’s dedicated her career to helping families by improving safety, education, and opportunities for her community, and has a proven track record of putting Maryland first.
As a prosecutor, she worked to improve community safety while holding law enforcement to a higher standard. As Prince George’s County Executive, she focused on job creation and economic equity through improvements to the education system.
**We have an opportunity to elect Angela and accomplish BIG things in the Senate together.[Will you chip in $25 to help Angela make history as Maryland’s next U.S. Senator?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1290?t=16&amount=25&akid=66%2E52803%2EwfN471)**
